Aatrox.name: Aatrox
Aatrox.title: the Darkin Blade
Aatrox.blurb: Once honored defenders of Shurima against the Void, Aatrox and his brethren would eventually become an even greater threat to Runeterra, and were defeated only by cunning mortal sorcery. But after centuries of imprisonment, Aatrox was the first to find...

abilities.name: Deathbringer Stance
abilities.mobaDesc: Aatrox periodically empowers his next basic attack, gaining 50 bonus range and dealing 5–12% of the target’s maximum health as bonus magic damage (based on level), while healing Aatrox for 100% of the bonus magic damage dealt (reduced to 25% against minions). Damage against monsters is capped at 100–320 (based on level). The cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds when Aatrox hits a champion or large monster with a basic attack or an ability, and when he hits a champion with the edge of The Darkin Blade

abilities.name: The Darkin Blade
abilities.riotDesc: Aatrox slams his greatsword down, dealing physical damage. He can swing three times, each with a different area of effect.
abilities.mobaDesc: There are 3 potential casts for Aatrox’s Q. For the first, Aatrox swings his sword in the target direction, striking enemies in a line. For the second cast, he strikes enemies in a cone, and in the third near the target area. The first and second cast can be reactivated within 4 seconds, with the second cast refreshing this timer. For the first and second cast, hitting enemies at the far edge of the blade will deal bonus damage and be knocked up. On the third cast, enemies who are in the center will receive extra damage. The Darkin Blade deals 55% damage to minions.

abilities.name: Infernal Chains
abilities.riotDesc: Aatrox smashes the ground, dealing damage to the first enemy hit. Champions and large monsters have to leave the impact area quickly or they will be dragged to the center and take the damage again.
abilities.mobaDesc: Aatrox throws out a chain that stops at the first enemy hit. Enemies that are hit are slowed for 1.5 seconds. If Infernal Chains hits a champion or large monster, they are chained to that area. If the chained enemy is still in the area after 1.5 seconds, they are dragged to the center.

abilities.name: Umbral Dash
abilities.riotDesc: Passively, Aatrox heals when damaging enemy champions. On activation, he dashes in a direction.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Aatrox heals for a percentage of damage he deals against enemy champions. Active: Aatrox dashes in a target direction. Umbral Dash can be cast during his other spells without interrupting them. For example, he can use his E in between all instances of his Q.

abilities.name: World Ender
abilities.riotDesc: Aatrox unleashes his demonic form, fearing nearby enemy minions and gaining attack damage, increased healing, and Move Speed. If he gets a takedown, this effect is extended.
abilities.mobaDesc: On activation, he fears nearby enemy minions and gains bonus movement speed, which decays over the duration. During the duration, Aatrox gains bonus attack damage and has increased self-healing. On enemy champion takedowns, the duration of World Ender is extended by 5 seconds.

combos.description: Trade normally with Q then E mid animation to line up your sweet spot.

Ahri.name: Ahri
Ahri.title: the Nine-Tailed Fox
Ahri.blurb: Innately connected to the magic of the spirit realm, Ahri is a fox-like vastaya who can manipulate her prey's emotions and consume their essence—receiving flashes of their memory and insight from each soul she consumes. Once a powerful yet wayward...

abilities.name: Essence Theft
abilities.mobaDesc:
After killing 9 minions or monsters, Ahri heals.
After taking down an enemy champion, Ahri heals for a greater amount.

abilities.name: Orb of Deception
abilities.riotDesc: Ahri sends out and pulls back her orb, dealing magic damage on the way out and true damage on the way back.

abilities.name: Fox-Fire
abilities.riotDesc: Ahri gains a brief burst of Move Speed and releases three fox-fires, that lock onto and attack nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Charm
abilities.riotDesc: Ahri blows a kiss that damages and charms an enemy it encounters, instantly stopping movement abilities and causing them to walk harmlessly towards her.

abilities.name: Spirit Rush
abilities.riotDesc: Ahri dashes forward and fires essence bolts, damaging nearby enemies. Spirit Rush can be cast up to three times before going on cooldown, and gains additional recasts when taking down enemy champions.

combos.description: Quickly trade with AA to make sure W locks on, instantly W and Q as quickly as possible.
This Level 3 All in combo uses E then instantly Q, followed by using W and an AA at the same time.
Your basic trade will be Q then instantly W AA at the same time.

Akali.name: Akali
Akali.title: the Rogue Assassin
Akali.blurb: Abandoning the Kinkou Order and her title of the Fist of Shadow, Akali now strikes alone, ready to be the deadly weapon her people need. Though she holds onto all she learned from her master Shen, she has pledged to defend Ionia from its enemies, one...

abilities.name: Assassin's Mark
abilities.mobaDesc: Akali's next damage ability against an enemy champion will create a ring around them for 4 seconds and grants her 40-70% (based on level) bonus Movement Speed for 2 seconds while moving away from them. On leaving the ring within its duration, she regains the bonus Movement Speed towards enemy champions for 2 seconds and gains Swinging Kama for 4 seconds which will double her next basic attack's range, give her bonus magic damage and will restore energy for her.

abilities.name: Five Point Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Akali throws out five kunai, dealing damage based on her bonus Attack Damage and Ability Power and slowing.
abilities.mobaDesc: Akali will throw a set of kunai in the direction she chooses, dealing magic damage to enemies hit. Enemies who are hit at maximum range will be slowed for a while. It will deal increased bonus damage to minions and monsters at rank 5.

abilities.name: Twilight Shroud
abilities.riotDesc: Akali drops a cover of smoke and briefly gains Move Speed. While inside the shroud, Akali becomes invisible and unable to be selected by enemy spells and attacks. Attacking or using abilities will briefly reveal her.
abilities.mobaDesc: Akali detonates a smoke bomb which creates a circular shroud that expands over the next 5 seconds into a ring. It also restores 80 energy and gives her decaying bonus movement speed in the target's direction. When inside the shroud, Akali is invisible when inside the shroud, while her abilities and basic attacks will break the invisibility for a short duration.

abilities.name: Shuriken Flip
abilities.riotDesc: Flip backward and fire a shuriken forward, dealing magic damage. The first enemy or smoke cloud hit is marked. Re-cast to dash to the marked target, dealing additional damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: This is a double cast ability. The first cast allows Akali to flip backward while firing a shuriken forward, which stops at the first enemy hit and deals physical damage. It will mark the enemy or the last W smoke section hit, for 3 seconds. The second cast allows Akali to dash to the marked target, disregarding the distance, and deals physical damage if the mark was on an enemy.

abilities.name: Perfect Execution
abilities.riotDesc: Akali leaps in a direction, damaging enemies she strikes. Re-cast: Akali dashes in a direction, executing all enemies she strikes.
abilities.mobaDesc: It is a double cast, point, and click ability. The first cast allows Akali to dash towards the target enemy champion, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit in her path. She can cast it again after 2.5 seconds, where the second cast will deal magic damage to the enemies hit, along with 0-200% increased damage based on target's missing health.

balance.otherEffects: Energy regeneration increased by 20%. Tenacity increased by 20%. Passive AP ratio changed to 65% AP. Q AP ratio changed to 70% AP. RFirst dash AP ratio changed to 40% AP. Second dash minimum AP ratio changed to 40% AP.

combos.description: For a quick trade Q then AA and E. E to your target, then AA.
To trade when starting from range E your target then E again. Use W AA Q, then AA Q AA.
Your basic trade is to Q then W and AA. Q AA E, then E to your target and AA Q AA.

Akshan.name: Akshan
Akshan.title: the Rogue Sentinel
Akshan.blurb: Raising an eyebrow in the face of danger, Akshan fights evil with dashing charisma, righteous vengeance, and a conspicuous lack of shirts. He is highly skilled in the art of stealth combat, able to evade the eyes of his enemies and reappear when they...

abilities.name: Dirty Fighting
abilities.mobaDesc: Every three hits from Akshan's Attacks and Abilities deals bonus damage and grants him a Shield if the target was a champion.

abilities.name: Avengerang
abilities.riotDesc: Akshan throws a boomerang that deals damage going out and coming back, extending its range each time it hits an enemy.
abilities.mobaDesc: Akshan throws a boomerang that deals physical damage and reveals enemies hit, extending its range each time it hits an enemy. Enemies can be hit once as the boomerang goes out and once as it returns.

abilities.name: Going Rogue
abilities.riotDesc:
Akshan passively marks enemy champions as Scoundrels when they kill his ally champions. If Akshan kills a Scoundrel, he resurrects the allies they killed, gains bonus gold, and clears all marks.

When activated, Akshan enters camouflage and gains Move Speed and Mana Regen while moving towards Scoundrels. Akshan loses the camouflage quickly while he is not in brush or near terrain.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: When enemy champions kill one of Akshan’s allies, they are marked as Scoundrels. When Akshan gets a takedown on a Scoundrel he gains bonus gold, all allies killed by the Scoundrel are resurrected at their base, and Scoundrel status is removed from all other enemies. Active: Akshan becomes camouflaged for a short duration, or indefinitely while near terrain. During this time, Akshan can see trails leading toward Scoundrels and gains move speed and mana regeneration while moving toward them.

abilities.name: Heroic Swing
abilities.riotDesc: Akshan fires a grappling hook into terrain then swings around it, repeatedly firing at the nearest enemy while swinging. He can jump off early or gets knocked off when colliding with champions or terrain.
abilities.mobaDesc: Akshan fires a hookshot that embeds in the first terrain hit. While embedded, he can recast to swing around the terrain in the cast direction, firing physical damage bullets at the nearest enemy while swinging. While swinging, he can recast again to jump off in the direction of the cursor and fire a final shot. Heroic Swing's cooldown resets when Akshan earns a takedown on an enemy champion.

abilities.name: Comeuppance
abilities.riotDesc: Akshan locks onto an enemy champion and starts storing bullets. When released, he fires all stored bullets, dealing damage based on missing health to the first champion, minion, or structure hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Akshan locks onto an enemy champion and begins channeling power into his gun to store bullets. At the end of the duration or after recasting Akshan unleashes the stored bullets, each dealing physical damage based on missing health to the first minion, champion, or structure hit. Akshan can move normally and cast Heroic Swing while channeling and firing Comeuppance.

combos.description: AA and AA your enemy followed by your Q, then AA, AA and E and then a few more AA's to take them down and use your E to escape again afterwards.
AA, AA and Q your enemy, then AA and AA again before using your E to finish.
AA, AA and Q your enemy.

Alistar.name: Alistar
Alistar.title: the Minotaur
Alistar.blurb: Always a mighty warrior with a fearsome reputation, Alistar seeks revenge for the death of his clan at the hands of the Noxian empire. Though he was enslaved and forced into the life of a gladiator, his unbreakable will was what kept him from truly...

abilities.name: Triumphant Roar
abilities.mobaDesc: Alistar gains a stack of Triumph whenever he CC's at least one enemy with his abilities, and every time an enemy minion or a small monster dies near him. At 7 stacks, he consumes them and roars, healing himself for 25-161 (based on level) and all surrounding allies for double the amount. He can roar instantly if a nearby champion or epic monster dies.

abilities.name: Pulverize
abilities.riotDesc: Alistar smashes the ground, dealing damage to nearby enemies and tossing them into the air.
abilities.mobaDesc: Alistar slams the ground beneath him which knocks up enemies near him and deals magic damage to them.

abilities.name: Headbutt
abilities.riotDesc: Alistar rams a target with his head, dealing damage and knocking the target back.
abilities.mobaDesc: Allows Alistar to dash to an enemy's location, dealing magic damage to them on contact and knocking them back 650 units. The target unit is stunned for a second if they are hit by the ability.

abilities.name: Trample
abilities.riotDesc: Alistar tramples nearby enemy units, ignoring unit collision and gaining stacks if he damages an enemy champion. At full stacks Alistar's next basic attack against an enemy champion deals additional magic damage and stuns them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Alistar tramples the ground around him every 0.5 seconds for 5 seconds and can pass through units while the ability is active. When near an enemy champion, he deals magic damage to them per tick while also gaining a Trample stack every time the ability damages at least one enemy champion. If Alistar gets 5 Trample stacks, his next basic attack will stun the enemy target and deal bonus magic damage to them.

abilities.name: Unbreakable Will
abilities.riotDesc: Alistar lets out a wild roar, removing all crowd control effects on himself, and reducing incoming physical and magical damage for the duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Alistar removes all forms of CC from himself and takes reduced incoming damage for the next 7 seconds.

combos.description: To knock an enemy back into your team Q them, then walk behind your target and use W.
Your standard Alistar combo will be to W Q one after another then E once in range. AA then AA once it's up for the stun.
For a longer cc chain using a wall Q and instantly E AA. W your opponent into the wall and stun them with your AA.

Ambessa.name: Ambessa
Ambessa.title: Matriarch of War
Ambessa.blurb: All who know the name Medarda respect and fear the family's leader, Ambessa. As a Noxian general, she embodies a deadly combination of ruthless strength and fearless resolve in battle. Her role as matriarch is no different, requiring great cunning to...

abilities.name: Cunning Sweep / Sundering Slam
abilities.riotDesc: Ambessa sweeps her twin drakehounds in a semicircle in front of her, dealing bonus damage to enemies hit by the blades. Striking an enemy will transform the next cast of this ability for a short period of time, causing her to slam her twin drakehounds down in a line in front of her, dealing bonus damage to the first enemy hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ambessa sweeps her blades forward in a semi-circle, dealing extra damage to enemies at the edge. If you hit an enemy, it readies Sundering Slam. Recast: Sundering Slam: Ambessa slams down her blades, dealing bonus damage to the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Repudiation
abilities.riotDesc: Ambessa gains a shield, briefly braces herself, and then slams the ground to damage nearby enemies. If she blocked any non-minion damage while bracing herself, this ability will deal increased damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ambessa gains a shield, braces herself, then slams the ground. If she braces herself from damage by an enemy champion, large monster, or structure, she does more damage with her slam.

abilities.name: Lacerate
abilities.riotDesc: Ambessa whips her twin drakehounds around herself, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Initiating Drakehound's Step from this ability causes her to strike a second time at the end of its dash.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ambessa whips her chains in a circle, damaging and briefly slowing enemies. Using Drakehound’s Step will trigger an additional strike.

abilities.name: Public Execution
abilities.riotDesc: Ambessa blinks to the farthest enemy champion in a line of her choosing and suppresses them upon her arrival. She then slams the enemy into the ground where they take damage and are stunned.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Ambessa gains Armor Penetration and her Abilities heal her. Active: Ambessa becomes unstoppable and blinks to the farthest enemy champion in a line. She suppresses the target before slamming them for damage and a Stun.

Amumu.name: Amumu
Amumu.title: the Sad Mummy
Amumu.blurb: Legend claims that Amumu is a lonely and melancholy soul from ancient Shurima, roaming the world in search of a friend. Doomed by an ancient curse to remain alone forever, his touch is death, his affection ruin. Those who claim to have seen him describe...

abilities.name: Cursed Touch
abilities.mobaDesc: Amumu's basic attacks and Ultimate apply a Curse for 3 seconds, which refreshes with each consecutive basic attack. The Cursed targets will take 10% bonus true damage from all incoming (pre-mitigation) magic damage

abilities.name: Bandage Toss
abilities.riotDesc: Amumu tosses a sticky bandage at a target, stunning and damaging the target while he pulls himself to them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Amumu tosses a bandage in a straight line in the direction of his choice. On hitting an enemy unit, it stuns them for 1 second, dealing magic damage to them while also pulling Amumu to the target's location.

abilities.name: Despair
abilities.riotDesc: Overcome by anguish, nearby enemies lose a percentage of their maximum Health each second and have their <font color='#9b0f5f'>Curses</font> refreshed.
abilities.mobaDesc: A toggle ability which makes Amumu cry a constant pool of tears. It refreshes Curse on the enemies and also deals magic damage to them every 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Tantrum
abilities.riotDesc: Permanently reduces the physical damage Amumu would take. Amumu can unleash his rage, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Each time Amumu is hit, the cooldown on Tantrum is reduced.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Allows Amumu to take reduced (post-mitigation) physical damage. Active: Amumu deals magic damage to enemies near him. The cooldown of this ability is reduced by 0.5 seconds for every time Amumu is hit by a basic attack."

abilities.name: Curse of the Sad Mummy
abilities.riotDesc: Amumu entangles surrounding enemy units in bandages, applying his <keywordMajor>Curse</keywordMajor>, damaging and stunning them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Amumu instantly CCs every enemy around him (barring the one's with an active spell-shield) and disarms them for 2 seconds, while also dealing magic damage and applying Curse.

combos.description: To gank Q your target, cast W mid air then AA E AA once you land.
While in melee range, W AA then instantly E Q followed by an AA.
To catch out the enemy team with an AoE engage, Q then R mid air. Instantly W E once you land.

Anivia.name: Anivia
Anivia.title: the Cryophoenix
Anivia.blurb: Anivia is a benevolent winged spirit who endures endless cycles of life, death, and rebirth to protect the Freljord. A demigod born of unforgiving ice and bitter winds, she wields those elemental powers to thwart any who dare disturb her homeland...

abilities.name: Rebirth
abilities.mobaDesc: Anivia transforms into an egg on taking fatal damage periodically where she can't move or cast abilities. She also gains -40 - 20 (based on level) bonus armor and bonus magic resistance. She is reborn after six seconds, with the amount of health her egg had if the enemy doesn't kill her egg during that duration.

abilities.name: Flash Frost
abilities.riotDesc: Anivia brings her wings together and summons a sphere of ice that flies towards her opponents, chilling and damaging anyone in its path. When the sphere explodes it does moderate damage in a radius, stunning anyone in the area.
abilities.mobaDesc: A double cast ability where the first cast launches a massive chunk of ice that flies to a target location, dealing magic damage and slowing enemies that it passes through for 3 seconds. It can also be recast after the cast time. On recasting, Anivia shatters the chunk of ice, instantly stunning anyone in its blast radius and dealing magic damage to them.

abilities.name: Crystallize
abilities.riotDesc: Anivia condenses the moisture in the air into an impassable wall of ice to block all movement. The wall only lasts a short duration before it melts.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons a wall of ice at a target location. It knocks all units away from it and acts as impassable terrain for the next 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Frostbite
abilities.riotDesc: With a flap of her wings, Anivia blasts a freezing gust of wind at her target, dealing damage. If the target was recently hit by Flash Frost or damaged by a fully formed Glacial Storm, the damage they take is doubled.
abilities.mobaDesc: A point and click damage ability which deals magic damage to the targeted enemy unit. The damage is doubled against targets who are stunned by her Q or damaged by a fully formed Ultimate within the last 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Glacial Storm
abilities.riotDesc: Anivia summons a driving rain of ice and hail to damage her enemies and slow their advance.
abilities.mobaDesc: Creates a snowstorm at a target location which slows and deals magic damage to targets within it every single second. The storm's size increases in size over 1.5 seconds and at maximum size, the enemies within the storm will receive 300% damage and suffer a 50% stronger slow which will last for 1.5 seconds. The ability can be recast, or Anivia can move too far away from it to deactivate it, and it will automatically deactivate if she runs out of mana. Additionally, it can also be deactivated by all forms of interrupting CC.

combos.description: Fast trade using Q, then E and quickly Q again.
Chunk your opponent by using R under them, then AA, E. R again and AA.
For a quick trade Q then AA Q. E AA to finish.

Annie.name: Annie
Annie.title: the Dark Child
Annie.blurb: Dangerous, yet disarmingly precocious, Annie is a child mage with immense pyromantic power. Even in the shadows of the mountains north of Noxus, she is a magical outlier. Her natural affinity for fire manifested early in life through unpredictable...

abilities.name: Molten Shield
abilities.riotDesc: Grants Annie or an ally a shield, a burst of Move Speed, and damages enemies who strike her with attacks or spells.
abilities.mobaDesc: Wraps Tibbers and herself in an aura, gaining 30-60% (based on level) decaying bonus movement speed, while also reducing damage taken for 3 seconds. Enemies who attack Annie or Tibbers with basic attacks during this time will take magic damage in return.

abilities.name: Disintegrate
abilities.riotDesc: Annie hurls a Mana infused fireball, dealing damage and refunding the Mana cost if it destroys the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a fireball at an enemy target, dealing magic damage to them. If the fireball kills its target, it will refund her the mana cost and half of its cooldown immediately.

abilities.name: Incinerate
abilities.riotDesc: Annie casts a blazing cone of fire, dealing damage to all enemies in the area.
abilities.mobaDesc: Releases a cone of fire in a target direction which deals magic damage to all enemies hit in the area.

abilities.name: Molten Shield
abilities.riotDesc: Grants Annie or an ally a shield, a burst of Move Speed, and damages enemies who strike her with attacks or spells.
abilities.mobaDesc: Wraps Tibbers and herself in an aura, gaining 30-60% (based on level) decaying bonus movement speed, while also reducing damage taken for 3 seconds. Enemies who attack Annie or Tibbers with basic attacks during this time will take magic damage in return.

abilities.name: Summon: Tibbers
abilities.riotDesc: Annie wills her bear Tibbers to life, dealing damage to units in the area. Tibbers can attack and also burns enemies that stand near him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons Tibbers to a target location in a burst of flame, dealing magic damage to surrounding enemies. He can be controlled by Annie and will remain on the Rift for 45 seconds (if he is not killed before that). Recasting the ability will allow Annie to direct Tibbers to a target location.

combos.description: To all in at level 6 use Q while your passive is up. As soon as the stun lands R W instantly then AA.
To get some poke damage on your opponent AA then quickly Q W and AA again.
Trade onto your target by using E to get into range then instantly W Q and AA.

Aphelios.name: Aphelios
Aphelios.title: the Weapon of the Faithful
Aphelios.blurb: Emerging from moonlight's shadow with weapons drawn, Aphelios kills the enemies of his faith in brooding silence—speaking only through the certainty of his aim, and the firing of each gun. Though fueled by a poison that renders him mute, he is guided by...

abilities.name: The Hitman and the Seer
abilities.mobaDesc: Aphelios has access to an arsenal of 5 weapons. He equips two at any one time. At the start of the game, he starts with Calibrum and Severum, with Gravitum, Infernum and Crescendum queued. Weapons spawn with 50 Moonlight ammunition, which is consumed by basic attacks or his Q cast. Once he has consumed all the ammo, his main weapon is moved to the end of the queue. Aphelios does not improve his abilities with skill points. He starts with Phase, gains access to Q at level 2, and gains access to Moonligh Vigil at level 6.

abilities.name: Weapon Abilites
abilities.riotDesc:
Aphelios has 5 different activated abilities, based on his main-hand weapon:

Calibrum (Rifle): Long range shot that marks its target for a long-range follow-up attack.
Severum (Scythe Pistol): Run fast while attacking nearby enemies with both weapons.
Gravitum (Cannon): Root all enemies slowed by this weapon.
Infernum (Flamethrower): Blast enemies in a cone and attack them with your off-hand weapon.
Crescendum (Chakram): Deploy a sentry that shoots your off-hand weapon.
abilities.mobaDesc: **Calibrum: **Gains bonus range while this is his main weapon. Enemies damaged during this time via an ability are marked, revealing them for the duration. Aphelios's next basic attack against a marked target uses the current off-hand weapon and gains global range. **Moonshot: **Aphelios fires a bolt of energy in a line, dealing damage to the first enemy hit. **Severum: **Basic attacks don't use projectiles. Attacks heal himself. Healing at max health is converted into a shield. **Onslaught: **Gains bonus movement speed and attacks the nearest enemy- prioritizing champions. **Gravitum:** Applies a slow that decays over 3.5 seconds. **Binding Eclipse:** Aphelios expunges all enemies affected by Gravitum's slow and deals damage plus roots them for 1 second. **Infernum:** Sprays firebolts in a cone behind targets dealing damage to enemies hit. **Duskwave: ** Aphelios unleashes a wave of energy in a cone, dealing damage to all enemies hit and locking on to each of them. After a delay, Aphelios then fires a volley of basic attacks from his current off-hand weapon. **Crescendum: **Basic attacks with Crescendum hurl the blade at the target, which lingers for 0.25 seconds before coming back to Aphelios. He is disarmed until he retrieves Crescendum, but the attack timer is reset once caught. **Sentry:** Aphelios deploys a lunar sentry for up to 20 seconds, reduced to 4 seconds after it starts attacking. Deploying a new sentry reduces the eldest's duration to 4 seconds. A sentry has 3 health and enemies can attack the sentry with basic attacks, dealing 1 damage per hit. The sentry autonomously attacks the nearest enemy in range with a clone of Aphelios' current off-hand weapon

abilities.name: Phase
abilities.riotDesc: Aphelios swaps his main-hand gun with his off-hand gun, replacing his basic attack and activated ability.
abilities.mobaDesc: Aphelios switches between his main weapon and off-hand weapon.

abilities.name: Weapon Queue System
abilities.riotDesc: Aphelios has no third ability. This slot shows the next weapon Alune will give him. Weapon order begins fixed but may change over game time -- when a weapon is out of ammo it goes to the end of the order.
abilities.mobaDesc: Weapon Cooling System

abilities.name: Moonlight Vigil
abilities.riotDesc: Fire a concentrated blast of moonlight that explodes on enemy champions. Applies the unique effect of Aphelios' main-hand gun.
abilities.mobaDesc: Aphelios casts forth a lunar spotlight that stops when it comes into contact with an enemy champion. It then deals damage at the center. After a delay, basic attacks will begin raining from the sky based on Aphelios' current weapon. **Calibrum:** Applies an empowered mark that deals additional physical damage per mark. **Severum:** If at least one enemy is hit, Aphelios heals himself. **Gravitum:** Enemies are slowed by 99%. **Infernum:** The initial blast deals additional damage. **Crescendum:** 3 additional spectral chakrams return to Aphelios from the first enemy hit, for a total of 4, on top of those from other enemies hit.

combos.description: To snipe with Calibrum out use Q and R instantly then AA twice.

Ashe.name: Ashe
Ashe.title: the Frost Archer
Ashe.blurb: Iceborn warmother of the Avarosan tribe, Ashe commands the most populous horde in the north. Stoic, intelligent, and idealistic, yet uncomfortable with her role as leader, she taps into the ancestral magics of her lineage to wield a bow of True Ice...

abilities.name: Frost Shot
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive - Frost Shot: Ashe's Auto-Attacks and abilities will apply Frost to the enemies, slowing them by 20%-30% (depending on level) for 2 seconds. The Auto-Attacks against Frost afflicted enemies will deal additional damage. Passive - Critical Slow: Ashe's Critical Strikes deal no extra damage, instead they double Frost's slow strength to 40%-60% (depending on level) which will decay over a second to its normal strength.

abilities.name: Ranger's Focus
abilities.riotDesc: Ashe builds up Focus by attacking. At maximum Focus, Ashe can cast Ranger's Focus to consume all stacks of Focus, temporarily increasing her Attack Speed and transforming her basic attack into a powerful flurry attack for the duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: When this ability is inactive, Ashe's basic attacks on-attack against non-structures will grant Focus stacks for 4 seconds. The duration is refreshed on structure attacks and stacks are lost by one every second. Active: Ashe gains bonus Attack Speed for 4 seconds and causes her auto-attacks to fire a flurry of five arrows. They trigger on-hit effects only once and they deal modified physical damage.

abilities.name: Volley
abilities.riotDesc: Ashe fires arrows in a cone for increased damage. Also applies Frost Shot.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ashe fires a volley of 9 arrows in a cone in the target direction. All of them deal physical damage to the first enemy struck and slows them. Enemies won't take damage from arrows beyond the first one.

abilities.name: Hawkshot
abilities.riotDesc: Ashe sends her Hawk Spirit on a scouting mission anywhere on the map.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Ashe periodically stores a Hawkshot charge, up to a maximum of 2. Active: Ashe sends a hawk spirit towards the target location. This spirit will then explode and provide vision of that area for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Enchanted Crystal Arrow
abilities.riotDesc: Ashe fires a missile of ice in a straight line. If the arrow collides with an enemy Champion, it deals damage and stuns the Champion, stunning for longer the farther arrow has traveled. In addition, surrounding enemy units take damage and are slowed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ashe fires a missile of ice in the target direction which will grant vision of the area it flies through for 1 second. This arrow will stun the first target hit for 1-3.5 seconds (based on the distance traveled), and it will reveal the area around them for 1 second. Enemies around the main target take 50% damage but are only slowed.

combos.description: Make sure to instantly press Q after your fourth AA for a quick burst of damage.
Ult then walk into AA range and use W in between AAs - ideally while they are still stunned until you can proc your Q.
To easily trade AA then W before your next AA is ready.

AurelionSol.name: Aurelion Sol
AurelionSol.title: The Star Forger
AurelionSol.blurb: Aurelion Sol once graced the vast emptiness of the cosmos with celestial wonders of his own devising. Now, he is forced to wield his awesome power at the behest of a space-faring empire that tricked him into servitude. Desiring a return to his...

abilities.name: Cosmic Creator
abilities.mobaDesc: Aurelion Sol's damaging Abilities break down enemies into stacks of <font color='#3458eb'>Stardust</font>, which permanently improves each of his abilities.

abilities.name: Breath of Light
abilities.riotDesc: Aurelion Sol channels his dragon breath for a few seconds, damaging the first enemy hit and splashing reduced damage onto nearby enemies. Each second the breath is channeled directly at an enemy will deal bonus damage, which is improved by the amount of Stardust that's been collected. This ability collects Stardust if the target is a champion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a breath of light that can be channeled dealing damage to the first target it hits and the surrounding area. Extended channels on the same target deal extra damage and give Stardust

abilities.name: Astral Flight
abilities.riotDesc:
Aurelion Sol flies over terrain in a targeted direction. While in this state, he can cast other abilities. Breath of Light no longer has a cooldown or maximum channel duration and deals increased damage while flying.

Astral Flight's remaining cooldown is reduced whenever an enemy champion dies after being recently damaged by Aurelion Sol.

Stardust increases Astral Flight's maximum range.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fly in the chosen direction. While flying, breath of light has no CD, max duration, and deals more damage.

abilities.name: Singularity
abilities.riotDesc: Aurelion Sol summons a black hole, damaging enemies and slowly pulling them toward its center. This ability grants Stardust each time an enemy dies within the black hole and for each second an enemy champion is caught inside it. The center of the black hole executes enemies who are below a certain percentage of their maximum health. Stardust increases Singularity's area as well as the execution threshold.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summon a black whole at the target location dragging enemies towards the center and dealing damage. Enemies below 5% health are killed instantly

abilities.name: Falling Star / The Skies Descend
abilities.riotDesc:
Falling Star: Aurelion Sol crashes a star into the earth. This impact deals magic damage and stuns enemies while also granting Stardust for each enemy champion it hits. Gathering enough Stardust transforms Aurelion Sol's next Falling Star into The Skies Descend.

The Skies Descend: Aurelion Sol drags a giant star down from the heavens with an increased impact zone and increased damage, knocking up enemies rather than stunning them. A shockwave then spreads from the edge of the impact zone, which damages and slows the enemies it hits. Stardust increases the impact area of both Falling Star and The Skies Descend.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summon a Star to crash down dealing damage and stunning enemies in the area. At 75 Stardust, it is upgraded to knock enemies up and release and extra shockwave that slows and does damage.

combos.description: Simply press your E and then your empowered R.
Fire up your E first and then follow that with your Q
Use your E then R instantly before finishing off with your Q.

Aurora.name: Aurora
Aurora.title: the Witch Between Worlds
Aurora.blurb: From the moment she was born, Aurora navigated life with a unique ability to move between the spirit and material realms. Determined to learn more about the spirit realm's inhabitants, she left her home to further her research and happened upon a...

abilities.name: Twofold Hex
abilities.riotDesc: Aurora sends out a missile that curses any enemies it hits. She can then recast the ability to draw active curses back toward herself, damaging foes who are hit along the way.
abilities.mobaDesc: Aurora sends out a missile that curses any enemies it hits. She can then recast the ability to draw active curses back toward herself, damaging foes who are hit along the way.

abilities.name: Across the Veil
abilities.riotDesc: Aurora leaps in a direction of her choosing, entering the spirit realm upon landing, becoming invisible, and gaining Move Speed for a short duration of time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Aurora leaps in a direction of her choosing, entering the spirit realm upon landing and becoming invisible for a short duration of time.

abilities.name: The Weirding
abilities.riotDesc: Aurora converges the realms, sending out a blast of spirit magic that damages and slows enemies before Aurora hops backward to safety.
abilities.mobaDesc: Aurora unlocks a window to the spirit realm, sending out a blast of spirit magic that damages and slows enemies before Aurora hops backward to safety.

abilities.name: Between Worlds
abilities.riotDesc: Aurora leaps in a direction of her choosing, releasing a shockwave that damages and slows any enemies it hits. Afterward, she creates an area that slows enemies within it and allows Aurora to teleport from one side of the area to the other.
abilities.mobaDesc: Aurora leaps in a direction of her choosing, releasing a shockwave that damages and slows any enemies it hits. Afterward, she creates an area that traps enemies within it and allows Aurora to teleport from one side of the area to the other.

combos.description: Press Q then E, W and Q again to finish.
Press Q, then AA, E and Q again to finish.

Azir.name: Azir
Azir.title: the Emperor of the Sands
Azir.blurb: Azir was a mortal emperor of Shurima in a far distant age, a proud man who stood at the cusp of immortality. His hubris saw him betrayed and murdered at the moment of his greatest triumph, but now, millennia later, he has been reborn as an Ascended...

abilities.name: Shurima's Legacy
abilities.mobaDesc: Azir can create a turret on the remnants of a destroyed friendly or ally turret. The turret's health decays over 60 seconds and it will lose 100 armor if Azir dies/moves too far away.

abilities.name: Conquering Sands
abilities.riotDesc: Azir sends all Sand Soldiers towards a location. Sand Soldiers deal magic damage to enemies they pass through and apply a slow for 1 second.
abilities.mobaDesc: Azir directs all Sand Soldiers to dash toward the target location, dealing magic damage to all enemies they pass through, and slowing them. The slow is stronger for every subsequent soldier the target is hit by.

abilities.name: Arise!
abilities.riotDesc: Azir summons a Sand Soldier to attack nearby targets for him, replacing his basic attack against targets within the soldier's range. Their attacks deal magic damage to enemies in a line.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Azir periodically stocks a Sand Soldier (maximum of 2). He also gains bonus Attacks Speed (doubled if he summons a third concurrent soldier) Active Azir summons an untargetable Sand Soldier at the target location that lasts for 10 seconds. They will expire twice as fast while within the range of an enemy turret and expiring immediately if Azir is not in control range. The soldier will attack in Azir stead if he targets an enemy near the soldier, dealing magic damage in a line. Subsequent Sand Soldiers beyond the first will deal 25% damage.

abilities.name: Shifting Sands
abilities.riotDesc: Azir shields himself briefly and dashes to one of his Sand Soldiers, damaging enemies. If he hits an enemy champion, he instantly readies a new Sand Soldier for deployment and halts his dash.
abilities.mobaDesc: Azir gets a shield for 1.5 seconds and dashes to the target Sand Soldiers, dealing magic damage to enemies he passes through. He will also get a W charge if Azir hits an enemy champion while using his E.

abilities.name: Emperor's Divide
abilities.riotDesc: Azir summons a wall of soldiers which charge forward, knocking back and damaging enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Azir calls a wall of soldiers from behind him, which will charge forward in the target direction. The enemies hit by it will take magic damage and are knocked back. The wall of soldiers will then stand in their place and will act as terrain for 5 seconds. Azir can walk through the walls though.

balance.otherEffects: Total attack speed increased by 2.5%. Ability haste increased by 20. Arise: Azir will start the game with one point already ranked in Arise!, allowing him to allocate the other two to his other abilities.

combos.description: To trade and fight, use W and AA, then E, Q and AA again.
Your basic trade is to W then AA, followed by Q AA.
To create a gap between you and the enemy, R them away and then W. AA, Q and AA again, then W and AA.

Bard.name: Bard
Bard.title: the Wandering Caretaker
Bard.blurb: A traveler from beyond the stars, Bard is an agent of serendipity who fights to maintain a balance where life can endure the indifference of chaos. Many Runeterrans sing songs that ponder his extraordinary nature, yet they all agree that the cosmic...

abilities.name: Traveler's Call
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Ancient Chimes: Sacred chimes appear at random locations on the map and stay for 10 minutes. Collecting one will grant Bard Movement Speed. Every consecutive chime will grant an additional Movement Speed. It grants Bard Experience and Mana. Bard will empower his Meeps each time he collects 5 chimes. Meeps: Bard attracts small spirits known as Meeps to his side. On-attack, he consumes a Meep, dealing bonus damage and slow (based on how many meeps he has). They respawn every 8-4 seconds (based on number of Chimes)

abilities.name: Cosmic Binding
abilities.riotDesc: Bard fires a missile which will slow the first enemy struck, and continue onward. If it strikes a wall, it will stun the initial target; if it strikes another enemy, it will stun them both.
abilities.mobaDesc: Bard fires a burst of energy in a target direction, dealing magic damage to the first enemy struck and slowing them. If it hits an enemy and a unit behind it, both of them will be CC'd for a duration.

abilities.name: Caretaker's Shrine
abilities.riotDesc: Reveals a Health shrine which powers up over a short time, disappearing after healing and speeding up the first ally that touches it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Bard places a shrine at a target location that builds up in power over 5 seconds while granting sight of a small area around it for a small time. Up to 3 shrines can be active at a time. Bard or his allies are healed for an amount based on the shrine's power and will gain Movement Speed that decays over 1.5 seconds. Stepping on the shrine will destroy it.

abilities.name: Magical Journey
abilities.riotDesc: Bard opens a portal in nearby terrain. Allies and enemies alike can take a one-way trip through that terrain by moving into the portal.
abilities.mobaDesc: Bard opens a one-way path through a piece of terrain in the target direction for 10 seconds. Allies and enemies can pass through it but allies will have an increased 33.3% travel speed.

abilities.name: Tempered Fate
abilities.riotDesc: Bard sends spirit energy arcing to a location, putting all champions, minions, monsters, and turrets hit into stasis for a brief time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Bard sends a ball of magical energy to a target location, revealing the area before it lands and puts every unit (including epic monsters) into Stasis for 2.5 seconds upon impact.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done increased by 20%. Passive Chime spawn rate changed to every 30 seconds (initial spawn unchanged). W Recharge timer changed to 10 seconds.

combos.description: Your basic trade will be Q in between AAs
When roaming E then go through it and Q your target.

Belveth.name: Bel'Veth
Belveth.title: the Empress of the Void
Belveth.blurb: A nightmarish empress created from the raw material of an entire devoured city, Bel'Veth is the end of Runeterra itself... and the beginning of a monstrous reality of her own design. Driven by epochs of repurposed history, knowledge, and memories from...

abilities.name: Death in Lavender
abilities.mobaDesc: Bel'Veth gains permanent attack speed stacks after taking down large minions and monsters and champions. She also gains temporary bonus attack speed after using an ability.

abilities.name: Void Surge
abilities.riotDesc: Bel'Veth dashes in a chosen direction and damages all enemies she passes through.
abilities.mobaDesc: Bel'Veth dashes in one of four directions, dealing damage to all enemies she passes through and applying on-hit effects. Each direction has its own unique cooldown that scales with attack speed.

abilities.name: Above and Below
abilities.riotDesc: Bel'Veth slams her tail to the ground, damaging, knocking up, and slowing her enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Bel’Veth slams her tail down, dealing damage, knocking up, and slowing enemies hit. Upon hitting an enemy champion, this ability reduces Q - Void Surge’s dash cooldown in the direction of the champion hit.

abilities.name: Royal Maelstrom
abilities.riotDesc: Bel'Veth roots herself in place, channeling a storm of slashes around her that targets the lowest-health enemy and grants her lifesteal and damage reduction.
abilities.mobaDesc: Bel’Veth channels a storm of slashes around her, gaining damage reduction and increased life steal. Each slash strikes the lowest health enemy within her Maelstrom, dealing more damage the more health they are missing. The amount of slashes scales with her attack speed.

abilities.name: Endless Banquet
abilities.riotDesc: Bel'Veth consumes Void coral remnants, transforming into her true form and increasing her max health, attack range, attack speed, and out-of-combat move speed. Consuming the Void coral remnants of a Void epic monster will grant her a longer ultimate duration, as well as the power to summon Void remora.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Every second attack against the same target deals additional True Damage, stacking infinitely. Takedowns against Epic Monsters and Champions leave behind a piece of Void Coral. Epic Monsters from the Void like Rift Herald and Baron Nashor drop special, voidier Void Coral. Active: Bel’veth consumes a piece of Void Coral and explodes, slowing and dealing True Damage to nearby enemies based on their missing health. Upon consuming Void Coral, Bel’Veth temporarily changes into her True Form. Consuming Void Coral left by Epic Monsters from the Void (Rift Herald and Baron Nashor) grants Bel'Veth her true form for an extended duration and causes minions that die in her presence to be reborn as faithful Voidlings. Voidlings are small minions that will serve Bel’Veth by marching down the lane in which they were spawned. True Form: When Bel’Veth unleashes her True Form, she gains increased max health, out-of-combat move speed, attack range, and total attack speed. While in her True Form, she also gains the ability to dash through walls with Q

balance.otherEffects: Tenacity increased by 20%. Passive: Bel'Veth gains 2 stacks from nearby siege minion deaths. R: Enhanced Void Corals spawn from nearby turrets being destroyed. Void Coral duration changed to 40 seconds.

combos.description: Use your Q, W, AA then Q, AA and finish with another Q, AA.
Use your Q, AA, Q AA, W and then E.

Blitzcrank.name: Blitzcrank
Blitzcrank.title: the Great Steam Golem
Blitzcrank.blurb: Blitzcrank is an enormous, near-indestructible automaton from Zaun, originally built to dispose of hazardous waste. However, he found this primary purpose too restricting, and modified his own form to better serve the fragile people of the Sump...

abilities.name: Mana Barrier
abilities.mobaDesc: Blitzcrank gains a shield based on their mana when dropping to low health.

abilities.name: Rocket Grab
abilities.riotDesc: Blitzcrank fires their right hand to grab an opponent on its path, dealing damage and dragging it back to them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Blitzcrank fires his right hand in a target direction that catches the first enemy it hits. The ability deals magic damage and yoinks them to Blitzcrank's location.

abilities.name: Overdrive
abilities.riotDesc: Blitzcrank super charges themself to get dramatically increased Move and Attack Speed. They are temporarily slowed after the effect ends.
abilities.mobaDesc: Blitzcranks gets increased Movement Speed for 5 seconds which decays to 10% after 2.5 seconds. Once it ends, Blitzcrank is slowed by 30% for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Power Fist
abilities.riotDesc: Blitzcrank charges up their fist to make the next attack deal double damage and pop their target up in the air.
abilities.mobaDesc: Blitzcrank's next basic attack will knock the unit he hits for 1 second. It will also deal double his Physical damage.

abilities.name: Static Field
abilities.riotDesc: Enemies attacked by Blitzcrank are marked and take lightning damage after 1 second. Additionally, Blitzcrank can activate this ability to remove nearby enemies' shields, damage them, and silence them briefly.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Provided that the ability is not on Cooldown, Blitzcrank's basic attacks will apply a mark that stacks up to 3 times. After every second, a mark is consumed to deal magic damage. Active: Blitzcrank detonates a static field around him, destroying shields of nearby enemies before dealing magic damage and silencing the targets for 0.5 seconds.

combos.description: To engage when close range use W to get into range to E knockup then Q them mid air.
To chain your crowd control Q and instantly activate E, then AA once they arrive.

Brand.name: Brand
Brand.title: the Burning Vengeance
Brand.blurb: Once a tribesman of the icy Freljord named Kegan Rodhe, the creature known as Brand is a lesson in the temptation of greater power. Seeking one of the legendary World Runes, Kegan betrayed his companions and seized it for himself—and, in an instant, the...

abilities.name: Blaze
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Abilities set his targets ablaze for 4 seconds, damaging them for 3% maximum health over 3.25 seconds as magic damage. Additional abilities used on a target who is ablaze will result in them being empowered. A target can have 3 Blaze stacks at a time. Killing an enemy that is ablaze will restore 20-40 mana. After reaching 3 stacks on large monsters and champions, an area is marked around them which explodes after 2 seconds, consuming all the stacks. The enemies struck take magic damage and maximum health damage as well.

abilities.name: Sear
abilities.riotDesc: Brand launches a ball of fire forward that deals magic damage. If the target is ablaze, Sear will stun the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Brand fires a fireball in a target direction that deals magic damage to the first enemy it hits. Blaze: The target will be stunned for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Pillar of Flame
abilities.riotDesc: After a short delay, Brand creates a Pillar of Flame at a target area, dealing magic damage to enemy units within the area. Units that are ablaze take an additional 25% damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: After a brief delay, Brand will erupt a target area in flames, dealing magic damage. Blaze: The targets take 25% bonus damage.

abilities.name: Conflagration
abilities.riotDesc: Brand conjures a powerful blast at his target that spreads to nearby enemies, dealing magic damage. If the target is ablaze, Conflagration's spread is doubled.
abilities.mobaDesc: Brand sets the target enemy aflame which deals magic damage. Blaze: The ability spreads to enemies around the target.

abilities.name: Pyroclasm
abilities.riotDesc: Brand unleashes a devastating torrent of fire that bounces up to 5 times off of Brand and nearby enemies, dealing magic damage to enemies each time bounce. Bounces prioritize stacking Blaze to max on Champions. If a target is ablaze, Pyroclasm will briefly slow them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Brand launches a fireball at the target enemy that bounces between nearby enemies up to four times, dealing magic damage every time. Blaze: Briefly slows the target hit.

combos.description: To perform your bread and butter combo instantly E Q your target then W after or as the stun lands.
To do some short range damage W your target and instantly E Q.

Braum.name: Braum
Braum.title: the Heart of the Freljord
Braum.blurb: Blessed with massive biceps and an even bigger heart, Braum is a beloved hero of the Freljord. Every mead hall north of Frostheld toasts his legendary strength, said to have felled a forest of oaks in a single night, and punched an entire mountain into...

abilities.name: Concussive Blows
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Braum's basic attacks and Q apply a stack of Concussive Blow to his target for 4 seconds. This stacks up to 4 times and will CC the afflicted target. Once afflicted by the Passive, Braum's allies' auto-attacks will also add stacks on the target. This CC effect cannot occur on the same target more than once every few seconds.

abilities.name: Winter's Bite
abilities.riotDesc:
Braum propels freezing ice from his shield, slowing and dealing magic damage.

Applies a stack of Concussive Blows.
abilities.mobaDesc: Braum firs an ice-ram from his shield in the target direction, dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit and slowing them for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Stand Behind Me
abilities.riotDesc: Braum leaps to a target allied champion or minion. On arrival, Braum and the ally gain Armor and Magic Resist for a few seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes to an allied unit, gaining and granting(only to champions) bonus armor and bonus magic resistance for 3 seconds. Braum can target himself as well, instantly granting him the bonus resistances.

abilities.name: Unbreakable
abilities.riotDesc: Braum raises his shield in a direction for several seconds, intercepting all projectiles causing them to hit him and be destroyed. He negates the damage of the first attack completely and reduces the damage of all subsequent attacks from this direction.
abilities.mobaDesc: Braum raises his shield in the target direction for a few seconds and creates a barrier that intercepts incoming enemy projectiles and reduces the damage. The first instance of the damage blocked by his shield is negated completely. Braum will also gain 10% bonus Movement Speed and is ghosted while using this ability.

abilities.name: Glacial Fissure
abilities.riotDesc: Braum slams the ground, knocking up enemies nearby and in a line in front of him. A fissure is left along the line that slows enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Braum slams his shield into the ground, creating a fissure in the target direction that deals magic damage to enemies as well as those around him. A field of ice then remains at the fissure's location for 4 seconds, slowing the enemies standing on it.

combos.description: To save an ally in danger W to an ally then E Q R instantly
A common way to stun your opponent is to W to an allied unit then AA Q and AA twice more for your passive to proc.
Your standard level 6 combo is to Q AA then instantly R. AA twice more to proc your passive.

Briar.name: Briar
Briar.title: the Restrained Hunger
Briar.blurb: A failed experiment by the Black Rose, Briar's uncontrollable bloodlust required a special pillory to focus her frenzied mind. After years of confinement, this living weapon broke free from her restraints and unleashed herself into the world. Now she's...

abilities.name: Crimson Curse
abilities.mobaDesc: Briar gains increased Healing based on her missing health and her attacks and abilities apply a bleed for short duration that stacks. The bleed deals physical damage based on the number of stacks and Heals Briar for a percentage of the pre-mitigation damage. Briar has no base health regeneration and her abilities cost health to cast.

abilities.name: Head Rush
abilities.riotDesc: Briar leaps to a unit and hits enemies with The Heel Wheel (of Pain), stunning them and breaking their Armor.
abilities.mobaDesc: Briar leaps to a target, Stunning them for a short duration, dealing physical damage, and reducing their armor. Briar will stop prioritizing champions if she casts this Ability on a minion or monster during Blood Frenzy

abilities.name: Blood Frenzy / Snack Attack
abilities.riotDesc:
Briar leaps forward and shatters her pillory, entering a Blood Frenzy that causes her to relentlessly pursue the nearest enemy (prioritizing champions). While frenzied, she gains increased Attack Speed and Move Speed, and her attacks deal damage in an area around her target.

Briar can reactivate this ability while frenzied to take a CHOMP out of her target on her next attack, dealing additional damage based on their missing Health, and healing Briar based on the damage she deals.
abilities.mobaDesc: Briar leaps to a location and enters a Blood Frenzy, self taunting to the nearest enemy (prioritizing champions) for a period of time. While in Blood Frenzy she gains Attack Speed and Move Speed and her attacks now deal physical damage around the main target. Briar can Recast this ability to empower her next attack. It deals missing health physical damage and heals Briar for a large percentage of the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Chilling Scream
abilities.riotDesc: Briar refocuses her mind, removing Blood Frenzy and channeling energy into a powerful scream that damages and slows enemies. While charging, she takes reduced damage and heals for a portion of her max Health. A fully charged scream knocks foes back, dealing additional damage and stunning those who collide with a wall.
abilities.mobaDesc: Begin Charging: Briar removes Blood Frenzy and gathers energy, gaining damage reduction and restoring health Release: Briar unleashes a scream that deals damage based on time charged and Slows for a short duration. When fully charged the scream knocks back, dealing additional damage to enemies that hit a wall and Stunning them.

abilities.name: Certain Death
abilities.riotDesc: Briar kicks her pillory's hemolith gemstone, marking the first champion it hits as her prey. She then beelines straight to them, fearing other surrounding enemies upon arriving at her target, and enters a state of complete hemomania. She will pursue her prey until death, gaining the benefits of Blood Frenzy as well as additional Armor, Magic Resistance, Life Steal, and Move Speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Briar kicks a hemolith and flies to the location of the first champion hit, marking them as her prey. On landing she deals a large amount of physical damage to everything nearby and causes nearby enemies to Flee. She then enters an empowered Blood Frenzy and will pursue her prey until one of them dies. During this time she gains Armor, Magic Resist, and additional Move Speed.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done increased by 5%. E Damage reduction changed to 55%.

combos.description: Pop your W, then W again, Q and then E.
Lead with Q then charge your E, then W, and W again!
Charge up your E, then Q, AA, W, W, and AA to finish.

Caitlyn.name: Caitlyn
Caitlyn.title: the Sheriff of Piltover
Caitlyn.blurb: Renowned as its finest peacekeeper, Caitlyn Kiramman is also Piltover's best shot at ridding the city of its elusive criminal elements. She is often paired with Vi, acting as a cool counterpoint to her partner's more impetuous nature. Even though she...

abilities.name: Headshot
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Caitlyn's Auto-Attacks generate a stack of Headshot on-attack. This is doubled when attacking from a brush. At 6 stacks, the next Auto-Attack will deal bonus physical damage. This Passive also applies to any unit that is hit by Caitlyn's W or E.

abilities.name: Piltover Peacemaker
abilities.riotDesc: Caitlyn revs up her rifle for 1 second to unleash a penetrating shot that deals physical damage (deals less damage to subsequent targets).

abilities.name: Yordle Snap Trap
abilities.riotDesc: Caitlyn sets a trap that, when sprung, reveals and immobilizes the enemy champion for 1.5 seconds, granting Caitlyn an empowered Headshot.

abilities.name: 90 Caliber Net
abilities.riotDesc: Caitlyn fires a heavy net to slow her target. The recoil knocks Caitlyn back.

abilities.name: Ace in the Hole
abilities.riotDesc: Caitlyn takes time to line up the perfect shot, dealing massive damage to a single target at a huge range. Enemy champions can intercept the bullet for their ally.

balance.otherEffects: Q AD ratio changed to 125 / 140 / 155 / 170 / 185% AD.

combos.description: To all in at level 6 quickly one after another W under your target, E and Q them. AA twice and R to finish up.
Your basic short trade is to E your target and Q quickly, then AA.

Camille.name: Camille
Camille.title: the Steel Shadow
Camille.blurb: Weaponized to operate outside the boundaries of the law, Camille is the Principal Intelligencer of Clan Ferros—an elegant and elite agent who ensures the Piltover machine and its Zaunite underbelly runs smoothly. Adaptable and precise, she views sloppy...

abilities.name: Adaptive Defenses
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Periodically, Camille's next auto-attack against an enemy Champion will provide her with either a physical damage or magic damage shield, based on which type would mitigate the most damage from her target.

abilities.name: Precision Protocol
abilities.riotDesc: Camille's next attack deals bonus damage and grants bonus Move Speed. This spell can be recast for a short period of time, doing significantly increased bonus damage if Camille delays a period of time between the two attacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: Camille's next Auto-Attack becomes empowered and gains bonus range and damage. It also gives her Movement Speed for 1 second. This ability can be re-cast within the next 3.5 seconds. This cast will mimic the first cast's effects. If cast at least 1.5 seconds after the first attack, the ability's damage will be doubled and 40%-100% (based on level) of total damage is dealt as true damage.

abilities.name: Tactical Sweep
abilities.riotDesc: Camille blasts in a cone after a delay, dealing damage. Enemies in the outer half are slowed and take extra damage, while also healing Camille.
abilities.mobaDesc: Camille becomes ghosted and sweeps a target area after a 1.1-second delay. This deals Physical damage in that area. Enemies hit by the outer half of the cone take bonus physical damage and are slowed by 80% that decays over 2 seconds. Camille is healed for the bonus damage dealt against champions.

abilities.name: Hookshot
abilities.riotDesc: Camille pulls herself to a wall, leaping off and knocking up enemy champions upon landing.
abilities.mobaDesc: Camille fires a grapple towards a target location. If the grapple comes in contact with the terrain, Camille will dash towards and bind to the terrain for 0.75 seconds. After the delay, she can recast the ability where her dash range is doubled if the recast is towards an enemy champion. She will prematurely stop upon colliding with an enemy champion, knocking them back and stunning them as well as nearby enemy champions. She also gains bonus attack speed for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: The Hextech Ultimatum
abilities.riotDesc: Camille dashes to target champion, anchoring them to the area. She also deals bonus magic damage to the target with her basic attacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: Camille becomes briefly untargetable and will jump to her target unstoppably over 0.6 seconds. This will disable all their ongoing channels and will create a hexagonal zone around the target's current location for the duration whilst knocking away all other nearby enemies on impact. The target won't be able to escape the zone by any means, and Camille's auto-attacks will deal bonus magic damage while she is within the zone.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done increased by 20%. Shielding done increased by 10%. Ability haste increased by 10.

combos.description: Use your E twice, AA, Q, R, then AA, AA and finish with Q.
AA your target, Q them, use your E twice to stun them and then AA, Q and W to finish.
Use your Q on a minion, then use your E twice, AA your target followed by Q & W.

Cassiopeia.name: Cassiopeia
Cassiopeia.title: the Serpent's Embrace
Cassiopeia.blurb: Cassiopeia is a deadly creature bent on manipulating others to her sinister will. Youngest and most beautiful daughter of the noble Du Couteau family of Noxus, she ventured deep into the crypts beneath Shurima in search of ancient power. There, she was...

abilities.name: Serpentine Grace
abilities.mobaDesc: Increased effectiveness of all Movement Speed buffs by 6-40% (based on level).

abilities.name: Noxious Blast
abilities.riotDesc: Cassiopeia blasts an area with Poison after a brief delay, granting her increased Move Speed if she hits an enemy champion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Cassiopeia blasts the target area with Noxious Poison after a brief delay, dealing magic damage every second for 3 seconds to all enemies hit. If the Q hits an enemy Champion, Cassiopeia will get bonus Movement Speed.

abilities.name: Miasma
abilities.riotDesc: Cassiopeia releases several clouds of poison, slowing, grounding, and lightly damaging enemies that pass through them. Grounded enemies cannot use Movement abilities.
abilities.mobaDesc: Cassiopeia spits venom in an arc in front of her, leaving toxic clouds of Debilitating Poison where they hit the ground for 5 seconds. Debilitating Poison deals magic damage to enemies standing upon it every second and will also ground the enemies.

abilities.name: Twin Fang
abilities.riotDesc: Cassiopeia lets loose an attack that deals increased damage to Poisoned targets and heals her for a percentage of the damage dealt. If the target dies from this attack, Cassiopeia regains Mana.
abilities.mobaDesc: Cassiopeia launches her fangs at the target enemy, dealing magic damage and refunding mana if the ability kills a target. If the target is poisoned, this ability will deal bonus damage and will heal Cassiopeia. This heal is drastically reduced if the target is not a champion.

abilities.name: Petrifying Gaze
abilities.riotDesc: Cassiopeia releases a swirl of magical energy from her eyes, stunning any enemies in front of her that are facing her and slowing any others with their back turned.
abilities.mobaDesc: Cassiopeia blasts the enemies in a cone in a specific direction, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit. Enemies facing Cassiopeia will be CC'd for 2 seconds and all other enemies will be slowed by 40% for 2 seconds.

combos.description: Lead with your Q, then E and E again before using your W. Now you can E some more before another Q and E to finish.
Land your Q, then E as many times as you can before your Q comes back up before using it again!

Chogath.name: Cho'Gath
Chogath.title: the Terror of the Void
Chogath.blurb: From the moment Cho'Gath first emerged into the harsh light of Runeterra's sun, the beast was driven by the most pure and insatiable hunger. A perfect expression of the Void's desire to consume all life, Cho'Gath's complex biology quickly converts...

abilities.name: Carnivore
abilities.mobaDesc: Killing an enemy unit or destroying an enemy structure will heal Cho'Gath for 20-71 (depending on level) and restores mana.

abilities.name: Rupture
abilities.riotDesc: Ruptures the ground at target location, popping enemy units into the air, dealing damage and slowing them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Cho'gath will gain vision of a target area, and after a short delay, will rupture the same place, dealing magic damage and knocking up enemies for a second. A 60% slow follows the knockup and lingers for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Feral Scream
abilities.riotDesc: Cho'Gath unleashes a terrible scream at enemies in a cone, dealing magic damage and Silencing enemies for a few seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Cho'Gath roars in a direction of his choice, dealing magic damage to enemies in a cone and silencing enemy champions in the conical area.

abilities.name: Vorpal Spikes
abilities.riotDesc: Cho'Gath's attacks release deadly spikes, dealing damage and slowing all enemy units in front of him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Cho'Gath's next 3 auto-attacks within 6 seconds will gain bonus range and will launch a volley of spikes in a line. These spikes deal magic damage and apply a decaying slow over the next 1.5 seconds to all enemies hit.

abilities.name: Feast
abilities.riotDesc: Devours an enemy unit, dealing a high amount of true damage. If the target is killed, Cho'Gath grows, gaining maximum Health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Cho'Gath tries to eat the target, dealing True damage. This damage is increased to 1000 against non-champions. If this ability kills its target, Cho'Gath gains a Feast stack which will give him bonus health, attack range, and size per stack. Only 6 stacks can be gained from non-epic monsters or minions.

combos.description: When trying to engage on your target post level 6 Q and walk into E range to AA then W AA, execute with R.
If you're trying to all in a target with mobility or movement spells up W Q instantly then AA E and use R to execute.
For a decent melee trade W then quickly AA and instantly E after it completes to reset your AA. Q after your E slow connects then AA twice more.

Corki.name: Corki
Corki.title: the Daring Bombardier
Corki.blurb: The yordle pilot Corki loves two things above all others: flying, and his glamorous mustache... though not necessarily in that order. After leaving Bandle City, he settled in Piltover and fell in love with the wondrous machines he found there. He...

abilities.name: Hextech Munitions
abilities.mobaDesc: A percentage of Corki's basic attack damage is dealt as bonus true damage.

abilities.name: Phosphorus Bomb
abilities.riotDesc: Corki fires a flash bomb at a target location, dealing magic damage to enemies in the area. This attack additionally reveals units in the area for a duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Corki will launch a bomb to the designated area which will explode upon impact and will deal magic damage to enemies hit by it. The bomb will also provide vision of the area as well as any champion who is hit by it for 6 seconds.

abilities.name: Valkyrie
abilities.riotDesc: Corki flies a short distance, dropping bombs that create a trail of fire that damages opponents who remain in it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Corki dashes to a target location while dropping bombs on his trail that leave up to 3 burning patches. These last for 2 seconds and deal magic damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies within. Special Delivery: Dashes unstoppable to the target location quickly and will knock enemies aside while doing so. He also leaves a trail of fire for 5 seconds. The enemies hit by Corki and standing on the trail will take magic damage every 0.25 seconds, and will be slowed as well.

abilities.name: Gatling Gun
abilities.riotDesc: Corki's gatling gun rapidly fires in a cone in front of him, dealing damage and reducing enemy Armor and Magic Resist.
abilities.mobaDesc: Corki fires bullets in a conical area in front of him for 4 seconds. This deals equal parts physical and magic damage every 0.25 seconds to all enemies hit while also shredding the target's armor and magic resistance with each tick. This effect stacks up to 8 times and lasts for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Missile Barrage
abilities.riotDesc: Corki fires a missile toward his target location that explodes on impact, dealing damage to enemies in an area. Corki stores missiles over time, up to a maximum. Every 3rd missile fired will be a Big One, dealing extra damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Corki stocks up missiles periodically, up to a maximum of 7. Active: Corki fires a missile in the direction of his choice that explodes upon the first enemy hit. It deals magic damage in an area around the explosion. Every 3rd missile Corki fires deals 100% increased damage with an increased range and explosion radius.

combos.description: For a basic trade you can E AA then Q right as it finishes and continue to AA.
Your bread and butter trade opener is to Q E instantly then AA.

Darius.name: Darius
Darius.title: the Hand of Noxus
Darius.blurb: There is no greater symbol of Noxian might than Darius, the nation's most feared and battle-hardened commander. Rising from humble origins to become the Hand of Noxus, he cleaves through the empire's enemies—many of them Noxians themselves. Knowing that...

abilities.name: Hemorrhage
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Damaging basic attacks and abilities cause the target to bleed every 1.25 seconds for 5 seconds while dealing damage to the target over the duration. This can stack up to 5 times and the damage is increased against monsters. On applying full stacks to an enemy champion, or killing someone with his Ultimate, Darius gains Noxian Might for 5 seconds. Noxian Might: Darius gains bonus Attack damage and instantly applies full Hemorrhagee stacks through his usual means.

abilities.name: Decimate
abilities.riotDesc: Darius winds up and swings his axe in a wide circle. Enemies struck by the blade take more damage than those struck by the handle. Darius heals based on enemy champions and large monsters hit by the blade.
abilities.mobaDesc: Darius swings his axe around him in a circle and deals physical damage to nearby enemy units. This damage is reduced by 35% if an enemy is hit by the handle of the axe. Darius will also heal himself if he hits a large monster or a champion with the axe. No heal or Passive stacks will be acquired if the target is hit by the handle.

abilities.name: Crippling Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Darius's next attack strikes an enemy's crucial artery. As they bleed out, their Move Speed is slowed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Darius' next auto-attack within 4 seconds becomes unstoppable and gains bonus range, physical damage, and slows the target by 90% for 1 second. If this ability kills its target, the mana cost and half its cooldown are refunded.

abilities.name: Apprehend
abilities.riotDesc: Darius hones his axe, passively causing his physical damage to ignore a percentage of his target's Armor. When activated, Darius sweeps up his enemies with his axe's hook and pulls them to him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Darius gains armor penetration. Active: Darius pulls in all enemies in front of him, slowing them by 40% for 1 second, and gaining vision of the area around the pull.

abilities.name: Noxian Guillotine
abilities.riotDesc: Darius leaps to an enemy champion and strikes a lethal blow, dealing true damage. This damage is increased for each stack of Hemorrhage on the target. If Noxian Guillotine is a killing blow, its cooldown is refreshed for a brief duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Darius attempts to execute the target enemy champion and deals true damage based on the number of Hemorrhage stacks. If the target dies within 0.15 seconds after being hit by his Ultimate, Darius causes all nearby minions and monsters to flee for 3 seconds. At rank 3, this ability has no mana cost and each kill with the ability will completely reset its cooldown.

combos.description: Set up your Q easily with E then W AA once they reach you followed by stepping back to land your Q sweet spot.
Your basic trade is Q then AA W once you reach your target.

Diana.name: Diana
Diana.title: Scorn of the Moon
Diana.blurb: Bearing her crescent moonblade, Diana fights as a warrior of the Lunari—a faith all but quashed in the lands around Mount Targon. Clad in shimmering armor the color of winter snow at night, she is a living embodiment of the silver moon's power. Imbued...

abilities.name: Moonsilver Blade
abilities.mobaDesc: Diana permanently gains bonus attack speed. After casting an ability, this bonus is tripled for 3 seconds. Diana's auto-attacks grant a stack for 3.5 seconds. After gaining 2 stacks, the next attack will cleave the nearby enemies and deal magic damage. This will consume all the stacks.

abilities.name: Crescent Strike
abilities.riotDesc:
Unleashes a bolt of lunar energy in an arc dealing magic damage.

Afflicts enemies struck with Moonlight, revealing them if they are not stealthed for 3 seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Diana launches a blot of lunar energy in an arc that explodes at the target location. This deals magic damage to the enemies hit and afflicts them with Moonlight for 3 seconds, revealing them for the duration.

abilities.name: Pale Cascade
abilities.riotDesc: Diana creates three orbiting spheres that detonate on contact with enemies to deal damage in an area. She also gains a temporary shield that absorbs damage. If her third sphere detonates, the shield gains additional strength.
abilities.mobaDesc: Diana shields herself for up to 5 seconds and creates three spheres that rotate around her for the duration. These spheres deal damage if they hit an enemy champion or unit. If all three spheres detonate, the W shield is reapplied and it stacks with the original shield.

abilities.name: Lunar Rush
abilities.riotDesc:
Becomes the living embodiment of the vengeful moon, dashing to an enemy and dealing magic damage.

Lunar Rush has no cooldown when used to dash to an enemy afflicted with Moonlight. All other enemies will have the Moonlight debuff removed regardless of whether they were the target of Lunar Rush.
abilities.mobaDesc: Diana dashes to an enemy, dealing magic damage to the target and consuming Moonlight from all enemies. If Diana dashes to a target afflicted with Moonlight, the E Cooldown is reset.

abilities.name: Moonfall
abilities.riotDesc:
Diana reveals and draws in all nearby enemies and slows them.

If Diana pulls in one or more enemy champions, the moonlight crashes down onto her after a short delay, dealing magic damage in an area around her, increased for each target beyond the first pulled.
abilities.mobaDesc: Draws in all enemies around her, revealing and slowing them in the process. If a Champion is drawn in, Diana calls down a beam of moonlight after 1 second, dealing magic damage in an area around her. This damage is increased for each champion pulled in by the initial pull.

combos.description: For a melee range all in W then AA twice, use Q E instantly and AA three times. E again, then AA once more.
You can sneakily trade with your passive. AA your first target twice then Q E your main target. Instantly AA W upon landing, then E back to safety on a different enemy.
To trade while hiding your first attack AA and W as soon as the animation starts. Instantly Q followed by more AAs.

Draven.name: Draven
Draven.title: the Glorious Executioner
Draven.blurb: In Noxus, warriors known as Reckoners face one another in arenas where blood is spilled and strength tested—but none has ever been as celebrated as Draven. A former soldier, he found that the crowds uniquely appreciated his flair for the dramatic, and...

abilities.name: League of Draven
abilities.mobaDesc: Draven gains his fans' Adoration when he catches a Spinning Axe or kills a minion, monster, or tower. Killing enemy champions grants Draven bonus gold based on how much Adoration he has.

abilities.name: Spinning Axe
abilities.riotDesc: Draven's next attack will deal bonus physical damage. This axe will ricochet off the target high up into the air. If Draven catches it, he automatically readies another Spinning Axe. Draven can have two Spinning Axes at once.
