abilities.mobaDesc: Draven's next auto-attack withing 5.8 seconds will deal bonus physical damage. In addition, the axe ricochets off the target high up in the air, landing 2 seconds later at a location. If Draven catches it, his Q is reapplied for no additional cost on his next basic attack.

abilities.name: Blood Rush
abilities.riotDesc: Draven gains increased Move Speed and Attack Speed. The Move Speed bonus decreases rapidly over its duration. Catching a Spinning Axe will refresh the cooldown of Blood Rush.
abilities.mobaDesc: Draven ghosts himself for 1.5 seconds, gaining bonus attack speed for 3 seconds and bonus Movement speed which decays over 1.5 seconds. Catching an axe will reset the cooldown of this ability.

abilities.name: Stand Aside
abilities.riotDesc: Draven throws his axes, dealing physical damage to targets hit and knocking them aside. Targets hit are slowed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Draven throws his axes in a line, dealing damage to all enemies hit and knocking them aside. The targets are slowed for 2 seconds after getting knocked aside.

abilities.name: Whirling Death
abilities.riotDesc: Draven hurls two massive axes to deal physical damage to each unit struck. Whirling Death slowly reverses direction and returns to Draven after striking an enemy champion. Draven may also activate this ability while the axes are in flight to cause it to return early. Deals less damage for each unit hit and resets when the axes reverse direction. Executes enemies who have less health than Draven's number of Adoration stacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: Draven hurls two axes in a target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies struck. This ability can be recast after 1 second, which will result in the axes returning to Draven and dealing damage on its return path as well. It will also return if it reaches the edge of the map or strikes an enemy champion.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Base gold per kill changed to An icon representing Gold 40. Stacks lost on death changed to 30%.

combos.description: F
Surprise your target by using R then W. Quickly E and instantly Flash mid animation, then Q AA and W AA.
Your basic trade is to E then Q AA.
Hide a spinning axe with an AA and immediate Q.

DrMundo.name: Dr. Mundo
DrMundo.title: the Madman of Zaun
DrMundo.blurb: Utterly mad, tragically homicidal, and horrifyingly purple, Dr. Mundo is what keeps many of Zaun's citizens indoors on particularly dark nights. Now a self-proclaimed physician, he was once a patient of Zaun's most infamous asylum. After "curing" the...

abilities.name: Goes Where He Pleases
abilities.mobaDesc: Dr. Mundo resists the first Immobilizing effect that hits him, instead losing Health and dropping a chemical cannister nearby. Walking over it restores Health.

abilities.name: Infected Bonesaw
abilities.riotDesc: Dr. Mundo throws an infected bonesaw, dealing damage to the first enemy hit based on their current health and slowing them.

abilities.name: Heart Zapper
abilities.riotDesc: Dr. Mundo electrocutes himself, dealing persistent damage to nearby enemies and storing a portion of damage he takes. At the end of the duration or on Recast, Dr. Mundo deals a burst of damage to nearby enemies. If the burst hit an enemy, he heals a percentage of the stored damage.

abilities.name: Blunt Force Trauma
abilities.riotDesc:
Passive - Dr. Mundo gains bonus Attack Damage, increasing based on his max Health.

Active - Dr. Mundo slams his “medical” bag into an enemy, dealing additional damage based on his missing Health. If the enemy dies they are swatted away, dealing damage to enemies they pass through.

abilities.name: Maximum Dosage
abilities.riotDesc: Dr. Mundo pumps himself with chemicals, instantly healing a percent of his missing Health. He then gains Move Speed and regenerates a portion of his maximum Health over a long duration.

Ekko.name: Ekko
Ekko.title: the Boy Who Shattered Time
Ekko.blurb: A prodigy from the rough streets of Zaun, Ekko is able to manipulate time to twist any situation to his advantage. He uses his own invention, the Z-Drive, to explore the branching possibilities of reality, crafting the perfect moment to seemingly...

abilities.name: Z-Drive Resonance
abilities.mobaDesc: Resonance: Ekko's Auto-Attacks and damaging abilities apply a stack of Resonance for 4 seconds. At 3 stacks, Resonance is consumed to deal bonus magic damage, and this damage is increased against monsters. Stolen Time: Triggering Resonance against a champion will gran bonus Movement Speed for a duration.

abilities.name: Timewinder
abilities.riotDesc: Ekko throws a temporal grenade that expands into a time-distortion field upon hitting an enemy champion, slowing and damaging anyone caught inside. After a delay, the grenade rewinds back to Ekko, dealing damage on its return.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ekko throws a projectile in the direction of his choice, dealing magic damage to enemies along its path. This projectile will return to Ekko with a higher speed after it reaches the maximum range. It will deal magic damage in both instances to all units in its path.

abilities.name: Parallel Convergence
abilities.riotDesc: Ekko's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage to low health enemies. He can cast Parallel Convergence to split the timeline, creating an anomaly after a few seconds that slows enemies caught inside. If Ekko enters the anomaly, he gains shielding and stuns enemies by suspending them in time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Ekko's auto-attacks deal bonus magic damage based on the target's missing health to enemies who are below 30% of their maximum health. Active: Ekko's afterimage bats a device to the target location, which travels over 3 seconds and expands once it hits the ground. Enemies in the impact radius of this device will be slowed by 40% and will be visible to the enemy in the last 1 second only. If Ekko enters the expansion within the next 1.5 seconds after it lands, he gains a shield for 2 seconds and stuns any enemy within it for 2.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Phase Dive
abilities.riotDesc: Ekko rolls evasively while charging up his Z-Drive. His next attack deals bonus damage and warps reality, teleporting him to his target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ekko dashes in the direction of his choice and causes his next auto-attack (within the next 3 seconds) to have bonus range. He will also blink to the target if he is within 125 range of them and will deal bonus magic damage to the same target.

abilities.name: Chronobreak
abilities.riotDesc: Ekko shatters his timeline, becoming untargetable and rewinding to a more favorable point in time. He returns to whenever he was a few seconds ago, and heals for a percentage of the damage received in that duration. Enemies near his arrival zone take massive damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: On unlocking his Ultimate, or when its Cooldown is lower than 4 seconds, Ekko gains a time-delayed afterimage of himself which tracks where he was 4 seconds ago. Active: Ekko enters stasis and becomes immune to displacements as soon as he casts his Ultimate. He then heals himself and teleports back to his afterimage, dealing magic damage to surrounding enemies on arrival.

combos.description: To all in an opponent before level 6, W your target and wait until it's about to proc. E forward and Q AA to gap close and trigger the stun.
Your most basic trade will be to use E then AA as soon as you're done rolling, then quickly Q AA.
If someone facechecks you lead with W then Q AA. E away from your target then AA to dash back to land the stun.

Elise.name: Elise
Elise.title: the Spider Queen
Elise.blurb: Elise is a deadly predator who dwells in a shuttered, lightless palace, deep within the oldest city of Noxus. Once mortal, she was the mistress of a powerful house, but the bite of a vile demigod transformed her into something beautiful, yet utterly...

abilities.name: Spider Queen
abilities.mobaDesc: Human Form: On hitting a target with her abilities, Elise gains one dormant Spiderling. This can stack up to a certain amount based on her Ultimate's rank. Spider Form: Elise's auto-attacks against non-structures deal bonus magic damage and heal her for on-hit damage dealt.

abilities.name: Neurotoxin / Venomous Bite
abilities.riotDesc:
Human Form: Deals damage based upon how high the target's Health is.

Spider Form: Lunges at an enemy and deals damage based upon how low their Health is.
abilities.mobaDesc: Elise fires toxins at the enemy target which deals magic damage. The damage is capped against monsters.

abilities.name: Volatile Spiderling / Skittering Frenzy
abilities.riotDesc:
Human Form: Releases a venom-gorged Spiderling that explodes when it nears a target.

Spider Form: Elise and her Spiderlings gain Attack Speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Elise summons and untargetable venom-filled, glowing spider for 3 seconds, which moves in a target direction. The spider explodes upon contact with an enemy unit, or at the end of its lifespan, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Cocoon / Rappel
abilities.riotDesc:
Human Form: Stuns the first enemy unit hit and reveals them if they are not stealthed.

Spider Form: Elise and her Spiderlings ascend into the air and then descend upon target enemy. After descending on an enemy target, Elise's bonus damage and healing from Spider Queen is increased.
abilities.mobaDesc: Elise will fire a lump of web in the direction of her choice. If it hits an enemy, they get stunned and are revealed.

abilities.name: Spider Form
abilities.riotDesc: Transforms into a menacing spider, reducing her attack range in exchange for Move Speed, new abilities, and a Spiderling swarm that will attack her foes.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive : Spider Queen's bonuses are increased. Human Form: Elise transforms into a spider, gaining movement speed and melee auto-attacks. She also gains access to a new set of abilities and unleashes all her stored Spiderlings. Spider Form: Elise transforms into a human, gaining ranged auto-attacks. She also gains access to human abilities while storing all the unleashed Spiderlings.

combos.description: Start off in spider form then rappel to your target or a minion to gank. Use R to go human form so you can immediately E to stun, then W Q AA.

Evelynn.name: Evelynn
Evelynn.title: Agony's Embrace
Evelynn.blurb: Within the dark seams of Runeterra, the demon Evelynn searches for her next victim. She lures in prey with the voluptuous façade of a human female, but once a person succumbs to her charms, Evelynn's true form is unleashed. She then subjects her victim...

abilities.name: Demon Shade
abilities.mobaDesc: Evelynn gains Demon Shade after not attacking or performing any action which breaks stealth for 4 seconds. Attacking or taking damage from an enemy will break Demon Shade and put it on cooldown. Demon Shade: While below a certain health threshold, Evelynn heals herself every second. From level 6, she also gains Camouflage.

abilities.name: Hate Spike
abilities.riotDesc: Evelynn strikes out with her Lasher, dealing damage to the first unit hit. Then, Evelynn can shoot a line of spikes at nearby foes a few times.
abilities.mobaDesc: Evelynn launches a projectile in a target direction, dealing magic damage to the first enemy (excluding towers) hit. Hitting a monster will refund 50% of the Q Cooldown. For the next 4 seconds, enemies she auto-attacks or uses abilities on will take magic damage. It can be recast 3 times after the initial cast, which will result in Evelynn unleashing a line of deadly spikes in the direction of her target. They will take magic damage if they are within range and any enemy within the path of those spikes will also take damage.

abilities.name: Allure
abilities.riotDesc: Evelynn curses her target, causing her next attack or spell after a delay to charm her target and reduce their magic resist.
abilities.mobaDesc: Evelynn applies a curse on a target enemy or monster for 5 seconds. Evelynn's next attack or ability will slow the curse afflicted target by 65%. If the target is cursed for 2.5 seconds, she will also charm the target. If the target is an enemy champion, she will reduce their magic resistance as well.

abilities.name: Whiplash
abilities.riotDesc: Evelynn whips her target with her Lasher, dealing damage. She then gains Move Speed for a short duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Evelynn dashes to a target and whips them with her lashers. It applies on-hit effects and deals magic damage. Evelynn also gains bonus Movement Speed for a small duration. This ability becomes empowered when she gets Demon Shade and she deals bonus damage to the target.

abilities.name: Last Caress
abilities.riotDesc: Evelynn briefly goes untargetable and decimates the area in front of her before warping backwards a long distance.
abilities.mobaDesc: Evelynn becomes untargetable and blinks back 700 units after dealing with devastating amounts of damage to all targets in her ability area. Units take more damage if they are below 30% of their maximum Health.

balance.otherEffects: Tenacity increased by 20%. R Cooldown changed to 100 / 80 / 60 seconds.

combos.description: If need to burst a target without W, Q then Q again as you run into E range. Use E and use Q right before you R, which should be almost instantly after your E finishes.
For your full damage combo W your target and Q from max range as it completes. Move towards your target and use Q, then E once in range and Q, then AA and use Q right before your R.
When slightly further away W your target then Q right as it completes. E as soon as you are in range then Q three more times as quickly as you can and AA while doing so.

Ezreal.name: Ezreal
Ezreal.title: the Prodigal Explorer
Ezreal.blurb: A dashing adventurer, unknowingly gifted in the magical arts, Ezreal raids long-lost catacombs, tangles with ancient curses, and overcomes seemingly impossible odds with ease. His courage and bravado knowing no bounds, he prefers to improvise his way...

abilities.name: Rising Spell Force
abilities.mobaDesc: Ezreal gains increasing Attack Speed each time he successfully hits a spell, stacking up to 5 times.

abilities.name: Mystic Shot
abilities.riotDesc: Ezreal fires a damaging bolt of energy which reduces all of his cooldowns slightly if it strikes an enemy unit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ezreal fires a projectile in a target direction, dealing physical damage to the first enemy unit hit. It also applies on-hit and on-attack effects, and can heal off the amount of life steal Ezreal has. Hitting an enemy will reduce his abilities' cooldowns by 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Essence Flux
abilities.riotDesc: Ezreal fires an orb that sticks to the first champion or objective hit. If Ezreal hits an enemy with the orb, it detonates and deals damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ezreal fires an orb-like projectile that will latch onto an enemy, epic monster, or structure for 4 seconds. Hitting an enemy with his W latched on them will allow him to deal Magic Damage to the target. It will also refund the mana cost of that ability (the ability used to detonate the W) and will restore 60 mana.

abilities.name: Arcane Shift
abilities.riotDesc: Ezreal teleports to a target nearby location and fires a homing bolt which strikes the nearest enemy unit. Prioritizes enemies stuck with Essence Flux.
abilities.mobaDesc: Ezreal blinks to the target location and fires a homing blot of energy to the nearest target. This deals magic damage and reveals them briefly. It prioritizes targets marked by his W.

abilities.name: Trueshot Barrage
abilities.riotDesc: Ezreal winds up before firing a powerful barrage of energy that deals massive damage to each unit it passes through (damage is reduced for minions and non-epic monsters).
abilities.mobaDesc: Ezreal fires a Projectile in the target direction which deals damage to enemies it passes through. It will also reveal the area that it flies through.

combos.description: When slightly further away E forward then instantly Q AA. During the AA downtime W and continue to AA until your Q is back up.
Quickly trade with W then instantly E foward, Q and AA.
If you land a Q and want to all in. Q then E forward and AA. During the AA downtime use W so that your next AA procs it

Fiddlesticks.name: Fiddlesticks
Fiddlesticks.title: the Ancient Fear
Fiddlesticks.blurb: Something has awoken in Runeterra. Something ancient. Something terrible. The ageless horror known as Fiddlesticks stalks the edges of mortal society, drawn to areas thick with paranoia where it feeds upon terrorized victims. Wielding a jagged scythe...

abilities.name: A Harmless Scarecrow
abilities.mobaDesc: Fiddlesticks' trinket is replaced by scarecrow effigies.

abilities.name: Terrify
abilities.riotDesc: Fiddlesticks damaging enemies with spells while unseen or targeting an enemy with Terrify's activation strikes a target unit with fear, causing it to flee in terror for a duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: When Fiddlesticks has been out of combat for at least 2.5 seconds and is unseen by the enemy team, or when he is pretending to be an effigy, his next damaging ability will Fear all targets struck. He cannot fear them again for a certain duration. Active: Deals magic damage and fears a target enemy. If that target has been feared previously, he will deal double damage to them instead.

abilities.name: Bountiful Harvest
abilities.riotDesc: Fiddlesticks drains health from nearby enemies, dealing bonus execute damage at the end of the duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fiddlesticks tethers himself to all nearby enemies and channels. During the channel, enemies are revealed and he deals magic damage to them every 0.25 seconds. The last tick deals additional magic damage. Fiddlesticks also heals for a percentage of the pre-mitigation damage dealt which is reduced massively against minions. If the channel was not interrupted, 60% of the remaining cooldown is refunded.

abilities.name: Reap
abilities.riotDesc: Fiddlesticks slashes an area with its scythe, slowing all enemies hit and silencing enemies hit in the center of the slash.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slashes all enemies in the target area with his scythe, dealing magic damage and slowing enemies hit for 1.25 seconds. Enemies hit in the center of the area are also silenced for 1.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Crowstorm
abilities.riotDesc: A murder of crows flock wildly around Fiddlesticks, dealing damage per second to all enemy units in the area.
abilities.mobaDesc: After channeling for 1.5 seconds, Fiddlesticks will blink to a target location and deal magic damage to nearby enemies every 0.25 seconds, for 5 seconds.

combos.description: While pretending to be an Effigy cast E, then instantly R. After landing cast Q W quickly.
For a quick combo Q then instantly E W.
When out of your target's vision, E then instantly Q W.

Fiora.name: Fiora
Fiora.title: the Grand Duelist
Fiora.blurb: The most feared duelist in all Valoran, Fiora is as renowned for her brusque manner and cunning mind as she is for the speed of her bluesteel rapier. Born to House Laurent in the kingdom of Demacia, Fiora took control of the family from her father in...

abilities.name: Duelist's Dance
abilities.mobaDesc: Fiora reveals vitals of nearby visible champions. These linger for 13.25 seconds and a new vital shows up after the first one is destroyed or times out. Any attack or damaging ability against a vital will trigger it and will deal a portion of the target's maximum health as true damage, heal Fiora and grant her Movement Speed that decays over 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Lunge
abilities.riotDesc: Fiora lunges in a direction and stabs a nearby enemy, dealing physical damage and applying on-hit effects.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes a short distance in the target direction and deals physical damage to an enemy if they are present near Fiora arrival location. It can also damage structures and wards and reduces the cooldown of the ability if she hits an enemy.

abilities.name: Riposte
abilities.riotDesc: Fiora parries all incoming damage and disables for a short time, then stabs in a direction. This stab slows the first enemy champion hit, or stuns them if Fiora blocked an immobilizing effect with this ability.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fiora strikes in a target direction for 0.75 seconds, during which she can't do anything else but becomes invulnerable to non-turret damage and gains crowd control and debuff immunity. After the duration, Fiora stabs her sword forward and deals magic damage in a line. This will slow and cripple the first enemy struck by 50% for 2 seconds. If Fiora parries at least one immobilizing effect, this ability will stun the target instead.

abilities.name: Bladework
abilities.riotDesc: Fiora has increased attack speed for the next two attacks. The first attack slows the target, and the second attack will critically strike.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fiora's next two basic attacks will gain bonus range and attack speed. The first attack slows the target and the second attack will critically strike. The second attack deals reduced critical damage.

abilities.name: Grand Challenge
abilities.riotDesc: Fiora reveals all four Vitals on an enemy champion and gains Move Speed while near them. If Fiora hits all four Vitals or if the target dies after she has hit at least one, Fiora and her allies in the area are healed over the next few seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Increases her Passive bonus Movement Speed. Active: Fiora challenges an enemy champion for 8 seconds, highlighting all their vitals. If she triggers at least on vital before the target dies, or triggers all four of them, she creates a zone that heals all allied units in it for a few seconds.

combos.description: Quickly trade making use of your E Auto Attack reset. AA and instantly Q. E after it lands then AA.
You can also trade by using W earlier in the combo. Q and instantly AA W, followed by an AA E with an AA as a finisher.
Your normal trade will be using Q to proc a vital and instantly AA E followed by a W, with an AA after it finishes.

Fizz.name: Fizz
Fizz.title: the Tidal Trickster
Fizz.blurb: Fizz is an amphibious yordle, who dwells among the reefs surrounding Bilgewater. He often retrieves and returns the tithes cast into the sea by superstitious captains, but even the saltiest of sailors know better than to cross him—for many are the tales...

abilities.name: Nimble Fighter
abilities.mobaDesc: Fizz is permanently Ghosted and takes reduced pre-mitigation damage.

abilities.name: Urchin Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Fizz dashes through his target, dealing magic damage and applying on hit effects.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes a fixed distance towards the target enemy, dealing magic damage to them along with 100% AD damage.

abilities.name: Seastone Trident
abilities.riotDesc: Fizz's attacks bleed his enemies, dealing magic damage over several seconds. Fizz can empower his next attack to deal bonus damage and empower his further attacks for a short time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Fizz's auto-attacks cause them to take magic damage every 0.5 seconds for 3 seconds which refreshes on-hit. Active: Fizz next Auto-attack deals bonus magic damage and gains bonus range. If this ability kills its target, its Cooldown is reduced to 1 second and the mana cost is refunded.

abilities.name: Playful / Trickster
abilities.riotDesc: Fizz hops into the air, landing gracefully upon his spear and becoming untargetable. From this position, Fizz can either slam the ground or choose to jump again before smashing back down.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fizz becomes untargetable and vaults to a target location. He can re-cast it after a 0.15-second delay. On re-cast, Fizz will dash towards the target location and deal magic damage to nearby enemies. If Fizz does not re-cast the spell, he will splash onto the ground below and deal magic damage whiles slowing enemies for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Chum the Waters
abilities.riotDesc: Fizz tosses a fish in a direction that attaches to any champion that touches it, slowing the target. After a short delay, a shark erupts from the ground, knocking up the target and knocking any nearby enemies aside. All enemies hit are dealt magic damage and slowed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fizz throws a lure to a target location. If this lure hits an enemy Champion, it sticks to them and after 2 seconds, a shark emerges at the position of the lure, dealing magic damage and knocking aside surrounding enemies. It also slows them for 2 seconds. The damage, slow, eruption radius and knockback distance are increases based on how far the lure travels.

combos.description: To All In from range E onto your target, then when you land AA W. Continue to AA and use Q to stay in range.
To All In early Q then AA W instantly and use E right after for damage.
The most common poke trade is to Q then AA W instantly and use E twice to quickly get out.

Galio.name: Galio
Galio.title: the Colossus
Galio.blurb: Outside the gleaming city of Demacia, the stone colossus Galio keeps vigilant watch. Built as a bulwark against enemy mages, he often stands motionless for decades until the presence of powerful magic stirs him to life. Once activated, Galio makes the...

abilities.name: Colossal Smash
abilities.mobaDesc: Galio's next attack deals bonus magic damage to its target and all enemies around it. The attack is Unstoppable in nature.

abilities.name: Winds of War
abilities.riotDesc: Galio fires two windblasts that converge into a large tornado that deals damage over time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Galio fires two windblasts in an arc which converge to the target area, dealing magic damage to all enemies they pass through. Once they meet, the gusts form a tornado that lasts and advances for 2 seconds, dealing magic damage every 0.5 seconds to every enemy within it.

abilities.name: Shield of Durand
abilities.riotDesc: Galio charges a defensive stance, moving slowly. Upon releasing the charge, Galio will taunt and damage nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: After learning this ability or not taking damage for 12 seconds, Galio gains a magic damage shield. Active: Galio charges for up to 3 seconds, slowing himself by 15% and gaining magic damage reduction and half of that amount as physical damage reduction. Charging it will increase the radius, damage, and taunt duration. This ability can be recast within 3 seconds. On re-casting, Galio taunts nearby enemy champions and reduces their Movement Speed to a static value of 60 for a brief duration. Affected enemies take magic damage as well.

abilities.name: Justice Punch
abilities.riotDesc: Galio will briefly step back and charge, knocking up the first enemy champion he encounters.
abilities.mobaDesc: Galio dashes forward and stops after dashing a certain distance. He will instantly stop if he hits an enemy champion, will deal magic damage to them while knocking them up for 0.75 seconds.

abilities.name: Hero's Entrance
abilities.riotDesc: Galio designates an ally's position as his landing spot, granting all allies in the area a magic shield. After a delay Galio smashes down location, knocking up nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Galio designates and allied champion's location and grants the W Passive shield to them as well as all the allied champions in the area he cast it at for 5 seconds while channeling for 2.75 seconds. After a delay of 1.25 seconds, Galio leaps into the air and dashes to the same location. He will knock up all nearby enemies and will deal magic damage to them.

combos.description: While at a short range, E backwards to hit your target then instantly Q AA. Cast W and wait to recast until after it's fully charged then AA.
For quick burst damage, E your target then instantly Q as you arrive. Quickly cast and recast W, then AA.
When ganking or helping an ally, R to a teammate then upon landing cast W. Recast W whenever you like and instantly Q E AA as quickly as you can on your main target.

Gangplank.name: Gangplank
Gangplank.title: the Saltwater Scourge
Gangplank.blurb: As unpredictable as he is brutal, the dethroned reaver king Gangplank is feared far and wide. Once, he ruled the port city of Bilgewater, and while his reign is over, there are those who believe this has only made him more dangerous. Gangplank would see...

abilities.name: Trial by Fire
abilities.mobaDesc: Gangplank periodically empowers his next Auto-Attack to burn the target. It deals bonus true damage over 2.5 seconds, ticking every 0.25 seconds. If Gangplank successfully hits a target with his Passive empowered auto-attack, he gains bonus movement speed for 2 seconds. Destroying a Powder Keg resets the Cooldown of his Passive and grants its movement speed.

abilities.name: Parrrley
abilities.riotDesc: Shoots target, plundering Gold for each enemy unit killed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shoots thee target enemy, dealing physical damage, and applying on-hit and on-attack effects. This ability can critically strike. If this ability kills the target, Gangplank plunders gold and Silver Serpents. He can use his Silver Serpents to upgrade his Ultimate.

abilities.name: Remove Scurvy
abilities.riotDesc: Eats citrus to cure crowd control effects and restore Health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Consumes Oranges that cleanses him from all Crowd Control. It also heals him for an amount.

abilities.name: Powder Keg
abilities.riotDesc: Gangplank uncovers a powder keg at target location. If he attacks it, it explodes, spreading the attack's damage to enemies in the area, slowing them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Periodically stocks a Powder Keg, up to a maximum of 3. Active: Places a Keg at the target location for up to 25 seconds, which connects to nearby Powder Kegs with an overlapping explosion radius. Gangplank and his enemies can attack the Powder Keg with auto attacks, dealing one damage per hit. Gangplank may also shoot the barrel with his Q. If Gangplank gets the killing blow, it explodes, also triggering a chain reaction that explodes nearby connected kegs. The Keg is destroyed safely if the enemy kills it. The exploding Kegs deal bonus Physical damage against champions whilst ignoring 40% of each enemy's armor, and slows them for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Cannon Barrage
abilities.riotDesc: Gangplank signals his ship to bombard an area, slowing and damaging enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gangplank calls down 12 waves of cannonballs in clusters of 3 at a target location for 8 seconds. The location is revealed and each wave deals magic damage to all enemies within the area while slowing them by 30% for a small duration. Gangplank can upgrade this ability with his Silver Serpents. The upgrades are as follows: Death's Daughter: An initial cannonball lands at the center of the area, dealing a cluster's worth of true damage to all enemies it hits and slowing them by 60% for 1.5 seconds. Raise Morale: The barrage area gives allies bonus Movement Speed which persists for 2 seconds after leaving it. Fire at Will: Fires 6 more waves during the duration of the Ultimate.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Passively gains 1 An icon for Gangplank's ability Silver Serpents Silver Serpent per second.

combos.description: Use your E and Q your target. Then AA, AA, AA your barrel, AA your target, Q them and AA to finish.
Press your E, then AA, AA, Q your barrel and finish with another AA.

Garen.name: Garen
Garen.title: The Might of Demacia
Garen.blurb: A proud and noble warrior, Garen fights as one of the Dauntless Vanguard. He is popular among his fellows, and respected well enough by his enemies—not least as a scion of the prestigious Crownguard family, entrusted with defending Demacia and its...

abilities.name: Perseverance
abilities.mobaDesc: Garen regenerates 1.5%-10.1% (based on level) of his maximum health every 5 seconds. This is interrupted for 8 seconds if Garen takes damage from any source other than minions and small monsters.

abilities.name: Decisive Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Garen gains a burst of Move Speed, breaking free of all slows affecting him. His next attack strikes a vital area of his foe, dealing bonus damage and silencing them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Garen removes all slows on him and gains 30% bonus movement speed for a few seconds. Garen's next auto-attack within the next 4.5 seconds will deal bonus physical damage and will silence the target for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Courage
abilities.riotDesc: Garen passively increases his Armor and Magic Resist by killing enemies. He may also activate this ability to give him a shield and tenacity for a brief moment followed by a lesser amount of damage reduction for a longer duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Garen permanently gains 0.25 bonus armor and magic resistance every time he kills an enemy. This stacks up to a maximum of 30 bonus resistances. After reaching this threshold, his armor and magic resistance is increased by 10%. Active: Reduces incoming damage by 30% for a few seconds and gains a shield and 60% tenacity for the first 0.75 seconds.

abilities.name: Judgment
abilities.riotDesc: Garen rapidly spins his sword around his body, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Garen becomes ghosted and spins like a Beyblade. He spins 7 times over 3 seconds, dealing physical damage with each spin. Enemy champions hit six times will have their armor reduced by 25% for 6 seconds. Further hits refresh the duration of the debuff and after 1 second, this ability can be cast again. Recasting it will end this ability earlier.

abilities.name: Demacian Justice
abilities.riotDesc: Garen calls upon the might of Demacia to attempt to execute an enemy champion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Garen selects a target enemy champion, dealing them with true damage. The target is revealed for 1 second, starting from the beginning of the cast time.

balance.otherEffects: W: Bonus resistances on-kill changed to 0.4. Number of enemy kills needed to reach the maximum amount changed to 75.

combos.description: Your most simple trade is to Q instantly after your first AA then E.
When close to an opponent E then Q R instantly after your AA finishes.
To fight normally activate Q to gain movespeed then AA E, once E finishes AA again and execute with R.

Gnar.name: Gnar
Gnar.title: the Missing Link
Gnar.blurb: Gnar is a primeval yordle whose playful antics can erupt into a toddler's outrage in an instant, transforming him into a massive beast bent on destruction. Frozen in True Ice for millennia, the curious creature broke free and now hops about a changed...

abilities.name: Rage Gene
abilities.mobaDesc: Mini Gnar: When in mini form, Gnar gains bonus Movement Speed, attack range, attack speed growth and attack speed Rage Gene: Mini Gnar generates Rage over 2 seconds upon dealing or taking damage. At maximum rage, casting an ability or waiting for 4 seconds will transform him into Mega Gnar for 15 seconds. After that, Gnar will return to Mini form and his Rage Gene Passive will be placed on a 15 second Cooldown. Mega Gnar: Gains a different set of abilities and gains increased AD, Health, armor, and magic resistance. He simultaneously loses the mini form bonuses.

abilities.name: Boomerang Throw / Boulder Toss
abilities.riotDesc:
Gnar throws a boomerang that damages and slows enemies it hits before returning to him. If he catches the boomerang its cooldown is reduced.

Mega Gnar instead throws a boulder that stops on the first unit hit, damaging and slowing everything nearby. It can then be picked up to reduce the cooldown.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gnar throws a boomerang forward in a line that deals physical damage and slows enemies for 2 seconds. The boomerang returns to Gnar in a fixed-line after reaching its maximum range or hitting an enemy, dealing 50% damage to subsequent targets. Catching the boomerang while in mid-air refunds 40% of its Cooldown maximum cooldown.

abilities.name: Hyper / Wallop
abilities.riotDesc:
Gnar's attacks and spells hype him up, dealing bonus damage and granting him Move Speed.

Mega Gnar is too enraged to be hyper and instead can rear up on his hind legs and smash down on the area in front of him, stunning enemies in an area.
abilities.mobaDesc: Every Hyper 2 third attack or ability on the same target within 3.5 seconds deals bonus magic damage and grants bonus Movement Speed.

abilities.name: Hop / Crunch
abilities.riotDesc:
Gnar leaps to a location and bounces off the head of any unit he lands on, traveling further.

Mega Gnar is too large to bounce and instead lands with earth-shattering force, dealing damage in an area around him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gnar leaps to a target location, gaining bonus attack speed for 4 seconds. If Gnar lands on a unit he will bounce further in the same direction. Landing on an enemy deals physical damage and slows them by 80% for 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: GNAR!
abilities.riotDesc: Mega Gnar throws everything around him in a chosen direction, dealing damage and slowing them. Any enemy that hits a wall is stunned and takes bonus damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Mini Gnar: Increases W's bonus movement speed Mega Gnar: Knocks back nearby enemies in a target direction, dealing physical damage and slowing them by an amount. Enemies that hit terrain take 50% bonus damage and are stunned instead.

combos.description: AA, then E, Q and AA to finish.

Gragas.name: Gragas
Gragas.title: the Rabble Rouser
Gragas.blurb: Equal parts jolly and imposing, Gragas is a massive, rowdy brewmaster who's always on the lookout for new ways to raise everyone's spirits. Hailing from parts unknown, he searches for ingredients among the unblemished wastes of the Freljord to help him...

abilities.name: Happy Hour
abilities.mobaDesc: Gragas periodically heals for 6% of his maximum health upon using an ability.

abilities.name: Barrel Roll
abilities.riotDesc: Gragas rolls his cask to a location, which can be activated to explode or will explode on its own after 4 seconds. The potency of the explosion increases over time. Enemies struck by the blast have their Move Speed slowed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gragas rolls a cask to the target location, granting sight around it, and it stays for 2 seconds, increasing its damage and Slow strength, up to a maximum of 150%. Barrel Roll can be recast after the cask has fully traveled. After 4 seconds the cask detonates, dealing magic damage to all surrounding enemies, slowing them in the process.

abilities.name: Drunken Rage
abilities.riotDesc: Gragas samples his latest brew for 1 second. After finishing, he becomes boisterous and belligerent, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies on his next basic attack and reducing damage received.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gragas channels for 0.75 seconds, drinking out of his cask and reducing incoming damage for 2.5 seconds. Upon completing the channel, Gragas' next basic attack within 5 seconds gains 50 bonus range and deals bonus magic damage to the target and nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Body Slam
abilities.riotDesc: Gragas charges to a location and collides with the first enemy unit he comes across, dealing damage to all nearby enemy units and stunning them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gragas Dash charges forward, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies upon colliding with one, as well as knocking them back and stunning them for 1 second. If Gragas hits an enemy with it, the cooldown of the ability is reduced by 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Explosive Cask
abilities.riotDesc: Gragas hurls his cask to a location, dealing damage and knocking back enemies caught in the blast radius.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gragas hurls a cask that travels to the target location over 0.55 seconds and explodes on impact, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies and knocking them back from the center of the explosion. It does not knock units through terrain.

combos.description: Use your Q and instantly W.

Graves.name: Graves
Graves.title: the Outlaw
Graves.blurb: Malcolm Graves is a renowned mercenary, gambler, and thief—a wanted man in every city and empire he has visited. Even though he has an explosive temper, he possesses a strict sense of criminal honor, often enforced at the business end of his...

abilities.name: New Destiny
abilities.mobaDesc: Graves' shotgun has some unique properties. He must reload when he runs out of ammo. Attacks fire 4 bullets, which cannot pass through units. Non-champions struck by multiple bullets are knocked back.

abilities.name: End of the Line
abilities.riotDesc: Graves fires an explosive shell that detonates after 1 second, or after colliding with terrain.
abilities.mobaDesc: Graves fires a round in the target direction that deals physical damage to all enemies it passes through and leaves behind a powder trail. After 2 seconds, or 0.25 after hitting terrain, the round detonates, dealing physical damage to all enemies in a wide area and in a reverse wave along the initial powder trail.

abilities.name: Smoke Screen
abilities.riotDesc: Graves fires a smoke canister at the target area creating a cloud of smoke that reduces sight range. Enemies caught in the initial impact are dealt magic damage and have their Move Speed reduced briefly.
abilities.mobaDesc: Graves fires a smoke canister at the target area, dealing magic damage and slowing enemies upon impact by 50% for 0.5 seconds. The canister will then create a smokescreen in that area for 4 seconds and will apply near sight to all enemies within.

abilities.name: Quickdraw
abilities.riotDesc: Graves dashes forward gaining an Armor and Magic Resist boost for several seconds. If Graves dashes towards an enemy champion, gain two stacks of True Grit instead. Hitting enemies with basic attacks lowers the cooldown of this skill and refreshes the resistance boost.
abilities.mobaDesc: Graves Dash dashes in the target direction, resetting his auto-attack timer and reloading one shell while gaining a stack of 'True Grit' for 4 seconds, stacking up to 8 times. Dashing towards an enemy grants 2 stacks of True Grit. TRUE GRIT: Graves gains bonus armor. Attacks versus non-minions will refresh the duration of True Grit.

abilities.name: Collateral Damage
abilities.riotDesc: Graves fires an explosive shell dealing heavy damage to the first champion it hits. After hitting a champion or reaching the end of its range, the shell explodes dealing damage in a cone.
abilities.mobaDesc: Graves fires an explosive shell in the target direction which deals physical damage to all enemies hit while also recoiling Graves in the opposite direction. After hitting an enemy champion or reaching the end of its range, the shell explodes to deal 80% of its original damage in a cone. The same unit won't take damage from both the shell and the explosion.

combos.description: When fighting any opponent AA twice then E towards your target, Q instantly and use your final AA right after.
To All In before level 6 W your target, then quickly AA and E to reposition. AA Q and AA again.

Gwen.name: Gwen
Gwen.title: The Hallowed Seamstress
Gwen.blurb: A former doll transformed and brought to life by magic, Gwen wields the very tools that once created her. She carries the weight of her maker's love with every step, taking nothing for granted. At her command is the Hallowed Mist, an ancient and...

abilities.name: A Thousand Cuts
abilities.mobaDesc: Gwen’s basic attacks and abilities deal 1% of the enemies maximum health and heal her for some of the damage dealt.

abilities.name: Snip Snip!
abilities.riotDesc: Gwen snips her scissors in a cone up to 6 times dealing magic damage. Gwen deals true damage to units in the center and applies her passive to them on each snip.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Gwens basic attacks on-attack grant a stack. Gwen deals damage in a cone in a target direction. The center of the snip deals true damage, and applies Thousand Cuts. If she has any stacks, she consumes each of them. The final snip deals more damage.

abilities.name: Hallowed Mist
abilities.riotDesc: Gwen summons mist that protects her from enemies outside of it. She can only be targeted by enemies who enter the mist.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gwen Summons a mist around her. While inside the mist, she gains bonus armor and MR, and is untargetable to enemies apart from towers outside the mist. Recasting this ability or using your dash will move the mist to her new location.

abilities.name: Skip 'n Slash
abilities.riotDesc: Gwen dashes a short distance then gains Attack Speed, attack range, and magic damage <OnHit>On-Hit</OnHit> for a few seconds. If she hits an enemy during that time, this Ability's cooldown is partially refunded.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: Gwen dashes to a target location. For the next 4 seconds, she gains bonus on-hit damage, range and attack speed. The first auto-attack she uses refunds 50% of the cooldown. It is also a reset timer, and she can cast it during any one of her abilities.

abilities.name: Needlework
abilities.riotDesc:
Gwen hurls a needle that slows enemies hit, deals magic damage, and applies A Thousand Cuts to champions hit.

This ability can be cast up to two more times, with each cast throwing additional needles and dealing more damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gwen launches a needle in a target direction, dealing damage and slowing the enemies hit. Gwens next basic attack or hit of her Q within 6 seconds allows her to recast this ability. She can recast this ability multiple times.

combos.description: Start with an AA, then E and AA again, then Q and AA to finish.

Hecarim.name: Hecarim
Hecarim.title: the Shadow of War
Hecarim.blurb: Hecarim is a spectral fusion of man and beast, cursed to ride down the souls of the living for all eternity. When the Blessed Isles fell into shadow, this proud knight was obliterated by the destructive energies of the Ruination, along with all his...

abilities.name: Warpath
abilities.mobaDesc: Hecarim gains 15%-30% of his bonus Movement Speed as bonus Attack damage.

abilities.name: Rampage
abilities.riotDesc: Hecarim cleaves nearby enemies dealing physical damage. If Hecarim damages at least one enemy, he increases the damage and lowers the cooldown of subsequent Rampages.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hecarim cleaves nearby enemies, dealing physical damage. Damaging at least one enemy with this ability will reduce its cooldown by 1 second while increasing the damage by 5% for a few seconds. This effect stacks twice.

abilities.name: Spirit of Dread
abilities.riotDesc: Hecarim gains Armor and Magic Resist. Hecarim deals magic damage to nearby enemies, and gains Health equal to a percentage of any damage those enemies suffer.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hecarim surrounds himself with the spirit of dread for 4 seconds, dealing magic damage per second to all enemies within the AOE circle. While Spirit of Dread is active, Hecarim is healed for 30% of the damage taken by enemies from any source within the area.

abilities.name: Devastating Charge
abilities.riotDesc: Hecarim gains increasing Move Speed and can move through units for a short duration. His next attack knocks the target back and deals additional physical damage based on the distance he has traveled since activating the ability.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hecarim becomes ghosted and gains Movement speed icon 25% − 100% (based on time active) bonus movement speed for 4 seconds. While in effect, Hecarim's next basic attack is empowered to gain bonus range and cause him to dash to the target's direction, knocking back the target if they are within range of Hecarim and dealing bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Onslaught of Shadows
abilities.riotDesc: Hecarim summons spectral riders and charges forward, dealing magic damage in a line. Hecarim creates a shockwave when he finishes his charge, causing nearby enemies to flee in terror.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hecarim summons spectral riders and dashes unstoppably in the target direction with them, dealing magic damage to all enemies in their path. Enemies within range of where Hecarim stops are also made to flee from him, also gradually slowing them by up to 99% over the duration.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done increased by 20%. Ability haste increased by 10. E: Cooldown changed to 16 / 15 / 14 / 13 / 12 seconds.

combos.description: In a shorter fight with R you should E and run at your target, R then mid air W and AA your target. Quickly Q followed by an AA.
For prolonged fights E and run at your target, then W right as you get in range and AA. Q as soon as it connects then AA and R behind your target followed by an AA right after.
To fake-out your enemy when engaging E then run behind your target. When you get in range W and Q but only AA once you are behind your target.

Heimerdinger.name: Heimerdinger
Heimerdinger.title: the Revered Inventor
Heimerdinger.blurb: The eccentric Professor Cecil B. Heimerdinger is one of the most innovative and esteemed inventors the world has ever known. As the longest serving member of the Council of Piltover, he saw the best and the worst of the city's unending desire for...

abilities.name: Hextech Affinity
abilities.mobaDesc: Heimerdinger gains 20% bonus movement speed while near allied turrets or his Q turrets.

abilities.name: H-28 G Evolution Turret
abilities.riotDesc: Heimerdinger lays down a rapid-fire cannon turret equipped with a secondary pass-through beam attack (turrets deal half damage to towers).
abilities.mobaDesc: PASSIVE: Heimerdinger periodically stocks a Turret Kit, up to a maximum of 3. ACTIVE: Heimerdinger deploys an H-28G Evolution Turret at the target location. Up to 3 H-28G Evolution Turrets can be deployed at a time, and deploying a fourth turret destroys the oldest one. Upgrade: Heimerdinger deploys a H-28Q Apex Turret at the target location, which lasts for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Hextech Micro-Rockets
abilities.riotDesc: Heimerdinger fires long-range rockets that converge on his cursor.
abilities.mobaDesc: Heimerdinger unleashes a wave of 5 rockets that converge to the target location and fan beyond it up to a maximum range, with each rocket dealing magic damage to the first enemy it hits. Enemies can be hit by multiple rockets, with each one beyond the first dealing reduced damage. Upgrade: Heimerdinger launches 4 waves of rockets in quick succession, each rocket dealing magic damage. Enemy champions and monsters are dealt reduced damage from rockets beyond the first, and further reduced beyond the fifth.

abilities.name: CH-2 Electron Storm Grenade
abilities.riotDesc: Heimerdinger lobs a grenade at a location, dealing damage to enemy units, as well as stunning anyone directly hit and slowing surrounding units.
abilities.mobaDesc: Heimerdinger hurls a grenade at the target location, dealing magic damage upon impact to all nearby enemies and slowing them by 35% for 2 seconds. If the grenade hits an enemy champion all Q turrets near it will gain 100% beam charge. Enemies at the center of the grenade will be stunned for 1.5 seconds. Upgrade: Heimerdinger hurls a massive grenade at the target location that bounces a fixed distance 3 times, exploding each time at twice the radius. Enemy champions can only be damaged once per cast, but can be slowed and stunned multiple times.

abilities.name: UPGRADE!!!
abilities.riotDesc: Heimerdinger invents an upgrade, causing his next spell to have increased effects.
abilities.mobaDesc: Heimerdinger empowers his next basic ability, placing it on the same cooldown as its basic form, modifying its damage and making it free to cast. Upgrade can be recast after 3 seconds. Recast: Heimerdinger ends Upgrade and puts it on a 3-second cooldown.

combos.description: To quickly poke out your target E then W AA.
To make use of your turret procs E then instantly Q, AA then quickly Q W followed by another AA.
For a quick burst combo E then instantly Q W followed by an AA.

Hwei.name: Hwei
Hwei.title: the Visionary
Hwei.blurb: Hwei is a brooding painter who creates brilliant art in order to confront Ionia's criminals and comfort their victims. Beneath his melancholy roils a torn, emotional mind—haunted by both the vibrant visions of his imagination and the gruesome memories...

abilities.name: Signature of the Visionary
abilities.mobaDesc: Hwei marks enemy champions with his signature finishing touch by first damaging them with his abilities. Hitting an enemy with two damage-dealing spells places Hwei’s signature on the ground beneath them. The signature detonates after a short delay, dealing magic damage to all enemies in range.

abilities.name: Subject: Disaster
abilities.riotDesc:
Hwei envisions a series of disasters, allowing him to paint a devastating blow.

This ability replaces Hwei's abilities with damaging abilities: Devastating Fire, Severing Bolt, and Molten Fissure.
abilities.mobaDesc:
Hwei paints visions of disaster that deals a large amount of damage to enemies.
**Devastating Fire (QQ)**
Hwei paints a blazing fireball that flies out in the target direction. It explodes on the first enemy hit or at maximum range, dealing magic damage plus percent max health magic damage to all enemies in an area.
**Severing Bolt (QW)**
Hwei paints a long-range, devastating bolt at the target location. After a delay, the bolt strikes, dealing magic damage. Immobilized or isolated enemies take increased damage based on missing health.
**Molten Fissure (QE)**
Hwei paints a field of exploding volcanic eruptions, creating lingering lava in its path. Every eruption deals magic damage to enemies hit. Enemies in the lava area are dealt magic damage per second and are slowed.

abilities.name: Subject: Serenity
abilities.riotDesc:
Hwei envisions a series of serenities, allowing him to paint invigorating settings.

This ability replaces Hwei's abilities with utility abilities: Fleeting Current, Pool of Reflection, and Stirring Lights.
abilities.mobaDesc:
Hwei paints visions of serenity that provides utility for himself and allied champions.

**Fleeting Current (WQ)**
Hwei paints a current of swift waters in a line for a few seconds that grants movement speed to himself and allies.
**Pool of Reflection (WW)**
Hwei forms a protective pool at the target location that lasts for a few seconds. Allied champions inside the area gain an immediate shield, increasing in value over a few seconds while in the area.
**Stirring Lights (WE)**
Hwei paints three swirling lights that circle him for several seconds. Hwei's next 3 attacks or spells deal bonus magic damage and grant mana on hit.

abilities.name: Subject: Torment
abilities.riotDesc:
Hwei envisions a series of torments, allowing him to paint controlling visages.

This ability replaces Hwei's abilities with crowd control abilities: Grim Visage, Gaze of the Abyss, and Crushing Maw.
abilities.mobaDesc:
Hwei paints visions of torment that control enemies.

**Grim Visage (EQ)**
Hwei launches a terrifying face that strikes the first enemy hit, dealing magic damage and causing them to flee for a brief duration.
**Gaze of the Abyss (EW)**
Hwei paints an abyssal eye at the target location that grants vision and locks onto the nearest visible enemy champion. After a short delay, the eye fires at the locked-on champion, rooting the first enemy in its path for a few seconds and dealing magic damage to them.
**Crushing Maw (EE)**
Hwei paints crushing jaws that deal magic damage to enemies hit and pulls them toward the center, slowing them by a set amount that quickly decays.

abilities.name: Spiraling Despair
abilities.riotDesc: Hwei paints a vision of pure despair. The first enemy champion struck becomes the center of an expanding painting that slows and damages nearby enemies. The vision explodes after reaching its maximum size or when the champion dies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hwei launches a vision of pure despair that sticks to an enemy champion for a few seconds. The vision expands and overwhelms all enemies it touches, dealing magic damage per second. Enemies within the zone are afflicted with stacks of Despair over time. Each stack of Despair applies a stacking percent slow. Upon completion, the vision shatters, dealing magic damage.

balance.otherEffects: Q: Deals 80% damage to minions (60% total). W: Deals 80% damage to minions (60% total). E: Deals 80% damage to minions (60% total). (ALL ABILITIES AFFECTED)

Illaoi.name: Illaoi
Illaoi.title: the Kraken Priestess
Illaoi.blurb: Illaoi's powerful physique is dwarfed only by her indomitable faith. As the prophet of the Great Kraken, she uses a huge, golden idol to rip her foes' spirits from their bodies and shatter their perception of reality. All who challenge the “Truth Bearer...

abilities.name: Prophet of an Elder God
abilities.mobaDesc: Periodically, Illaoi spawns a Tentacle on a nearby impassable terrain if no other Tentacles are nearby. Tentacles fully spawn after a 2-second delay and are untargetable for that time. Tentacles deal bonus physical damage to all enemies that it strikes when commanded to attack by her abilities. If the Tentacle hits at least one enemy champion, Illaoi will also heal up for 5% of her missing health.

abilities.name: Tentacle Smash
abilities.riotDesc: Increases the damage dealt by Tentacles. When activated, Illaoi smashes down a Tentacle that deals physical damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Tentacles deal increased damage. Active: Illaoi summons a tentacle that slams down in the target direction, dealing physical damage before disappearing.

abilities.name: Harsh Lesson
abilities.riotDesc: Illaoi leaps to her target, dealing physical damage and causing nearby Tentacles to also swing at the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Illaoi's next auto-attack gains bonus range, bonus physical damage, and commands all Tentacles in range to attack her target. She will leap to her target if they are beyond her Auto-Attack range.

abilities.name: Test of Spirit
abilities.riotDesc: Illaoi rips the spirit from a foe's body, forcing it to stand before her. Spirits echo a percentage of the damage they take to the original target. If killed, or if the target gets too far from the spirit, the target will become a <font color='#669900'>Vessel</font> and begin spawning Tentacles.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a projectile in the target direction, which stops upon hitting an enemy champion or reaching the maximum range. On hitting a champion, their spirit is pulled in front of Illaoi and the target is tetherd to the Spirit for a few seconds. When the Spirit is killed or the target moves too far away, the tether is severed, marking the target as a Vessel for 10 seconds, revealing the area around them for a few seconds, and slowing them massively. Any tentacle within the range of the target will attack them and a tentacle will also spawn periodically near the target.

abilities.name: Leap of Faith
abilities.riotDesc: Illaoi smashes her idol into the ground, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies. A Tentacle spawns for each enemy champion hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slams her idol on the ground, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies. An additional Tentacle is summoned for 8 seconds for every enemy champion hit. The tentacles attack rapidly and are untargetable while the ability is active.

combos.description: For a long fight with the spirit W AA and instantly E Q, then AA until your W is back up.
If you're in a longer fight AA W quickly then instantly Q AA. Follow up with E and AA the spirit until it dies.
For your basic trade without E, W AA then instantly Q AA right after the dash.

Irelia.name: Irelia
Irelia.title: the Blade Dancer
Irelia.blurb: The Noxian occupation of Ionia produced many heroes, none more unlikely than young Irelia of Navori. Trained in the ancient dances of her province, she adapted her art for war, using the graceful and carefully practised movements to levitate a host of...

abilities.name: Ionian Fervor
abilities.mobaDesc: Irelia gains a single stack of Ionian Fervor for every enemy champion hit by her abilities, or if she hits at least one non-champion. This effect stacks up to 4 times and lasts for 6 seconds. Auto-Attacks against enemy champions and large/epic monsters will refresh the duration. Ionian Fervor: Gains 10%-25%(based on level) bonus attack speed per stack. At maximum stacks, her Auto-Attacks will deal bonus magic damage on-hit.

abilities.name: Bladesurge
abilities.riotDesc: Irelia dashes forward to strike her target, healing herself. If the target is Marked or dies to Bladesurge, its cooldown refreshes.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Enemy champions and monsters hit by her E or Ultimate's initial cast are marked for 5 seconds Active: Dashes to the target enemy, dealing physical damage while healing herself and applying on-hit effects. The cooldown of the ability is essentially reset if she hits a mark afflicted target or kills a target upon Q'ing on them.

abilities.name: Defiant Dance
abilities.riotDesc: Irelia charges a strike that deals more damage as she charges. She takes reduced physical damage during the charge.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges up for 1.5 seconds, during when she is unable to move but takes reduced physical damage. It can be re-cast before the entire duration and cannot be interrupted by crowd control. At the end of the duration, or upon re-casting, Irelia swipes with her blades in the target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies around her in a line.

abilities.name: Flawless Duet
abilities.riotDesc: Irelia sends out two blades which converge on each other. Enemies caught in between are damaged, stunned and Marked.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sends a blade to a target location which lasts for 3.5 seconds. Irelia can send out a second blade at a position of her choice in the same 3.5 seconds. On placing both the blades, they fly towards each other, dealing magic damage and stunning all enemies between those two blade. It applies a Q Passive mark as well.

abilities.name: Vanguard's Edge
abilities.riotDesc: Irelia fires a massive number of blades that explode outward upon hitting an enemy champion. Enemies hit by the blades are damaged and Marked. Afterwards the blades form a wall that will damage and slow enemies that walk through it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Launches a barrage of blades in the target direction, which expands outward upon hitting an enemy champion and dealing magic damage to all enemies hit. After expanding, the blades drop on the ground and knock all units away from them and forms a spade-shaped perimeter around the enemy champion hit. Enemies that pass through the blade take magic damage and are slowed massively for a brief duration.

Ivern.name: Ivern
Ivern.title: the Green Father
Ivern.blurb: Ivern Bramblefoot, known to many as the Green Father, is a peculiar half man, half tree who roams Runeterra's forests, cultivating life everywhere he goes. He knows the secrets of the natural world, and holds deep friendships with all things that grow...

abilities.name: Friend of the Forest
abilities.mobaDesc: Ivern cannot attack nor damage non-epic monsters. Instead, targeting a Jungle camp initiates a channel that places the monsters within a grove. Placing a grove costs Ivern a portion of his Health and Mana. This Grove matures over time and once fully matured, Ivern can interact with the camp to free the monsters while receiving full gold and experience. Smiting a large monster within a grove will instantly free the camp's monsters, regardless of its maturity or th Monster's HP. Starting at level 5, freeing the Red Brambleback or the Blue Sentinel leaves behind a sapling for 1 minute that can be picked up by an allied champion to gain the camp's buff. If an ally kills either monster, they also leave behind a sapling that only Ivern can consume.

abilities.name: Rootcaller
abilities.riotDesc: Ivern conjures a vine, dealing damage and rooting enemy targets hit. Ivern's allies can dash to the rooted target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a projectile in the target direction, dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit and rooting them for a shot duration. On right-clicking a target rooted by this ability, Ivern or his allies will dash near the target, stopping at their maximum attack range from the target.

abilities.name: Brushmaker
abilities.riotDesc: In brush, Ivern and his nearby allies attacks deal bonus magic damage. Ivern can activate this ability to create a patch of brush.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: While in a brush, Ivern's auto-attacks deal bonus magic damage. This bonus persists for a few seconds after leaving the brush. Ivern will periodically stock a W charge, up to a maximum of 3. Active: Grows a patch of brush at the target location for 30 seconds, revealing the area within and near it for 3 seconds. Spawns more brushes if used near terrain or other brushes. The brush won't drop vision on target if it is placed in the vision line of an enemy turret.

abilities.name: Triggerseed
abilities.riotDesc: Ivern places a shield on an ally which explodes after a short duration slowing and damaging enemies. The shield refreshes if it hits no enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shields a target for 2 seconds. At the end of the duration, the shield bursts, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies, and slowing them for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Daisy!
abilities.riotDesc: Ivern summons his Sentinel friend Daisy to fight with him. Re-cast command Daisy to attack or move.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: Ivern summons his sentinel friend Daisy at his side, who remains on the map for up to 60 seconds as a controllable entity. Recast: Ivern can command daisy to move to a target location or to follow Ivern.

combos.description: To bring Daisy to a fight R then Q and instantly E yourself followed by an AA once it lands. Continue to AA once you're close.
To engage on an enemy E yourself then Q. Once it lands AA.
To get on top of an enemy quickly W AA instantly then Q once it lands AA your target.

Janna.name: Janna
Janna.title: the Storm's Fury
Janna.blurb: Armed with the power of Runeterra's gales, Janna is a mysterious, elemental wind spirit who protects the dispossessed of Zaun. Some believe she was brought into existence by the pleas of Runeterra's sailors who prayed for fair winds as they navigated...

abilities.name: Howling Gale
abilities.riotDesc: By creating a localized change in pressure and temperature, Janna is able to create a small storm that grows in size with time. She can activate the spell again to release the storm. On release this storm will fly towards the direction it was cast in, dealing damage and knocking away any enemies in its path.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons a tornado at her current location which charges up over 3 seconds. Its range, speed, damage, and knockup duration increases for every second it is left charging. This ability can be recast after a short delay. The tornado launches itself for 1.5 seconds in the target direction, dealing magic damage to all enemies it passes through and knocking them up for a duration. This ability can be recast to launch the tornado early.

abilities.name: Zephyr
abilities.riotDesc: Janna summons an air elemental that passively increases her Move Speed and enables her to pass through units. She may also activate this ability to deal damage and slow an enemy's Move Speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Janna is ghosted and has bonus Movement Speed when this ability is not on Cooldown. Active: Deals magic damage to a target enemy champion, dealing magic damage to them and slowing them for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Eye Of The Storm
abilities.riotDesc: Janna conjures a defensive gale that shields an ally champion or turret from incoming damage and increases their Attack Damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shields a target allied champion or herself for 5 seconds. This shield decays overtime. This shield grants bonus attack damage to the target. This ability's cooldown is reduced by 20% if Janna can slow or knockup an enemy champion. This can happen once per ability cast. The shield can be used on turrets as well.

abilities.name: Monsoon
abilities.riotDesc: Janna surrounds herself in a magical storm, throwing enemies back. After the storm has settled, soothing winds heal nearby allies while the ability is active.
abilities.mobaDesc: Channels for 3 seconds while knocking back all nearby enemies. Enemies closer to her are knocked further away. Allies withing her channel area will be healed every 0.5 seconds.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done reduced by 10%. Shielding done increased by 0%. Q: Cooldown changed to 16 seconds.

combos.description: To trade on a target, use Q in fog of war, then walk up to W and AA. Recast Q and AA again.
For an extended trade, walk up to your target, E AA then W AA. Quickly Q twice and AA.
To engage on your opponent W then instantly cast Q twice followed by an AA.

JarvanIV.name: Jarvan IV
JarvanIV.title: the Exemplar of Demacia
JarvanIV.blurb: Prince Jarvan, scion of the Lightshield dynasty, is heir apparent to the throne of Demacia. Raised to be a paragon of his nation's greatest virtues, he is forced to balance the heavy expectations placed upon him with his own desire to fight on the front...

abilities.name: Martial Cadence
abilities.mobaDesc: Jarvan's first basic attack on an enemy deals bonus physical damage based on their current Health. This effect cannot occur again on the same enemy for a few seconds.

abilities.name: Dragon Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Jarvan IV extends his lance, dealing physical damage and lowering the Armor of enemies in its path. Additionally, this will pull Jarvan to his Demacian Standard, knocking up enemies in his path.
abilities.mobaDesc: Jarvan IV extends his lance in the target direction and deals physical damage to all enemies. It will also reduce their armor for 3 seconds. If the lance connects with an E, Jarvan IV dashes to its location, knocking up nearby enemies along his path for 0.75 seconds.

abilities.name: Golden Aegis
abilities.riotDesc: Jarvan IV calls upon the ancient kings of Demacia to shield him from harm and slow surrounding enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: Jarvan IV slows all enemies nearby for 2 seconds while shielding himself for 5 seconds. This shield increases based on his maximum health and the number of champions hit by his W Active.

abilities.name: Demacian Standard
abilities.riotDesc: Jarvan IV carries the pride of Demacia, passively granting him bonus Attack Speed. Activating Demacian Standard allows Jarvan IV to place a Demacian flag that deals magic damage on impact and grants Attack Speed to nearby allied champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Jarvan IV gains bonus attack speed. Active: Throws a flag to the target location, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies. The flag remains for 8 seconds, granting sight of its surrounding and providing Demacian Standard's bonus attack speed to all allies and Jarvan IV when they are near the flag.

abilities.name: Cataclysm
abilities.riotDesc: Jarvan IV heroically leaps into battle at a target with such force that he terraforms the surrounding area to create an arena around them. Nearby enemies are damaged at the moment of impact.
abilities.mobaDesc: Leaps unstoppably to an enemy champion and deals physical damage to them and all nearby enemies upon arrival. On impact, he creates a circle of impassable terrain that pulls units inside it. The terrain lasts for 3.5 seconds and grants sight of the inside and surrounding area. On recasting, Jarvan will destroy the terrain created by his Ultimate.

balance.otherEffects: No special effects for Jarvan IV.

combos.description: When out of range for R, E Q to get into range and R while still mid air. Follow up with an AA.
When looking to gank before 6 E Q instantly then AA once you arrive. Use W right as or after they land then AA.
When looking to gank after 6 E Q instantly then AA followed by R AA

Jax.name: Jax
Jax.title: Grandmaster at Arms
Jax.blurb: Unmatched in both his skill with unique armaments and his biting sarcasm, Jax is the last known weapons master of Icathia. After his homeland was laid low by its own hubris in unleashing the Void, Jax and his kind vowed to protect what little remained...

abilities.name: Relentless Assault
abilities.mobaDesc: Jax's consecutive basic attacks continuously increase his Attack Speed.

abilities.name: Leap Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Jax leaps toward a unit. If they are an enemy, he strikes them with his weapon.

abilities.name: Empower
abilities.riotDesc: Jax charges his weapon with energy, causing his next attack to deal additional damage.

abilities.name: Counter Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Jax's combat prowess allows him to dodge all incoming attacks for a short duration and then quickly counterattack, stunning all surrounding enemies.

abilities.name: Grandmaster-at-Arms
abilities.riotDesc: Every third consecutive attack deals additional Magic Damage. Additionally, Jax can activate this ability to deal damage around himself and strengthen his resolve, increasing his Armor and Magic Resist for a short duration.

combos.description: Your standard hard engage combo is E then Q and E again mid air followed by an instant AA. W right as the AA completes then continue to AA.
When fighting up close AA W AA then E and continue to AA. Q then mid air E to keep on your target then AA some more.
When looking to quickly fight up close E AA instantly, W Q as quickly as you can and E AA right after.

Jayce.name: Jayce
Jayce.title: the Defender of Tomorrow
Jayce.blurb: Jayce Talis is a brilliant inventor who, along with his friend Viktor, made the first great discoveries in the field of hextech. Celebrated across Piltover, he tries to live up to his reputation as "the Man of Progress," but often struggles with the...

abilities.name: Hextech Capacitor
abilities.mobaDesc: When Jayce swaps weapons he gains Move Speed for a short duration.

abilities.name: To the Skies! / Shock Blast
abilities.riotDesc:
Hammer Stance: Leaps to an enemy dealing physical damage and slowing enemies.

Cannon Stance: Fires an orb of electricity that detonates upon hitting an enemy (or reaching the end of its path) dealing physical damage to all enemies hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Jayce leaps to the enemy's location and smashes his hammer on the ground. It deals physical damage to all enemies in the area and slows them for a couple of seconds.

abilities.name: Lightning Field / Hyper Charge
abilities.riotDesc:
Hammer Stance: Passive: Restores Mana per strike. Active: Creates a field of lightning damaging nearby enemies for several seconds.

Cannon Stance: Gains a burst of energy, increasing Attack Speed to maximum for several attacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Jayce restores mana every time he hits an enemy with an auto-attack. Active: Jayce surrounds himself with an electric field for 4 seconds, dealing magic damage each second to all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Thundering Blow / Acceleration Gate
abilities.riotDesc:
Hammer Stance: Deals magic damage to an enemy and knocks them back a short distance.

Cannon Stance: Deploys an Acceleration Gate increasing the Move Speed of all allied champions who pass through it. If Shock Blast is fired through the gate the missile speed, range, and damage will increase.
abilities.mobaDesc: Jayce swings his hammer at a target enemy. This deals magic damage while pulling them to a location away from him in the direction of the target.

abilities.name: Mercury Cannon / Mercury Hammer
abilities.riotDesc:
Hammer Stance: Transforms the Mercury Hammer into the Mercury Cannon gaining new abilities and increased range. The first attack in this form reduces the target's Armor and Magic Resist.

Cannon Stance: Transforms the Mercury Cannon into the Mercury Hammer gaining new abilities and increasing Armor and Magic Resist. The first attack in this form deals additional magic damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Jayce transforms his Hammer into a Cannon and vice versa. On enabling his cannon, he gains ranged auto-attacks and causes his next auto-attack to reduce his target's armor and magic resistance by a certain percentage for 5 seconds.

combos.description: For a quick melee trade Q onto your target, AA and then E.
Leave little room for your opponent to trade back. In ranged form AA and Q, then R and Q onto your target. AA then E.

Jhin.name: Jhin
Jhin.title: the Virtuoso
Jhin.blurb: Jhin is a meticulous criminal psychopath who believes murder is art. Once an Ionian prisoner, but freed by shadowy elements within Ionia's ruling council, the serial killer now works as their cabal's assassin. Using his gun as his paintbrush, Jhin...

abilities.name: Whisper
abilities.mobaDesc: Jhin's Auto-attacks have an ammunition mechanic. Once he expends four rounds, he will reload over 2.5 seconds. Jhin's 4th round will critically strike and is unstoppable. It deals bonus damage based on the target's missing health. Jhin also gets his attack speed converted to bonus attack damage and critical strikes grant Jhin movement speed based on his attack speed.

abilities.name: Dancing Grenade
abilities.riotDesc: Jhin launches a magical cartridge at an enemy. It can hit up to four targets and gains damage each time it kills.
abilities.mobaDesc: Launches a grenade at a target enemy, dealing physical damage. The canister can bounce up to 4 times (3 times after the first bounce) and will gain bonus damage per bounce if it kills a unit on each bounce.

abilities.name: Deadly Flourish
abilities.riotDesc: Jhin brandishes his cane, firing a single shot with incredible range. It pierces through minions and monsters, but stops on the first champion hit. If the target was recently struck by Jhin's allies, lotus traps, or damaged by Jhin, they are rooted.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Enemy champions who cross over an E or are damaged by him or his allied champions are marked for 4 seconds. Active: Jhin fires a narrow but long shot in the target direction that deals physical damage in a line until it collides with an enemy. Striking a marked target, roots them, and gives Jhin his Passive movement speed.

abilities.name: Captive Audience
abilities.riotDesc:
Jhin places an invisible lotus trap that blooms when walked over. It slows nearby enemies before dealing damage with an explosion of serrated petals.

Beauty in Death - When Jhin kills an enemy champion, a lotus trap will bloom near their corpse.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Jhin summons a Lotus Trap under every enemy champion he kills. He also stacks Lotus Trap charges, up to a maximum of 2. Active: Places a Lotus Trap at the target location which stealths and then arms after a second. It can last up to 180 seconds and grants a small area of vision around it. It will detonate if any champion walks on it while simultaneously marking them with your W Passive.

abilities.name: Curtain Call
abilities.riotDesc: Jhin channels, transforming Whisper into a shoulder-mounted mega-cannon. It is able to fire 4 super shots at extreme range that pierce through minions and monsters, but stop on the first champion impacted. Whisper cripples enemies hit, which slows them and deals execute damage. The 4th shot is perfectly crafted, epically powerful, and guaranteed to critically strike.
abilities.mobaDesc: Jhin channels and reveals himself for a total of 10 seconds. He gains massive range and can cast his Curtain Call up to 4 times with a 1-second cooldown between casts. Every cast will make Jhin fire a round in the target direction that grants sight around the round's trajectory for 0.5 seconds and deals physical damage (which is increased based on missing health). The rounds slow them by 80% as well. The fourth shot will critically strike to deal bonus physical damage.

combos.description: Trade normally by AA three times then Q right before using your final shot.
To keep your target locked in range while you trade AA then quickly W, then AA Q and AA twice more for your 4th shot.

Jinx.name: Jinx
Jinx.title: the Loose Cannon
