Jinx.blurb: An unhinged and impulsive criminal from the undercity, Jinx is haunted by the consequences of her past—but that doesn't stop her from bringing her own chaotic brand of pandemonium to Piltover and Zaun. She uses her arsenal of DIY weapons to devastating...

abilities.name: Get Excited!
abilities.mobaDesc: Whenever an enemy champion, epic monster, turret, or inhibitor dies within 3 seconds of being damaged by Jinx, she gains 175% bonus movement speed which decays over 6 seconds. She also gains 15% total attack speed and removes the attack speed cap.

abilities.name: Switcheroo!
abilities.riotDesc: Jinx modifies her basic attacks by swapping between Pow-Pow, her minigun and Fishbones, her rocket launcher. Attacks with Pow-Pow grant Attack Speed, while attacks with Fishbones deal area of effect damage, gain increased range, but drain Mana and attack slower.
abilities.mobaDesc: Toggles between her minigun and her rocket launcher. Pow-Pow: Auto-attacks with her minigun grants her bonus attack speed for 2.5 seconds, up to 3 times. Fishbones: Attacks with her Rocket launcher costs mana on-attack to deal 110% AD to the main target as well as splash the damage to all enemies within a radius. This damage is affected by critical strike modifiers. Jinx also gains bonus range but loses 25% of her bonus attack speed.

abilities.name: Zap!
abilities.riotDesc: Jinx uses Zapper, her shock pistol, to fire a blast that deals damage to the first enemy hit, slowing and revealing it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Jinx fires a lightning shot that deals physical damage to the first enemy it hits, revealing and slowing them for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Flame Chompers!
abilities.riotDesc: Jinx throws out a line of snare grenades that explode after 5 seconds, lighting enemies on fire. Flame Chompers will bite enemy champions who walk over them, rooting them in place.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tosses out 3 Chompers that arm after 0.7 seconds and explode after 5 seconds, dealing magic damage over 1.5 seconds to all enemies within a small area. Enemy champions who walk into a chomper will be rooted for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Super Mega Death Rocket!
abilities.riotDesc: Jinx fires a super rocket across the map that gains damage as it travels. The rocket will explode upon colliding with an enemy champion, dealing damage to it and surrounding enemies based on their missing Health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a rocket in a target direction. This has a global range and explodes upon colliding with an enemy champion, dealing physical damage to all champions and enemies in an area around the champion hit. The rocket deals 10-100% damage based on travel distance along with bonus damage based on missing health.

combos.description: A normal trade will start off with Pow-Pow and AA W, then AA twice more and use E. Q to AA more with Fishbones.
W to slow your target then E. Swap to Fishbones with Q and AA your target while they are crowd controlled.
Use your E and W together to make it easier to trap. AA while your opponent is crowd controlled.

Kaisa.name: Kai'Sa
Kaisa.title: Daughter of the Void
Kaisa.blurb: Claimed by the Void when she was only a child, Kai'Sa managed to survive through sheer tenacity and strength of will. Her experiences have made her a deadly hunter and, to some, the harbinger of a future they would rather not live to see. Having entered...

abilities.name: Second Skin
abilities.mobaDesc: Kai'Sa's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage based on level. Her auto-attacks and W, along with nearby allies' CC effects mark enemies with Plasma for 4 seconds, stacking up to 4 items. The next attack on a full Plasma-stacked champion will deal bonus missing health magic damage. Upon gaining a set amount of permanent stats from items and stat growth, Kai'Sa can evolve the related basic ability after channeling for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Icathian Rain
abilities.riotDesc:
Kai'Sa shoots a swarm of missiles that seek out nearby targets.

Living Weapon: Icathian Rain is upgraded to shoot more missiles.
abilities.mobaDesc: Releases a swarm of 6 missiles which evenly distribute among nearby visible enemies. Each missile deals physical damage. Living Weapon: Ability fires 12 missiles instead of 6.

abilities.name: Void Seeker
abilities.riotDesc:
Kai'Sa shoots a long range missile, marking enemies with her passive.

Living Weapon: Void Seeker is upgraded to apply more passive marks and reduce cooldown on champion hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a void blast in a target direction, stopping at the first enemy hit, dealing physical damage, and revealing them for 4 seconds. Living Weapon: Applies 3 Plasma stacks and refunds 70% of the cooldown if it hits an enemy.

abilities.name: Supercharge
abilities.riotDesc:
Kai'Sa briefly increases her Move Speed, then increases her Attack Speed.

Living Weapon: Supercharge is upgraded to briefly grant Invisibility.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges for the duration of the cast time, during which she is ghosted, gains bonus movement speed and can't auto-attack during the duration. After charging, Kai'Sa gains bonus attacks speed. Living Weapon: Gains Invisibility for 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Killer Instinct
abilities.riotDesc: Kai'Sa dashes near an enemy champion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Instantly shields herself for 2 seconds and dashes to a target location near a visible enemy champion who has been affected by Plasma. The duration refreshes once the dash ends.

combos.description: To trade normally try to AA and Q at the same time then AA W AA.
If you can guarantee your W then use it early. AA then instantly W and Q during its animation then AA twice.

Kalista.name: Kalista
Kalista.title: the Spear of Vengeance
Kalista.blurb: A specter of wrath and retribution, Kalista is the undying spirit of vengeance, an armored nightmare summoned from the Shadow Isles to hunt deceivers and traitors. The betrayed may cry out in blood to be avenged, but Kalista only answers those willing...

abilities.name: Martial Poise
abilities.mobaDesc: Kalista's basic attacks have unique properties, It deals 90% AD physical damage, Attacks miss if she loses vision on the target, Attacks are unstoppable, She can switch target mid-attack windup, Makes her dash in the target direction after issuing a movement command, during a windup, or after casting Q. Oathsworn Bond: Kalista begins the game with an exclusive Black Spear.

abilities.name: Pierce
abilities.riotDesc: Throw a fast moving spear that passes through enemies it kills.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hurls a fast and narrow spear in a direction, dealing physical damage to the first enemy hit. The spear continues onward if Pierce kills its target, transferring all the Rend stacks to the next enemy it hits.

abilities.name: Sentinel
abilities.riotDesc:
Gain bonus damage when Kalista and her Oathsworn strike the same target.

Activate to send a soul to scout out the path, revealing the area in front of it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Soul Marked: Kalista and her Oathsworn are linked, their auto-attacks and Q apply a Soul-Mark to their targets. If both Soul Marks are applied in quick succession, the target takes bonus magic damage and cannot be soul marked for 10 seconds. Passive: Periodically stocks a Sentinel charge, up to a maximum of 2. Active: Summons a Sentinel to an area to patrol the area.

abilities.name: Rend
abilities.riotDesc: Attacks impale their targets with spears. Activate to rip the spears out, slowing and dealing escalating damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Her basic attacks on-hit and Q each lodge a spear in the target for 4 seconds, stacking up to 254 times. Active: Rips all lodged spears from nearby enemies, dealing physical damage and slowing them for 2 seconds. Damage is increased with additional spears, but with reduced efficiency. The cooldown and mana are reset if Rend kills at least one target within a very brief time.

abilities.name: Fate's Call
abilities.riotDesc: Kalista teleports the Oathsworn ally to herself. They gain the ability to dash toward a position, knocking enemy champions back.
abilities.mobaDesc: Retrieves her Oathsworn and cleanses them from all CC while rendering them Invulnerable, untargetable, silencing them, and being unable to move for 4 seconds. The Oathsworn can emerge to a target location, stopping at the first enemy Champion hit, knocking up all surrounding enemies, and landing themselves at their auto-attack range relative to the target hit.

Karma.name: Karma
Karma.title: the Enlightened One
Karma.blurb: No mortal exemplifies the spiritual traditions of Ionia more than Karma. She is the living embodiment of an ancient soul reincarnated countless times, carrying all her accumulated memories into each new life, and blessed with power that few can...

abilities.name: Gathering Fire
abilities.mobaDesc: Reduces Mantra's Cooldowns by a few seconds every time she damages an enemy champion with an ability. The time is reduced by a meager amount if she uses her auto-attacks.

abilities.name: Inner Flame
abilities.riotDesc:
Karma sends forth a ball of spirit energy that explodes and deals damage upon hitting an enemy unit.

Mantra Bonus: In addition to the explosion, Mantra increases the destructive power of her Inner Flame, creating a cataclysm which deals damage after a short delay.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a burst of spiritual energy in the target direction, blowing up on the first enemy hit and dealing magic damage whole slowing all enemies around the target by 35% for 1.5 seconds. Mantra: Detonates indefinitely on reaching maximum range, dealing bonus magic damage in an increased area. A field is left at the location of the detonation for 1.5 seconds, slowing enemies by 50%, after which it explodes and deals magic damage to all enemies inside.

abilities.name: Focused Resolve
abilities.riotDesc:
Karma creates a tether between herself and a targeted enemy, dealing damage and revealing them. If the tether is not broken, the enemy will be rooted and damaged again.

Mantra Bonus: Karma strengthens the link, healing herself and extending the root duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tether's to a single champion or monster and deals magic damage on the initial cast. If the tether lasts for 2 seconds, thee target takes the same amount of magic damage again and is rooted for a duration. Mantra: Karma heals for both instances of the tether as well.

abilities.name: Inspire
abilities.riotDesc:
Karma summons a protective shield that absorbs incoming damage and increases the Move Speed of the protected ally.

Mantra Bonus: Energy radiates out from her target, strengthening the initial shield and applying Inspire to nearby allied champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shield a target allied champion or herself for 2.5 seconds and grants movement speed to the target for 1.5 seconds. Mantra: Target receives a bonus shield and the effects are extended to allied champions near it, except they only gain 30% of the shield amount.

abilities.name: Mantra
abilities.riotDesc: Karma empowers her next ability to do an additional effect. Mantra is available at level 1 and does not require a skill point.
abilities.mobaDesc: Empowers her next ability and is available from the beginning of the game.

balance.otherEffects: Q: Bonus primary damage changed to 40 / 90 / 140 / 190.

combos.description: To all in someone when in close range W and instantly E, move forward then AA. Once the root lands R Q instantly followed by an AA.
When looking to survive R W instantly followed by E Q as quickly as you can as you retreat.
To all in an enemy R Q instantly then quickly move forward to cast W and E followed by using AAs as you maintain the tether.

Karthus.name: Karthus
Karthus.title: the Deathsinger
Karthus.blurb: The harbinger of oblivion, Karthus is an undying spirit whose haunting songs are a prelude to the horror of his nightmarish appearance. The living fear the eternity of undeath, but Karthus sees only beauty and purity in its embrace, a perfect union of...

abilities.name: Death Defied
abilities.mobaDesc: On dying, Karthus remains active for 7 seconds but is unable to move, auto-attack, cast summoner spells, or use active items. He also becomes untargetable and invulnerable for the duration as well and can use abilities at no cost. His E will be toggled on for the entire duration.

abilities.name: Lay Waste
abilities.riotDesc: Karthus unleashes a delayed blast at a location, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Deals increased damage to isolated enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Creates a blast at a target location that detonates after a brief delay and deals magic damage to all enemies within. The damage is doubled against single targets.

abilities.name: Death Defied
abilities.mobaDesc: On dying, Karthus remains active for 7 seconds but is unable to move, auto-attack, cast summoner spells, or use active items. He also becomes untargetable and invulnerable for the duration as well and can use abilities at no cost. His E will be toggled on for the entire duration.

abilities.name: Defile
abilities.riotDesc: Karthus passively steals energy from his victims, gaining Mana on each kill. Alternatively, Karthus can surround himself in the souls of his prey, dealing damage to nearby enemies, but quickly draining his own Mana.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Restores mana whenever he kills an enemy. Toggle: Deals magic damage every 0.25 seconds to all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Requiem
abilities.riotDesc: After channeling for 3 seconds, Karthus deals damage to all enemy champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: Channels for 3 seconds and deals magic damage to all targetable enemy champions upon its completion.

combos.description: When at long range W Q your target instantly then walk forward and E right before you are in range, then continue to use Q.
When at close range E AA instantly followed by Q and using AA's in between every Q cast.

Kassadin.name: Kassadin
Kassadin.title: the Void Walker
Kassadin.blurb: Cutting a burning swath through the darkest places of the world, Kassadin knows his days are numbered. A widely traveled Shuriman guide and adventurer, he had chosen to raise a family among the peaceful southern tribes—until the day his village was...

abilities.name: Void Stone
abilities.mobaDesc: Kassadin is ghosted permanently and takes 10% reduced magical damage.

abilities.name: Null Sphere
abilities.riotDesc: Kassadin fires an orb of void energy at a target, dealing damage and interrupting channels. The excess energy forms around himself, granting a temporary shield that absorbs magic damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires an orb of void energy at the target enemy, dealing magic damage and stopping their ongoing channels. He also gains a shield which absorbs magic damage for 1.5 seconds

abilities.name: Nether Blade
abilities.riotDesc: Passive: Kassadin's basic attacks deal bonus magic damage. Active: Kassadin's next basic attack deals significant bonus magic damage and restores Mana.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Auto-Attacks deal bonus magic damage Active: Empowers his blade to cause his next auto-attack to gain range, become unstoppable and deal increased bonus magic damage. It also restores mana, which is increased if he attacks an enemy champion.

abilities.name: Force Pulse
abilities.riotDesc: Kassadin draws energy from spells cast in his vicinity. Upon charging up, Kassadin can use Force Pulse to damage and slow enemies in a cone in front of him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Gains a stack of Void Energy whenever he uses an ability near a champion. This effect stacks up to six times and at six stacks, Kassadin can activate Force Pulse. Active: Emits a pulse of void energy, dealing magic damage to all enemies in a cone in the target direction and slows them for a second.

abilities.name: Riftwalk
abilities.riotDesc: Kassadin teleports to a nearby location dealing damage to nearby enemy units. Multiple Riftwalks in a short period of time cost additional Mana but also deal additional damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Blinks to the target location and deals magic damage to all nearby champions upon arrival. The mana consumed is doubled for each subsequent usage of this ability while also increasing its damage. This effect stacks up to 4 times.

balance.otherEffects: E: Base damage changed to 80 / 115 / 150 / 185 / 220. AP ratio changed to 75% AP.

combos.description: To trade simply E and instantly Q.
To harass after level 6 R into max E range then E Q instantly.
While in tower range, Q E then instantly R out.

Katarina.name: Katarina
Katarina.title: the Sinister Blade
Katarina.blurb: Decisive in judgment and lethal in combat, Katarina is a Noxian assassin of the highest caliber. Eldest daughter to the legendary General Du Couteau, she made her talents known with swift kills against unsuspecting enemies. Her fiery ambition has driven...

abilities.name: Voracity
abilities.mobaDesc: Whenever an enemy champion dies within 3 seconds of Katarina damaging them, her cooldowns are reduced by 15 seconds. Sinister Steel: On retrieving a dagger, Katarina slashes through all nearby enemies, dealing magic damage and reducing her E's cooldown.

abilities.name: Bouncing Blade
abilities.riotDesc: Katarina throws a <font color='#FFF673'>Dagger</font> at the target that then bounces to nearby enemies before ricocheting onto the ground.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a Dagger at the target enemy which will bounce to up to 2 nearby enemies and deal magic damage to each bounce target.

abilities.name: Preparation
abilities.riotDesc: Katarina gains a burst of Move Speed, tossing a <font color='#FFF673'>Dagger</font> into the air directly above herself.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tosses a Dagger into the air above her current location. She is ghosted and gains decaying movement speed until the dagger lands.

abilities.name: Shunpo
abilities.riotDesc: Katarina blinks to the target, striking it if its an enemy, or striking the nearest enemy otherwise.
abilities.mobaDesc: Katarina blinks to the target location around a unit or a Dagger, dealing magic damage to the nearest enemy.

abilities.name: Death Lotus
abilities.riotDesc: Katarina becomes a flurry of blades, dealing massive magic damage while she channels to the 3 nearest enemy champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: Channels and spins in place for 2.5 seconds, dealing magic damage to up to 3 champions in her range and applying Grievous Wounds on them for 3 seconds.

balance.otherEffects: Tenacity increased by 20%. Ability haste increased by 10.

combos.description: To easily trade Q and instantly E AA, pick up the dagger, AA again then E back to a minion.

Kayle.name: Kayle
Kayle.title: the Righteous
Kayle.blurb: Born to a Targonian Aspect at the height of the Rune Wars, Kayle honored her mother's legacy by fighting for justice on wings of divine flame. She and her twin sister Morgana were the protectors of Demacia for many years—until Kayle became disillusioned...

abilities.name: Divine Ascent
abilities.mobaDesc: On reaching levels 1, 6, 11, and 16, and spending a skill point on her Ultimate, Kayle ascends into a new form and gains additional bonuses. Level 1: Kayle's attacks give her a stack of Zeal for 5 seconds and this stacks up to 5 times. Each stack gives her 6% bonus attack speed and at maximum stacks, Kayle becomes Exalted and gains 8% bonus movement speed. Level 6: Gains ranged auto-attacks. Level 11: When Exalted, Kayle's attacks against non-structural units will launch a wave of fire in the target's location, dealing bonus magic damage to enemies hit. Level 16: Kayle is permanently exalted and gains bonus attack range.

abilities.name: Radiant Blast
abilities.riotDesc: Kayle conjures a portal, summoning a celestial sword that pierces through enemies, slowing, damaging, and reducing the resistances of all hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Launches a sword-shaped energy beam in the direction of her choice. It deals magic damage to enemies upon colliding with them while simultaneously slowing them, and reducing their armor and magic resistance by 15% for 4 seconds. It also restores mana for each champion hit.

abilities.name: Celestial Blessing
abilities.riotDesc: Blessed by the divine, Kayle heals and grants Move Speed to herself and the nearest ally.
abilities.mobaDesc: Kayle and a targeted allied champion are healed for a certain amount while gaining bonus movement speed for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Starfire Spellblade
abilities.riotDesc:
Passive: Kayle's celestial sword, Virtue, deals bonus magic damage to enemies she attacks.

Active: Kayle's next attack smites her target with celestial fire, dealing bonus damage proportionate to their missing health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Auto-Attacks deal bonus magic damage on-hit. Active: Causes Kayle's next auto-attack to become unstoppable and deal bonus magic damage based on the target's missing health. It also gives her access to one ranged auto-attack early on.

abilities.name: Divine Judgment
abilities.riotDesc: Kayle makes an ally invulnerable and calls upon former Aspects of Justice to purify the area around her target with a holy rain of swords.
abilities.mobaDesc: Grants herself or an allied champion Invulnerability for a few seconds while surrounding the target with swords. Upon completing the cast time, the swords fall down, dealing magic damage in the area around the Ulted target.

combos.description: If you want to trade back damage as you retreat AA then instantly E Q and use W to escape.
When quickly trading Q and instantly E eAA.
When trading Q then instantly AA twice, quickly using E as the second AA finishes.

Kayn.name: Kayn
Kayn.title: the Shadow Reaper
Kayn.blurb: A peerless practitioner of lethal shadow magic, Shieda Kayn battles to achieve his true destiny—to one day lead the Order of Shadow into a new era of Ionian supremacy. He wields the sentient darkin weapon Rhaast, undeterred by its creeping corruption of...

abilities.name: The Darkin Scythe
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Kayn gathers orbs from his targets. These orbs are of two different kinds and will appear upon damaging an enemy champion. If he attacks ranged champions, he will get blue orbs, while if he attacks melee champions, he will gain red orbs. These orbs will fill up a bar which will allow him to choose between two forms, one of which, when chose, will be his permanent form the entire game. The forms and their bonuses are as follows: Shadow Assassin: On being out of champion combat for over 8 seconds, he will deal bonus magic damage to the enemy champion on the first instance of his damage dealt. This is also applicable to his Ultimate. Darkin: Heals for the post-mitigation damage he deals with abilities against enemy champions.

abilities.name: Reaping Slash
abilities.riotDesc: Kayn dashes, then slashes. Both deal damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes forward and deals physical damage to enemies he passes through. He then swings his scythe, dealing the same damage to surrounding enemies. Darkin: The damage of this ability is modified for both instances. The dash speed will scale with Kayn's total movement speed.

abilities.name: Blade's Reach
abilities.riotDesc: Kayn damages and slows targets in a line.
abilities.mobaDesc: Performs an upwards sweep with his scythe, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit in a line in the target direction and slowing them by 90% over 1.5 seconds. Shadow Assassin: Increases the range of this ability. Also summons a living shadow at the casting position to perform this ability in Kayn's stead and reduces the ability's cast time to 0. Darkin: Knocks up enemies hit for a second.

abilities.name: Shadow Step
abilities.riotDesc: Kayn can walk through terrain.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus movement speed, is ghosted and can walk through terrain for 1.5 seconds. He also heals himself on moving through terrain for the first time and, if he is not in combat with enemy champions, this ability's duration is increased. Taking damage from enemies will reduce the remaining duration of the effect to 1.5 seconds. Shadow Assassin: Cooldown is permanently reduced to 8 seconds at all ranks. He also gains 100% slow resistance and gains bonus movement speed for the remaining duration on entering terrain.

abilities.name: Umbral Trespass
abilities.riotDesc: Kayn hides in an enemy's body, dealing massive damage when he bursts out.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Marks a champion that he damaged in the last 3.15 seconds. Active: Goes into the body of the enemy champion for up to 2.5 seconds and can re-cast the ability after 0.5 seconds. On exiting the target, he deals physical damage to the target. Shadow Assassin: Gains bonus cast range and emerge range while also resetting his Passive's cooldown. Darkin: Deals modified damage and heals him based on pre-mitigation damage.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done reduced by 20%. Tenacity increased by 20%. Passive: Transformation no longer restores full health and mana. Locked form cooldown changed to 2 minutes. Shadow Assassin combat timer changed to 4 seconds. Q: Bonus AD ratio per hit changed to 95% bonus AD. Total bonus AD ratio changed to 190% bonus AD. E: Shadow Assassin cooldown changed to 7 seconds.

combos.description: Your most standard gank will use E through a wall then W into Q.
To commit for a bigger gank E through a wall then Q in melee range and AA, followed by using W to staying in range for more AA's.
To poke in Shadow form, E through a wall then W and instantly Q away back into the wall.

Kennen.name: Kennen
Kennen.title: the Heart of the Tempest
Kennen.blurb: More than just the lightning-quick enforcer of Ionian balance, Kennen is the only yordle member of the Kinkou. Despite his small, furry stature, he is eager to take on any threat with a whirling storm of shuriken and boundless enthusiasm. Alongside his...

abilities.name: Mark of the Storm
abilities.mobaDesc: Enemies hit by Kennen's abilities receive a Mark for 6 seconds, which stacks up to 3 times. At 3 stacks, the marks are consumed to stun the target for some time and restore 25 energy.

abilities.name: Thundering Shuriken
abilities.riotDesc: Kennen throws a fast moving shuriken towards a location, causing damage and adding a Mark of the Storm to any opponent that it hits.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a charged shuriken in the target direction and deals magic damage to the first enemy hit.

abilities.name: Electrical Surge
abilities.riotDesc: Kennen passively deals extra damage and adds a Mark of the Storm to his target every few attacks, and he can activate this ability to damage and add another Mark of the Storm to targets who are already marked.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Auto-Attacks grant a stack of Electrical Surger on-attack. On reaching 4 stacks, his next auto-attack will deal bonus magic damage and apply a Passive Mark and consume all stacks on-hit. Can Critically strike for 140% Damage Active: Sends out a surge of electricity to all nearby enemies affected with the Mark of the Storm(Passive), or caught in his Ultimate, dealing magic damage.

abilities.name: Lightning Rush
abilities.riotDesc: Kennen morphs into a lightning form, enabling him to pass through units and apply a Mark of the Storm. Kennen gains Move Speed when entering this form, and attack speed when leaving it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Transforms into a ball of electricity, becomes ghosted, and gains 100% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds. After a brief delay, Kennen can reactivate this ability. Kennen deals magic damage to all enemies he passes through and restores 40 energy the first time he damages an enemy with this ability. He also gains bonus attack speed for 4 seconds upon exiting Lightning Rush. Critical Strikes now extend the duration of Lightning Rush's Attack Speed buff by 1 second, up to the initial duration of 4s. This can happen any number of times.

abilities.name: Slicing Maelstrom
abilities.riotDesc: Kennen summons a storm that strikes at nearby enemy champions for magical damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: Summons a Shuriken Storm around him for 3 seconds, gaining bonus armor and magic resistance while striking bolts of lightning down on all enemies within range every 0.5 seconds, dealing magic damage. Each maelstrom hit applies a Mark of the Storm, up to a maximum of 3. The storm deals 10% increased damage with each successive strikee against a target, up to a maximum of 150% damage.

combos.description: To quickly trade from afar when your W passive is up Q and instantly AA W.
Your ideal ranged trading pattern when one stack away from W your passive is to, AA Q followed by AA W and conitnue to AA if needed.
A trade used when there aren't minions blocking, E forward then Q. After you connect with E use W then recast E so you can AA.

Khazix.name: Kha'Zix
Khazix.title: the Voidreaver
Khazix.blurb: The Void grows, and the Void adapts—in none of its myriad spawn are these truths more apparent than Kha'Zix. Evolution drives the core of this mutating horror, born to survive and to slay the strong. Where it struggles to do so, it grows new, more...

abilities.name: Unseen Threat
abilities.mobaDesc: Isolation: Marks enemy units that don't have their allies around them. All his abilities have special interactions against such targets. On losing sight of Kha'Zix, or on activating Void Assault, Unseen Threat causes Kha'Zix's next auto-attack to deal bonus magic damage against his target and slows them.

abilities.name: Taste Their Fear
abilities.riotDesc: Deals physical damage to the target. Damage increased on <font color='#FFF673'>Isolated</font> targets. If he chooses to <font color='#00DD33'>Evolve Reaper Claws</font>, this refunds a percent of it's cooldown against <font color='#FFF673'>Isolated</font> targets. Kha'Zix also gains increased range on his basic attacks and Taste Their Fear.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slashes the target enemy, dealing physical damage which is increased against isolated targets. Evolved Reaper Claws: Gains bonus range on his auto-attacks and Q. If the target is Isolated, 45% of the cooldown is refunded.

abilities.name: Void Spike
abilities.riotDesc: Kha'Zix fires exploding spikes that deal physical damage to enemies hit. Kha'Zix is healed if he is also within the explosion radius. If he chooses to <font color='#00DD33'>Evolve Spike Racks</font>, Void Spike now fires three spikes in a cone, slow enemies hit, and reveals enemy champions hit for 2 seconds. <font color='#FFF673'>Isolated</font> targets are slowed for extra.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a cluster of spikes in the target direction which detonate upon hitting an enemy and deals physical damage. Kha'Zix will heal himself if he is near the detonation radius. Evolved Spike Racks: Fires three Clusters in a cone, slows enemies by 60%, and grants vision of the enemy hit for 2 seconds. Isolated targets are slowed by 90% instead.

abilities.name: Leap
abilities.riotDesc: Kha'Zix leaps to an area, dealing physical damage upon landing. If he chooses to <font color='#00DD33'>Evolve Wings</font>, Leap's range increases by 200 and the cooldown resets on champion kill or assist.
abilities.mobaDesc: Leaps to the target location, dealing physical damage to the enemies in the landing area. Evolved Wings: Gains bonus range and the Cooldown is reset on enemy champion takedowns.

abilities.name: Void Assault
abilities.riotDesc: Each rank allows Kha'Zix to evolve one of his abilities, giving it a unique additional effect. When activated, Kha'Zix becomes <font color='#91d7ee'>Invisible</font>, triggering Unseen Threat and increasing Move Speed. If he chooses to <font color='#00DD33'>Evolve Adaptive Cloaking</font>, Void Assault gains increased <font color='#91d7ee'>Invisibility</font> duration, and an additional use.
abilities.mobaDesc: Each rank in Void Assault allows Kha'Zix to evolve one of his abilities, granting it additional effects. Active: Becomes invisible for some time and gains bonus Movement Speed. After 2 seconds of leaving invisibility, and for the next 10 seconds, this ability can be cast a second time at no cost. Evolved Adaptive Cloaking: Increases the invisibility duration, and can be cast up to 3 times.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done increased by 20%. Tenacity increased by 20%.

combos.description: When someone facechecks W then instantly Q AA.
To quickly burst R into melee range then AA and W Q straight after.

Kindred.name: Kindred
Kindred.title: The Eternal Hunters
Kindred.blurb: Separate, but never parted, Kindred represents the twin essences of death. Lamb's bow offers a swift release from the mortal realm for those who accept their fate. Wolf hunts down those who run from their end, delivering violent finality within his...

abilities.name: Mark of the Kindred
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Lamb and Wolf mark targets to hunt. Getting a kill on such targets will empower Kindred's abilities and give Lamb bonus range on her attacks. Lamb can select a target of her choice while Wolf will periodically mark camps in the Jungle. The mark will be visible to every champion on the map.

abilities.name: Dance of Arrows
abilities.riotDesc: Kindred tumbles and shoots up to three arrows at nearby targets.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes in a target direction, gaining bonus attack speed for 4 seconds and firing three arrows to nearby visible targets. Each arrow deals physical damage. Using this ability in the active zone of your W will reduce this abilities cooldown to a fixed amount.

abilities.name: Wolf's Frenzy
abilities.riotDesc: Wolf enrages and attacks enemies around him. Lamb passively gains stacks by moving and attacking. When fully charged, Lamb's next attack restores health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Kindred gains stacks on moving upto a 100 of them. At full stacks, the next auto-attack will heal Kindred for an amount based on missing health. Active: Creates a zone around a designated location and separates from Lamb. Wolf will automatically attack enemies within this zone, prioritizing Lamb's attack target.

abilities.name: Mounting Dread
abilities.riotDesc: Lamb fires a carefully placed shot, slowing the target. If Lamb attacks the target two more times, her third attack instead directs Wolf to pounce on the enemy, savaging them for massive damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Marks the target enemy for 4 seconds and slows them by 50% for a second. If Lamb manages to attack the marked target 2 times, the 3rd attack directs wolf to pounce on them, dealing bonus physical damage. Wolf's pounce will critically strike.

abilities.name: Lamb's Respite
abilities.riotDesc: Lamb grants all living things inside a zone a respite from death. Until the effect ends, nothing can die. At the end, units are healed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Creates a zone on the ground under herself for 4 seconds. All units in this zone cannot be killed nor healed if they reach a certain health threshold. Once the effect ends, all units are healed immediately.

combos.description: Your standard melee range Gank Combo W AA instantly then Q AA E. Follow with two AAs and Q AA right afterwards to execute.
To quickly proc your E lead with E AA instantly then W Q AA. Follow up with two AAs and Q AA right after.
Your mid range Standard Gank Combo is W Q E AA one after another as quickly as you can, followed by some AAs until your Q is up again.

Kled.name: Kled
Kled.title: the Cantankerous Cavalier
Kled.blurb: A warrior as fearless as he is ornery, the yordle Kled embodies the furious bravado of Noxus. He is an icon beloved by the empire's soldiers, distrusted by its officers, and loathed by the nobility. Many claim Kled has fought in every campaign the...

abilities.name: Skaarl, the Cowardly Lizard
abilities.mobaDesc: When Kled reaches 100 Courage while dismounted, Skaarl begins the remount process. Skaarl's health is now restored at the beginning of this remount sequence, allowing him to immediately absorb incoming damage again. The full remount completes after a brief animation. While mounted, all damage dealt to Kled is taken by Skaarl. Any bonus health from items is applied to Skaarl. If Skaarl's health drops to 0, he runs away and Kled is dismounted. Dismounting acts like a cleanse and briefly makes Kled untargetable, invulnerable, and immune to crowd control. Kled also gains new abilities and modified stats while dismounted

abilities.name: Bear Trap on a Rope
abilities.riotDesc:
Kled throws a bear trap that damages and hooks an enemy champion. If shackled for a short duration, the target takes additional physical damage and is yanked toward Kled.

When dismounted, this ability is replaced by Pocket Pistol, a ranged gun blast that knocks back Kled and restores courage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a bear trap on a rope in a direction of his choice, dealing physical damage and tethering to the first champion hit within its maximum range. If Kled can maintain the tether, he pulls them towards him and deals physical damage while applying Grievous Wounds and a slow on them for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Violent Tendencies
abilities.riotDesc: Kled gains massive attack speed for four attacks. The fourth attack deals more damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus attack speed on his next 4 basic attacks within 4 seconds after the first attack. The final attack deals bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Jousting
abilities.riotDesc: Kled dashes, dealing physical damage and gaining a short burst of speed. Kled can cast this ability again to dash back through his initial target, dealing the same damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes in a target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies struck. This charge cannot cross terrain. On hitting an enemy champion or a large monster, Skaarl can dash a fixed distance through them, marking them for a few seconds. At the end of the dash, Skaarl gains bonus movement speed for a second and can recast this ability. Recast: Skaarl dashes through the marked target. This subsequent charge can cross terrain.

abilities.name: Chaaaaaaaarge!!!
abilities.riotDesc: Kled and Skaarl charge to a location, leaving a speed-granting trail behind them and gaining a shield. Skaarl locks onto and rams the first enemy champion encountered.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charge towards a target location while leaving a draft zone behind him which allows his teammates to gain bonus movement speed (capping at 650) on following Kled. Kled also gains a shield and bonus movement speed, and the shield lasts for 2 seconds upon finishing the charge. Kled will home in on the first champion in range, colliding with the first visible enemy champion on the way, to knock them back and deal physical damage based on the time traveled.

combos.description: Start with Five AAs, then Q then E and then another two AAs before you E back out again!
Start with Q, then E followed by three AAs then E and finish with an AA
Start with E, then Q, then follow up with four AAs to proc your W.

KogMaw.name: Kog'Maw
KogMaw.title: the Mouth of the Abyss
KogMaw.blurb: Belched forth from a rotting Void incursion deep in the wastelands of Icathia, Kog'Maw is an inquisitive yet putrid creature with a caustic, gaping mouth. This particular Void-spawn needs to gnaw and drool on anything within reach to truly understand it...

abilities.name: Icathian Surprise
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: On dying, Kog'Maw's corpse remains on the map for 4 seconds. He can control the Movement of it but can't auto-attack or cast abilities. He is also invulnerable, untargetable, and gains 40% Movement Speed over the duration of 4 seconds. At the end of the duration, he explodes and deals true damage to all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Caustic Spittle
abilities.riotDesc: Kog'Maw launches a corrosive projectile which deals magic damage and corrodes the target's armor and magic resist for a short time. Kog'Maw also gains additional attack speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Gains bonus attack speed. Active: Launches a projectile in the target direction, dealing magic damage and shredding the armor and magic resistance of the first target it hits.

abilities.name: Bio-Arcane Barrage
abilities.riotDesc: Kog'Maw's attacks gain range and deal a percent of the target's maximum health as magic damage %i:OnHit% <OnHit>On-Hit</OnHit>.
abilities.mobaDesc: Kog'Maw's auto-attacks gain bonus attack range and deal on-hit magic damage to non-structural units for the next 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Void Ooze
abilities.riotDesc: Kog'Maw launches a peculiar ooze which damages all enemies it passes through and leaves a trail which slows enemies who stand on it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Spits a ball of gunk in the target location which deals magic damage and slows the enemies for 1 second. The gunk lasts for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Living Artillery
abilities.riotDesc: Kog'Maw fires an artillery shell at a great distance dealing magic damage (increased significantly on low health enemies) and revealing non-stealthed targets. Additionally, multiple Living Artilleries in a short period of time cause them to cost additional Mana.
abilities.mobaDesc: Launches a ball of acid at a target location. The ball drops to the ground after 0.6 seconds and deals magic damage based on the target's missing health. The damage is double against champions below 40% maximum health and the mana cost increases on consecutive casts.

balance.otherEffects: Q: Resistances reduction changed to 15 / 18 / 21 / 24 / 27%. W: Target health ratio changed to 2.5 / 3 / 3.5 / 4 / 4.5% of target's maximum health.

combos.description: For a quick burst E and instantly Q R.
A common fight opener is to E and instantly Q R. Follow up by quickly using W and then AA'ing.
To trade Q E instantly, quickly W and then AA.

KSante.name: K'Sante
KSante.title: the Pride of Nazumah
KSante.blurb: Defiant and courageous, K'Sante battles colossal beasts and ruthless Ascended to protect his home of Nazumah, a coveted oasis amid the sands of Shurima. But after a falling-out with his former partner, K'Sante realizes that in order to become a warrior...

abilities.name: Dauntless Instinct
abilities.mobaDesc: K'Sante's Abilities mark targets to take more damage on his next Attack.

abilities.name: Ntofo Strikes
abilities.riotDesc:
K'Sante strikes, damaging and slowing enemies in a short line.

On hit, grants a stack of Ntofo Strikes. At 2 stacks, K'Sante fires a shockwave that pulls enemies in.

When All Out, cooldown is reduced.

abilities.name: Path Maker
abilities.riotDesc:
K'Sante charges up, taking reduced damage, then dashes, knocking back and stunning enemies.

When All Out, deals increased damage and no longer knocks back or stuns.

abilities.name: Footwork
abilities.riotDesc:
K'Sante dashes and gains a shield. If targeting an ally, K'Sante dashes to the ally with increased range and both gain a shield.

When All Out, cooldown is reduced and speed is increased.

abilities.name: All Out
abilities.riotDesc: K'Sante knocks an enemy back, launching them through any wall in their path. Then, K'Sante goes All Out and dashes after them, gaining increased damage, healing, and transformed abilities at the cost of reduced defenses.

combos.description: Use your Q then auto attack until it's back off cooldown, then Q and AA again and finish off with your empowered Q and AA.

Leblanc.name: LeBlanc
Leblanc.title: the Deceiver
Leblanc.blurb: Mysterious even to other members of the Black Rose cabal, LeBlanc is but one of many names for a pale woman who has manipulated people and events since the earliest days of Noxus. Using her magic to mirror herself, the sorceress can appear to anyone...

abilities.name: Sigil of Malice
abilities.riotDesc: LeBlanc projects a sigil, dealing damage and marking the target for 3.5 seconds. Damaging the marked target with an ability detonates the sigil, dealing additional damage. If either part kills the target, Leblanc refunds the Mana cost and part of this spell's remaining Cooldown.
abilities.mobaDesc: Directs an orb at the target enemy, dealing magic damage and marking them for 3.5 seconds. On damaging a marked target with an ability, she deals the same amount of damage to the target as done initially by this ability.

abilities.name: Distortion
abilities.riotDesc: LeBlanc dashes to a location, dealing damage to enemies near her destination. For the next 4 seconds, activate Distortion again to return LeBlanc to her starting location.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes to a location and deals magic damage to all enemies upon arrival. This ability can be recast after 0.2 seconds. Doing so will result in LeBlanc blinking back to her initial position.

abilities.name: Ethereal Chains
abilities.riotDesc: LeBlanc launches a chain that shackles the first enemy hit. If the target remains shackled for 1.5 seconds, LeBlanc roots them and deals additional damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a chain in the target direction, dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit and tethering to them. If the tether lasts for 1.5 seconds, the target is rooted and takes additional magic damage.

abilities.name: Mimic
abilities.riotDesc: LeBlanc casts a mimicked version of one of her basic spells.
abilities.mobaDesc: Casts a mimicked version of her most recently used ability but with added effects. Mimic Sigil of Malice: Deals modified damage and double damage upon triggering the mark. Mimic Distortion: Deals modified damage. Mimic Ethereal Chains: Deals modified damage and double damage upon rooting.

combos.description: When further away trade by using W into melee range, AA Q instantly then W out.
The classic Leblanc trade is Q then W on your enemy, AA and W out at the end of the AA animation.

LeeSin.name: Lee Sin
LeeSin.title: the Blind Monk
LeeSin.blurb: A master of Ionia's ancient martial arts, Lee Sin is a principled fighter who channels the essence of the dragon spirit to face any challenge. Though he lost his sight many years ago, the warrior-monk has devoted his life to protecting his homeland...

abilities.name: Flurry
abilities.mobaDesc: After Lee Sin uses an ability, his next 2 basic attacks gain Attack Speed and return Energy.

abilities.name: Sonic Wave / Resonating Strike
abilities.riotDesc:
Sonic Wave: Lee Sin projects a discordant wave of sound to locate his enemies, dealing physical damage to the first enemy it encounters. If Sonic Wave hits, Lee Sin can cast Resonating Strike for the next 3 seconds.
Resonating Strike: Lee Sin dashes to the enemy hit by Sonic Wave, dealing physical damage based on the target's missing Health.

abilities.name: Safeguard / Iron Will
abilities.riotDesc:
Safeguard: Lee Sin rushes to target ally, shielding himself from damage. If the ally is a champion, they are also shielded. After using Safeguard, Lee Sin can cast Iron Will.
Iron Will: Lee Sin's intense training allows him to thrive in battle. Lee Sin gains Omnivamp.

abilities.name: Tempest / Cripple
abilities.riotDesc:
Tempest: Lee Sin smashes the ground, sending out a shockwave that deals magic damage and reveals enemy units hit. If Tempest hits an enemy, Lee Sin can cast cripple.
Cripple: Lee Sin cripples nearby enemies damaged by Tempest, reducing their Move Speed. Move Speed recovers gradually over the duration.

abilities.name: Dragon's Rage
abilities.riotDesc: Lee Sin performs a powerful roundhouse kick launching his target back, dealing physical damage to the target and any enemies they collide with. Enemies the target collides with are knocked into the air for a short duration. This technique was taught to him by Jesse Perring, although Lee Sin does not kick players off the map.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done increased by 10%. Shielding done increased by 20%. Energy regeneration increased by 20%.

combos.description: Start with E, then AA, E, AA, W, AA, Q, AA, AA and finish with your Q again.

Leona.name: Leona
Leona.title: the Radiant Dawn
Leona.blurb: Imbued with the fire of the sun, Leona is a holy warrior of the Solari who defends Mount Targon with her Zenith Blade and the Shield of Daybreak. Her skin shimmers with starfire while her eyes burn with the power of the celestial Aspect within her...

abilities.name: Sunlight
abilities.mobaDesc: Leona's abilities mark enemies hit for 2.5 seconds. Damage dealt by all champions on marked targets will allow the allied champion to deal bonus magic damage after consuming the mark.

abilities.name: Shield of Daybreak
abilities.riotDesc: Leona uses her shield to perform her next basic attack, dealing bonus magic damage and stunning the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Her next auto-attack within 6 seconds gains bonus range and deals bonus magic damage. It will also CC the target for 1 second.

abilities.name: Eclipse
abilities.riotDesc: Leona raises her shield to gain Damage Reduction, Armor, and Magic Resist. When the duration first ends, if there are nearby enemies, she will deal magic damage to them and prolong the duration of the effect.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains flat damage reduction and gains bonus armor and magic resistance for 3 seconds. This duration is increased for 3 more seconds if her W detonates and hits at least one enemy champion.

abilities.name: Zenith Blade
abilities.riotDesc: Leona projects a solar image of her sword, dealing magic damage to all enemies in a line. When the image fades, the last enemy champion struck will be briefly immobilized and Leona will dash to them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Directs a projectile in the direction of her choice which deals magic damage to all enemies hit. If she hits an enemy champion, she will dash to the last one hit and root them for 0.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Solar Flare
abilities.riotDesc: Leona calls down a beam of solar energy, dealing damage to enemies in an area. Enemies in the center of the area are stunned, while enemies on the outside are slowed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Calls down a beam of solar energy to the target location which strikes after a brief delay. It deals magic damage and stuns anyone who is hit by the center of the ability. Enemies hit by the outer circumference of the ability are slowed instead.

combos.description: Take out a freshly placed enemy ward on your own by using AA then a quick Q AA.
Your standard level 2 all in is to E then instantly AA Q when you land.

Lillia.name: Lillia
Lillia.title: the Bashful Bloom
Lillia.blurb: Intensely shy, the fae fawn Lillia skittishly wanders Ionia's forests. Hiding just out of sight of mortals—whose mysterious natures have long captivated, but intimidated, her—Lillia hopes to discover why their dreams no longer reach the ancient Dreaming...

abilities.name: Dream-Laden Bough
abilities.mobaDesc: Hitting a champion or monster with a skill will deal additional max Health damage over time.

abilities.name: Blooming Blows
abilities.riotDesc: Passively, Lillia gains stacking Move Speed when hitting enemies with spells. She can activate this to deal magic damage to nearby enemies, dealing extra true damage on the edge.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Lillia gains a Prance stack for 5 seconds whenever she hits at least 1 enemy with an ability, which can refresh up to 5 times. Stacks are lost every second. Each stack she has grants her bonus movement speed. Active: Lillia swings her censer around dealing damage to nearby enemies. Enemies hit by the outer edge of the area take the bonus true damage.

abilities.name: Watch Out! Eep!
abilities.riotDesc: Lillia deals damage in a nearby area, dealing heavy damage in the center.
abilities.mobaDesc: Lillia dashes towards a target area before winding up a strike and dealing damage to enemies in the target area. She doesn’t actually go into the target area- just in front of it. Enemies hit within the center are dealt increased damage.

abilities.name: Swirlseed
abilities.riotDesc: Lillia hurls a seed that damages and slows those it lands on. If it doesn't hit anything, it will continue rolling until it hits a wall or target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Lillia bowls a seed in a target area that rolls forward until it hits an enemy champion or terrain. Once it comes in to contact with something or someone, it deals damage in a cone and slows targets.

abilities.name: Lilting Lullaby
abilities.riotDesc: Lillia causes all enemies with Dream Dust on them to become Drowsy before falling asleep. Those enemies will take extra damage on being forcibly woken up.
abilities.mobaDesc: Lilia casts a lullaby over all targetable enemies affect by Dram Dust rendering them drowsy then puts them to sleep. The next non-minion/non-persistent damage taken by a sleeping champion will consume the debuff and deal extra damage.

combos.description: Hit your target from range with your E and then press your R. Then W onto your enemy and Q them to burst them down.
Start with an AA, Q and AA. Then W, AA, E, AA, AA and Q again to finish the combo.
Lead with your E then W onto your enemy and finish off with a fadeaway Q!

Lissandra.name: Lissandra
Lissandra.title: the Ice Witch
Lissandra.blurb: Lissandra's magic twists the pure power of ice into something dark and terrible. With the force of her black ice, she does more than freeze—she impales and crushes those who oppose her. To the terrified denizens of the north, she is known only as ''The...

abilities.name: Iceborn Subjugation
abilities.mobaDesc: When an enemy champion dies near Lissandra, she spawns a Frozen Thrall from their corpse. These thralls are invulnerable and untargetable who will chase enemies, prioritizing champions. They shatter near enemies, dealing magic damage.

abilities.name: Ice Shard
abilities.riotDesc: Throws a spear of ice that shatters when it hits an enemy, dealing magic damage and slowing Move Speed. Shards pass through the target, dealing the same damage to other enemies hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a spear of ice in a line that deals magic damage to the first enemy hit and slows them for 1.5 seconds. On damaging an enemy, the shard shatters and gains increased range. It deals the same damage to other enemies hit but doesn't slow them.

abilities.name: Ring of Frost
abilities.riotDesc: Freezes nearby enemies in ice, dealing magic damage and rooting them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Roots all nearby enemies and deals magic damage to them.

abilities.name: Glacial Path
abilities.riotDesc: Lissandra creates an ice claw that deals magic damage. Reactivating this ability transports Lissandra to the claw's current location.
abilities.mobaDesc: Projects a claw of ice in the target direction. It deals magic damage to all enemies it passes through. This ability can be recast and doing so will consume the claw while making Lissandra blink to the claw's location.

abilities.name: Frozen Tomb
abilities.riotDesc: If cast on an enemy champion, the target is frozen solid, stunning it. If cast on Lissandra, she encases herself in dark ice, healing herself while becoming untargetable and invulnerable. Dark ice then emanates from the target dealing magic damage to enemies and slowing Move Speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Enemy Cast: Freezes the target champion and Stuns them for 1.5 seconds. Self Cast: Places herself in stasis for 2.5 seconds while healing herself over the duration. This heal increases based on the missing health of Lissandra. Any champion near Lissandra will be slowed and will take magic damage as well.

combos.description: To combo from further away E towards your target then reactivate it once you are on top of them. Instantly W AA followed by Q AA.
You can also quickly trade with W then instantly using E Q followed by an AA.
For your full combo without R, Q and E towards your target instantly. Then AA, reactivate E and instantly W AA.

Locke.name: Locke
Locke.title: the Ashen Exorcist
Locke.blurb: A nail-slinging exorcist versed in forbidden rites, Corvin Locke is the progeny of Demacian occultists. Born into lies and hypocrisy, he learned young that demons aren't the cause of humanity's darkness, but the consequence. Now, Locke tears through...

abilities.name: Silver Stake
abilities.riotDesc: Locke's attacks deal additional magic damage On-Hit, increased based on enemy missing Health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Locke's attacks deal additional magic damage On-Hit, increased based on enemy missing Health.

abilities.name: Ritual Nails
abilities.riotDesc: Locke readies a set of Soul Nails to throw, dealing damage to and marking enemies hit. Locke can consume the marks to deal bonus damage with his attacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: Locke throws a nail, dealing damage and slowing enemies that it hits. He can activate this ability up to 3 times in total. The slow is increases with the more stacks of Q he lands on the same target. If Locke attacks the champion who is hit by the nails, it will deal increased damage and consume all the nails.

abilities.name: Soul Ignition
abilities.riotDesc: Locke ignites his soul, gaining Attack Speed and Move Speed, and dealing damage to himself. At the end of the duration, Locke will heal back a portion of the damage he takes during the effect.
abilities.mobaDesc: He gains bonus movement speed briefly. While this ability is active, he suffers from true damage based on his current health. When recast or when the ability ends, he heals based on the damage taken. You can recast this ability when you’re CC locked as well.

abilities.name: Ashen Pursuit
abilities.riotDesc: Locke teleports to a location before dashing to attack his next target, dealing damage to enemies passed through.
abilities.mobaDesc: He blinks, dealing damage to targets. He will then dash towards them, dealing damage to enemies in the path. Any enemies who are impacted by Ritual Nail stacks will be triggered. If you get a kill, then this ability will be reset.

abilities.name: Purgatory
abilities.riotDesc: Locke throws a binding artifact that deals damage and potentially executes enemies hit. Locke gains additional power for sealing away enemy champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: He throws out an AOE ability that deals damage and slows enemies in the area. While active, enemies who are below the threshold will be executed. After the Ultimate times out, it will remain on the map where Locke can pick it up to reduce his Ultimate’s cooldown and get some additional stats.

Lucian.name: Lucian
Lucian.title: the Purifier
Lucian.blurb: Lucian, a Sentinel of Light, is a grim hunter of wraiths and specters, pursuing them relentlessly and annihilating them with his twin relic pistols. After the specter Thresh slew his wife, Lucian embarked on the path of vengeance—but even with her...

abilities.name: Lightslinger
abilities.mobaDesc: On using an ability, Lucian's next auto-attack will shoot an additional shot after a brief delay. This second shot deals reduced damage to champions but is affected by critical strike modifiers and can apply on-hit effects.

abilities.name: Piercing Light
abilities.riotDesc: Lucian shoots a bolt of piercing light through a target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a laser in a straight line in the direction of the enemy. It deals physical damage to all enemies hit.

abilities.name: Ardent Blaze
abilities.riotDesc: Lucian shoots a missile that explodes in a star shape, marking and briefly revealing enemies. Lucian gains Move Speed for attacking marked enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a star-shaped shot that explodes in a cross pattern upon hitting an enemy or reaching its maximum range. It deals magic damage and reveals the area for a second. Enemies hit by this ability are marked for 6 seconds, and Lucian gets bonus Movement Speed for 1 second if he or his allied champions damage a marked target.

abilities.name: Relentless Pursuit
abilities.riotDesc: Lucian quickly dashes a short distance. Lightslinger attacks reduce Relentless Pursuit's cooldown.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: This ability's cooldown is reduced by a second for each Passive shot landed. This cooldown reduction is doubled to 2 seconds against enemy champions. Active: Dashes to a target location.

abilities.name: The Culling
abilities.riotDesc: Lucian unleashes a torrent of shots from his weapons.
abilities.mobaDesc: Lucian channels and rapidly shoots in the target direction for 3 seconds, dealing physical damage to the first enemy they collide with. This ability can be recast after 0.75 seconds and Lucian is ghosted for the entire duration.

balance.otherEffects: Tenacity increased by 20%. Ability haste increased by 10.

combos.description: Another basic trade is to Q then AA and instantly E after the first shot. Follow up by an AA then W after the first shot and AA.
For a basic trade you can also E then AA Q, followed by AA W AA.
To get a movement speed buff early in your combo W then AA and instantly E to reposition after the first shot, followed by an AA. Q after the first shot and AA.

Lulu.name: Lulu
Lulu.title: the Fae Sorceress
Lulu.blurb: The yordle mage Lulu is known for conjuring dreamlike illusions and fanciful creatures as she roams Runeterra with her fairy companion Pix. Lulu shapes reality on a whim, warping the fabric of the world, and what she views as the constraints of this...

abilities.name: Pix, Faerie Companion
abilities.mobaDesc: Lulu is assisted by Pix who fires a barrage of 3 bolts to anyone Lulu (or the champion he is attached to) auto-attacks. These attacks deal bonus magic damage and these bolts can be intercepted by other enemy units when Lulu tries to attack a target.

abilities.name: Glitterlance
abilities.riotDesc: Pix and Lulu each fire a bolt of magical energy that damages and heavily slows all enemies it hits.
abilities.mobaDesc: Lulu and Pix each fire a magic bolt towards the target direction. The bolts deal magic damage and slow the targets the bolts pass through. The full damage is taken by the first target only though, the remaining targets take reduced magic damage.

abilities.name: Whimsy
abilities.riotDesc: If cast on an ally, grants them Attack Speed and Move Speed for a short time. If cast on an enemy, turns them into an adorable critter that can't attack or cast spells.
abilities.mobaDesc: Enemy Cast: Transforms the target into a harmless squirrel. The cast has a travel time but the polymorphed target won't be able to attack and will have its movement speed reduced by 60. Ally Cast: Gives the ally bonus Movement Speed and attack speed for a few seconds.

abilities.name: Help, Pix!
abilities.riotDesc: If cast on an ally, commands Pix to jump to an ally and shield them. He then follows them and aids their attacks. If cast on an enemy, commands Pix to jump to an enemy and damage them. He then follows them and grants you vision of that enemy.
abilities.mobaDesc: Enemy Cast: Deals magic damage to the target and reveals them for 4 seconds. Ally Cast: Shield's the targeted ally for 2.5 seconds, provided that they are a champion and not some other unit.

abilities.name: Wild Growth
abilities.riotDesc: Lulu enlarges an ally, knocking nearby enemies into the air and granting the ally a large amount of bonus health. For the next few seconds, that ally gains an aura that slows nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Enlarges target ally champion (including herself) and gives them bonus health. It also grants them an aura that slows nearby enemies for the duration. On-activation, nearby enemies around the target are knocked up.

combos.description: Go more aggressive by using E on your target then instantly Q. AA followed by a W on your opponent and another AA.
Quickly trade with Q then instantly E on your target and AA
To trade E yourself then AA and Q in between your AA timer.

Lux.name: Lux
Lux.title: the Lady of Luminosity
Lux.blurb: Luxanna Crownguard hails from Demacia, an insular realm where magical abilities are viewed with fear and suspicion. Able to bend light to her will, she grew up dreading discovery and exile, and was forced to keep her power secret, in order to preserve...

abilities.name: Illumination
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Lux's damaging spells mark enemies with energy for 6 seconds. Lux's auto-attacks and Ultimate against these targets consume the mark to deal bonus magic damage.

abilities.name: Light Binding
abilities.riotDesc: Lux releases a sphere of light that binds and deals damage to up to two enemy units.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throw a projectile in the target direction which roots the first two targets that it hits. It also deals magic damage.

abilities.name: Prismatic Barrier
abilities.riotDesc: Lux throws her wand and bends the light around any friendly target it touches, protecting them from enemy damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws her wand in the target direction. Any allied champion in the path of the wand (and Lux herself) is shielded from some amount of damage. After reaching its maximum range, the wand returns back and shields any allied champion that the wand passes through on its way back to Lux. The shields can stack if the wand passes through the same ally twice.

abilities.name: Lucent Singularity
abilities.riotDesc: Fires an anomaly of twisted light to an area, which slows nearby enemies. Lux can detonate it to damage enemies in the area of effect.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a ball of light at a location which then spreads out once it reaches the target area. The area lasts up to 5 seconds and any enemy unit in the are will be slowed. At the end of the duration, or if Lux recast's this ability, the area detonates and deals magic damage to all enemy units within it.

abilities.name: Final Spark
abilities.riotDesc: After gathering energy, Lux fires a beam of light that deals damage to all targets in the area. In addition, triggers Lux's passive ability and refreshes the Illumination debuff duration.

balance.otherEffects: Shielding done reduced by 10%. R: Cooldown changed to 80 / 70 / 60 seconds.

combos.description: Another way to trade is to Q then AA and quickly E right after. AA again while making sure to reactivate E before the AA lands.
A nice and simple trade is to E then AA and reactivate E right before your AA lands.
If you can catch someone out Q E R as quickly as possible and reactivate E as soon as you can.

Malphite.name: Malphite
Malphite.title: Shard of the Monolith
Malphite.blurb: A massive creature of living stone, Malphite struggles to impose blessed order on a chaotic world. Birthed as a servitor-shard to an otherworldly obelisk known as the Monolith, he used his tremendous elemental strength to maintain and protect his...

abilities.name: Granite Shield
abilities.mobaDesc: Malphite is shielded by a layer of rock which absorbs damage up to 10% of his maximum Health. If Malphite has not been hit for a few seconds, this effect recharges.

abilities.name: Seismic Shard
abilities.riotDesc: Malphite sends a shard of the earth through the ground at his foe, dealing damage upon impact and stealing Move Speed for 3 seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Send a rolling rock towards a target enemy that deals magic damage. Malphite gains bonus movement speed, while the target loses movement speed for 3 seconds upon impact.

abilities.name: Thunderclap
abilities.riotDesc: Malphite attacks with such force that it creates a sonic boom. For the next few seconds, his attacks create aftershocks in front of him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Gains bonus armor which is tripled when Granite Shield is active. Active: Malphite's next auto-attack gains bonus range and deals bonus physical damage on-hit. Remaining auto-attacks within the next 5 seconds also trigger an on-hit cone, which deals physical damage to all enemies hit in the direction of the initial target.

abilities.name: Ground Slam
abilities.riotDesc: Malphite slams the ground, sending out a shockwave that deals magic damage based on his Armor and reduces the Attack Speed of enemies for a short duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slams the ground, dealing magic damage and crippling all nearby enemies for a few seconds.

abilities.name: Unstoppable Force
abilities.riotDesc: Malphite launches himself to a location at high speed, damaging enemies and knocking them into the air.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes unstoppably to the target location, deals magic damage and knocks any enemy near his arrival point.

combos.description: For your basic engage use R. Upon landing instantly E Q then AA W.
To maximise your CC Use R. Upon landing instantly AA W followed by quickly using Q E then an AA.
Your basic combo against abilty based champs is to Q then walk forward, AA once in range and instantly W once it completes to reset the AA. Follow up with an instant E then an AA.

Malzahar.name: Malzahar
Malzahar.title: the Prophet of the Void
Malzahar.blurb: A zealous seer dedicated to the unification of all life, Malzahar truly believes the newly emergent Void to be the path to Runeterra's salvation. In the desert wastes of Shurima, he followed the voices that whispered in his mind, all the way to ancient...

abilities.name: Void Shift
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains a shield on not taking damage for a certain duration. This shield makes him immune to crowd control and makes him take 90% reduced damage.

abilities.name: Call of the Void
abilities.riotDesc: Malzahar opens up two portals to the Void. After a short delay, they fire projectiles that deal Magic Damage and silence enemy champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: Opens two portals which are perpendicular to thee target's location. After a brief delay, all enemies between the portals take magic damage and are silenced.

abilities.name: Void Swarm
abilities.riotDesc: Malzahar summons Voidlings to attack nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Gains a stack of Zz'Rot Swarm when he casts another ability. This can stack up to 2 times. Active: Consumes all the Zz'Rot Swarm stacks and summons voidlings at a target location after a brief delay. These voidlings deal magic damage with their attacks.

abilities.name: Malefic Visions
abilities.riotDesc:
Malzahar infects his target's mind with cruel visions of their demise, dealing damage over time. Using Malzahar's other spells on the target will refresh the visions.

If the target dies while afflicted by the visions, they pass on to a nearby enemy unit and Malzahar gains Mana. Malzahar's Voidlings are attracted to affected units.
abilities.mobaDesc: Afflicts the target with visions, dealing them magic damage every 0.5 seconds over 4 seconds. If the afflicted target is damaged with Malzahar's Q or R, then the duration of this ability will be refreshed. If the afflicted target dies during this time, the visions pass on to the closest enemy, refreshing the duration and restoring some mana.

abilities.name: Nether Grasp
abilities.riotDesc: Malzahar channels the essence of the Void to suppress an enemy champion over a zone of damaging negative energy.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tethers to the target enemy champion, supressing and revealing them for 2.5 seconds. The target takes magic damage every 0.25 seconds. A zone is created below the target which lasts 5 seconds and deals magic damage every 0.5 seconds to all enemies within.

balance.otherEffects: Q: Deals 80% damage to minions (60% total). W: Deals 80% damage to minions (60% total). R: Null Zone deals 80% damage to minions (60% total).

combos.description: For your full ult combo Q then W then instantly E R.
When trading without swarm stacks E then Q W instantly and quickly AA right after.
A quick combo with swarm stacks starts with E then as quickly as you can W Q R.

Maokai.name: Maokai
Maokai.title: the Twisted Treant
Maokai.blurb: Maokai is a rageful, towering treant who fights the unnatural horrors of the Shadow Isles. He was twisted into a force of vengeance after a magical cataclysm destroyed his home, surviving undeath only through the Waters of Life infused within his...

abilities.name: Sap Magic
abilities.mobaDesc: His next auto-attack becomes unstoppable and heals him after a brief delay. Every time Maokai casts and ability or is struck by an enemy's ability, his Passive's Cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Bramble Smash
abilities.riotDesc: Maokai knocks back nearby enemies with a shockwave, dealing magic damage and slowing them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Releases a shockwave that travels in a line, dealing magic damage to all enemies it passes through and slowing them by 99% for 0.25-second. Enemies near Maokai, are stunned for 0.5 seconds and will be knocked back.

abilities.name: Twisted Advance
abilities.riotDesc: Maokai contorts into a mass of moving roots, becoming untargetable and dashing to the target. Upon arrival, he roots the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes to the target enemy while being untargetable and dealing magic damage on arrival. He will root them for a duration upon arrival.

abilities.name: Sapling Toss
abilities.riotDesc: Maokai flings a sapling to the target area to stand guard. More effective in brush.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tosses a sapling to the target location. These saplings react to the first nearby enemy, chasing them for 2.5 seconds and exploding either upon contact or at the end of the duration. These saplings will deal magic damage to all nearby enemies and slow them for a duration. On tossing a sapling in a brush, the sapling gets bonus damage and an increased duration on the map.

abilities.name: Nature's Grasp
abilities.riotDesc: Maokai summons a colossal wall of brambles and thorns that slowly advances forwards, damaging and rooting any enemies in the path.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons a colossal wall of 5 brambles that advance forward, accelerating slowly. Each vine stops at the first enemy champion hit, dealing magic damage and rooting them for a duration.

balance.otherEffects: E: AP ratio changed to 20% AP. Total enhanced AP ratio changed to 40% AP.

combos.description: One of the most effective trades starts with using E into a brush then W your target. AA as soon as you arrive then instantly Q your target towards your sapling and AA.
Engage a mid range fight with W then instantly Q R E as quickly as you can followed by some AA's.
To engage from further away R then E right before using W. Continue to AA until the root ends, then Q and AA again.

MasterYi.name: Master Yi
MasterYi.title: the Wuju Bladesman
MasterYi.blurb: Master Yi has tempered his body and sharpened his mind, so that thought and action have become almost as one. Though he chooses to enter into violence only as a last resort, the grace and speed of his blade ensures resolution is always swift. As one of...

abilities.name: Alpha Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Master Yi teleports across the battlefield with blinding speed, dealing physical damage to multiple units in his path, while simultaneously becoming untargetable. Alpha Strike can critically strike and deals bonus physical damage to monsters. Basic attacks reduce Alpha Strike's cooldown.
abilities.mobaDesc: Vanishes for a while, and strikes up to 4 targets before re-appearing again. He will re-appear if there are no more targets to attack and will deal physical damage to each target. If there are no targets nearby, he may strike the same enemies again, dealing 25% damage instantly.

abilities.name: Alpha Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Master Yi teleports across the battlefield with blinding speed, dealing physical damage to multiple units in his path, while simultaneously becoming untargetable. Alpha Strike can critically strike and deals bonus physical damage to monsters. Basic attacks reduce Alpha Strike's cooldown.
abilities.mobaDesc: Vanishes for a while, and strikes up to 4 targets before re-appearing again. He will re-appear if there are no more targets to attack and will deal physical damage to each target. If there are no targets nearby, he may strike the same enemies again, dealing 25% damage instantly.

abilities.name: Meditate
abilities.riotDesc: Master Yi rejuvenates his body by focus of mind, restoring Health and taking reduced damage for a short time. In addition, Master Yi will gain stacks of Double Strike and pause the remaining duration on Wuju Style and Highlander for each second he channels.
abilities.mobaDesc: Channels for 4 seconds, healing himself and taking reduced damage for the duration. He also pauses his E and R durations and grants one stack of his Passive per second. This can be interrupted by CC. After the channel ends, Master Yi reduces incoming damage for another 0.25 seconds but reduces greater damage vs turret damage, than any other form of damage.

abilities.name: Wuju Style
abilities.riotDesc: Grants bonus true damage on basic attacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: Empowers his sword to deal bonus true damage per auto-attack for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Highlander
abilities.riotDesc: Master Yi moves with unparalleled agility, temporarily increasing his Move Speed and Attack Speed as well as making him immune to all slowing effects. While active, Champion kills or assists extend Highlander's duration. Passively reduces cooldown for his other abilities on a kill or assist.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Takedowns on champions will reduce the cooldown of Master Yi's basic abilities by 70% Active: Master Yi cleanses himself of all slows and cripples. He is ghosted for the next 7 seconds and gains bonus attack speed and movement speed. He also becomes slow immune and immune to cripples. While active, champion takedowns extend the duration of Highlander by 7 seconds.

balance.otherEffects: No special effects for Master Yi.

combos.description: A normal fight is as simple as using E before your first AA, AA twice more and Q AA
Use W to cancel your Auto Attack. AA then instantly W and AA.

Mel.name: Mel
Mel.title: the Soul's Reflection
Mel.blurb: Mel Medarda is the presumed heir of the Medarda family, once one of the most powerful in Noxus. In appearance she is a graceful aristocrat, but beneath the surface lies a skilled politician who makes it her business to know everything about everyone she...

abilities.name: Searing Brilliance
abilities.mobaDesc:
Whenever Mel uses an ability, she gains three bonus projectiles (up to nine maximum) on her next attack.

When Mel deals damage through an ability or attack, she applies Overwhelm, which can stack infinitely. If the enemy is hit by Mel with enough Overwhelm damage, the stacks are consumed to execute the target.

abilities.name: Radiant Volley
abilities.riotDesc: Mel fires a barrage of projectiles that explode around a target location, dealing damage repeatedly to enemies within the area.
abilities.mobaDesc: Mel fires a barrage of projectiles that explode around a target location, dealing damage repeatedly to enemies within the area.

abilities.name: Rebuttal
abilities.riotDesc: Mel forms a barrier around herself that reflects enemy projectiles back at the attacker, prevents her from taking damage, and grants her movement speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Mel forms a barrier around herself that reflects enemy projectiles back at the attacker, prevents her from taking damage, and grants her movement speed.

abilities.name: Solar Snare
abilities.riotDesc: Mel fires a radiant orb forward, rooting those at its center while the area around it slows enemies and deals damage over time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Mel fires a radiant orb forward, rooting those at its center while the area around it slows enemies and deals damage over time.

abilities.name: Golden Eclipse
abilities.riotDesc:
Mel strikes all enemies marked with Overwhelm regardless of their distance from her, dealing additional damage for each stack of Overwhelm.

Ranks of Golden Eclipse increase Overwhelm's damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Mel strikes all enemies marked with Overwhelm regardless of their distance from her, dealing additional damage for each stack of Overwhelm. Ranks of Golden Eclipse increase Overwhelm's damage.

combos.description: Use E, then Q and R to finish.
Press Q then AA, W, AA, E, AA, AA, AA, then Q and R.

Milio.name: Milio
Milio.title: The Gentle Flame
