Milio.blurb: Milio is a warmhearted boy from Ixtal who has, despite his young age, mastered the fire axiom and discovered something new: soothing fire. With this newfound power, Milio plans to help his family escape their exile by joining the Yun Tal—just like his...

abilities.name: Fired Up!
abilities.mobaDesc: Milio's abilities enchant allies on touch, making their next damage deal a burst of extra damage and burn the target.

abilities.name: Ultra Mega Fire Kick
abilities.riotDesc: Kick a ball that knocks back an enemy. The ball launches upward on hit and falls toward the enemy, damaging and slowing enemies in the area upon impact.
abilities.mobaDesc: Kick a ball that knocks back an enemy. On hit, the ball bounces behind the target, damaging and slowing enemies in the area upon impact.

abilities.name: Cozy Campfire
abilities.riotDesc: Create an empowering zone that heals allies and increases attack range to those inside. The zone follows the ally nearest to the cast point.
abilities.mobaDesc: Create an empowering zone that heals allies and increases Attack Range for those inside. The zone follows the ally nearest to the cast point.

abilities.name: Warm Hugs
abilities.riotDesc: Milio tosses a shield to an ally, temporarily increasing their movement speed. This ability has 2 charges.
abilities.mobaDesc: Milio tosses a shield to an ally, temporarily increasing their movement speed.

abilities.name: Breath of Life
abilities.riotDesc: Milio unleashes a wave of soothing flames that heal and remove crowd control effects from allies in range.
abilities.mobaDesc: Milio unleashes a wave of soothing flames that heal and remove crowd control effects from allies in range.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done reduced by 5%. Shielding done reduced by 10%. Ability haste reduced by 10.

combos.description: Start with your E, Q and AA then W, AA, E, AA and AA again to finish the trade.
Buff yourself with your E, then follow up with your R, W and Q.
Engage with your Q then use your utility with your E's shield, your W and then your E again to finish.

MissFortune.name: Miss Fortune
MissFortune.title: the Bounty Hunter
MissFortune.blurb: A Bilgewater captain famed for her looks but feared for her ruthlessness, Sarah Fortune paints a stark figure among the hardened criminals of the port city. As a child, she witnessed the reaver king Gangplank murder her family—an act she brutally...

abilities.name: Love Tap
abilities.mobaDesc: Miss Fortune's next auto-attack against a unique enemy unit will deal bonus physical damage to them.

abilities.name: Double Up
abilities.riotDesc: Miss Fortune fires a bullet at an enemy, damaging them and a target behind them. Both strikes can also apply Love Tap.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a shot at a target enemy unit which deals physical damage. The shot will ricochet to the unit standing behind it and deal physical damage to that target as well. The 2nd target will take bonus physical damage if the initial target dies on being Q'd. The ricochet damage is affected by critical strike modifiers.

abilities.name: Strut
abilities.riotDesc: Miss Fortune passively gains Move Speed when not attacked. This ability can be activated to grant bonus Attack Speed for a short duration. While it's on cooldown, Love Taps reduce the remaining cooldown of Strut.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Gains bonus Movement Speed if she has not taken damage in the last 5 seconds. This speed increases to a greater amount after another 5 seconds. Active: Gains bonus attack speed for 4 seconds and brings this ability's passive effect to full power. Marking a new target with your Passive will reduce this ability's cooldown by 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Make It Rain
abilities.riotDesc: Miss Fortune reveals an area with a flurry of bullets, dealing waves of damage to opponents and slowing them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Rains down bullets on a target location for 2 seconds, providing vision of that area and slowing enemies in that area while dealing magic damage to them.

abilities.name: Bullet Time
abilities.riotDesc: Miss Fortune channels a barrage of bullets into a cone in front of her, dealing large amounts of damage to enemies. Each wave of Bullet Time can critically strike
abilities.mobaDesc: Channels for 3 seconds while firing several waves of bullets in a cone towards the target location. Each wave deals physical damage and the waves can critically strike.

balance.otherEffects: No special effects for Miss Fortune.

combos.description: The most basic way to maximise your R damage is to E on your target, then instantly R.
To normally trade E on your target, then W right before you AA and instantly Q AA after.
Use W then Q AA for an extremely quick trade.

MonkeyKing.name: Wukong
MonkeyKing.title: the Monkey King
MonkeyKing.blurb: Wukong is a vastayan trickster who uses his strength, agility, and intelligence to confuse his opponents and gain the upper hand. After finding a lifelong friend in the warrior known as Master Yi, Wukong became the last student of the ancient martial...

abilities.name: Stone Skin
abilities.mobaDesc: Wukong gains bonus armor and regenerates max health every 5 seconds. These effects are increased whenever Wukong or his clone damage an enemy champion or monster.

abilities.name: Crushing Blow
abilities.riotDesc: Wukong's next attack gains attack range, deals bonus damage, and reduces the target's armor for a few seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Wukong empowers his staff, causing his next basic attack to have extra damage and range while reducing the enemies armor. Cooldown is slightly reduced if he or his clone damage an enemy. His Q is an auto-attack reset.

abilities.name: Warrior Trickster
abilities.riotDesc: Wukong becomes <font color='#91d7ee'>Invisible</font> and dashes in a direction, leaving behind a clone that will attack nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Wukong dashes in a direction, entering invisibility for 1 second and leaving behind a decoy of himself. The clone can auto attack and cast R. The clone will not knock up enemies who were already knocked up by Wukong though.

abilities.name: Nimbus Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Wukong dashes to a targeted enemy and sends out images to attack enemies near his target, dealing damage to each enemy struck.
abilities.mobaDesc: Wukong dashes to a target enemy and sends out clones to attack 2 nearby enemies. Upon hitting the target, Wukong gains bonus attack speed.

abilities.name: Cyclone
abilities.riotDesc:
Wukong's extends his staff and spins it around repeatedly, gaining Move Speed.

Enemies struck take damage and are knocked up.
abilities.mobaDesc: Wukong and his clone spin their staffs for up to 2 seconds while gaining bonus movement speed. They will knock up and deal damage to enemies who are in the zone. Take note that they can only be knocked up once and not twice, so the Clone can't knock up a previously knocked up champion by Wukong himself.

balance.otherEffects: W: Cooldown changed to 20 / 19 / 18 / 17 / 16 seconds. R: Cooldown changed to 140 / 120 / 100 seconds.

combos.description: Q then instantly W.
E onto your enemy, AA, W, AA, Q and finish with another AA.
E onto your target, AA, Q, AA.

Mordekaiser.name: Mordekaiser
Mordekaiser.title: the Iron Revenant
Mordekaiser.blurb: Twice slain and thrice born, Mordekaiser is a brutal warlord from a foregone epoch who uses his necromantic sorcery to bind souls into an eternity of servitude. Few now remain who remember his earlier conquests, or know the true extent of his powers—but...

abilities.name: Darkness Rise
abilities.mobaDesc: Morderkaiser's auto-attacks deal bonus magic damage on-hit. Damaging abilities or auto-attacks grant a stack per champion or large monster hit. This stacks up to 3 times. At 3 stacks, Mordekaiser deals magic damage per second to all enemies nearby and gains bonus movement speed.

abilities.name: Obliterate
abilities.riotDesc: Mordekaiser smashes the ground with his mace dealing damage to each enemy struck. Damage is increased when hitting a single enemy.
abilities.mobaDesc: Smashes the area in the direction of his choice, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit. It critically strikes if the ability hits only one enemy.

abilities.name: Indestructible
abilities.riotDesc: Mordekaiser stores damage he deals and takes to create a shield. He may consume the shield to heal.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Stores a portion of the damage he deals and takes as a potential shield on his secondary resource bar. The shield decays after not dealing or taking damage for a second. Consumes all the potential shield stacks to shield himself for an amount. The shield decays very slowly. The shield is converted to health on recasting this ability.

abilities.name: Death's Grasp
abilities.riotDesc: Mordekaiser pulls all enemies in an area.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Mordekaiser gains magic penetration Active: Grants sight of the area briefly and then pulls all enemies within. This deals magic damage.

abilities.name: Realm of Death
abilities.riotDesc: Mordekaiser drags his victim to a different dimension with him and steals a portion of their stats. If he kills them, he keeps the stats until the victim respawns.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slows the target and teleports both the target and himself to the Death Realm. Mordekaiser will steal stats from the target and will have 7 seconds to kill the target. If Mordekaiser successfully kills the target, he keeps some of the target's stats until the target respawns.

combos.description: Q then AA to proc your passive and E your target back into you if they start to run away.
To help guarantee your Q, E at close range then AA and Q them at their travel destination.
To trade and get your passive AA and Q between AA timers.

Morgana.name: Morgana
Morgana.title: the Fallen
Morgana.blurb: Conflicted between her celestial and mortal natures, Morgana bound her wings to embrace humanity, and inflicts her pain and bitterness upon the dishonest and the corrupt. She rejects laws and traditions she believes are unjust, and fights for truth from...

abilities.name: Soul Siphon
abilities.mobaDesc: Heals herself equal to 20% of ability damage dealt to champions, large minions, and large monsters.

abilities.name: Dark Binding
abilities.riotDesc: Morgana binds an enemy in place with dark magic, forcing them to feel the pain they've caused and dealing magic damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Releases a sphere of magic in a target direction. This deals magic damage and roots the first target that it hits.

abilities.name: Tormented Shadow
abilities.riotDesc: Morgana casts a cursed shadow on an area, damaging enemies who dare stand in her dark circle. They receive magic damage over time, which increases the lower health they are.
abilities.mobaDesc: Creates a puddle of dark magic at a place of her choice. Any enemy within it will take magic damage. This damage is increased based on the target's missing health.

abilities.name: Black Shield
abilities.riotDesc: Morgana anoints an ally with a protective barrier of starfire, which absorbs magical damage and disabling effects until it is broken.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shields a target allied champion for 5 seconds. This shield absorbs magic damage and grants Crowd Control immunity.

abilities.name: Soul Shackles
abilities.riotDesc: Morgana unleashes the full force of her Celestial power as she unbinds her wings and hovers above the ground. She lashes chains of dark pain onto nearby enemy champions, gaining Move Speed. The chains slow and deal initial damage and, after a delay, stun those who are unable to break them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tethers to all the enemies near her, dealing magic damage and gaining bonus Movement Speed towards them for 3 seconds. It also slows all enemies hit and provides true sight of them. If one or more targets are still tethered after 3 seconds, they take magic damage and are stunned for 1.5 seconds.

combos.description: Burst enemies with R then quickly Q W followed by AA's.
Lead with Q then W once you confirm it will land. Walk forward and E yourself then R once in range, then AA while maintaining the R tether. Use W as soon as it comes up and AA.
When close to an enemy R and maintain the tether then W AA right as it stuns. Use Q any time before the stun expires and continue to AA.

Naafiri.name: Naafiri
Naafiri.title: the Hound of a Hundred Bites
Naafiri.blurb: Across the sands of Shurima, a chorus of howls rings out. It is the call of the dune hounds, voracious predators who form packs and compete for the right to hunt in these barren lands. Among them, one pack stands above all, for they are driven not only...

abilities.name: We Are More
abilities.mobaDesc: Naafiri spawns Packmates that attack the targets of her attacks and abilities.

abilities.name: Darkin Daggers
abilities.riotDesc:
Naafiri hurls up to two daggers, each inflicting bleed, or each inflicting bonus damage if the target is already bleeding.

Packmates leap to attack the first champion or monster hit by this skill.
abilities.mobaDesc: Naafiri hurls up to two daggers, each inflicting bleed, or each inflicting bonus damage if the target is already bleeding. Packmates leap to attack champions hit by this skill.

abilities.name: The Call of the Pack
abilities.riotDesc: Naafiri becomes Untargetable and empowers her pack, spawning additional packmates and gaining increased Move Speed and Attack Damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Naafiri empowers her pack and spawns additional Packmates, gaining a burst of speed and vision and a shield when she attacks a champion. On first champion takedown, all effects are refreshed.

abilities.name: Eviscerate
abilities.riotDesc: Naafiri dashes and damages enemies in an area around her, recalling her packmates and fully healing them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Naafiri dashes and damages enemies in an area, recalling and healing her Packmates to full.

abilities.name: Hounds' Pursuit
abilities.riotDesc: Naafiri and her packmates dash at a champion, dealing damage. Naafiri reveals nearby enemies if she scores a takedown and can recast this Ability once. The second cast grants a shield.
abilities.mobaDesc: Naafiri and her packmates dash at an enemy, colliding with the first champion hit and dealing damage.

combos.description: Press Q then W, Q and E, then AA, AA.
Pop W, then Q, R, Q, E then AA, AA.
Use R, then Q, AA, E, Q, AA. Then W, and AA to finish.

Nami.name: Nami
Nami.title: the Tidecaller
Nami.blurb: A headstrong young vastaya of the seas, Nami was the first of the Marai tribe to leave the waves and venture onto dry land, when their ancient accord with the Targonians was broken. With no other option, she took it upon herself to complete the sacred...

abilities.name: Surging Tides
abilities.mobaDesc: Allied champions touched by any of Nami's abilities gain bonus movement speed for 1.5 seconds. This speed is doubled when touched by her Ultimate.

abilities.name: Aqua Prison
abilities.riotDesc: Sends a bubble to a target area, dealing damage and stunning all enemies on impact.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hurls a bubble towards the target area that always lands after a second. It deals magic damage to all enemies hit, reveals them and leaves them suspended in the air for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Ebb and Flow
abilities.riotDesc: Unleashes a stream of water that bounces back and forth between allied and enemy champions, healing allies and damaging enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: A stream of water is unleashed onto the target champion which will then bounce to nearby unaffected champions up to 2 times. It alternates between enemies and allies. This ability heals allied champions and deals damage to enemy champions with the damage/heal being modified every bounce.

abilities.name: Tidecaller's Blessing
abilities.riotDesc: Empowers an allied champion for a short duration. The ally's basic attacks and spells deal bonus magic damage and slow the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Blesses the target allied champion or herself for 6 seconds. The blessed targets' next three auto-attacks or abilities will deal bonus magic damage and slow them for 1 second.

abilities.name: Tidal Wave
abilities.riotDesc: Summons a massive Tidal Wave that knocks up, slows, and damages enemies. Allies hit gain double the effect of Surging Tides.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons a tidal wave which travels in the target direction. It deals magic damage to all enemies hit, knocks them up and slows them for a duration.

combos.description: Trade for some easy damage by using E on yourself, then W yourself or your target and AAing.
To trade E yourself then AA. Wait for the slow then Q W instantly and AA.

Nasus.name: Nasus
Nasus.title: the Curator of the Sands
Nasus.blurb: Nasus is an imposing, jackal-headed Ascended being from ancient Shurima, a heroic figure regarded as a demigod by the people of the desert. Fiercely intelligent, he was a guardian of knowledge and peerless strategist whose wisdom guided the ancient...

abilities.name: Soul Eater
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus life steal based on level

abilities.name: Siphoning Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Nasus strikes his foe, dealing damage and increasing the power of his future Siphoning Strikes if he slays his target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Nasus empowers his next auto-attack, making it unstoppable and gaining bonus range and damage on it. If this ability kills its target, Nasus gains 3 stacks. The stacks are increased to 12 if he kills a Champion, large minion or large monster with this ability.

abilities.name: Wither
abilities.riotDesc: Nasus ages an enemy champion, decelerating their Move Speed and Attack Speed over time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slows and cripples the target drastically for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Spirit Fire
abilities.riotDesc: Nasus unleashes a spirit flame at a location, dealing damage and reducing the Armor of enemies who stand on it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Creates a zone at the target location, dealing magic damage to all enemies within it. The zone also deals magic damage per second and reduces the armor of all the enemy units inside it.

abilities.name: Fury of the Sands
abilities.riotDesc: Nasus unleashes a mighty sandstorm that batters nearby enemies. While the storm rages, he gains increased Health, Attack Range, damages nearby enemies, has a reduced cooldown on Siphoning Strike, and gains bonus Armor and Magic Resistance.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus health, armor, and magic resistance on activating. He will also increase in size and gain bonus range on his auto-attacks. He will deal bonus magic damage to all enemy units around him and his Q will have its Cooldown reduced by half.

balance.otherEffects: Q: Per-kill stacks changed to 6. Per-large-kill stacks changed to 24.

combos.description: Cancel your E animation by using an AA instantly after followed by W Q.
A normal trade will AA then instantly Q as soon as the damage goes through, then quickly E W and AA again.
E W Q can be chained together to cancel the animations. E and W instantly after followed by Q AA.

Nautilus.name: Nautilus
Nautilus.title: the Titan of the Depths
Nautilus.blurb: A lonely legend as old as the first piers sunk in Bilgewater, the armored goliath known as Nautilus roams the dark waters off the coast of the Blue Flame Isles. Driven by a forgotten betrayal, he strikes without warning, swinging his enormous anchor to...

abilities.name: Staggering Blow
abilities.mobaDesc: Auto-Attacks deal bonus physical damage and root his target for a duration. This effect can't occur on the same target more that one time every few seconds.

abilities.name: Dredge Line
abilities.riotDesc: Nautilus hurls his anchor forward. Colliding with an enemy pulls them and Nautilus together, dealing magic damage. Colliding with terrain pulls Nautilus towards it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws his anchor in a target direction. If it comes in contact with an enemy, Nautilus drags the anchor towards him, along with the unit that he hit. Nautilus dashes forward as well. This ability does magic damage and roots the target for a brief duration. On hitting terrain, Nautilus simply dashes to that location and 50% of the cooldown, and the mana cost of the ability is refunded.

abilities.name: Titan's Wrath
abilities.riotDesc: Nautilus gains a temporary Shield. While it persists, his Attacks deal damage over time to his target and surrounding enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shields himself up to 6 seconds. As long as the shield persists, his auto-attacks deal bonus magic damage over 2 seconds to all enemies around him and his target.

abilities.name: Riptide
abilities.riotDesc: Nautilus creates three exploding waves around himself. Each explosion damages and slows enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Creates 3 waves of explosions that move away from him. Each wave deals magic damage and slows the enemies hit for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Depth Charge
abilities.riotDesc: Nautilus fires a shockwave into the earth that chases an opponent. This shockwave rips up the earth above it, knocking enemies into the air. When it reaches the opponent, the shockwave erupts, knocking his target into the air and stunning them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sends out a homing ability to the enemy champion of his choice which deals magic damage to the target upon impact, and knocks up that target, along with any other target in the path between Nautilus and his target.

combos.description: AA your target then Q to a wall, using your E to hit your target before you escape to the wall.
Before level 6 all in leading with Q and AA after you land, then quickly W E.
When in melee range AA then instantly E. Q right as the root is about to finish, then AA W as soon as you can.

Neeko.name: Neeko
Neeko.title: the Curious Chameleon
Neeko.blurb: Hailing from a long lost tribe of vastaya, Neeko can blend into any crowd by borrowing the appearances of others, even absorbing something of their emotional state to tell friend from foe in an instant. No one is ever sure where—or who—Neeko might be...

abilities.name: Inherent Glamour
abilities.mobaDesc: Neeko can choose to disguise as any other champion on her team. She can keep the disguise until she takes damage or decides to change to some other champion. Neeko can use the same champions' auto-attacks but not cast their abilities. On casting an ability, her true form will be revealed and her Passive will go on a cooldown.

abilities.name: Blooming Burst
abilities.riotDesc: Neeko throws a seed dealing magic damage. The seed blooms again on hitting champions or killing units.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a projectile to a target location which deals magic damage to all enemies within. If the projectile kills an enemy unit or damages a champion or large monster, it will proc again at the same location and deal reduced magic damage. This can happen thrice (including the initial cast).

abilities.name: Shapesplitter
abilities.riotDesc: Neeko passively deals bonus magic damage every third attack, briefly increasing her move speed. Neeko can activate to send a clone in a direction and recast to change the direction of the clone.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Auto-attacks on-hit will grant Neeko a stack of Shapesplitter. At 2 stacks, Neeko's next auto-attack will consume the stacks and deal bonus magic damage while granting her Movement Speed for a second. This attack is not counted as a projectile. Active: Disappears briefly and creates a clone of herself and sends it running in the target direction. She also gains Movement Speed while doing so. If she is in disguise, the clone will also be a copy of that disguise.

abilities.name: Tangle-Barbs
abilities.riotDesc: Neeko slings a tangle that damages and roots everything it passes through. If the tangle kills an enemy or passes through a champion, it becomes larger, faster, and roots for longer.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a magical barb at the target direction, rooting any enemy target it passes through and dealing magic damage. The barb grows in size and speed, and the root duration is increased if it hits at least one enemy target.

abilities.name: Pop Blossom
abilities.riotDesc: After a short preparation, Neeko leaps into the air, knocking up all nearby enemies. Upon landing, nearby enemies are damaged and stunned. The preparation is hidden if Neeko is disguised.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sprouts a blossom over 1.25 seconds. This creates a bunch of roots around her and these roots are invisible to enemies when she is disguised. At the end of the channel, Neeko shields herself, and the shield strength is based on the number of enemy champions around her. She then leaps into the air and then lands to deal magic damage to all nearby enemies and root them for 1.25 seconds.

combos.description: To use your standard trade W forward then instantly AA E Q followed by a couple of AAs.
For a long trade AA then instantly Q followed by AA E AA. Use W to land your final AA.
For a quick burst of damage E Q instantly then quickly AA.

Nidalee.name: Nidalee
Nidalee.title: the Bestial Huntress
Nidalee.blurb: Raised in the deepest jungle, Nidalee is a master tracker who can shapeshift into a ferocious cougar at will. Neither wholly woman nor beast, she viciously defends her territory from any and all trespassers, with carefully placed traps and deft spear...

abilities.name: Prowl
abilities.mobaDesc: Prowl: Hiding in a brush will grant Nidalee 10% bonus Movement Speed for 2 seconds. This bonus is increased to 30% when facing a nearby visible enemy champion. Hunt: Hitting enemy Champions or monsters with a Q or W will mark them. The mark reveals them and grants Nidalee bonus movement speed. Her cougar Q and W on these marked targets are empowered.

abilities.name: Javelin Toss / Takedown
abilities.riotDesc: In human form, Nidalee throws a spiked javelin at her target that gains damage as it flies. As a cougar, her next attack will attempt to fatally wound her target, dealing more damage the less life they have.
abilities.mobaDesc: Human Form: Tosses a javelin in the target direction, dealing magic damage to the first enemy it hits. This damage increases on the basis of the distance traveled by it. Cougar Form: Her next Auto-Attack gains bonus range and is modified to deal magic damage. This damage increases based on her target's missing health. Against marked targets, this ability does 40% increased damage.

abilities.name: Bushwhack / Pounce
abilities.riotDesc: In human form, Nidalee lays a trap for unwary opponents that, when sprung, damages and reveals its target. As a cougar, she jumps in a direction, dealing damage in an area where she lands.
abilities.mobaDesc: Human Form: Lays a trap at a location which stealths and arms after a few seconds. It lasts for 2 minutes. Any enemy who steps on it will take magic damage and will be marked. Cougar Form: Dashes to a target location and deals magic damage to all enemies around her landing point. She will have an increased dash range against marked targets.

abilities.name: Primal Surge / Swipe
abilities.riotDesc: In human form, Nidalee channels the spirit of the cougar to heal her allies and imbue them with Attack Speed for a short duration. As a cougar, she claws in a direction, dealing damage to enemies in front of her.
abilities.mobaDesc: **Human Form**: Heals a target allied champion or herself and grants increased attack speed to the same for 7 seconds. **Cougar Form**: Claws at enemies in an arc in the target direction. This ability deals magic damage to all enemies hit.

abilities.name: Aspect Of The Cougar
abilities.riotDesc: Nidalee transforms into a cougar, gaining new abilities.
abilities.mobaDesc: Switch between Cougar and Human forms. Cougar Form: Gains melee attacks and a new set of abilities. Human Form: Gains ranged attacks with a new set of abilities.

combos.description: To get a quick burst of damage off in cougar form W and Q mid air, then AA E instantly. As you land follow up with an AA if needed.

Nilah.name: Nilah
Nilah.title: the Joy Unbound
Nilah.blurb: Nilah is an ascetic warrior from a distant land, seeking the world's deadliest, most titanic opponents so that she might challenge and destroy them. Having won her power through an encounter with the long-imprisoned demon of joy, she has no emotions...

abilities.name: Joy Unending
abilities.mobaDesc: Nilah gains increased experience from last-hitting minions along with the ability to enhance and share nearby healing and shielding from her allies.

abilities.name: Formless Blade
abilities.riotDesc: With a snap of her whip-blade, Nilah damages any enemies she hits in a straight line in her chosen direction. This action extends her attack range for a short duration.

abilities.name: Jubilant Veil
abilities.riotDesc: Nilah envelops herself in mist, increasing her movement speed and allowing her to gracefully dodge all incoming attacks. Any allies she touches during the mist's duration will also gain this effect.

abilities.name: Slipstream
abilities.riotDesc: Nilah enthusiastically dashes toward her target, dealing damage to any enemies she passes through on the way.

abilities.name: Apotheosis
abilities.riotDesc: Twirling her whip-blade in joyful exuberance, Nilah deals damage to enemies around her before pulling them closer with her weapon.

combos.description: Start the fight with your E Q combo, then AA, W, AA, AA, AA and then finish off with your E Q back out again.
Start with your W, then E and Q your target followed by some auto attacks.

Nocturne.name: Nocturne
Nocturne.title: the Eternal Nightmare
Nocturne.blurb: A demonic amalgamation drawn from the nightmares that haunt every sentient mind, the thing known as Nocturne has become a primordial force of pure evil. It is liquidly chaotic in aspect, a faceless shadow with cold eyes and armed with wicked-looking...

abilities.name: Umbra Blades
abilities.mobaDesc: His auto-attacks are periodically enhanced, dealing bonus physical damage to his target as well as his surrounding enemies. He simultaneously heals himself by an amount per enemy hit. Auto-Attacks reduce the cooldown of this Passive by 1 second, which is increased to 3 seconds against monsters and enemy champions.

abilities.name: Duskbringer
abilities.riotDesc: Nocturne throws a shadow blade that deals damage, leaves a Dusk Trail, and causes champions to leave a Dusk Trail. While on the trail, Nocturne can move through units and has increased Move Speed and Attack Damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sends a shadow blade in the target direction a leaves a trail along which the blade travels. This blade deals physical damage to all enemies it passes through and causes enemy champions hit by it to leave a trail behind them. Following the trail will allow Nocturne to be ghosted and will grant him bonus Movement Speed and attack damage

abilities.name: Shroud of Darkness
abilities.riotDesc: Nocturne empowers his blades, passively gaining Attack Speed. Activating Shroud of Darkness allows Nocturne to fade into the shadows, creating a magical barrier which blocks a single enemy ability and doubles his passive Attack Speed if successful.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Permanently gains bonus attack speed. Active: Gains a spell shield for 1.5 seconds. Blocking an ability will double the Passive bonus attack speed for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Unspeakable Horror
abilities.riotDesc: Nocturne plants a nightmare into his target's mind, dealing damage each second and applying fear to the target if they do not get out of range by the end of the duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Gains 335 bonus Movement Speed when moving towards fleeing targets. Active: Tethers to the enemy, dealing magic damage over 2 seconds. If the target doesn't break the tether, they will be slowed and made to flee from Nocturne for a short duration.

abilities.name: Paranoia
abilities.riotDesc: Nocturne reduces the sight radius of all enemy champions and removes their ally vision in the process. He can then launch himself at a nearby enemy champion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Nearsights all enemy champions on the map. He can recast this ability to dash unstoppably towards a visible enemy champion, dealing bonus physical damage to them on arrival.

combos.description: If you're already in melee range E AA instantly then Q right after and continue to AA.
When medium range use Q then instantly E once in range and AA.
To guarantee your damage quickly R twice then E as soon as you can. AA while you maintain the tether, Q as soon as the fear goes off then continue to AA.

Nunu.name: Nunu & Willump
Nunu.title: the Boy and His Yeti
Nunu.blurb: Once upon a time, there was a boy who wanted to prove he was a hero by slaying a fearsome monster—only to discover that the beast, a lonely and magical yeti, merely needed a friend. Bound together by ancient power and a shared love of snowballs, Nunu...

abilities.name: Call of the Freljord
abilities.mobaDesc: The next instance of damage dealt to an enemy champion, large monster or structure grants the nearby ally with the highest attack speed a 20% bonus attack speed increase, and a 10% movement speed increase. Willump gains splash damage on his auto-attacks, dealing Physical damage in a cone to enemies behind the target he is attacking.

abilities.name: Consume
abilities.riotDesc: Willump takes a bite out of a minion, monster, or enemy champion, dealing damage and healing himself.
abilities.mobaDesc: Chomps on the target enemy, dealing magic damage and healing himself. The heal is increased by 50% when he is below 50% of his maximum health. He deals true damage to minions and monsters and restores more health.

abilities.name: Biggest Snowball Ever!
abilities.riotDesc: Willump creates a snowball that grows in size and speed as he rolls it. The snowball damages and knocks up enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Frees himself from any slowing effect, becomes ghosted, gains a larger field of view, and rolls a snowball in the direction of the player's cursor. This snowball keeps increasing in power, and the direction can be changed with the movement of the cursor. They also gain movement speed over the duration, and the snowball can be controlled for 10 seconds or until it collides with an enemy champion, large pet, medium-large monster, or terrain. On collision, the target/s are dealt magic damage and they are knocked up as well for a small duration followed by a brief stun. Nunu can recast the ability to let go of the snowball early. The snowball will roll a small distance after it is left loose, and will have the same effect on any target it hits, as would have been the case if Nunu was controlling the snowball.

abilities.name: Snowball Barrage
abilities.riotDesc: Nunu throws multiple snowballs that damage enemies. When he's finished, Willump roots any champions or large monsters that were hit by a snowball.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a volley of 3 snowballs in the target direction over 0.4 seconds. The snowballs shatter on hitting an enemy, dealing magic damage to enemies in a cone. Enemies hit 3 times will be slowed for a second. This ability can be recast twice within 3 seconds. Each recast will hurl another volley of snowball and have the same effects as the first volley of the snowballs. After 3 seconds of the first cast, slowed enemies around Willump take magic damage and are rooted for a duration.

abilities.name: Absolute Zero
abilities.riotDesc: Nunu & Willump create a powerful blizzard in an area that slows enemies and deals massive damage at the end.
abilities.mobaDesc: Starts channeling, absorbing heat from the surrounding over 3 seconds, and slowing all enemies in that area. He will also gain a shield for that duration and the area is not visible to enemies if Nunu and Willump are hidden. At the end of the channel, or if the channel is interrupted, surrounding enemies take magic damage based on the time spent channeling and remain slowed based on the same criteria. Nunu's shield will also decay over 3 seconds.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done increased by 10%. Shielding done increased by 20%. Tenacity increased by 20%. Q: Non-champion heal AP ratio changed to 110% AP. W: Minimum AP ratio changed to 67% AP. Maximum AP ratio changed to 200% AP.

combos.description: E then instantly AA Q, E again then AA W. R, cancelling the channel right as the root ends.
To engage with your snowball W then roll into your opponent and E right after it hits. Quickly use Q E, AA then E again followed by one more AA and your R.
Approach with E, then E again right before you AA Q. Use your last E charge and continue to AA, then use W right as the root ends.

Olaf.name: Olaf
Olaf.title: the Berserker
Olaf.blurb: An unstoppable force of destruction, the axe-wielding Olaf wants nothing but to die in glorious combat. Hailing from the brutal Freljordian peninsula of Lokfar, he once received a prophecy foretelling his peaceful passing—a coward's fate, and a great...

abilities.name: Berserker Rage
abilities.mobaDesc: Olaf gains Attack Speed and Life Steal based on his missing Health.

abilities.name: Undertow
abilities.riotDesc: Olaf throws an axe into the ground at a target location, dealing damage to enemies it passes through and reducing their Armor and Move Speed. If Olaf picks up the axe, the ability's cooldown is reset.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws an axe to the target location, dealing physical damage to all enemies it passes through. It also slows them for a duration. The axe will remain at the target location for a duration which is equal to the cooldown of the ability. If Olaf picks the axe, he reduces the cooldown of this ability by 4.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Tough It Out
abilities.riotDesc: Olaf's Attack Speed is increased and he gains a Shield.
abilities.mobaDesc: Olaf gains bonus attack speed and life steal for 6 seconds. He will also gain enhanced healing from all sources based on missing health.

abilities.name: Reckless Swing
abilities.riotDesc: Olaf attacks with such force that it deals true damage to his target and himself, refunding the Health cost if he destroys the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Strike thunder onto the target enemy, dealing true damage to them. This ability heals Olaf for its cost if it manages to kill the target. The cooldown of this ability is reduced by a second every time Olaf auto-attacks a target.

abilities.name: Ragnarok
abilities.riotDesc: Olaf passively gains increased armor and magic resist. He can activate this ability to become immune to disables for as long as he keeps attacking.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Gains bonus armor and magic resistance while this ability is inactive. Active: Removes any form of crowd control from himself, and becomes immune to crowd control for the next 6 seconds. He also gains bonus attack damage as well as increased size. Olaf also gains bonus movement speed for the first second of activating this ability while moving towards the nearby visible champion.

combos.description: To all in R and run at your target like you're unstoppable, use Q then E once you're in range. Activate W right before you AA, then kite towards your axe as you AA, then follow up with a Q once you have your axe.
When ganking up close Q E instantly then AA as you kite to your axe, pick it up and Q again.
In a normal fight E then instantly AA. Q as soon as your AA finishes, then AA while you kite towards your axe to pick it up and Q again once you do.

Orianna.name: Orianna
Orianna.title: the Lady of Clockwork
Orianna.blurb: Once a curious girl of flesh and blood, Orianna is now a technological marvel comprised entirely of clockwork. She became gravely ill after an accident in the lower districts of Zaun, and her failing body had to be replaced with exquisite artifice...

abilities.name: Clockwork Windup
abilities.mobaDesc: The Ball: All of Orianna's abilities are conducted through her ball. This ball attaches to Orianna if she is near it, and blinks back to Orianna if she is too far away from it. Clockwork Winding: Auto-Attacks deal bonus magic damage on-hit and grant a stack of Clockwork Winding. This effect stacks up to 2 times and deals bonus damage per stack to the same target. She will lose all stacks if she switches targets.

abilities.name: Command: Attack
abilities.riotDesc: Orianna commands her Ball to fire toward a target location, dealing magic damage to targets along the way (deals less damage to subsequent targets). Her Ball remains at the target location after.
abilities.mobaDesc: Commands the ball to fly to a target location and stay there. It deals magic damage to all enemies it passes through.

abilities.name: Command: Dissonance
abilities.riotDesc: Orianna commands her Ball to release a pulse of energy, dealing magic damage around it. This leaves a field behind that speeds up allies and slows enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: The ball emits an electric pulse around its current location. This deals magic damage to enemies around it and leaves an electric field on the are for 3 seconds. Orianna and her allies gain bonus movement speed when inside the field while enemies are afflicted with a decaying slow.

abilities.name: Command: Protect
abilities.riotDesc: Orianna commands her Ball to attach to an allied champion, Shielding them and dealing magic damage to any enemies it passes through on the way. Additionally, the Ball grants additional Armor and Magic Resist to the champion it is attached to.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: The Ball will grant bonus armor and magic resistance to whoever it is attached to. Active: Commands the ball to fly to a target allied champion or herself. It then attaches to that target, shielding them, and dealing damage to any enemy it passes through.

abilities.name: Command: Shockwave
abilities.riotDesc: Orianna commands her Ball to unleash a shockwave, dealing magic damage and launching nearby enemies towards the Ball after a short delay.
abilities.mobaDesc: Commands the ball to unleash a shockwave which deals magic damage to all nearby enemies and pulls them towards the ball.

combos.description: Your most basic trade is Q and instantly W before it lands.
For a more lengthy trade Q and instantly AA, then W E as soon as it lands.

Ornn.name: Ornn
Ornn.title: The Fire below the Mountain
Ornn.blurb: Ornn is the Freljordian spirit of forging and craftsmanship. He works in the solitude of a massive smithy, hammered out from the lava caverns beneath the volcano Hearth-Home. There he stokes bubbling cauldrons of molten rock to purify ores and fashion...

abilities.name: Living Forge
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains 10% bonus armor and magic resistance from all sources. Living Forge: Ornn can craft non-purchasable items anywhere on the map. This act takes 4 seconds and can be interrupted if Ornn enters combat. Master Craftsman: On reaching level 13, any Masterwork item Ornn owns will be upgraded for free (includes items purchased later on). For each level after 13, Ornn can upgrade one of an ally's upgradable items for free as well. Temper: Ornn's auto-attacks against enemies inflicted with Brittle will briefly knock them back. Enemies made Brittle by Ornn take 10% − 18% (based on Ornn's level) of their maximum health as bonus magic damage the next time they are immobilized by Ornn or his allies, consuming Brittle.

abilities.name: Volcanic Rupture
abilities.riotDesc: Ornn slams the ground, sending out a fissure dealing damage and slowing enemies hit. After a small delay, a magma pillar forms at the end location.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slams the ground and creates a fissure in the target direction which stops after traveling for a while. It deals physical damage and slows all enemies hit for 2 seconds. After a brief delay, a magma pillar erupts at maximum range, knocking aside enemies hit. This pillar acts as impassable terrain for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Bellows Breath
abilities.riotDesc: Ornn advances, breathing fire. Enemies hit by the final gout of flame become Brittle.
abilities.mobaDesc: Becomes unstoppable and moves ahead in the target direction with reduced movement speed while belching fire over a cone in front of him. It deals magic damage and the final bout of flame will apply Brittle to enemies.

abilities.name: Searing Charge
abilities.riotDesc: Ornn charges, dealing damage to enemies he passes through. If Ornn collides with terrain while charging, the impact creates a shockwave around him which deals damage and knocks up enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges forward, dealing physical damage to enemies he passes through. He stops upon colliding with terrain and creates a shockwave around him which deals the same initial damage, and knocks up enemies along with stunning them. This ability can destroy champion made terrain, including Ornn's Q.

abilities.name: Call of the Forge God
abilities.riotDesc: Ornn summons a massive elemental at a location which travels toward him with increasing speed. Enemies run over by the elemental take damage, are slowed and are made Brittle. Ornn can recast the ability to charge into the elemental, redirecting it in the direction he hits it, causing the elemental to affect any enemies it runs over to be knocked up, dealing the same damage and re-applying Brittle.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sounds his horn which summons an elemental ram. This ram moves towards Ornn from maximum range, dealing magic damage and slowing enemies hit for 2 seconds. The slow strength is proportional to the distance traveled by the ram. He can recast this ability. On recasting, Ornn dashes in a target direction. If he collides with the elemental, he will send the ram in that direction as well. Now the ram will knock up any enemy it passes through and will deal magic damage to the enemies. Each pass will apply Brittle to all the targets for 3 seconds but can affect enemies only once.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: NEW EFFECT: Forging an item puts Living Forge on a 120-second cooldown.

combos.description: When in melee range, AA then Q. AA again, then E and AA.
Quickly trade by using AA, W and AAing once more.
You can also trade by using Q, then W and an AA. E your target, then AA again.

Pantheon.name: Pantheon
Pantheon.title: the Unbreakable Spear
Pantheon.blurb: Once an unwilling host to the Aspect of War, Atreus survived when the celestial power within him was slain, refusing to succumb to a blow that tore stars from the heavens. In time, he learned to embrace the power of his own mortality, and the stubborn...

abilities.name: Mortal Will
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains a stack of Mortal Will when he lands an auto-attacks or casts an ability. This effect stacks up to 5 times. At 5 stacks, Pantheon's next ability consumes the stacks and grants bonus effects.

abilities.name: Comet Spear
abilities.riotDesc: Pantheon either thrusts his spear or throws his spear in the chosen direction.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges a spear up to 4 seconds which increases the range of the ability but slows Pantheon. This ability can be recast. On recasting, Pantheon hurls his spear, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit. The damage is increased if the target is below 20% of their maximum health but the damage is reduced beyond the first target hit. If the recast was within 0.35 seconds of the initial cast, Pantheon will drive his spear forward and deal the same amount of damage but will have 50% of this ability's cooldown refunded. If interrupted or not re-casted, this ability goes on Cooldown but refunds half of the mana cost. Mortal Will: Deals bonus damage and slows all enemies hit.

abilities.name: Shield Vault
abilities.riotDesc: Pantheon dashes to a target, damaging and stunning them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Leaps forward to a target enemy champion and stuns them while dealing physical damage to them. Mortal Will: Pantheon's next auto-attack within 4 seconds will be unstoppable and strikes his target 3 times. This deals physical damage and each hit can be affected by critical strike modifiers.

abilities.name: Aegis Assault
abilities.riotDesc: Pantheon sets his shield, becoming invulnerable to damage from the front and striking repeatedly with his spear.
abilities.mobaDesc: Braces his shield and channels for 1.5 seconds towards a target direction. He is also slowed while this ability is active. Pantheon is invulnerable against damage dealt by enemies (including turret damage) from the target direction. He will deal physical damage over the duration in a cone to all enemies struck. At the end of the duration, he slams the shield on the ground, dealing physical damage. Mortal Will: This ability's duration is increased to 2.5 seconds which also deals more damage due to the duration increase.

abilities.name: Grand Starfall
abilities.riotDesc: Pantheon composes himself and then leaps into the air, landing at a chosen location as a comet.
abilities.mobaDesc: Channels for 2 seconds and leaps into the air. He will then throw a spear at his target location, revealing it and will then crash down at the same location after a brief delay. This will grant him full stacks of his Passive. The landing deals magic damage but is decreased at the edges of the fall area.

combos.description: When you don't need to gapclose, Q your target then AA. Use W and AA, then E and AA again. Q again once it's off cooldown.
At 5 passive stacks W onto your target, then AA. Use Q, then AA and E to chase or disengage.
Trade with your opponent by using W onto your target, then Q and AA before using E.

Poppy.name: Poppy
Poppy.title: Keeper of the Hammer
Poppy.blurb: Runeterra has no shortage of valiant champions, but few are as tenacious as Poppy. Bearing the legendary hammer of Orlon, a weapon twice her size, this determined yordle has spent untold years searching in secret for the fabled “Hero of Demacia,” said...

abilities.name: Iron Ambassador
abilities.mobaDesc: Periodically, Poppy's next auto-attack becomes ranged where she throws her buckler at the target enemy. This deals bonus magic damage and the buckler falls near her target. If she picks the buckler, she will shield herself for 3 seconds. If the buckler happens to kill the target, it will automatically come back to Poppy and shield her.

abilities.name: Hammer Shock
abilities.riotDesc: Poppy swings her hammer, dealing damage and creating a zone that will slow enemies and explode after a delay.
abilities.mobaDesc: Smashes the ground in front of her, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit. The ground becomes unstable, slowing enemies standing on it. This ground then erupts after a second, dealing physical damage equal to the initial damage.

abilities.name: Steadfast Presence
abilities.riotDesc: Poppy passively gains Armor and Magic Resist. This bonus increases when she is low on Health. Poppy can activate Steadfast Presence to gain Move Speed and stop enemy dashes around her. If a dash is stopped, the enemy is slowed and grounded.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Her total armor and magic resistance are both increased by 10%. This effect is doubled when she falls below 40% maximum health. Active: Poppy gains bonus movement speed for 2 seconds and surrounds herself with a visible aura. Any enemy attempting to dash in that aura will be dealt magic damage and knocked up for 0.5 seconds. After that, the same enemy will be grounded and slowed for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Heroic Charge
abilities.riotDesc: Poppy dashes to the target and pushes it back. If the target is pushed into a wall, it is stunned.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tackles the target enemy, dashing to the enemy's location and dealing physical damage to them while carrying them backward. If the target collides with terrain, she deals them the same physical damage and stuns them.

abilities.name: Keeper's Verdict
abilities.riotDesc: Poppy channels a hammer strike that knocks enemies very far away.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges for up to 4 seconds, slowing herself while increasing this ability's knockback range over the duration. It can be recast at any time within the charge up duration. On recasting, Poppy will smash the ground and send a shockwave in a target direction until it collides with an enemy champion. Enemies in the shockwave's path or hit by the hammer eruption will take physical damage and will be knocked back a massive distance towards their base. Releasing the ability within 0.5 seconds of the activation ends the charge to instead launch the hammer upwards, dealing 50% damage and knocking up all enemies around Poppy for 0.75 seconds.

combos.description: Use your R then W, E AA, Q and AA to finish.
Press your W then E, Q and R and AA to finish.
AA your target, then E, AA, Q and AA to finish.

Pyke.name: Pyke
Pyke.title: the Bloodharbor Ripper
Pyke.blurb: A renowned harpooner from the slaughter docks of Bilgewater, Pyke should have met his death in the belly of a gigantic jaull-fish… and yet, he returned. Now, stalking the dank alleys and backways of his former hometown, he uses his new supernatural...

abilities.name: Gift of the Drowned Ones
abilities.mobaDesc: Pyke's cannot gain max health from items, instead, he gains 1 bonus attack damage for every 14 points of health increase. Pyke will store a percentage of the damage he takes from champions as grey health on his health bar. This has an upper cap. On being unseen by enemies, he will consume the grey health and heal himself for the same amount.

abilities.name: Bone Skewer
abilities.riotDesc: Pyke either stabs an enemy in front of him or pulls an enemy towards him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges up to 3 seconds, increasing the ability's range significantly but is slowed during this duration. This ability can be recast at any time within its duration. Recast: Hurls his harpoon in the target direction, dealing physical damage and pulling the first target towards his direction. This inflicts a 90% slown on them for 1 second as well. If recast quickly, Pyke will instead thrust the harpoon forward, dealing the same damage to the closest enemy champion, or closest enemy if no champion is hit. If Pyke does not recast this ability and the charge completes without reactivation, or if he is interrupted during the charge, his Q is canceled and the ability is put on cooldown while refunding half the mana cost.

abilities.name: Ghostwater Dive
abilities.riotDesc: Pyke enters Camouflage and gains significant Move Speed that decays over time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Submerges into spectral waters, camouflaging himself and gaining bonus movement speed that decays over 5 seconds. Enemies will be notified if Pyke is near them. Casting an ability or attacking will end the camoflage.

abilities.name: Phantom Undertow
abilities.riotDesc: Pyke dashes and leaves behind a phantom that will return to him, stunning enemy champions along its path.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes in the target direction, leaving a Phantom behind for a second. The Phantom returns to Pyke, stunning enemies around it and those it passes through along the way for 1.25 seconds. Enemy champions also take physical damage.

abilities.name: Death From Below
abilities.riotDesc: Pyke blinks to and executes low health enemies, allowing him to cast this spell again and granting additional gold to an ally who assists.
abilities.mobaDesc: Executes champions who are below a certain threshold after blinking to the enemy champion's location. The hitbox is a cross and any enemy within that cross when Pyke executes an enemy will take physical damage. Each execution will grant kill gold to both Pyke and the last assisting ally in the form of a consumable item called 'Your Cut', instead of the normal assist gold. In addition, each enemy champion killed inside the X by an ally will grant Pyke two stacks of 'Your Cut'.

combos.description: If you cannot hook tap Q to slow then instantly AA E and continue to AA.
Your most basic combo will hold Q, then as soon as you let go instantly E toward your target and AA.
When hunting an enemy W to get closer then E through your target. Quickly tap Q when you land followed by some AA's.

Qiyana.name: Qiyana
Qiyana.title: Empress of the Elements
Qiyana.blurb: In the jungle city of Ixaocan, Qiyana plots her own ruthless path to the high seat of the Yun Tal. Last in line to succeed her parents, she faces those who stand in her way with brash confidence and unprecedented mastery over elemental magic. With the...

abilities.name: Royal Privilege
abilities.mobaDesc: Auto-Attacks and damaging abilities deal bonus physical damage to all enemies hit. This effect cannot occur in the same target more than once every few seconds.

abilities.name: Elemental Wrath / Edge of Ixtal
abilities.riotDesc: Qiyana swings her weapon, dealing damage with a bonus effect based on her element.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slashes forward in the target direction and deals physical damage to enemies in a line. The damage is reduced against targets beyond the first. This ability can be modified if Qiyana picks an element. Brush Element: Raises a grass trail behind Qiyana that tarvels forth. This lasts for 3.5 seconds and makes Qiyana invisible while granting her 20% bonus movement speed until she attacks, casts an ability (other than her W), or exits the trail. River Element: Roots for 0.5 seconds which is followed by a 20% slow for a second. Terrain Element: Enemies below 50% of maximum health are dealt bonus damage.

abilities.name: Terrashape
abilities.riotDesc: Qiyana dashes to a location and enchants her weapon with an element. Her attacks and abilities deal bonus damage while her weapon is enchanted.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: While holding an element, Qiyana gains bonus attack speed, bonus attack range, bonus magic damage on her auto-attacks and basic abilities, and out of combat bonus movement speed while moving near the Element which she is currently holding. Active: Dashes to the target location while gathering an element of the nearest Brush, River, Terrain she targeted.

abilities.name: Audacity
abilities.riotDesc: Qiyana dashes to an enemy, damaging them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes a fixed distance towards the target enemy, dealing physical damage. She can cast any of her abilities while using this ability. Casting her Q will guarantee a hit on the dash target.

abilities.name: Supreme Display of Talent
abilities.riotDesc: Qiyana sends out a shockwave that detonates whatever elements she hits with it, stunning and damaging nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sends a windblast in the target direction that knocks back enemies. The windblast stops upon hitting terrain. The windblast then creates an erupting shockwave across any River or Brush it passes through, as well as around the borders of terrain it reaches, dealing physical damage to all enemies who are caught in the shockwave.

balance.otherEffects: Tenacity increased by 20%. W: Targeting a Health Relic on Howling Abyss grants the River Element.

combos.description: Use your W to gapclose, then E your target and Q AA.
To chunk an enemy E towards them, then quickly Q W Q.
For a safe trade Q, then W and Q again.

Quinn.name: Quinn
Quinn.title: Demacia's Wings
Quinn.blurb: Quinn is an elite ranger-knight of Demacia, who undertakes dangerous missions deep in enemy territory. She and her legendary eagle, Valor, share an unbreakable bond, and their foes are often slain before they realize they are fighting not one, but two...

abilities.name: Harrier
abilities.mobaDesc: Valor marks enemies hit by Quinn's Q, Ultimate, or E. This mark reveals them for 4 seconds. Valor will automatically mark nearby visible enemies as vulnerable periodically. Quinn's next auto-attack against such a target will consume the mark to deal bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Blinding Assault
abilities.riotDesc: Quinn calls Valor to mark an enemy and hinder its vision before damaging all enemies in the immediate area.
abilities.mobaDesc: Signals Valor to fly in a target direction. The bird will stop on reaching the maximum range or colliding with an enemy unit. The collision will deal physical damage to all targets near the initial target and will apply nearsighted to the target for 1.75 seconds. Non-champions will be disarmed.

abilities.name: Heightened Senses
abilities.riotDesc: Passively grants Quinn Attack Speed and Move Speed after she attacks a <keywordMajor>Harrier</keywordMajor> target. Activate to have Valor reveal a large area nearby.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Attacking a marked target will grant Quinn bonus attack speed and movement speed for 2 seconds. Active: Orders Valor to reveal the area around for 2 seconds (including units hiding in brushes)

abilities.name: Vault
abilities.riotDesc: Quinn dashes to an enemy, dealing physical damage and slowing the target's Move Speed. Upon reaching the target, she leaps off the target, briefly interrupting it, and lands near her maximum Attack Range away from the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes to the target enemy, knocks them back, and deals physical damage to them. They are also slowed by 50%. Quinn will then leap back and land a fixed distance away from her target.

abilities.name: Behind Enemy Lines
abilities.riotDesc: Quinn and Valor team up to fly around at great speed. Ending the ability casts Skystrike, which deals damage to nearby enemies and marks champions with Harrier.
abilities.mobaDesc: Channels for 2 seconds and makes Valor pick her up. She gains increased movement speed and is ghosted for as long as she isn't dropped. If she hits a target while she is being carried, she will drop a hail of arrows from the top upon her target which will deal physical damage. CC will cancel this ability while taking damage from non-minions will make her lose her Movement Speed for a while.

balance.otherEffects: Total attack speed increased by 2.5%. Tenacity increased by 20%.

combos.description: To assassinate someone R then fly forward to E. AA after you land then Q instantly and continue to AA.
To trade use E then AA as soon as you land, followed by a Q. Continue to AA.
When looking to poke and maybe trade more use Q first then AA, E instantly after then continue to AA after you land.

Rakan.name: Rakan
Rakan.title: The Charmer
Rakan.blurb: As mercurial as he is charming, Rakan is an infamous vastayan troublemaker and the greatest battle-dancer in Lhotlan tribal history. To the humans of the Ionian highlands, his name has long been synonymous with wild festivals, uncontrollable parties...

abilities.name: Fey Feathers
abilities.mobaDesc: Generates a shield that lasts until it is broken. If the shield is damaged, but not destroyed, the shield will regenerate 10% of its maximum value every second on staying out of combat for 5 seconds. Auto-attacks and abilities reduce the Passive cooldown by a second for each enemy champion hit. Lover's Leap: If either Rakan or Xayah is Recalling, the other may move nearby and channel their own to join them. Both will reach the base at the same time when the initiator's recall ends.

abilities.name: Gleaming Quill
abilities.riotDesc: Flings a magical feather that deals magic damage. Striking a champion or epic monster enables Rakan to heal his allies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws an enchanted feather in the target direction which deals magic damage upon impact. If the target is an enemy champion, a small area starts filling up around Rakan. If an ally champion comes within that area, or if 3 seconds pass with no one coming in the area, Rakan heals himself and the surrounding allies (if any) for an amount.

abilities.name: Grand Entrance
abilities.riotDesc: Dashes to a location, knocking up nearby enemies on arrival.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes to the target location, and upon arrival, leaps into the air after a brief delay. This leap deals magic damage to all surrounding enemies and knocks them up for a second.

abilities.name: Battle Dance
abilities.riotDesc: Flies to an allied champion granting them a shield. Can be re-cast for free for a short duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes to a friendly target and shields them for 3 seconds. This ability can be cast 2 times within 5 seconds (the second cast won't cost any mana). If Xayah happens to be the target, the dash range is increased.

abilities.name: The Quickness
abilities.riotDesc: Gains Move Speed, charming and dealing magic damage to enemies touched.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus Movement Speed for 4 seconds while being ghosted for the same duration. During the 4 seconds, he deals magic damage to any target he comes in contact with, and charms and slows them by 75%. Each collision will increase the duration of this ability by 0.25 seconds, and he gains bonus movement speed upon coming in contact with an enemy.

combos.description: Protect an ally with Q then E to your ally. Instantly W your enemy then quickly AA and E to your ally to back out.
To trade Q then AA and right after W. Follow up with an AA.
Trade normally using W then instantly AA and Q E as quickly as you can.

Rammus.name: Rammus
Rammus.title: the Armordillo
Rammus.blurb: Idolized by many, dismissed by some, mystifying to all, the curious being Rammus is an enigma. Protected by a spiked shell, he inspires increasingly disparate theories on his origin wherever he goes—from demigod, to sacred oracle, to a mere beast...

abilities.name: Spiked Shell
abilities.mobaDesc: Rammus gains 15% of his total Armor and Magic Resist as bonus AD

abilities.name: Powerball
abilities.riotDesc: Rammus accelerates in a ball towards his enemies, dealing damage and slowing targets affected by the impact.
abilities.mobaDesc: Rolls like a ball and channels for up to 6 seconds, gaining bonus movement speed per second over the duration. Rammus stops rolling upon colliding with an enemy, knocking back nearby enemies and dealing magic damage to them while slowing them for a second.

abilities.name: Defensive Ball Curl
abilities.riotDesc: Rammus goes into a defensive formation, vastly increasing his Armor and Magic Resistance, and returning damage to enemies that attack him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus armor and magic resistance while increasing the damage dealt by his Passive and applying it to enemies when they land an auto-attack on him. Rammus is slowed by 30% for the duration. It can be recast as well, doing which will result in ending this ability earlier.

abilities.name: Frenzying Taunt
abilities.riotDesc: Rammus taunts an enemy champion or monster into a reckless assault against him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Taunts an enemy champion or monster and gain bonus attack speed for the duration. This attack speed refreshes on using his other abilities.

abilities.name: Soaring Slam
abilities.riotDesc: Rammus hops into the air and slams down at a target area, dealing magic damage and slowing enemies. If cast while Rammus is in Powerball, Rammus knocks up enemies near the center as well.
abilities.mobaDesc: Rammus launches himself into the air aiming for a targetted area. Upon coming down, Rammus deals magic damage and slows enemies. If used during powerball, Rammus will knock up all enemies near the center of the landing zone.

RekSai.name: Rek'Sai
RekSai.title: the Void Burrower
RekSai.blurb: An apex predator, Rek'Sai is a merciless Void-spawn that tunnels beneath the ground to ambush and devour unsuspecting prey. Her insatiable hunger has laid waste to entire regions of the once-great empire of Shurima—merchants, traders, even armed...

abilities.name: Fury of the Xer'Sai
abilities.mobaDesc: Generates 25 Fury on dealing damage with Auto-Attacks, Q (burrowed), W or E, and loses 20 Fury per second if she hasn't generated any in the last 5 seconds. When burrowed, Rek'Sai will consume all the Fury and heal herself: consuming the Fury.

abilities.name: Queen's Wrath / Prey Seeker
abilities.riotDesc:
Rek'Sai's next 3 basic attacks deal bonus Physical Damage to nearby enemies.

While Burrowed, Rek'Sai launches a burst of void-charged earth that damages and reveals enemies hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Unburrowed: Empowers her next 3 auto-attacks to deal bonus physical damage, while doing damage to all enemies around her. The damage to the primary target is affected by Critical chance modifiers. Burrowed: Fires a void charged pulse in the target direction which stops at the first enemy hit. It deals physical damage and reveals them for 2.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Burrow / Un-burrow
abilities.riotDesc:
Rek'Sai burrows into the ground, gaining new abilities and increased Move Speed. Her vision range is reduced and she cannot use basic attacks.

While Burrowed, Rek'Sai may cast Unburrow to knock up and damage nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Unburrowed: Burrows into the ground, reducing her vision radius but gaining movement speed instead. She also becomes ghosted and gains a different set of abilities. While burrowed, she can detect enemy units who are moving over a massive range. Burrowed: Bursts out of the ground, dealing physical damage to surrounding enemies and knocking them aside. The enemy closest to the center is knocked up instead, but cannot be affected by this same effect for some time.

abilities.name: Furious Bite / Tunnel
abilities.riotDesc:
Rek'Sai bites her target, dealing physical damage, or bonus true damage if she has max Fury.

While Burrowed, Rek'Sai creates a re-usable, long lasting tunnel. Enemies can destroy it by standing on top of either entrance.
abilities.mobaDesc: Unburrowed: Bites an enemy, dealing physical damage. At maximum Fury, the damage is doubled and converted to true damage. Burrowed: Dashes to the target location, creating a tunnel in her path. These tunnels can be destroyed by enemies just by stepping on them. Each tunnel lasts for 10 minutes if left undestroyed. Rek'Sai can use these tunnels again. Rek'Sai can have up to 8 tunnels on the map at the same time.

abilities.name: Void Rush
abilities.riotDesc: Rek'Sai passively marks targets by damaging them. She can activate this ability to become briefly untargetable and lunge at a marked target for heavy damage based on their maximum health.

combos.description: Your basic trade pattern is AA Q AA AA then E to finish.
Your basic full combo is Q W, AA Q AA AA E R.
Utilize your abilites early by using Q in burrowed form then W. AA Q AA AA, then E AA.

Rell.name: Rell
Rell.title: the Iron Maiden
Rell.blurb: The product of brutal experimentation at the hands of the Black Rose, Rell is a defiant, living weapon determined to topple Noxus. Her childhood was one of misery and horror, enduring unspeakable procedures to perfect and weaponize her magical control...

abilities.name: Break the Mold
abilities.mobaDesc: Rell's Attacks and Abilites steal 3% Armor and 3% Magic Resist for 5 seconds. Max 15%

abilities.name: Shattering Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Rell deals magic damage to units in a line, breaking their shields and stunning them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Rell thrusts her lance in a selective direction, destroying the enemies shield before dealing damage. The first target hit applies her passive, and the damage to enemies after the first is reduced. If Rell is tethered to an ally with her E, she and the ally will gain a heal.

abilities.name: Ferromancy: Crash Down
abilities.riotDesc:
Mounted: Rell Dismounts, crashing down in her armor, Knocking enemies up and gaining a large Shield. While dismounted, she gains Armor, Magic Resist, Attack Speed, and Attack Range, but is Slowed.

Dismounted: Rell forms her Mount, gaining a burst of speed and Knocking Up the next enemy she attacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: There are 2 instances to Rell’s W. When she is mounted, she gains movement speed, which is reduced if she takes damage. When she is mounted (and when this ability is activated), she will jump of her mount, knocking up enemies and dealing damage. She will then enter an armored form where she reduces her movement speed but gains a shield. When she is dismounted, she is very slow but gains armor and magic resistance. When this ability is activated, she mounts up gaining movement speed briefly which is increased if she is running towards an enemy champion. Her next attack during the duration throws her target behind her dealing damage.

abilities.name: Full Tilt
abilities.riotDesc:
Passive: Rell gains out of combat Move Speed.

Active: Rell and an ally gain ramping Move Speed, doubled toward enemies and each other. Her next Attack explodes, dealing magic damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Rell can tether herself to an ally. While the tether lasts, her ally gains bonus armor and magic resistance. Active: When she activates this ability, she binds herself to a champion. She can then recast this while the tether is still up and running. Recast: Rell erupts the tether to deal damage to all enemies between and near her bound ally. She stuns everyone hit for 1 second.

abilities.name: Magnet Storm
abilities.riotDesc: Rell explodes in a magnetic fury, violently Pulling nearby enemies toward herself. Then Rell constantly Drags nearby enemies toward herself for a short while, dealing magic damage over time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Rell pulls all nearby enemies towards her. For 2 seconds, she deals damage and continuously drags the enemies towards her.

Renata.name: Renata Glasc
Renata.title: the Chem-Baroness
Renata.blurb: Renata Glasc rose from the ashes of her childhood home with nothing but her name and her parents' alchemical research. In the decades since, she has become Zaun's wealthiest chem-baron, a business magnate who built her power by tying everyone's...

abilities.name: Leverage
abilities.mobaDesc: Renata's Attacks deal bonus damage and mark enemies. Renata's allies can damage marked enemies to deal bonus damage.

abilities.name: Handshake
abilities.riotDesc: Renata sends out a missile rooting the first enemy hit, and can recast the ability to throw the unit in a direction.

abilities.name: Bailout
abilities.riotDesc: Renata buffs an allied champion to fight harder, delaying their death and potentially saving them if they get a takedown.

abilities.name: Loyalty Program
abilities.riotDesc: Renata sends out a pair of chemtech missiles, shielding allies and damaging and slowing enemies hit.

abilities.name: Hostile Takeover
abilities.riotDesc: Renata sends out a wave of chemicals, causing any enemies hit to go Berserk.

balance.otherEffects: No special effects for Renata Glasc.

combos.description: Use your E, then Q twice then finish with an AA
Start with an AA then W then AA then E, AA, Q twice then finish with an AA
Use your Q, then Q then E and finish with an AA

Renekton.name: Renekton
Renekton.title: the Butcher of the Sands
Renekton.blurb: Renekton is a terrifying, rage-fueled Ascended being from the scorched deserts of Shurima. Once, he was his empire's most esteemed warrior, leading the nation's armies to countless victories. However, after the empire's fall, Renekton was entombed...

abilities.name: Reign of Anger
abilities.mobaDesc: Generates 5 Fury each time he auto-attacks an enemy. He also loses 4 Fury per second if he hasn't dealt or taken damage in the last 12 seconds. When above 50 Fury, Renekton's next basic ability will consume 50 Fury and enhance its effects. He also generated 50% bonus Fury from all sources while below 50% maximum health.

abilities.name: Cull the Meek
abilities.riotDesc: Renekton swings his blade, dealing moderate physical damage to all targets around him, and heals for a small portion of the damage dealt. If he has more than 50 Fury, his damage and heal are increased.
abilities.mobaDesc: Deals physical damage to all nearby enemies and heals himself for each enemy hit. He also generates Fury on hitting enemies but the Fury per cast is capped at 30. Reign of Anger: Deals additional damage, increases the total healing by 200%, and the healing cap by 300%.

abilities.name: Ruthless Predator
abilities.riotDesc: Renekton slashes his target twice, dealing moderate physical damage and stuns them for 0.75 seconds. If Renekton has more than 50 Fury, he slashes his target three times, destroying damage shields on the target, dealing high physical damage, and stunning them for 1.5 seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Empowers his next auto-attack for 7 seconds. He gains bonus range and strikes his target twice after a cast time. It deals modified physical damage and stuns them for a duration. Each attack will apply on-hit effects and grants Fury. Reign of Anger: Destroys shields on the target before attacking them 3 times. The attacks deal bonus damage and increase the stun duration.

abilities.name: Slice and Dice
abilities.riotDesc: Renekton dashes, dealing damage to units along the way. Empowered, Renekton deals bonus damage and reduces the Armor of units hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes in the target direction, and deals physical damage to all enemies he passes through. Hitting an enemy will allow Renekton to re-cast this ability within 4 seconds. On recasting, Renekton dashes in the target direction, dealing the same physical damage to all enemies he passes through. He will generate Fury if he hits enemies/champions. Reign of Anger: Deals bonus damage and reduce their armor for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Dominus
abilities.riotDesc: Renekton transforms into the Tyrant form, gaining bonus Health and dealing damage to enemies around him. While in this form, Renekton gains Fury periodically.
abilities.mobaDesc: Empowers himself for 15 seconds, gaining bonus health, increased size, bonus range, and 20 Fury. For the duration of his Ultimate, he deals magic damage every 0.5 seconds to all nearby enemies and generates 5 Fury per second. This can give Renekton a maximum of 75 Fury.

combos.description: Your bread and butter animation cancel. AA then instantly W before AAing again.
To poke trade E onto your target then AA Q and E out right after.

Rengar.name: Rengar
Rengar.title: the Pridestalker
Rengar.blurb: Rengar is a ferocious vastayan trophy hunter who lives for the thrill of tracking down and killing dangerous creatures. He scours the world for the most fearsome beasts he can find, especially seeking any trace of Kha'Zix, the void creature who...

abilities.name: Unseen Predator
abilities.mobaDesc: Generates a Ferocity stack on casting an auto-attack. On reaching 4 stacks, his next basic ability will be empowered, which will grant an additional cast of this ability along with bonus Movement Speed for 1.5 seconds. It will also empower some of your abilities but will consume all the Ferocity stacks. The stacks are lost if Rengar is out of combat for 8 seconds. When hiding in a brush, Rengar's auto-attacks gain a pounce range. On attacking a target, he will leap to that target and attack them. This effect lasts for 0.25 even after leaving a brush but is lost immediately if he casts Flash. Leaping with no Ferocity stacks generates 1 Ferocity stack. Bonetooth Necklace: Taking down an enemy within 1.5 seconds of damaging them will grant you a trophy per unique champion, up to 5. These trophies grant bonus AD per stack.

abilities.name: Savagery
abilities.riotDesc:
Rengar's next Attack brutally stabs his target for bonus damage.

Ferocity effect: deals increased damage and grants Attack Speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: The next two auto-attacks within 3 seconds gain bonus attack speed. These attacks are unstoppable and gain bonus range while dealing bonus physical damage. Empowered: Deals bonus physical damage and gains increased bonus attack speed.

abilities.name: Battle Roar
abilities.riotDesc:
Rengar lets out a battle roar, damaging enemies and healing for some of the recent damage he has taken.

Ferocity effect: additionally breaks crowd control effects.
abilities.mobaDesc: Let's out a roar, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies and healing himself for 50% of the damage he has taken in the last 1.5 seconds. Empowered: The magic damage is modified and cleanses Rengar of all crowd control.

abilities.name: Bola Strike
abilities.riotDesc:
Rengar throws a bola, slowing the first target hit for a short duration.
