Ferocity effect: roots the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a bola in the target direction, dealing physical damage to the first enemy hit and slowing them for 1.75 seconds. Empowered: Physical damage is modified and roots its target for 1.75 seconds.

abilities.name: Thrill of the Hunt
abilities.riotDesc: Rengar's predatory instincts take over, <font color='#cd90ee'>Camouflaging</font> him and revealing the nearest enemy champion in a large radius around him. During Thrill of the Hunt, Rengar gains Move Speed and he can leap to the tracked enemy without being in brush, reducing their armor.
abilities.mobaDesc: Camouflages himself and gains Unseen Predator (brush Passive) for the remaining duration. His next auto-attack will make him deal bonus physical damage and reduce the target's armor for 4 seconds. Nearby enemy champions will be alerted to Rengar's presence.

balance.otherEffects: Tenacity increased by 20%. Q: Unempowered AD ratio changed to 10 / 13.75 / 17.5 / 21.25 / 25% AD. Empowered AD ratio changed to 40% AD. E : Bonus AD ratio changed to 100% bonus AD. R: Cooldown changed to 90 / 80 / 70 seconds.

combos.description: Use your E AA and Q, then W, AA, W again, and finish with a final AA.

Riven.name: Riven
Riven.title: the Exile
Riven.blurb: Once a swordmaster in the warhosts of Noxus, Riven is an expatriate in a land she previously tried to conquer. She rose through the ranks on the strength of her conviction and brutal efficiency, and was rewarded with a legendary runic blade and a...

abilities.name: Runic Blade
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains a charge for 6 seconds every time Riven uses an ability. This can stack up to 3 times. Her auto-attacks consume a charge to deal bonus physical damage (which can critically strike).

abilities.name: Broken Wings
abilities.riotDesc: Riven lashes out in a series of strikes. This ability can be reactivated three times in a short time frame with the third hit knocking back nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slashes her sword while moving in the direction of the cursor. This can be cast 3 times and deals physical damage to all enemies struck. It also acts as an auto-attack reset. The 3 casts have different effects. 1st Cast: Dashes towards the cursor, and deals damage to any enemy she comes in contact with. This cannot cross terrain. 2nd Cast: Mimics the first cast. 3rd Cast: Thee impact radius of her First cast is expanded. She will also knock back enemies and can cross terrain with this charge.

abilities.name: Ki Burst
abilities.riotDesc: Riven emits a Ki Burst, damaging and stunning nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Emits a burst of energy all around her that shocks nearby enemies, dealing physical damage and stunning all the surrounding targets for 0.75 seconds.

abilities.name: Valor
abilities.riotDesc: Riven steps forward a short distance and blocks incoming damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes in the direction of the cursor while shielding herself for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Blade of the Exile
abilities.riotDesc: Riven empowers her keepsake weapon with energy, and gains Attack Damage and Range. During this time, she also gains the ability to use Wind Slash, a powerful ranged attack, once.
abilities.mobaDesc: Empowers her Blade for 15 seconds, gaining bonus attack damage, bonus range, and increased range on her Q and W. She can recast this ability after 0.5 seconds to cast Wind Slash. Wind Slash: Unleashes a wave of energy in a cone, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit. The damage is increased based on missing health of the enemies.

combos.description: Chain your dash and stun by using E W instantly.
To ensure your ult damage hits your target, use your R2 and W them instantly.
When already in melee range use your R1 and W quickly to save on cast time.

Rumble.name: Rumble
Rumble.title: the Mechanized Menace
Rumble.blurb: Rumble is a young inventor with a temper. Using nothing more than his own two hands and a heap of scrap, the feisty yordle constructed a colossal mech suit outfitted with an arsenal of electrified harpoons and incendiary rockets. Though others may scoff...

abilities.name: Junkyard Titan
abilities.mobaDesc: Generates Heat (Resource Bar) each time he uses a basic ability while losing 10 Heat per second after not using any ability for 4 seconds. He gains Danger Zone at or above 50 heat, and becomes Overheated at 100 Heat. Danger Zone: Basic abilities are enhanced. Overheating: Rumble's abilities are disabled for 6 seconds. During this time, his auto-attacks deal bonus magic damage to non-structures while his heat decays back to zero.

abilities.name: Flamespitter
abilities.riotDesc: Rumble torches opponents in front of him, dealing magic damage in a cone for 3 seconds. While in Danger Zone this damage is increased.
abilities.mobaDesc: Activates his flamethrower for 3 seconds, gaining 20 heat and dealing magic damage every 0.25 seconds to all enemies in a cone in front of him. This ability deals reduced damage to minions. Danger Zone: Damage increased by 50%

abilities.name: Scrap Shield
abilities.riotDesc: Rumble pulls up a shield, protecting him from damage and granting him a quick burst of speed. While in Danger Zone, the shield strength and speed bonus is increased.
abilities.mobaDesc: Rumble Shields himself for 1.5 seconds, gaining Heat and bonus Movement Speed. Danger Zone: All effects are increased by 50%

abilities.name: Electro Harpoon
abilities.riotDesc: Rumble launches a harpoon, electrocuting his target with magic damage, slowing their Move Speed, and reducing their Magic Resist. Rumble can carry 2 harpoons at a time. While in Danger Zone the damage and slow percentage is increased.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Periodically stocks an Electro Harpoon charge, up to a maximum of 2 charges. Active: Shoots a harpoon, gaining heat and dealing magic damage to the first enemy hit and slowing them for 2 seconds. The slows can stack if the same target is hit by the harpoon again. Danger Zone: Effects are increased by 50%

abilities.name: The Equalizer
abilities.riotDesc: Rumble fires off a group of rockets, creating a wall of flames that damages and slows enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Deploys a barrage of rockets down the target path, landing in a line over one second and lasting for 5 seconds. Enemies within the line of rockets take magic damage every 0.5 seconds and are slowed by 35%. The damage will persist for 1 second even after leaving the area.

combos.description: Start with your E, then Q, , AA, E then finish off with an AA
Start with your Q, then W then an AA then E, AA, E, then finish off with an AA

Ryze.name: Ryze
Ryze.title: the Rune Mage
Ryze.blurb: Widely considered one of the most adept sorcerers on Runeterra, Ryze is an ancient, hard-bitten archmage with an impossibly heavy burden to bear. Armed with immense arcane power and a boundless constitution, he tirelessly hunts for World Runes—fragments...

abilities.name: Arcane Mastery
abilities.mobaDesc: Ryze gains 5% per 100 AP bonus mana.

abilities.name: Overload
abilities.riotDesc:
Passively, Ryze's other basic abilities reset the cooldown of Overload and charge a rune. When Ryze casts Overload with 2 runes charged, he gains a brief burst of Move Speed.

On cast, Ryze throws a charge of pure energy in a line, dealing damage to the first enemy struck. If the target has Flux on it, Overload deals extra damage and bounces to nearby enemies with Flux.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Basic abilities reset this ability's cooldown and charge a Rune for 4 seconds, up to 2 seconds. Active: Unleashes a runic blast in the target direction, dealing magic damage to the first enemy struck and consuming all of his Runes. On consuming 2 Runes, he gains bonus movement speed. Flux afflicted champions take increased damage and the Flux spreads to nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Rune Prison
abilities.riotDesc: Ryze traps a target in a cage of runes, damaging them and slowing their movement. If the target has Flux on it, they are instead rooted.
abilities.mobaDesc: Instantly deals magic damage and slows the target enemy by 35% for 1.5 seconds. Flux: This ability's slow is converted to a root.

abilities.name: Spell Flux
abilities.riotDesc: Ryze releases an orb of pure magical power that damages an enemy and debuffs all nearby enemies. Ryze's spells have additional effects against the debuffed enemy.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws an orb at the target enemy, dealing magic damage to his target and marking them and nearby enemies with Flux for 3 seconds. His next basic ability consumes this Flux to get bonus effects. Flux: This ability spreads further.

abilities.name: Realm Warp
abilities.riotDesc:
Passively, Overload deals even more damage against targets with Flux.

On cast, Ryze creates a portal to a nearby location. After a few seconds, allies standing near the portal are teleported to the target location.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Increases his Q damage against targets marked with E. Active: Opens a portal on the ground at his current location and begins channeling. If Ryze successfully channels for 2 seconds, all allied units within the portal blink to the target location and become untargetable for a small duration. This ability can affect untargetable units.

combos.description: Clear a minion wave by using E, then once off cooldown E again and Q.
Set up a gank by quickly using E W to root a target. AA then Q.
For a quick trade and exit Q your target, then quickly W E Q.

Samira.name: Samira
Samira.title: the Desert Rose
Samira.blurb: Samira stares death in the eye with unyielding confidence, seeking thrill wherever she goes. After her Shuriman home was destroyed as a child, Samira found her true calling in Noxus, where she built a reputation as a stylish daredevil taking on...

abilities.name: Daredevil Impulse
abilities.mobaDesc: Landing basic attacks and abilities against champions give Samira stacks. There is a unique visual for her stacks. Based on the style grade, she gains a different amount of movement speed. Samira’s basic attacks against targets within a certain range use her blade, becoming “non-projectile”. Basic attacks from further afield will be ranged.

abilities.name: Flair
abilities.riotDesc: Samira fires a shot or swings her sword, dealing damage. If cast during Wild Rush, strike all enemies in her path upon completion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Samira fires a shot in the target direction, dealing damage to the first enemy it hits. If the target is in close range, she will attack with her sword instead.

abilities.name: Blade Whirl
abilities.riotDesc: Samira slashes around her, damaging enemies and destroying enemy missiles.
abilities.mobaDesc: Samira slashes around herself dealing damage to enemies twice and destroying any enemy projectiles that enter the vicinity during this time.

abilities.name: Wild Rush
abilities.riotDesc: Samira dashes through an enemy (including structures), slashing enemies she passes through and gaining Attack Speed. Killing an enemy champion refreshes this ability's cooldown.
abilities.mobaDesc: Samira dashes through the target and slashes all enemies in her path. Takedowns on enemy champions will reset Wild Rush’s cooldown.

abilities.name: Inferno Trigger
abilities.riotDesc: Samira unleashes a torrent of shots from her weapons, wildly shooting all enemies surrounding her.
abilities.mobaDesc: Samira unleashes a torrent of shots from her weapons, shooting all nearby enemies while slowing her self. Inferno Trigger cannot be cast unless the style cost is satisfied. Infernal Trigger will reset the grade back to 0 stacks once the effect has ended. Samira cannot attack or cast her Q or W during her Ultimate. Her Ultimate will end prematurely if she is interrupted or hit by CC.

Sejuani.name: Sejuani
Sejuani.title: Fury of the North
Sejuani.blurb: Sejuani is the brutal, unforgiving Iceborn warmother of the Winter's Claw, one of the most feared tribes of the Freljord. Her people's survival is a constant, desperate battle against the elements, forcing them to raid Noxians, Demacians, and Avarosans...

abilities.name: Fury of the North
abilities.mobaDesc: Frost Armor: Receives Frost armor if she hasn't taken damage from monsters or enemy champions in the last 12 seconds. This lingers for 3 seconds after taking damage. Under the effect of Frost Armor, Bristle becomes slow-immune and immune to cripples. She also gains bonus armor and bonus magic resistance. Icebreaker: Enemies stunned by Sejuani are frozen. Sejuani's auto-attacks and abilities against frozen enemies consume the effect to deal bonus magic damage based on maximum health.

abilities.name: Arctic Assault
abilities.riotDesc: Sejuani charges forward, knocking enemies into the air. The charge stops after hitting an enemy champion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Bristle dashes in the target direction, dealing magic damage and knocking up all enemies hit for 0.5 seconds. Sejuani can cast any ability while using this one.

abilities.name: Winter's Wrath
abilities.riotDesc: Sejuani swings her mace twice, dealing damage, slowing enemies and applying Frost stacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: Swings her flail in a cone in the target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit and knocking back minions and monsters. She then lashes out with her flail in a straight line in the same direction, dealing additional physical damage and slowing all enemies hit by 75%. She can move freely while using this ability and the hitboxes will follow Sejuani's movement.

abilities.name: Permafrost
abilities.riotDesc: Sejuani freezes and stuns an enemy champion that has maximum Frost stacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Winter's Wrath and both Sejuani's and nearby allied melee champions' auto attacks apply Frost to enemy champions, epic, large and medium monsters, siege minions and super minions for 5 seconds, stacking up to 4 times. Active: Freezes the target and stuns them in place for a second while dealing magic damage to them.

abilities.name: Glacial Prison
abilities.riotDesc: Sejuani throws her bola that freezes and stuns the first champion hit and creates an ice storm that slows other enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws an ice bola in the target direction, stopping at the first enemy champion hit, dealing magic damage, stunning, and revealing them for 1 second. It deals increased damage and stuns for a greater duration if it travels a greater range. The impact also creates a frost storm around the target which slows enemies within and grants sight of the area in a smaller radius. At the end of the duration, the glacier breaks, dealing the same damage and slowing enemies by 80% for 1 second as well as briefly revealing them and the area.

combos.description: This is your standard Q W combo. Use both together then AA twice, E as soon as you can then AA R AA
To engage normally use Q then AA and use W as soon as the animation finishes, AA again then E and AA once more
When in melee range already you can chain your crowd control properly. AA W AA one after another then instantly Q E followed by AA R AA.

Senna.name: Senna
Senna.title: the Redeemer
Senna.blurb: Cursed from childhood to be haunted by the supernatural Black Mist, Senna joined a sacred order known as the Sentinels of Light, and fiercely fought back—only to be killed, her soul imprisoned in a lantern by the cruel specter Thresh. But refusing to...

abilities.name: Absolution
abilities.mobaDesc: Weakened Soul: Senna's attacks on enemy champions apply Mist for 4 seconds. Senna's next attack collects mist and deals damage. The same target cannot be collected from more than once every few seconds. Enemy champions, large monsters and large minions that die near Senna spawn Mist Wraiths. Senna can attack Mist Wraiths to collect gold and its Mist. Each stack of mist grants Senna 1 bonus AD. For every 20 stacks, Senna gains 25 bonus range and 10% critical strike chance. Upon exceeding 100% crit chance, she converts 35% of the excess into life steal. Relic Cannon: Senna doesn’t gain AD through growth like other champions, but her basic attacks deal 20% bonus AD and grant her bonus movement speed.

abilities.name: Piercing Darkness
abilities.riotDesc: From the twin barrels of her Relic Cannon, Senna fires a unified beam of light and shadow through a target, healing allies and damaging enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Senna fires a spectral laser in the direction of the target unit, healing allied champions hit and dealing damage to enemies hit by the center of the laser. Mist Wraiths struck by the beam are collected for Senna. Basic attacks reduce the cooldown by 1 second and resets her basic attack timer.

abilities.name: Last Embrace
abilities.riotDesc: Senna sends forth a wave of Black Mist. If it hits an enemy it latches onto them hungrily, rooting them and everything nearby after a brief delay.
abilities.mobaDesc: Senna throws a globule of Black Mist in a target direction dealing damage and rooting the first enemy hit 1 second afterwards. Nearby enemies are also rooted briefly.

abilities.name: Curse of the Black Mist
abilities.riotDesc: Senna draws the Mist she has stored in her weapon into a storm around her, embracing darkness and becoming a wraith within. Allies who enter the area are camouflaged and also appear as wraiths as the Mist shrouds them. Wraiths gain increased Move Speed, are unselectable, and hide their identities.
abilities.mobaDesc: Senna becomes camouflaged and so do allies that walk or stay in the mist. Senna’s basic attacks and abilities briefly break her camouflage. Wraith Form: Gains bonus movement speed and appears as an obscured wraith to enemies beyond 150 units. Basic attacks or casting abilities removes the form which cannot be regained for over a second.

abilities.name: Dawning Shadow
abilities.riotDesc: Senna calls upon the relic stones of fallen Sentinels, splitting her relic cannon into a holy array of shadow and light. She then fires a global beam that shields allies from harm, while damaging enemies caught in the center.
abilities.mobaDesc: Senna fires a broad beam of light in a target direction granting sight and dealing damage to enemies hit by the center of the beam. Any allied champions caught in the beam will be shielded.

combos.description: The most standard poke trade for lane is Q then AA instantly.
To burst after level 6, Q then AA W instantly. Follow it up with another AA and quickly R.
To trade from range use W on your target, then walk forward to AA Q AA.

Seraphine.name: Seraphine
Seraphine.title: the Starry-Eyed Songstress
Seraphine.blurb: Born in Piltover to Zaunite parents, Seraphine can hear the souls of others—the world sings to her, and she sings back. Though these sounds overwhelmed her in her youth, she now draws on them for inspiration, turning the chaos into a symphony. She...

abilities.name: Stage Presence
abilities.mobaDesc: Every third basic ability (her Q W or E) Seraphine casts will echo which causes this ability to be used twice. Think of it like she’s sending two waves instead of one on every third cast. Also, when she is near her allies and they use an ability, she gains a note. For each note, Seraphine’s attack range increases and deals additional damage. If she auto attacks, the note stack will be consumed.

abilities.name: High Note
abilities.riotDesc: Seraphine deals damage in an area.
abilities.mobaDesc: Seraphine throws out a pure note, dealing damage to targets hit. Think of this ability like Neeko’s Q. It has a sort of ripple effect like Neeko’s Q where the damage is dealt in the middle, and ripples outwards. Unlike Neeko’s Q that needs to hit a champion to proc twice, you can use it on anything and it will have this ripple effect. Empowered: She throws her Q twice.

abilities.name: Surround Sound
abilities.riotDesc: Seraphine Shields and Hastes nearby allies. If she is already Shielded she will Heal nearby allies as well.
abilities.mobaDesc: Seraphine gains bonus movement speed and a shield. If she is around some allies, they will get a shield and extra movement speed. If she already has a shield, she will provide them with a heal as well as a shield. Take note that the heal only comes in after a small delay. Empowered: She gives her allies a shield and a heal.

abilities.name: Beat Drop
abilities.riotDesc: Seraphine deals damage and impairs the movement of enemies in a line.
abilities.mobaDesc: Seraphine unleashes a soundwave that deals damage and slows enemies hit. Enemies that are already slowed are rooted instead, and immobilized enemies get stunned. Empowered: She throws out her musical note twice. If an enemy is hit twice, they’re rooted.

abilities.name: Encore
abilities.riotDesc: Seraphine deals damage and charms enemies hit, refreshing the range with every allied or enemy champion hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Seraphine projects a captivating force that charms all enemies hit. Any champion including her allies become “part of the performance” and extend the range of this ability. Allied champions gain maximum notes too. Maximum notes is 4- each for one of their abilities, but you'll get 5 stacks as you'll use your Ultimate which gives you an additional stack.

balance.otherEffects: Shielding done reduced by 20%. Healing done reduced by 20%. Ability haste reduced by 20.

combos.description: Start with your Q then E, follow up with an AA then W, then two AAs then Q and finally finish off with an AA

Sett.name: Sett
Sett.title: the Boss
Sett.blurb: A leader of Ionia's growing criminal underworld, Sett rose to prominence in the wake of the war with Noxus. Though he began as a humble challenger in the fighting pits of Navori, he quickly gained notoriety for his savage strength, and his ability to...

abilities.name: Pit Grit
abilities.mobaDesc: Sett's basic attacks alternate between a left punch and a right punch. Sett begins attacking with the left punch. His right punch gains bonus range, while the left deals normal damage. Right punches come out faster and deal more damage too. Sett also gains health regeneration for each 5% missing health

abilities.name: Knuckle Down
abilities.riotDesc: Sett's next two attacks deal additional damage based off of the target's max health. Sett also gains Move Speed while moving towards enemy champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sett gains movement speed while moving to a target. Sett’s next two basic attacks deal bonus damage.

abilities.name: Haymaker
abilities.riotDesc: Sett passively stores damage he takes as Grit. On cast, Sett expends all stored Grit to gain a shield and punch an area, dealing true damage in the center and physical damage on the sides.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sett stores 100% of damage taken as Grit which is capped at 50% of Sett’s max health. Grit decays quickly after damage was taken. Active: Sett winds up a giant punch in a direction, expanding all grit as true damage to all enemies in the centre line. Enemies who are not in the centre but still in range take physical damage. Sett also gains a rapidly decaying shield equal to Grit.

abilities.name: Facebreaker
abilities.riotDesc: Sett pulls in all enemies on opposite sides of him, dealing damage and stunning them. If enemies were only on one side, they are slowed instead of stunned.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sett smashes enemies on either side of him into each other, dealing damage and slowing them. If Sett grabs one enemy on either side, all enemies are stunned for 1 second.

abilities.name: The Show Stopper
abilities.riotDesc: Sett carries an enemy champion through the air and slams them into the ground, dealing damage and slowing all enemies near where they land.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sett grabs an enemy champion, carries them forward and then slams them into the ground. All enemies near the impact take lots of damage and are slowed. Take care though as you may push the enemy and yourself over a wall.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Health regeneration is halved. Q: Bonus movement speed changed to 35%. W: Grit cap changed to 35% maximum health. Damage base Grit ratio changed to 20%. Cooldown changed to 18 / 17 / 16 / 15 / 14 seconds.

combos.description: A normal trade will look like AA twice then Q instantly AA twice again.
After level 3 you can trade by AA twice Q instantly AA twice again E AA twice and finish off with W.
When around minions use E, AA twice, Q instantly, AA twice and finish up with W.

Shaco.name: Shaco
Shaco.title: the Demon Jester
Shaco.blurb: Crafted long ago as a plaything for a lonely prince, the enchanted marionette Shaco now delights in murder and mayhem. Corrupted by dark magic and the loss of his beloved charge, the once-kind puppet finds pleasure only in the misery of the poor souls...

abilities.name: Backstab
abilities.mobaDesc: Auto-attacks deal additional bonus physical damage when striking a non-structure from behind. This can critically strike.

abilities.name: Deceive
abilities.riotDesc:
Shaco becomes Invisible and teleports to target location.

His first attack while Invisible is empowered, dealing bonus damage and critically striking if he attacks from behind.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: After a brief delay, Shaco blinks to the target location and becomes invisible for a few seconds. After exiting invisibility, his next auto-attack within 0.25 seconds deals bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Jack In The Box
abilities.riotDesc: Shaco creates a hidden animated Jack-in-the-Box. When triggered, it will fear and attack nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: summons a Jack in the Box at the target location, lasting for up to 40 seconds. The boxes arm after 2 seconds and become stealthed, during which it is invulnerable and untargetable to enemies. If any enemy comes near the box, it will trigger and fear the surrounding targets while dealing magic damage to the enemies.

abilities.name: Two-Shiv Poison
abilities.riotDesc: Shaco's Shivs passively poison targets on hit, slowing their Move Speed. He can throw his Shivs to deal damage and poison the target. The thrown Shiv deals bonus damage if the target is below 30% health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Shaco's auto-attacks slow enemies for 2 seconds when this ability is off cooldown. Active: Throws a dagger at the target enemy, slowing them for 3 seconds and dealing magic damage. The damage is increased on targets below 30% of their maximum health. Backstab: Deals additional bonus magic damage which is increased when the target is below 30% max health.

abilities.name: Hallucinate
abilities.riotDesc: Shaco creates an illusion of himself near him, which can attack nearby enemies (Deals reduced damage to turrets). Upon death, it explodes, spawning three mini Jack in the Boxes and dealing damage to nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Vanishes for 0.5 seconds and blinks to a location while creating a copy of himself that blinks in the opposing direction. This copy/clone is controllable. He can command the clone to attack a specific target as well. When the clone dies, it deals magic damage to all enemies around it and leaves 3 mini-boxes behind which activate instantly, causing nearby enemies to flee for a second.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Bonus AD ratio changed to 40% bonus AD. Q: Bonus AD ratio changed to 85% bonus AD. Cooldown changed to 12 / 11 / 10 / 9 / 8 seconds. W: Limited to 6 Boxes active. E: Bonus AD ratio changed to 100% bonus AD.

combos.description: To gank or dodge an enemy skill shot Q and get behind your target to AA, then instantly R followed by more AA's until you want to E to execute.
To gank after level 6 Q and place your W behind your target, instantly R1 then eAA. Continue to AA until you want to E to execute.
Your standard gank combo will lead with Q, place Box behind your target then AA, continue to AA and use E.

Shen.name: Shen
Shen.title: the Eye of Twilight
Shen.blurb: Among the secretive, Ionian warriors known as the Kinkou, Shen serves as their leader, the Eye of Twilight. He longs to remain free from the confusion of emotion, prejudice, and ego, and walks the unseen path of dispassionate judgment between the spirit...

abilities.name: Ki Barrier
abilities.mobaDesc: On completing an ability's effects, Shen will shield himself for an amount for 2.5 seconds. If the triggering ability managed to affect at least one champion, the cooldown of his Passive is reduced by 4-7 seconds.

abilities.name: Twilight Assault
abilities.riotDesc: Shen recalls his spirit blade to attack with it, dealing damage based on the target's max health. The attacks are greatly empowered if it collides with an enemy champion, and all collided enemies are slowed while running away from Shen.
abilities.mobaDesc: Calls his Spirit Blade to his location. Enemies that the blade collides with are slowed for the next couple of seconds while moving away from Shen. On arrival, Shen empowers his next 3 auto-attacks which gain bonus range and deal magic damage. This damage is increased if the Blade collided with an enemy champion and Shen also gains bonus attack speed while it is active.

abilities.name: Spirit's Refuge
abilities.riotDesc: Attacks that would hit Shen or his allies near his spirit blade are blocked.
abilities.mobaDesc: Primes his Spirit Blade and creates an area around it. If Shen or an allied champion enters the area, or after a delay of 2 seconds, the blade creates a zone around it for 1.75 seconds. This zone blocks all non-turret based auto-attacks to any allied champion in the area.

abilities.name: Shadow Dash
abilities.riotDesc: Shen dashes in a direction, taunting enemies in his path.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Damage from this ability and Twilight Assault recovers energy. Active: Shen dashes in the target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemy champions and monsters in his path and taunting them for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Stand United
abilities.riotDesc: Shen shields target allied champion from incoming damage, and soon after teleports to their location.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shen channels for 3 seconds, shielding an allied champion. The shield increases based on the target's missing health. On completing the channel, Shen and his Spirit Blade blink to the target ally's location on the map. Shen also destroys any projectiles targeted at him at the time of completion.

combos.description: For a quick trade and retreat Q then instantly AA and cancel the backup of your AA animation with E.
Your basic taunt combo uses E through your target then Q mid air followed by some AA's.
To get some poke damage on your target Q then instantly AA.

Shyvana.name: Shyvana
Shyvana.title: the Half-Dragon
Shyvana.blurb: Shyvana is a fearsome half-dragon warrior. Though she often appears humanoid, she also rules the skies as a dragon, incinerating her foes with fiery breath. Having saved the life of the crown prince Jarvan IV, Shyvana now serves uneasily in his royal...

abilities.name: Emberstrike
abilities.riotDesc: Shyvana's next attack strikes both the target and the surrounding area. This Ability can be recast. While in Dragon Form, it gains an additional recast, dealing massive damage to a single target.

abilities.name: Inferno Aegis
abilities.riotDesc: Shyvana gains a shield, movement speed, and after a short delay, the area around her detonates. While in Dragon Form, the explosion will heal her if it strikes an enemy champion.

abilities.name: Molten Burst
abilities.riotDesc: Shyvana launches a fireball that explodes upon striking a large target and slows them. In Dragon Form, it passes through and explodes upon striking large enemies, leaving behind a trail of fire.

abilities.name: Dragon's Descent
abilities.riotDesc: Shyvana transforms into a Dragon and leaps forward causing enemies along her path to flee. While in Dragon form she becomes larger and her basic abilities are empowered.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Alternate Innate: While alive, Shyvana gains 1 bonus armor, 1 bonus magic resistance, and 0.1 bonus Fury regeneration whenever a large minion dies within 1400 units of her, or when she is healed by a health relic's area of effect on the enemy's side of the map.

combos.description: When close range W AA instantly, E Q AA as quickly as you can right after then continue to AA.
Your standard combo will be E then instantly W AA, Q as soon as the AA completes to reset your AA animation then continue to AA.
If you're already close to your opponent W right before using R then E Q eAA as quickly as you can after landing.

Singed.name: Singed
Singed.title: the Mad Chemist
Singed.blurb: Singed is a brilliant alchemist of dubious morality, whose experiments would turn the stomach of even the most cutthroat criminal. Selling his skills to the highest bidder, he cares little for how his noxious concoctions are used, with the ensuing chaos...

abilities.name: Noxious Slipstream
abilities.mobaDesc: Moving near a champion grants Singed 20% bonus movement speed for 2 seconds. The effects of this Passive can stack up to 25 times.

abilities.name: Poison Trail
abilities.riotDesc: Leaves a trail of poison behind Singed, dealing damage to enemies caught in the path.
abilities.mobaDesc: Toggle: Leaves a poison cloud behind him for 3.25 seconds. Enemies standing in the cloud's trail are poisoned for 2 seconds, taking magic damage every 0.25 seconds for the duration.

abilities.name: Mega Adhesive
abilities.riotDesc: Throws a vial of mega adhesive on the ground, slowing and grounding enemies who walk on it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Covers the target area with an adhesive for 3 seconds, slowing and grounding all enemies within.

abilities.name: Fling
abilities.riotDesc: Damages target enemy unit and flings them into the air behind Singed. If the target Singed flings lands in his Mega Adhesive, they are also rooted.
abilities.mobaDesc: Flings the target enemy over his shoulder, behind his casting position, and dealing magic damage. Target's flung into his W will be temporarily rooted.

abilities.name: Insanity Potion
abilities.riotDesc: Singed drinks a potent brew of chemicals, granting him increased combat stats, and making his Poison Trail apply Grievous Wounds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus Ability power, bonus armor, bonus magic resistance, bonus movement speed, bonus health regeneration, and bonus mana regeneration for the next 25 seconds.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Bonus movement speed per stack changed to 20%. Maximum bonus movement speed changed to 500%. Cooldown per target changed to 10 seconds.

combos.description: Q AA then W behind yourself and instantly E your enemy into your W. Follow up with a mid air AA.
Especially vs ranged Q then W your opponent, run up to them to E then instantly AA.
Most trades will start with Q and walk up to proc your passive then AA as soon as the poison hits. Use E to flip your target through your poison trail, then run them down to continue to AA.

Sion.name: Sion
Sion.title: The Undead Juggernaut
Sion.blurb: A war hero from a bygone era, Sion was revered in Noxus for choking the life out of a Demacian king with his bare hands—but, denied oblivion, he was resurrected to serve his empire even in death. His indiscriminate slaughter claimed all who stood in his...

abilities.name: Glory in Death
abilities.mobaDesc: On dying, Sion goes into stasis for 1.5 seconds after which he will reanimate with full but decaying health per second. Sion can move freely and use auto-attacks. His attacks gain attack speed and life steal while dealing bonus physical damage based on the maximum health of the target. He can use his abilities to activate Death Surge, which will result in him gaining bonus movement speed.

abilities.name: Decimating Smash
abilities.riotDesc: Sion charges a powerful swing in an area in front of himself that will deal damage to enemies when released. If he charges for enough time, enemies hit by the swing will also be knocked up and stunned.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges for 2 seconds, increasing the range and damage of this ability per second. If this channel gets interrupted, this ability is placed on a 2-second cooldown with no mana refunded. Recast: On recasting the ability, Sion deals physical damage to all enemies in the area and slows them. If the ability was allowed to channel completely, Sion will knock all enemies up instead and will stun them.

abilities.name: Soul Furnace
abilities.riotDesc: Sion shields himself and can reactivate after 3 seconds to deal Magic Damage to enemies nearby. When Sion kills enemies, he passively gains maximum Health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Sion gains 4 bonus health whenever he kills an enemy. This gain is increased to 15 health against large enemies and enemy champion kills. Active: Sion shields himself for up to 6 seconds. This ability can be recast after 3 seconds provided the shield is not destroyed. On recasting, the shield is detonated to deal magic damage to enemies around Sion.

abilities.name: Roar of the Slayer
abilities.riotDesc: Sion fires a short range shockwave that damages and slows and reduces the Armor of the first enemy hit. If the shockwave hits a minion or monster, it will be knocked back, damaging, slowing, and reducing the Armor of all enemies that it passes through.
abilities.mobaDesc: Deals magic damage to the first enemy hit with this ability and slows them for 2.5 seconds. He also reduces the target's armor for 4 seconds. If the target is a minion or non-epic monster, it is stunned for 0.75 seconds and knocked back in the same line. If the target passes through another target or a bunch of targets, they will have the same effects on them as the initial target.

abilities.name: Unstoppable Onslaught
abilities.riotDesc: Sion charges in a direction, ramping up speed over time. He can steer his charge slightly with the mouse cursor location. When he collides with an enemy he deals damage and knocks them up based on the distance he has charged.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges forward in the direction of the cursor for up to 8 seconds. He is immune to CC and ghosted when using this ability and can steer himself slowly. On reaching the end of the duration, Sion leaps forward for some distance and slams the ground around him. Colliding with an enemy champion or terrain will stop this ability, and running into terrain will also stun Sion for 0.5 seconds. On recasting this ability, Sion will stop charging, leap and slam the ground around him just as he would at the normal end of the duration of this ability.

balance.otherEffects: Ability haste reduced by 10. Passive: Life steal changed to 50%. W: Bonus health per lesser unit kill changed to 2. Bonus health per greater unit kill changed to 5. Shield health ratio changed to 6 / 8 / 10 / 12 / 14% maximum health.

combos.description: Use your E then Q, W, AA, AA and W again.
Use your E then Q, W, then R, AA, AA, and W.

Sivir.name: Sivir
Sivir.title: the Battle Mistress
Sivir.blurb: Sivir is a renowned fortune hunter and mercenary captain who plies her trade in the deserts of Shurima. Armed with her legendary jeweled crossblade, she has fought and won countless battles for those who can afford her exorbitant price. Known for her...

abilities.name: Fleet of Foot
abilities.mobaDesc: Sivir gains bonus movement speed for 2 seconds when she damages an enemy champion with an ability or an auto-attack.

abilities.name: Boomerang Blade
abilities.riotDesc: Sivir hurls her crossblade like a boomerang, dealing damage each way.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws her cross blade in the target direction. Enemies in its path take physical damage. On reaching maximum distance, the cross blade returns to her, dealing the same damage. each unit can be damaged only once per pass.

abilities.name: Ricochet
abilities.riotDesc: Sivir's next few basic attacks gain additional attack speed and bounce to nearby targets, dealing reduced damage while bouncing.
abilities.mobaDesc: Her next 3 auto-attacks within 4 seconds will bounce to nearby enemies, dealing physical damage until none remain in range. If Sivir critically strikes during the initial auto-attack, the remaining bounces critically strike as well.

abilities.name: Spell Shield
abilities.riotDesc: Creates a magical barrier that blocks a single enemy ability cast on Sivir. She receives health and a burst of movement speed if a spell is blocked.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: Sivir gains a spell shield for 1.5 seconds. Successfully blocking an ability restores mana.

abilities.name: On The Hunt
abilities.riotDesc: Sivir leads her allies in battle, granting them a surge of Move Speed for a period of time. In addition, Sivir's attacks reduce her spell cooldowns.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Sivir gains bonus attack speed while W is still active. Active: Sivir gains bonus movement speed for 8 seconds that decays to half of that amount after a few seconds.

combos.description: In longer trades AA then instantly W, AA again then Q instantly followed by more AA's.
For a quicker trade AA then instantly W to reset your AA and Q.
The most common trading tactic is to AA then Q as soon as the animation finishes, then AA again.

Skarner.name: Skarner
Skarner.title: the Primordial Sovereign
Skarner.blurb: The ancient, colossal brackern Skarner is revered in Ixtal as one of the founding members of its ruling caste, the Yun Tal. Devoted to keeping his nation safe from the rest of the world, Skarner dwells in a chamber beneath Ixaocan where he can hear the...

abilities.name: Threads of Vibration
abilities.mobaDesc: Skarner’s Attacks, Shattered Earth, Upheaval, and Impale, apply Quaking for a period of time. At max Quaking stacks, enemies take percent health magic damage over the duration.

abilities.name: Shattered Earth / Upheaval
abilities.riotDesc: Skarner rips a boulder from the earth that empowers his attacks and can be thrown as a powerful projectile.

abilities.name: Seismic Bastion
abilities.riotDesc: Skarner gains a shield and creates an earthquake whose shockwave damages and slows foes.

abilities.name: Ixtal's Impact
abilities.riotDesc: Skarner charges forward and passes through terrain. If he collides with a champion or large monster, he'll slam them into the next wall he hits to damage and stun them.

abilities.name: Impale
abilities.riotDesc: Skarner's tails lash forward to suppress enemy champions. Once suppressed, the victims will be dragged along by Skarner as he moves around.

combos.description: Press Q then AA, W, AA and AA again!

Smolder.name: Smolder
Smolder.title: the Fiery Fledgling
Smolder.blurb: Hidden amongst the craggy cliffs of the Noxian frontier, under the watchful eyes of his mother, a young dragon is learning what it means to be heir to the Camavoran imperial dragon lineage. Playful and eager to grow up, Smolder looks for any excuse to...

abilities.name: Dragon Practice
abilities.mobaDesc: Hitting champions with Abilities and killing enemies with Super Scorcher Breath grants a stack of Dragon Practice. Stacks increase the damage of Smolders basic Abilities.

abilities.name: Super Scorcher Breath
abilities.riotDesc: Smolder breathes fire on an enemy. As he gains more stacks, this ability becomes more powerful.

abilities.name: Achooo!
abilities.riotDesc: Smolder lets out an adorable flaming sneeze that explodes when hitting enemy champions.

abilities.name: Flap, Flap, Flap
abilities.riotDesc: Smolder takes flight ignoring terrain and bombarding the lowest health enemy.

abilities.name: MMOOOMMMM!
abilities.riotDesc: Smolder calls his mom to breath fire from above, dealing extra damage and slowing enemies in the center of her fire.

combos.description: Start with your Q, then AA, W, AA, and E to fly in! THen AA, AA, Q and AA again to finish.
Lead with AA, then W, AA, Q and AA to finish.

Sona.name: Sona
Sona.title: Maven of the Strings
Sona.blurb: Sona is Demacia's foremost virtuoso of the stringed etwahl, speaking only through her graceful chords and vibrant arias. This genteel manner has endeared her to the highborn, though others suspect her spellbinding melodies to actually emanate magic—a...

abilities.name: Power Chord
abilities.mobaDesc: Accelerando: Sona generates stacks for using her basic abilities. Every stack generates 0.5 ability haste, which stacks up to 60 ability haste. When she reaches 60 ability haste, she will reduce her Ultimate’s cooldown. Powerchord: After using 3 abilities, her next attack deals additional damage and has additional effects.

abilities.name: Hymn of Valor
abilities.riotDesc: Sona plays the Hymn of Valor, sends out bolts of sound, dealing magic damage to two nearby enemies, prioritizing champions and monsters. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone bonus damage on their next attack against enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sona sends out 2 bolts that deal damage to targets. She gains a stack for each enemy champion she damages. Aura: Sona and tagged allies deal bonus damage on their next auto-attack. Powercord: Sona’s auto attack deals additional damage to the target.

abilities.name: Aria of Perseverance
abilities.riotDesc: Sona plays the Aria of Perseverance, sending out protective melodies, healing Sona and a nearby wounded ally. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allies tagged by the zone a temporary shield.
abilities.mobaDesc: Heals herself and the most wounded nearby allied champion. Granting an ally (other than herself) the aura refunds 30 mana per cast. Aura: Sona and her allies receive a shield that lasts for 1.5 seconds. Power Chord: Reduces target size by 8% and reduces their damage by an amount for 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Song of Celerity
abilities.riotDesc: Sona plays the Song of Celerity, granting nearby allies bonus Move Speed. Sona gains a temporary aura that grants allied champions tagged by the zone bonus Move Speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sona gains bonus movement speed for 3 seconds. This can be extended up to 7 seconds if she doesn't take damage. Aura: Tagged allied champions gain bonus movement speed for 3 seconds. Power Chord: Slows its target by an amount for 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Crescendo
abilities.riotDesc: Sona plays her ultimate chord, stunning enemy champions and forcing them to dance and dealing magic damage to them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sends a wave of music over a wide range in the target direction. This deals magic damage and forces all enemy champions to dance for 1.5 seconds.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Maximum Accelerando stacks changed to 60. Maximum basic ability haste changed to 30. Q: Cooldown changed to 10 seconds. W: Cooldown changed to 13 seconds. Base heal changed to 45 / 56.25 / 67.5 / 78.75 / 90. Heal AP ratio changed to 20% AP. Aura base shield changed to 65 / 75 / 85 / 95 / 105. Shield AP ratio changed to 20% AP.

combos.description: At two stacks of your power chord passive AA then instantly Q AA for some quick damage.
To engage a fight R then instantly Q eAA.
When looking to setup a pick or gank opportunity E then instantly AA Q followed by an AA.

Soraka.name: Soraka
Soraka.title: the Starchild
Soraka.blurb: A wanderer from the celestial dimensions beyond Mount Targon, Soraka gave up her immortality to protect the mortal races from their own more violent instincts. She endeavors to spread the virtues of compassion and mercy to everyone she meets—even...

abilities.name: Salvation
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains 70% bonus movement speed when moving towards allied champions below 40% maximum health.

abilities.name: Starcall
abilities.riotDesc: A star falls from the sky at the target location dealing magic damage and slowing enemies. If an enemy champion is hit by Starcall, Soraka recovers Health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Calls a star at the target location, dealing magic damage to all enemies in that area and slowing them for 2 seconds. On hitting an enemy champion, Soraka gains Rejuvenation for 2.5 seconds where she heals herself every 0.5 seconds and gains bonus decaying movement speed. This Rejuvenation can be shared with allies if she uses her W on them while this effect is active.

abilities.name: Astral Infusion
abilities.riotDesc: Soraka sacrifices a portion of her own health to heal another friendly champion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Heals the target allied champion at the cost of her Health. This ability can't be cast if she is below 5% of her maximum health.

abilities.name: Equinox
abilities.riotDesc: Creates a zone at a location that silences all enemies inside. When the zone expires, all enemies still inside are rooted.
abilities.mobaDesc: Creates a zone that deals magic damage, upon formation, to all enemies hit by it. This zone persists for 1.5 seconds, silencing all enemies within it. After the duration ends, the zone detonates, dealing the same magic damage to all enemy champions within and briefly rooting them.

abilities.name: Wish
abilities.riotDesc: Soraka fills her allies with hope, instantly restoring health to herself and all allied champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: Instantly heals all allied champions, and herself, which is increased by 50% on targets below 40% maximum health.

balance.otherEffects: Healing done increased by 0%. Ability haste increased by 10. Q: Total heal changed to 75 / 90 / 105 / 120 / 135. Heal AP ratio changed to 40% AP. W: Health cost changed to 5% maximum health. Minimum health threshold unchanged.

combos.description: For a quick trade E Q instantly then AA
For effective healing Q then R and use W right as you receive your Rejuvenation buff from Q landing.
This trade can be used to engage or disengage. Q then AA and instantly E afterwards.

Swain.name: Swain
Swain.title: the Noxian Grand General
Swain.blurb: Jericho Swain is the visionary ruler of Noxus, an expansionist nation that reveres only strength. Though he was cast down and crippled in the Ionian wars, his left arm severed, he seized control of the empire with ruthless determination… and a new...

abilities.name: Ravenous Flock
abilities.mobaDesc: Swain can periodically target nearby immobilized enemy champion to rip out a Soul Fragment from them, dealing bonus magic damage and pulling them towards him. If the target would be brought past Swain, they are instead knocked back instead. Swain can harvest a soul fragment from a dead champion if Swain is near them. Flock: Swain's ravens bring nearby Soul Fragments to him, healing him for a percent of his maximum health. Each soul fragment increases his maximum health by 5.

abilities.name: Death's Hand
abilities.riotDesc: Swain unleashes several bolts of eldritch power that pierce through enemies. Enemies hit take more damage for each bolt they are struck by.
abilities.mobaDesc: Unleashes five bolts of dark magic in the target direction, dealing magic damage to all enemies in a cone. Enemies can be hit by multiple bolts, taking bonus magic damage.

abilities.name: Vision of Empire
abilities.riotDesc: Swain opens a demon eye that deals damage and slows enemies. Champions hit are revealed and also grant Swain a Soul Fragment.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons a demonic eye at the target location, revealing it for 2 seconds, which explodes after 1.5 seconds, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit. These enemies are slowed for 2.5 seconds. Enemy champions hit are revealed for a duration and have a Soul Fragment taken from them.

abilities.name: Nevermove
abilities.riotDesc: Swain launches a wave of demonic power forward. It then returns to Swain and roots enemies it hits. Swain can then choose to pull all rooted champions closer. This ability has a shorter cooldown during Demonic Ascension.
abilities.mobaDesc: Launches a wave in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies it passes through. On reaching its maximum distance, the wave returns to Swain, detonating at the first enemy hit, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies, and rooting them for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Demonic Ascension
abilities.riotDesc: Swain transforms into a demon and drains health from nearby enemy champions, minions, and neutral monsters. Swain can cast Demonflare to decimate and slow nearby enemies with a nova of soulfire. This form is indefinite as long as Swain drains enemy champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: Becomes a demonic entity and becomes ghosted, gaining bonus health, and doubling the health gained from Soul Fragments. Swain deals magic damage to all enemies around him and heals himself for each enemy hit. At the end of the duration, or if Swain recasts this ability, he with cast Demonflare and end his Ultimate. Demonflare: Releases a nova of energy, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies along with 37.5% of the health drained during Demonic Ascension.

combos.description: Use your E, W and E again. Then Q and AA to finish a short and sweet combo.
Use your W then E and E again. Finish with a Q and AA.

Sylas.name: Sylas
Sylas.title: the Unshackled
Sylas.blurb: Raised in one of Demacia's lesser quarters, Sylas of Dregbourne has come to symbolize the darker side of the Great City. As a boy, his ability to root out hidden sorcery caught the attention of the notorious mageseekers, who eventually imprisoned him...

abilities.name: Petricite Burst
abilities.mobaDesc: Casting an ability grants an Unshackled stack for 4 seconds, with the duration refreshing on subsequent ability uses. He can have 3 stacks at a time and will gain 80% bonus attack speed on having a stack. Unshackled: Next basic attack deals magic damage the primary target and reduced magic damage to the nearby secondary targets.

abilities.name: Chain Lash
abilities.riotDesc:
Sylas lashes his chains out, intersecting at his targeted location dealing damage to and slowing enemies.

After a delay, magical energy explodes from the intersection point dealing damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Lashes both his chains which converge at a point. It deals magic damage and slows enemies hit for 1.5 seconds. After a brief delay, the chains' intersection detonates, dealing magic damage to enemies within.

abilities.name: Kingslayer
abilities.riotDesc: Sylas lunges at an enemy with magical force dealing damage and healing himself against enemy champions.
abilities.mobaDesc: Rushes at the target enemy with a powerful strike and deals magic damage. If this ability damages an enemy champion, Sylas is also healed based on his missing health.

abilities.name: Abscond / Abduct
abilities.riotDesc: Sylas dashes to a location. Sylas can recast the ability to throw his chains out, pulling himself to an enemy he hits.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes in the target direction after which he can recast this ability to whip out his chains in the target direction. If the chains hit a target, it deals magic damage to them, stuns them and Sylas pulls himself towards them.

abilities.name: Hijack
abilities.riotDesc: Sylas steals the enemy's ultimate ability and can cast it freely.
abilities.mobaDesc: Steals the enemy target's Ultimate. Sylas can't select the same champion for the set duration and can hold the hijacked ultimate for 90 seconds. All Hijacked ultimates and abilities that do not scale with ability power have their attack damage ratios converted to ability power ratios, scaling with 0.6% AP per 1% total AD, and 0.4% AP per 1% bonus AD respectively.

combos.description: The most basic engage using E then E again followed by AA Q to keep your opponent close for your AA W finisher.
To trade in minions E into melee range then AA W AA, use your Q then use the slow to more easily land your stun.

Syndra.name: Syndra
Syndra.title: the Dark Sovereign
Syndra.blurb: Syndra is a fearsome Ionian mage with incredible power at her command. As a child, she disturbed the village elders with her reckless and wild magic. She was sent away to be taught greater control, but eventually discovered her supposed mentor was...

abilities.name: Transcendent
abilities.mobaDesc: Syndra collects Splinters of Wrath from gaining levels and damaging enemies which upgrade her abilities.

abilities.name: Dark Sphere
abilities.riotDesc: Syndra conjures a Dark Sphere dealing magic damage. The sphere remains and can be manipulated by her other powers.
abilities.mobaDesc: Conjures a Dark Sphere at the target location, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit. The orbs remain on the ground for 6 seconds. Transcendent: Dark Sphere deals 25% bonus magic damage against champions.

abilities.name: Force of Will
abilities.riotDesc: Syndra picks up and throws a Dark Sphere or enemy minion dealing magic damage and slowing the Move Speed of enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Grabs the nearest Dark Sphere, enemy minion or non-epic monster for 5 seconds. On recasting this ability, Syndra throws the grabbed target towards the target area. Enemies struck, including the grabbed target, take magic damage and are slowed for 1.5 seconds. Transcendent: Deals 20% bonus true damage.

abilities.name: Scatter the Weak
abilities.riotDesc: Syndra knocks enemies and Dark Spheres back dealing magic damage. Enemies hit by Dark Spheres become stunned.
abilities.mobaDesc: Knocks back all enemies and spheres away from her and deals magic damage. If the dark sphere hits a target, that target is stunned and takes magic damage. Transcendent: Area of effect is 50% wider.

abilities.name: Unleashed Power
abilities.riotDesc: Syndra bombards an enemy Champion with all of her Dark Spheres.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hurls her spheres at the target enemy champion, dealing magic damage per sphere. The sphere will then remain on the ground for 6 seconds. Transcendent: Cast range is increased.

combos.description: Lead with your Q then AA, W and W again. Then E AA, R, AA, AA and Q again to finish.
Start with your Q and E combo, then W, W and R to take them down.
Start with a Q, then W, W again and then E.

TahmKench.name: Tahm Kench
TahmKench.title: The River King
TahmKench.blurb: Known by many names throughout history, the demon Tahm Kench travels the waterways of Runeterra, feeding his insatiable appetite with the misery of others. Though he may appear singularly charming and proud, he swaggers through the physical realm like a...

abilities.name: An Acquired Taste
abilities.mobaDesc: Attacks deal bonus damage and apply a stack of his Passive. At 3 stacks, using your Q or R on an enemy champion will empower the ability.

abilities.name: Tongue Lash
abilities.riotDesc:
Tahm Kench lashes out with his tongue, damaging and slowing the first unit hit and healing himself if he strikes an enemy champion.

Applies a stack of An Acquired Taste to enemy champions. If the champion already has 3 stacks of An Acquired Taste, they are stunned and the stacks are consumed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Deal damage and slows the first target hit. If it hits a champion, it heals him for some health and applies a stack. If he has 3 stacks on the target, he will stun them briefly.

abilities.name: Abyssal Dive
abilities.riotDesc: Dive down and then re-appear at target location, damaging and knocking up all enemies in an area.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dive into the deep and re-appear at a target location, dealing damage and knocking enemies in that area up briefly.

abilities.name: Thick Skin
abilities.riotDesc:
Passive: Tahm Kench stores a percent of the damage he takes and heals based on it while out of combat.

Active: Convert all stored damage into a temporary shield.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tahm Kench stores incoming damage and restores some missing health after some time. If Tahm activates his E mid-fight, or while he has grey health, he will convert the grey health into a shield.

abilities.name: Devour
abilities.riotDesc: Tahm Kench devours a champion for a few seconds, dealing magic damage if they are an enemy, or shielding them if they are an ally.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tahm Kench devours a champion for a few seconds. If he recasts this ability, he can spit them out. For an enemy champion to be devoured, he needs to apply 3 stacks of his Passive on them. If he Devours an ally, he grants them a shield.

balance.otherEffects: No special effects for Tahm Kench.

combos.description: Start with Three AAs, then Q then finish up with W
Start with Q, then W, three AAs, then R, then three more AAs, then finish with Q
Start with W, then three AAs, then Q, then AA

Taliyah.name: Taliyah
Taliyah.title: the Stoneweaver
Taliyah.blurb: Taliyah is a nomadic mage from Shurima, torn between teenage wonder and adult responsibility. She has crossed nearly all of Valoran on a journey to learn the true nature of her growing powers, though more recently she has returned to protect her tribe...

abilities.name: Rock Surfing
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus movement speed near terrain or structures. entering combat or casting an ability puts this Passive on a 2-second cooldown which refreshes continuously while remaining in combat or casting abilities.

abilities.name: Threaded Volley
abilities.riotDesc: Taliyah throws a volley of rocks in a target direction, moving freely as she casts. This creates Worked Ground below her. If Taliyah casts Threaded Volley on Worked Ground, she consumes the ground to throw a stronger boulder that slows enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hurls 5 stone shards in quick succession in the direction of her choice. Each shard deals magic damage but deals reduced damage to the same target after the initial hit. Taliyah can freely move or cast other abilities while using this ability. Using this will create an area of Worked Ground around Taliyah that lasts for 45 seconds. Using this ability on the worked ground will hurl only one stone shard.

abilities.name: Seismic Shove
abilities.riotDesc: Taliyah causes an area of ground to erupt and throws enemies within it in a direction of her choosing.
abilities.mobaDesc: Marks the target location and selects a direction. After 1 second, the ground erupts, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit and knocking them in the chosen direction for 1 second.

abilities.name: Unraveled Earth
abilities.riotDesc: Taliyah creates a slowing minefield. If enemies dash through it or are knocked through it, the mines explode and stun them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Scatters boulders over the ground in front of her, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit. The boulders remain for 4 seconds, slowing all enemies within the area. At the end of their duration, all remaining boulders explode and deals the same damage as the initial cast. Enemies who dash over these boulders take magic damage immediately.

abilities.name: Weaver's Wall
abilities.riotDesc: Taliyah creates a very long wall and then surfs it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons a massive wall of rocks and creates impassable terrain for 5 seconds and knocking aside allied and enemy units it passes through. If Taliyah recasts this ability, she surfs the wall. Taking damage during or after the cast time will force her off the wall. She can voluntarily get off the wall as well by issuing a movement command. If recast after the wall has reached its maximum range, Taliyah manually destroys it.

Talon.name: Talon
Talon.title: the Blade's Shadow
Talon.blurb: Talon is the knife in the darkness, a merciless killer able to strike without warning and escape before any alarm is raised. He carved out a dangerous reputation on the brutal streets of Noxus, where he was forced to fight, kill, and steal to survive...

abilities.name: Blade's End
abilities.mobaDesc: Damaging abilities wound enemy champions and monsters, lasting 6 seconds and stacking up to 3 times. Talon's next auto-attack against a target with 3 wound stacks will cause the target to bleed for physical damage over 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Noxian Diplomacy
abilities.riotDesc: Talon stabs the target unit. If they are within melee range, this attack deals critical damage. If they are outside melee range, Talon will leap at his target before stabbing them. Talon refunds some health and cooldown if this ability kills the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes towards the target enemy, dealing physical damage on arrival. If cast near the target, Talon will instead stab the target and critically strike for bonus physical damage. Talon heals if this ability kills the target, and 50% of the cooldown is refunded.

abilities.name: Rake
abilities.riotDesc: Talon sends out a volley of daggers that then return back to him, dealing physical damage every time it passes through an enemy. The returning blades deal bonus damage and slow units hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sends a volley of daggers, dealing physical damage to all enemies they pass through. These daggers fly back to Talon and deal physical damage to all enemies they pass through and slows them for a second.

abilities.name: Assassin's Path
abilities.riotDesc: Talon vaults over any terrain or structure, up to a max distance. This ability has a low cooldown, but puts the used terrain on a long cooldown.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes over a target structure or piece of terrain. Talon can't cast this ability on the same area of terrain for a set duration.

abilities.name: Shadow Assault
abilities.riotDesc: Talon disperses a ring of blades and becomes Invisible while gaining additional Move Speed. When Talon emerges from Invisibility, the blades converge on his location. Each time the blades move, Shadow Assault deals physical damage to enemies hit by at least one blade.
abilities.mobaDesc: Disperses a ring of blades, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit while becoming invisible and gaining bonus movement speed for up to 2.5 seconds. When Talon emerges, the blades converge to his location, dealing the same physical damage to all enemies they pass through. On auto-attacking an enemy, or Q'ing to one of them, the blades converge to his target instead.

balance.otherEffects: Tenacity increased by 20%. Q: Bonus AD ratio changed to 115% bonus AD. W: Outgoing bonus AD ratio changed to 50% bonus AD. Incoming bonus AD ratio changed to 100% bonus AD. E: Per-wall cooldown changed to 10 / 9 / 8 / 7 / 6 seconds. R: Cooldown changed to 80 / 70 / 60 seconds.

combos.description: Use your W, then Q to your target, R and finish with an AA.
Use your W, then R, then Q and AA to finish.
Use your W, then AA, Q and AA to finish.

Taric.name: Taric
Taric.title: the Shield of Valoran
Taric.blurb: Taric is the Aspect of the Protector, wielding incredible power as Runeterra's guardian of life, love, and beauty. Shamed by a dereliction of duty and exiled from his homeland Demacia, Taric ascended Mount Targon to find redemption, only to discover a...

abilities.name: Bravado
abilities.mobaDesc: On casting an ability, his next two auto-attacks within 4 seconds gain attack speed, each dealing bonus magic damage and reducing the cooldowns of his basic abilities by 1 second, as well as refreshing the Passive duration on the first attack.

abilities.name: Starlight's Touch
abilities.riotDesc: Heals nearby allied champions based on charges stored. Bravado-empowered attacks grant a charge of Starlight's Touch.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Stores a charge of Starlight's Touch periodically, up to a maximum at once. Bravado empowered auto-attacks grant one charge. Active: Taric heals himself and all nearby allied champions for each stored charge at the time of cast.

abilities.name: Bastion
abilities.riotDesc:
Passively increase the Armor of Taric and any allied champion with Bastion.

Actively shields an ally and grants them Bastion for as long as they remain near Taric. Taric's spells also cast off the ally with Bastion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Taric gains bonus armor and links to his ally. When linked, the bonus armor and Taric's abilities are replicated on the ally, though the effects do not stack. Active: Shields himself and the target allied champion for 2.5 seconds, and links them with Bastion.

abilities.name: Dazzle
abilities.riotDesc: Taric readies a beam of starlight that, after a brief delay, deals magic damage and stuns enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Projects a beam of starlight towards the target location which detonates after a second. The detonation deals magic damage and stuns the targets for 1.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Cosmic Radiance
abilities.riotDesc: Pulses cosmic energy onto nearby allied champions after a delay, making them invulnerable for a short duration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons a start above him and his linked ally. This descends down over 2.5 seconds after which both the targets become invulnerable for 2.5 seconds.

combos.description: To infinitely club your opponent E AA AA, Q AA AA, then W AA AA Q and repeat.
For a defensive escape, use W then E R.
Make use of your passive by using W AA AA, Q AA AA and then Q AA AA.

Teemo.name: Teemo
Teemo.title: the Swift Scout
Teemo.blurb: Undeterred by even the most dangerous and threatening of obstacles, Teemo scouts the world with boundless enthusiasm and a cheerful spirit. A yordle with an unwavering sense of morality, he takes pride in following the Bandle Scout's Code, sometimes...

abilities.name: Blinding Dart
abilities.riotDesc: Obscures an enemy's vision with a powerful venom, dealing damage to the target unit and blinding it for the duration.

abilities.name: Move Quick
abilities.riotDesc: Teemo scampers around, passively increasing his Move Speed until he is struck by an enemy champion or turret. Teemo can sprint to gain bonus Move Speed that isn't stopped by being struck for a short time.

abilities.name: Toxic Shot
abilities.riotDesc: Each of Teemo's attacks will poison the target %i:OnHit% <OnHit>On-Hit</OnHit>, dealing damage on impact and each second after for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Noxious Trap
abilities.riotDesc: Teemo throws an explosive poisonous trap using one of the mushrooms stored in his pack. If an enemy steps on the trap, it will release a poisonous cloud, slowing enemies and damaging them over time. If Teemo throws a mushroom onto another mushroom it will bounce, gaining additional range.

balance.otherEffects: Ability haste reduced by 15. R: Trap duration changed to 180 seconds. Base damage changed to 180 / 290 / 400. Total AP ratio changed to 40% AP. Slow changed to 20% at all ranks. Deals 66% damage to minions (50% total). Maximum charges changed to 3 / 4 / 5.

combos.description: Flash in then AA and finish with Q
Start with W then R then Q and finish with AA
Start with AA then R then W then AA twice then Q followed by 2 AAs

Thresh.name: Thresh
Thresh.title: the Chain Warden
Thresh.blurb: Sadistic and cunning, Thresh is an ambitious and restless specter of the Shadow Isles. Once the custodian of countless arcane secrets, he was undone by a power greater than life or death, and now sustains himself by tormenting and breaking others with...

abilities.name: Damnation
abilities.mobaDesc: Enemy champions, large minions, and large monsters that die near Thresh drop a Soul for 8 seconds. Epic monsters drop 2 souls instead. Thresh collects these Souls which grants him ability power and bonus armor.

abilities.name: Death Sentence
abilities.riotDesc: Thresh binds an enemy in chains and pulls them toward him. Activating this ability a second time pulls Thresh to the enemy.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: Throws out his scythe in the target direction, becoming unable to move or attack while it is in flight. The scythe stops at the first enemy hit, dealing magic damage and stunning them for 1.5 seconds. He also forms a tether between himself and the target. Hitting an enemy reduces this ability's cooldown by 3 seconds. Recast: Thresh dashes to the tethered enemy, becoming able to attack again upon arrival. Thresh can cast any of his abilities while in flight, barring his Ultimate.

abilities.name: Dark Passage
abilities.riotDesc: Thresh throws out a lantern that shields nearby allied Champions from damage. Allies can click the lantern to dash to Thresh.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: Thresh throws his lantern to the target location which lands after 0.5 seconds, lasting for 6 seconds or until he moves too far away from it. Thresh and the first allied champion to come near the lantern are granted a shield for 4 seconds. An ally can select the lantern, while in the proximity of it, dashing to Thresh's current location and gaining the shield.

abilities.name: Flay
abilities.riotDesc: Thresh's attacks wind up, dealing more damage the longer he waits between attacks. When activated, Thresh sweeps his chain, knocking all enemies hit in the direction of the blow.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Basic attacks deal bonus magic damage, based on the time spent not auto-attacking enemies, up to 10 seconds. Active: Sweeps his chain in the target direction, dealing magic damage to enemies hit, knocking them in the chain's direction, and slowing them for 1 second.

abilities.name: The Box
abilities.riotDesc: A prison of walls that slow and deal damage if broken.
abilities.mobaDesc: Surrounds himself with a pentagon of spectral walls, each one lasting for 5 seconds. The walls break upon contact with an enenmy champion, dealing magic damage to the target and slowing them by 99% for 2 seconds. Enemies hitting any other wall beyond the first take no damage and are slowed for 1 second.

combos.description: The other way to all in is by using Q and waiting for your target to get closer. Then E them towards you and AA.
When possible walk up and lead with E then AA Q instantly, hit Q again to AA right after.
To trade normally AA then instantly E AA.

Tristana.name: Tristana
Tristana.title: the Yordle Gunner
Tristana.blurb: While many other yordles channel their energy into discovery, invention, or just plain mischief-making, Tristana was always inspired by the adventures of great warriors. She had heard much about Runeterra, its factions, and its wars, and believed her...

abilities.name: Draw a Bead
abilities.mobaDesc: The range of Tristana's auto-attacks, E and Ultimate increases based on level.

abilities.name: Rapid Fire
abilities.riotDesc: Tristana fires her weapon rapidly, increasing her Attack Speed for a short time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Empowers her cannon, gaining bonus attack speed for 7 seconds.

abilities.name: Rocket Jump
abilities.riotDesc: Tristana fires at the ground to propel her to a distant location, dealing damage and slowing surrounding units for a brief period where she lands.
abilities.mobaDesc: Jumps to the target location, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies on impact and slowing them by 60%. Takedowns and detonation of E at maximum stacks on an enemy champion will reset this ability's cooldown.

abilities.name: Explosive Charge
abilities.riotDesc: When Tristana kills a unit, her cannonballs burst into shrapnel, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Can be activated to place a bomb on a target enemy that explodes after a short duration dealing damage to surrounding units.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Enemies explode when killed by Tristana's basic attacks, dealing magic damage to all nearby enemies. Active: Places an explosive charge on the target enemy or enemy turret. After 4 seconds, the charge detonates, dealing physical damage to nearby enemies and turrets. This explosion radius is increased when used on a turret. Each auto-attack and ability against the target increases the Explosive charge's damage by 30%, stacking up to 4 times.

abilities.name: Buster Shot
abilities.riotDesc: Tristana loads a massive cannonball into her weapon and fires it at an enemy unit. This deals Magic Damage and knocks the target back. If the target is carrying the Explosive Charge bomb, the bomb detonation radius is doubled.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a massive cannonball at the target enemy, dealing magic damage and knocking back at the target and all enemies around them.

combos.description: W towards your target as you E and R them. Then AA your target down to take them out.
Use your E then W. Press Q then AA, AA, R and AA.
Use your E, then Q, AA, AA, AA and then R and AA to finish.

Trundle.name: Trundle
Trundle.title: the Troll King
Trundle.blurb: Trundle is a hulking and devious troll with a particularly vicious streak, and there is nothing he cannot bludgeon into submission—not even the Freljord itself. Fiercely territorial, he chases down anyone foolish enough to enter his domain. Then, his...

abilities.name: King's Tribute
abilities.mobaDesc: Whenever an enemy dies near Trundle, he heals for a percent of his maximum health.

abilities.name: Chomp
abilities.riotDesc: Trundle bites his opponent, dealing damage, briefly slowing and sapping some of their Attack Damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Trundle's next auto-attack deals bonus physical damage and slows the target by 75% for 0.1 seconds. Trundle also gains bonus attack damage for 5 seconds and reduces his target's attack damage by half that amount.

abilities.name: Frozen Domain
abilities.riotDesc: Trundle turns target location into his domain, gaining Attack Speed, Move Speed, and increased healing from all sources while on it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Produces a huge zone of ice for 8 seconds. While inside, he gains bonus attack speed, bonus movement speed, and increased healing from all sources.

abilities.name: Pillar of Ice
abilities.riotDesc: Trundle creates an ice pillar at target location, becoming impassable terrain and slowing all nearby enemy units.
abilities.mobaDesc: Projects a pillar of ice at the target location for 6 seconds, knocking back all units around it. This pillar acts as impassable terrain and slows enemies around it.

abilities.name: Subjugate
abilities.riotDesc: Trundle immediately steals a percent of his target's Health, Armor and Magic Resistance. Over the next 4 seconds the amount of Health, Armor, and Magic Resistance stolen is doubled.
abilities.mobaDesc: Starts draining the life force out of a target enemy champion, healing for a percent of their maximum health. He also deals magic damage, steals their armor and magic resistance, and increases in size while reducing the target's size. The armor and magic resistance will remain stolen for 4 seconds after the drain has ended.

combos.description: When in close range to a target W then instantly AA Q. Continue to AA then E your target back to you.
When able to easily get into melee range W and run up to AA Q then instantly E behind your target, followed by an AA.
To execute a standard gank W then E directly behind your target. Once in range AA and as soon as it connects Q.

Tryndamere.name: Tryndamere
Tryndamere.title: the Barbarian King
Tryndamere.blurb: Fueled by unbridled fury and rage, Tryndamere once carved his way through the Freljord, openly challenging the greatest warriors of the north to prepare himself for even darker days ahead. The wrathful barbarian has long sought revenge for the...

abilities.name: Battle Fury
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains 5 Fury each time he auto-attacks a target. He gains 10 Fury if he critically stikes, or when he kills an enemy. He will gain critical strike chance per point of Fury.

abilities.name: Bloodlust
abilities.riotDesc: Tryndamere thrives on the thrills of combat, increasing his Attack Damage as he is more and more wounded. He can cast Bloodlust to consume his Fury and heal himself.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Tryndamere permanently has bonus attack damage. He also gains bonus attack damage based on his missing health. Active: Consumes all his Fury to heal himself.

abilities.name: Mocking Shout
abilities.riotDesc: Tryndamere lets out an insulting cry, decreasing surrounding champions' Attack Damage. Enemies with their backs turned to Tryndamere also have their Move Speed reduced.
abilities.mobaDesc: Reduces attack damage of all nearby enemy champions for 4 seconds. Targets who have their back turned to him are slowed for the same duration.

abilities.name: Spinning Slash
abilities.riotDesc: Tryndamere slices toward a target unit, dealing damage to enemies in his path.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies in his path and gaining Fury per enemy hit.

abilities.name: Undying Rage
