abilities.riotDesc: Tryndamere's lust for battle becomes so strong that he is unable to die, no matter how wounded he becomes.
abilities.mobaDesc: Instantly gains Fury and becomes immune to death for 5 seconds.

combos.description: For a full engage W E instantly then AA once you land. Continue to AA until your next E comes up, then AA again.
Quick trade by hitting with an AA then instantly using E away.
When engaging from range E then instantly AA. Continue to AA and use W as soon as they turn away, then AA some more.

TwistedFate.name: Twisted Fate
TwistedFate.title: the Card Master
TwistedFate.blurb: Twisted Fate is an infamous cardsharp and swindler who has gambled and charmed his way across much of the known world, earning the enmity and admiration of the rich and foolish alike. He rarely takes things seriously, greeting each day with a mocking...

abilities.name: Loaded Dice
abilities.mobaDesc: Each kill grants him random amounts of gold.

abilities.name: Wild Cards
abilities.riotDesc: Twisted Fate throws three cards, dealing damage to each enemy unit they pass through.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dishes out 3 cards in a cone, dealing magic damage to all enemies they pass through.

abilities.name: Pick a Card
abilities.riotDesc: Twisted Fate chooses a magic card from his deck, and uses that for his next attack, causing bonus effects.
abilities.mobaDesc: Can cycle and pick one out of 3 cards. Once a card is chosen, his next auto-attack will have added effects. Blue Card: restores mana Red Card: deals magic damage around the target and slows all enemies hit for 2.5 seconds. Gold Card: Stuns the target.

abilities.name: Stacked Deck
abilities.riotDesc: Every 4 attacks, Twisted Fate deals bonus damage. In addition, his Attack Speed is increased.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Twisted Fate gains bonus attack speed. He gains a stack of the stacked deck on landing an auto-attack. At 3 stacks, his next auto-attack against non-structures consumes the stacks on-hit to deal bonus magic damage.

abilities.name: Destiny
abilities.riotDesc: Twisted Fate predicts the fortunes of his foes, revealing all enemy champions and enabling the use of Gate, which teleports Twisted Fate to any target location in 1.5 seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains vision of all enemies on the map. This ability can then be recast after 0.5 seconds. Recast: Channels for 1.5 seconds and blinks to the target location upon completion. This destroys all projectiles targeting him in the process.

balance.otherEffects: No special effects for Twisted Fate.

combos.description: To trade nicely with your Gold Card AA then instantly W, AA again then lock in a Gold Card. Quickly instantly AA Q followed by one more AA.
For your bread and butter combo W and lock in a Gold Card then instantly AA Q followed by one more AA.
To poke with your blue card AA then W. AA again, lock in a Blue Card and instantly AA.

Twitch.name: Twitch
Twitch.title: the Plague Rat
Twitch.blurb: A Zaunite plague rat by birth, but a connoisseur of filth by passion, Twitch is not afraid to get his paws dirty. Aiming a chem-powered crossbow at the gilded heart of Piltover, he has vowed to show those in the city above just how filthy they really...

abilities.name: Deadly Venom
abilities.mobaDesc: Auto-attacks poison his target with Deadly Venom. Each attack adds one stack. Each stack deals true damage per second over 6 seconds and it can stack up to 6 times.

abilities.name: Ambush
abilities.riotDesc:
Twitch becomes Camouflaged for a short duration and gains Move Speed. When leaving Camouflage, Twitch gains Attack Speed for a short duration.

When an enemy champion with Deadly Venom dies, Ambush's cooldown is reset.
abilities.mobaDesc: After a brief delay, Twitch becomes camouflaged for a duration. When stealthed, he gains bonus Movement Speed, which is increased when near enemy champions. On breaking stealth, Twitch gains bonus attack speed for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Venom Cask
abilities.riotDesc: Twitch hurls a cask of venom that explodes in an area, slowing targets and applying deadly venom to the target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hurls a cask of venom at the target area, infecting all enemies with a Passive stack and revealing the area. Enemies inside the area will be slowed while acquiring a Passive stack for each second they are in the area.

abilities.name: Contaminate
abilities.riotDesc: Twitch wreaks further havoc on poisoned enemies with a blast of his vile diseases.
abilities.mobaDesc: Deals physical damage to nearby enemies afflicted with his Passive. Damage is increased per stack on the target.

abilities.name: Spray and Pray
abilities.riotDesc: Twitch unleashes the full power of his crossbow, shooting bolts over a great distance that pierce all enemies caught in their path.
abilities.mobaDesc: Gets bonus attack damage and range for 5 seconds, during which his auto-attacks travel further and damages every enemy in their path.

Udyr.name: Udyr
Udyr.title: the Spirit Walker
Udyr.blurb: The most powerful spirit walker alive, Udyr communes with all the spirits of the Freljord, whether by empathically understanding their needs, or by channeling and transforming their ethereal energy into his own primal fighting style. He seeks balance...

abilities.name: Bridge Between
abilities.mobaDesc: Udyr has four basic Abilities that swap between Stances and can Recast an Ability to renew it with additional benefits. Additionally, after using an Ability, Udyr's next two Attacks gain Attack Speed.

abilities.name: Wilding Claw
abilities.riotDesc: Udyr gains attack speed and his next two attacks deal bonus physical damage. Recast: Gain even more attack speed, and the next two attacks call lightning to strike the target.

abilities.name: Iron Mantle
abilities.riotDesc: Udyr gains a shield and his next two attacks heal him. Recast: Gain an even bigger shield and heal based on max health over the next couple seconds.

abilities.name: Blazing Stampede
abilities.riotDesc: Udyr gains movement speed and his first attack against each target will Stun them. Recast: Gain even more movement speed and immunity to immobilizing effects for a couple seconds.

abilities.name: Wingborne Storm
abilities.riotDesc: Udyr surrounds himself in a glacial storm, damaging and slowing nearby enemies. Recast: Empower and unleash the storm, causing it to track enemies and deal additional damage.

Urgot.name: Urgot
Urgot.title: the Dreadnought
Urgot.blurb: Once a powerful Noxian headsman, Urgot was betrayed by the empire for which he had killed so many. Bound in iron chains, he was forced to learn the true meaning of strength in the Dredge—a prison mine deep beneath Zaun. Emerging in a disaster that...

abilities.name: Echoing Flames
abilities.mobaDesc: Each of his six legs conceal a shotgun that covers an arc. Each of them has one shell and an individual reload timer. The next auto-attack on-hit will cause that specific shotgun to fire, dealing physical damage to enemies in a cone.

abilities.name: Corrosive Charge
abilities.riotDesc: Fires an explosive charge at the target location, dealing physical damage and slowing enemies caught in the explosion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Launches a canister at the target location which explodes after it lands, dealing physical damage, and slowing all enemies hit for 1.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Purge
abilities.riotDesc: Urgot slows himself while he unloads his weapon on nearby enemies. Prioritizes enemy champions Urgot has recently struck with other abilities and triggers Echoing Flames.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Abilities apply purge to enemy champions for 5 seconds. Only one enemy can be marked at a time. Active: Gets ghosted and can autonomously attack the nearest enemy with fixed attack speed. This ability prioritizes champions marked with Purge, refreshing it with every attack. Urgot can attack while moving with reduced movement speed while gaining slow resistance. On re-casting this ability, Purge will be ended early.

abilities.name: Disdain
abilities.riotDesc: Urgot charges in a direction, shielding himself and trampling non-champion enemies. If he catches an enemy champion, he will stop and hurl them out of his way.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shield himself and dashes in the target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies in the way while knocking them aside. On coming in contact with an enemy champion, he stuns them and flings them to a location behind him.

abilities.name: Fear Beyond Death
abilities.riotDesc: Urgot fires a chem-drill that impales the first enemy champion hit. If that champion falls below a health threshold, Urgot judges them weak and can execute them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a drill in the target direction that impales the first enemy champion struck, and deals physical damage to them. Such units are revealed and slowed. If the target is below 25% of their maximum health, this ability can be cast again, doing so will result in Urgot suppressing them, revealing them, and then pulling the target toward himself, ultimately executing the target with the grinder in his stomach. Only killing Urgot can interrupt this ability, and if someone is executed, enemy units near Urgot will be feared and slowed.

Varus.name: Varus
Varus.title: the Arrow of Retribution
Varus.blurb: One of the ancient darkin, Varus was a deadly killer who loved to torment his foes, driving them almost to insanity before delivering the killing arrow. He was imprisoned at the end of the Great Darkin War, but escaped centuries later in the remade...

abilities.name: Living Vengeance
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus attack speed for 5 seconds upon taking down an enemy champion. He gets reduced attack speed on non-champion kills.

abilities.name: Piercing Arrow
abilities.riotDesc: Varus readies and then fires a powerful shot that gains extra range and damage the longer he spends preparing to fire.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges a shot for up to 4 seconds, increasing this ability's range and damage over the next 2 seconds, during which he is slowed. On recasting this ability, Varus fires a piercing arrow in the target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies struck. Detonating Blight stacks on an enemy champion reduces this ability's cooldown by 3 seconds.

abilities.name: Blighted Quiver
abilities.riotDesc: Passive: Varus' basic attacks deal bonus magic damage and apply Blight. Varus' other abilities detonate Blight, dealing magic damage based on the target's maximum Health. Active: Varus empowers his next Piercing Arrow.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Auto-attacks deal bonus magic damage and apply Blight for 6 seconds. This effect stacks up to 3 times. Varus' other abilities detonate Blight on enemies upon damaging them, dealing magic damage for each stack. Active: Varus' next Q will deal bonus magic damage.

abilities.name: Hail of Arrows
abilities.riotDesc: Varus fires a hail of arrows that deal physical damage and desecrate the ground. Desecrated ground slows enemies' Move Speed and reduces their self healing and regeneration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a hail of arrows at the target location, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit on impact. The location is corrupted for 4 seconds, slowing all enemies within and applying Grievous Wounds.

abilities.name: Chain of Corruption
abilities.riotDesc: Varus flings out a damaging tendril of corruption that immobilizes the first enemy champion hit and then spreads towards nearby uninfected champions, immobilizing them too on contact.
abilities.mobaDesc: Flings a projectile in the target direction, dealing magic damage, rooting and revealing the first enemy champion hit. This champion will also get full stacks of Blight. Any enemy champion near the initially affected champion will have 2 seconds to get away from them, else they will be rooted as well.

combos.description: Quick burst a target using R then quickly Q. AA E AA to finish.
Quickly CC & burst a target using E then R, and Q to finish.
Proc four Blight stacks with AA AA AA E, then quickly AA again.

Vayne.name: Vayne
Vayne.title: the Night Hunter
Vayne.blurb: Shauna Vayne is a deadly, remorseless Demacian monster hunter, who has dedicated her life to finding and destroying the demon that murdered her family. Armed with a wrist-mounted crossbow and a heart full of vengeance, she is only truly happy when...

abilities.name: Night Hunter
abilities.mobaDesc: Vayne ruthlessly hunts evil-doers, gaining Move Speed when moving toward nearby enemy champions.

abilities.name: Tumble
abilities.riotDesc: Vayne tumbles, maneuvering to carefully place her next shot. Her next attack deals bonus damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tumbles forward in the target direction. Her next auto-attack deals bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Silver Bolts
abilities.riotDesc: Vayne tips her bolts with a rare metal, toxic to evil things. The third consecutive attack or ability against the same target deals a percentage of the target's max health as bonus true damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Auto-attacks and E apply a stack of this ability for 3.5 seconds. This can stack up to 3 times, and attacking a new enemy removes all stacks from the previous target. The third stack consumes all of them to deal bonus true damage.

abilities.name: Condemn
abilities.riotDesc: Vayne draws a heavy crossbow from her back, and fires a huge bolt at her target, knocking them back and dealing damage. If they collide with terrain, they are impaled, dealing bonus damage and stunning them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a heavy bolt at the target enemy, which deals physical damage, and knocks them back while applying a W stack. If the target collides with terrain, they take bonus physical damage and are stunned for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Final Hour
abilities.riotDesc: Readying herself for an epic confrontation, Vayne gains increased Attack Damage, Invisibility during Tumble, reduced Tumble cooldown, and more bonus Move Speed from Night Hunter
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains bonus attack damage and Passive stats on activation. Her Q gains cooldown reduction and grants Vayne invisibility for 1 second. Attacking or casting E breaks the stealth immediately. Each enemy champion takedown will extend this ability's duration by 4 seconds.

combos.description: Stun your target by using E into a wall then AA. Q away from them and continue to AA as you retreat.
To poke trade AA then instantly Q AA and E your target away.
Trade normally with AA then quickly Q, AA and AA again.

Veigar.name: Veigar
Veigar.title: the Tiny Master of Evil
Veigar.blurb: An enthusiastic master of dark sorcery, Veigar has embraced powers that few mortals dare approach. As a free-spirited inhabitant of Bandle City, he longed to push beyond the limitations of yordle magic, and turned instead to arcane texts that had been...

abilities.name: Phenomenal Evil Power
abilities.mobaDesc: Gains a stack of Phenomenal Evil whenever he hits an enemy with an ability. He also gains 5 stacks on scoring a kill on a champion. Each stack grants him 1 ability power.

abilities.name: Baleful Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Veigar unleashes a bolt of dark energy that deals magic damage to the first two enemies hit. Units killed by this bolt grant Veigar some ability power permanently.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Killing an enemy unit with this ability will grant Veigar one stack of his Passive. He gains 2 stacks against large minions and monsters. Active: Unleashes a bolt of dark energy in the target direction, dealing magic damage to thee first 2 enemies hit.

abilities.name: Dark Matter
abilities.riotDesc: Veigar calls a great mass of dark matter to fall from the sky to the target location, dealing magic damage when it lands. Stacks of Phenomenal Evil reduce Dark Matter's cooldown.
abilities.mobaDesc: Causes a mass of dark matter to fall at a target location after a one-second delay, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit. This ability's cooldown is reduced by a percentage, which scales with his Passive.

abilities.name: Event Horizon
abilities.riotDesc: Veigar twists the edges of space, creating a cage that Stuns enemies that pass through.
abilities.mobaDesc: Forms a cage around the target location after a brief delay. This cage lasts for 3 seconds, stunning any enemy who tries to pass through its edges for the first time.

abilities.name: Primordial Burst
abilities.riotDesc: Blasts target enemy champion, dealing a large amount of magic damage, increasing based on the target's missing health.
abilities.mobaDesc: Targets an enemy champion and fires a magic blast at them. This deals magic damage which is increased based on missing health.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Stacks per champion takedown changed to 3. E: Cooldown changed to 23 / 21.5 / 20 / 18.5 / 17 seconds.

combos.description: Start with W and follow with a Q and AA
Start with E, then W followed by a Q and finish with an AA

Velkoz.name: Vel'Koz
Velkoz.title: the Eye of the Void
Velkoz.blurb: It is unclear if Vel'Koz was the first Void-spawn to emerge on Runeterra, but there has certainly never been another to match his level of cruel, calculating sentience. While his kin devour or defile everything around them, he seeks instead to...

abilities.name: Organic Deconstruction
abilities.mobaDesc: Vel'Koz's abilities apply a Deconstruction stack for 7 seconds, stacking up to 3 times. Basic attacks refresh the duration on-hit. The third stack deals bonus true damage.

abilities.name: Plasma Fission
abilities.riotDesc: Vel'Koz shoots a bolt of plasma that splits in two on reactivation or upon hitting an enemy. The bolt slows and damages on hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires a plasma bolt that collides with the first enemy hit. It deals magic damage and slows the target by 70% for a few seconds. This can be recast after 0.25 seconds. At the end of its range, or upon colliding with an enemy, the bolt splits in half and each part fires in the opposite directions perpendicular to the primary bolt's trajectory. Both of them deal the same damage and apply a slow to the first enemy who is hit by the split bolt. On recasting, Vel'Koz will split this ability early.

abilities.name: Void Rift
abilities.riotDesc: Vel'Koz opens a rift to the void that deals an initial burst of damage, then explodes for a second burst of damage after a delay.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Stores a Void Rift charge periodically. This can stack up to 2 times. Active: Opens a rift on the ground in a line in the target direction. This deals magic damage to enemies hit and leaves a trail behind. The trail detonates after 0.75 seconds, dealing magic damage to all enemies within.

abilities.name: Tectonic Disruption
abilities.riotDesc: Vel'Koz causes an area to explode, knocking up enemies, and knocking close enemies slightly away.
abilities.mobaDesc: Erupts the ground at the target location, dealing magic damage and knocking up enemies in the area for 0.75 seconds.

abilities.name: Life Form Disintegration Ray
abilities.riotDesc: Vel'Koz unleashes a channelled beam that follows the cursor for 2.5 seconds that deals magic damage. Organic Deconstruction Researches enemy champions causing them to take true damage instead.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Applying full Passive stacks on a target marks them for 7 seconds. Active: Channels for 2.6 seconds to project an energy beam in a line. The trajectory can be shifted as per Vel'Koz's will. The ray deals magic damage to enemies within the ray and slows them by 20%. Marked enemies take true damage instead.

combos.description: Execute a low health target by hitting them with Q and R.
When you hit an E pre-6, follow up with W Q, then A W AA.
Proc your passive twice by using Q W quickly, then E W.

Vex.name: Vex
Vex.title: the Gloomist
Vex.blurb: In the black heart of the Shadow Isles, a lone yordle trudges through the spectral fog, content in its murky misery. With an endless supply of teen angst and a powerful shadow in tow, Vex lives in her own self-made slice of gloom, far from the revolting...

abilities.name: Doom 'n Gloom
abilities.mobaDesc: Vex periodically becomes empowered, causing her next basic Ability to fear enemies and interrupt dashes.

abilities.name: Mistral Bolt
abilities.riotDesc: Launch a damaging missile that accelerates mid-flight.
abilities.mobaDesc: Vex launches a wave forward, dealing magic damage to enemies it passes through. After a short delay, the wave accelerates but has reduced width. Mistral Bolt detonates Gloom on any marked enemies it hits.

abilities.name: Personal Space
abilities.riotDesc: Gain a shield and damage nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Vex gains a shield and emits a shockwave, dealing magic damage to enemies around her. Personal Space detonates Gloom on any marked enemies it hits.

abilities.name: Looming Darkness
abilities.riotDesc: Summon a damaging and slowing zone that applies Gloom to enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shadow flies to a location, increasing in size as it travels. On arriving, Shadow deals magic damage, slows, and marks enemies hit with Gloom.

abilities.name: Shadow Surge
abilities.riotDesc: Fire a missile that marks an enemy champion. Recast to dash to them and deal damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shadow flies forward, marking and dealing magic damage to the first enemy champion hit. Vex can then recast this ability to have Shadow pull her to the marked target, dealing additional magic damage. If the marked target dies within a short time of taking damage from Shadow Surge, Vex can cast Shadow Surge again within a few seconds.

combos.description: Start with AA then E then AA then Q then AA
Start with AA then W then Q then E then finish with AA

Vi.name: Vi
Vi.title: the Piltover Enforcer
Vi.blurb: Raised on the mean streets of Zaun, Vi is a hotheaded, impulsive, and fearsome woman with very little respect for authority. She has always been a shrewd survivor, both from her youthful troublemaking topside and an unfairly long stint in Stillwater...

abilities.name: Blast Shield
abilities.mobaDesc: Hitting an enemy with an ability grants Vi a max health shield for up to 3 seconds. This ability has its cooldown reduced by 3 seconds for every trigger of her W.

abilities.name: Vault Breaker
abilities.riotDesc: Vi charges her gauntlets and unleashes a vault shattering punch, carrying her forward. Enemies she hits are knocked back and receive a stack of Denting Blows.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges up to 4 seconds to increase this ability's range, speed, and damage over 1.25 seconds. Vi is slowed while charging and can recast this ability at any time within its duration. Recast Vi dashes in the target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies she passes through. On colliding with an enemy, Vi will stop, and knock the said enemy champion backward.

abilities.name: Denting Blows
abilities.riotDesc: Vi's punches break her opponent's Armor, dealing bonus damage and granting her Attack Speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Auto-attacks and Q apply Denting Blow stacks on the enemy. This can stack up to 3 times, and at 3 stacks, Vi consumes them to deal bonus physical damage. She also reduces the target's armor by 20%. After triggering Denting Blows, Vi gains bonus attack speed for 4 seconds.

abilities.name: Relentless Force
abilities.riotDesc: Vi's next attack blasts through her target, dealing damage to enemies behind it.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Periodically stores up to 2 Excessive Force charges. Active: Vi's next auto-attack gains bonus range and deals physical damage to all enemies in a cone in front of her. This can critically strike for bonus physical damage.

abilities.name: Cease and Desist
abilities.riotDesc: Vi runs down an enemy, knocking aside anyone in the way. When she reaches her target she knocks it into the air, jumps after it, and slams it back into the ground.
abilities.mobaDesc: Locks onto a target and rushes unstoppably towards them, dealing physical damage and knocking them up for 1.25 seconds upon arrival. Enemies in her path aree dealt the same damage, knocked aside and stunned for a brief duration.

combos.description: R your target then AA, E, AA. Use your Q then AA, E and AA to finish.
Use your Q then AA, E, AA. Use your R then AA, E and AA to finish.
AA your target then E and AA. R, then AA, E, Q, AA and AA to finish.

Viego.name: Viego
Viego.title: The Ruined King
Viego.blurb: Once ruler of a long-lost kingdom, Viego perished over a thousand years ago when his attempt to bring his wife back from the dead triggered the magical catastrophe known as the Ruination. Transformed into a powerful, unliving specter tortured by an...

abilities.name: Sovereign's Domination
abilities.mobaDesc: Enemies who fall before Viego become wraiths. By attacking a wraith, Viego temporarily seizes control of the dead enemy's body, healing for a percentage of his target's max health and gaining access to their basic abilities and items. He replaces their Ultimate with a free cast of his own.

abilities.name: Blade of the Ruined King
abilities.riotDesc:
Viego's spectral blade passively deals bonus percent current Health damage On-Hit and strikes twice vs. enemies he recently hit with an Ability, stealing Health.

Viego can activate this Ability to thrust his zweihander forward, impaling enemies in front of him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Attacks deal bonus damage based on current percent health as well as strike twice versus enemies that have been targeted by abilities. It can be activated causing Viego to impale anything in front of him with his sword.

abilities.name: Spectral Maw
abilities.riotDesc: Viego charges up before dashing forward, releasing a ball of concentrated Black Mist that stuns the first enemy hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Viego dashes forward after charging up and stuns the first enemy struck by his black mist

abilities.name: Harrowed Path
abilities.riotDesc: Viego commands the Black Mist to haunt and surround a piece of terrain. Viego can hide in the Mist as a wraith, gaining camouflage, Move Speed, and Attack Speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Viego sends forth his mist to envelope around the terrain allowing him to gain camouflage, attack speed and movement speed while he is in it.

abilities.name: Heartbreaker
abilities.riotDesc: Viego teleports to a nearby location and executes an enemy champion on arrival, piercing their heart and causing a destructive shockwave around them that knocks away their allies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Viego discards the soul he is currently possessing and teleports to an area dealing damage and massive slow to the lowest health champion in the area. Other nearby enemies are knocked back and take less damage.

combos.description: F
F
F

Viktor.name: Viktor
Viktor.title: the Herald of the Arcane
Viktor.blurb: The fully biomechanical evolution of his former self, Viktor has embraced his Glorious Evolution and become something of a messiah to his followers. He sacrificed his own humanity under the logic that eliminating emotion would thereby eliminate...

abilities.name: Glorious Evolution
abilities.mobaDesc: Viktor can augment his basic abilities after gaining 100 Fragments. He obtains fragments by killing minions, monsters and champions. Chaos Storm (his Ultimate) gets augmented once all of his abilities have been upgraded.

abilities.name: Siphon Power
abilities.riotDesc:
Viktor blasts an enemy unit with magic damage, which grants him a shield and empowers his next basic attack.

Augment: Siphon Power's shield is increased by 60% and Viktor gains bonus move speed after casting the Ability.

abilities.name: Gravity Field
abilities.riotDesc:
Viktor conjures a heavy gravitational field that slows enemies caught within its radius. Enemies who stay in the field for too long become stunned.

Augment: Viktor's spells apply a slow to enemies.

abilities.name: Hextech Ray
abilities.riotDesc:
Viktor uses his biomechanical arm to fire a Hextech Ray that cuts across the field in a line, dealing damage to all enemies in its path.

Augment: An explosion follows in the Hextech Ray's wake, dealing magic damage.

abilities.name: Arcane Storm
abilities.riotDesc:
Viktor conjures an Arcane Storm on the field, dealing magic damage and interrupting enemy channels. The storm periodically does magic damage to all nearby enemies and can be redirected by Viktor.

Augment: The Arcane Storm moves 25% faster, and whenever champions die after taking damage from it, the storm grows and increases in its duration.

combos.description: AA then Q then AA then E, R then finish off with three AAs
Start with Q then AA then finish with E

Vladimir.name: Vladimir
Vladimir.title: the Crimson Reaper
Vladimir.blurb: A fiend with a thirst for mortal blood, Vladimir has influenced the affairs of Noxus since the empire's earliest days. In addition to unnaturally extending his life, his mastery of hemomancy allows him to control the minds and bodies of others as easily...

abilities.name: Crimson Pact
abilities.mobaDesc: Every 30 points of bonus Health gives Vladimir 1 Ability Power and every 1 point of Ability Power gives Vladimir 1.6 bonus Health (does not stack with itself).

abilities.name: Transfusion
abilities.riotDesc: Vladimir steals life from the target enemy. When Vladimir's resource is full, Transfusion will benefit from massively increased damage and healing for a brief time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Drains blood from the target enemy, dealing magic damage and healing himself. Each cast of this ability generates a stack of Bloodthirst over the ability's cooldown. When the Bloodthirst depletes, Vladimir gains bonus movement speed, and Crimson Rush, which makes his next Q deal increases damage while granting him increased healing.

abilities.name: Sanguine Pool
abilities.riotDesc: Vladimir sinks into a pool of blood, becoming untargetable for 2 seconds. Additionally, enemies on the pool are slowed and Vladimir siphons life from them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sinks into a pool of blood, gaining movement speed, and becoming untargetable and ghosted for the duration. Enemies standing on the pool are slowed by 40% and take magic damage. Vladimir will heal himself for a percentage of the damage dealt by this ability.

abilities.name: Tides of Blood
abilities.riotDesc: Vladimir pays his own health to charge up a reservoir of blood which, when released, deals damage in the area around him but can be blocked by enemy units.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges up to 1.5 seconds, which slows him if he charges for more than 1 second. He can recast this ability to unleash a nova of blood bolts. These bolts collide with the first enemy hit and deals magic damage to them. Enemies hit are also slowed if this ability was charged for at least 1 second.

abilities.name: Hemoplague
abilities.riotDesc: Vladimir infects an area with a virulent plague. Affected enemies take increased damage for the duration. After a few seconds, Hemoplague deals magic damage to infected enemies and heals Vladimir for each enemy Champion hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Infects all enemies in the target area with a plague, increasing the damage they take from all sources by 10% for 4 seconds. After 4 seconds, the infected enemies take magic damage while Vladimir is healed up.

combos.description: You can pre-6 trade by using E then W. Follow up with a Q.
Trade while dodging damage by using E then Q, followed by W.
For your standard trade, E then Q.

Volibear.name: Volibear
Volibear.title: the Relentless Storm
Volibear.blurb: To those who still revere him, the Volibear is the storm made manifest. Destructive, wild, and stubbornly resolute, he existed before mortals walked the Freljord's tundra, and is fiercely protective of the lands that he and his demi-god kin created...

abilities.name: The Relentless Storm
abilities.mobaDesc: Volibear gains 1 stack of The Relentless Storm whenever he damages an enemy with basic attacks or abilities. This can stack up to 5 times. Each stack gives Volibear 5% bonus attack speed. At 5 stacks, he gains lightning claws which buffs his basic attacks to deal bonus damage.

abilities.name: Thundering Smash
abilities.riotDesc: Volibear gains speed towards enemies, <status>Stunning</status> and damaging the first one he Attacks.
abilities.mobaDesc: Volibear ghosts and gains bonus movement speed which is doubled against enemy champions. While active, Voli’s next basic attacks pounces to the target and stuns them. If Volibear becomes immobilized while his Q is active, the effect ends and the cooldown is reset. His Q is also a auto attack reset.

abilities.name: Frenzied Maul
abilities.riotDesc: Volibear damages an enemy, applying on-hit effects and marking them. Casting this ability again on the same target deals bonus damage and Heals Volibear.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Volibear sticks the target enemy, dealing damage and wounding them for 8 seconds. Active: If your W targets a wounded enemy, Volibear bites the target and heals himself.

abilities.name: Sky Splitter
abilities.riotDesc: Volibear summons a lightning bolt at a location, dealing damage and Slowing enemies while granting Volibear a Shield if he's inside the blast radius.
abilities.mobaDesc: Volibear summons a lightning bolt to strike at the target location. If Volibear is within the lightning strike, he gains a shield. The lightning bolt deals magic damage and slows all enemies struck.

abilities.name: Stormbringer
abilities.riotDesc: Volibear leaps to a target location, Slowing and damaging enemies beneath him while gaining bonus Health. Enemy towers near his landing location become temporarily disabled.
abilities.mobaDesc: Volibear leaps to a target location. Volibear becomes ghosted, gains health and range and increases in size. Volibear impacts after a 1-second delay and slows all enemies. Volibear also disables enemy turrets in an area for a few seconds, dealing some damage to them too.

balance.otherEffects: E: Shield health ratio changed to 11% of his maximum health.

combos.description: Gank before level 6 using E on your target, then instantly Q. Run into melee range AA then AA W.
For more damage use Q then E your target once in range. AA once you are in melee range then quickly W followed by AA R.
After level 6 use your ultimate to engage. Q and E instantly then R to get into range and quickly AA W.

Warwick.name: Warwick
Warwick.title: the Uncaged Wrath of Zaun
Warwick.blurb: Warwick is a monster who hunts the gray alleys of Zaun. Transformed by agonizing experiments, his body is fused with an intricate system of chambers and pumps, machinery filling his veins with alchemical rage. He bursts from the shadows to prey upon...

abilities.name: Eternal Hunger
abilities.mobaDesc: Warwick deals bonus magic damage on-hit. While below 50% maximum health he also heals for the amount of post-mitigation damage dealt by this Passive, increased to 250% when below 25% maximum health.

abilities.name: Jaws of the Beast
abilities.riotDesc: Warwick lunges forward and bites his target, dealing damage based on their maximum health and healing for damage dealt.
abilities.mobaDesc: Lunges towards the target enemy, biting them and dealing magic damage to them while healing himself for a portion of the post-mitigation damage dealt by the ability. This ability can be held down to channel for up to 0.75 seconds. Doing so will make Warwick dash to the opposite side of the target and follow its position.

abilities.name: Blood Hunt
abilities.riotDesc: Warwick senses enemies below 50% health, gaining Move Speed toward and attack speed against them. When they fall below 25% health, he frenzies and these bonuses triple.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: When alive, Warwick senses all low health enemies and marks them as blood hunted. Warwick can see a blood trail that gives away the position of such targets and Warwick gains bonus movement speed while following it. Warwick also gains bonus attack speed on auto-attacking a blood hunted target or an enemy unit that is below 50% of their maximum health. These bonuses are enhanced against targets below 20% of their maximum health. Active: Briefly senses all nearby enemies within a large radius and marks the nearest enemy champion as Blood Hunted for 8 seconds, regardless of their current health. When no enemy is being Blood Hunted, the cooldown of this ability reduces twice as fast.

abilities.name: Primal Howl
abilities.riotDesc: Warwick gains damage reduction for 2.5 seconds. At the end, or if re-activated, he howls, causing nearby enemies to flee for 1 second.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: Reduces all incoming damage received for 2.5 seconds. This ability can be recast after 1 second. At the end of the duration, Warwick howls, causing all nearby enemies to flee for a second and slowing them by 90%.

abilities.name: Infinite Duress
abilities.riotDesc: Warwick leaps in a direction (scaling with his bonus Move Speed), suppressing the first champion he collides with for 1.5 seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Leaps in the target direction during which he is immune to crowd control. On colliding with an enemy champion, he suppresses and reveals them and deals magic damage to them for 1.5 seconds. Warwick is healed for all post-mitigation damage he deals to his target during this ability.

balance.otherEffects: Q: Cooldown changed to 6 seconds at all ranks.

combos.description: Use your W, then E and R.
Press your E, then your R, AA, Q and another AA to finish.
Use your E then AA, Q, AA, E, AA and finish with another AA.

Xayah.name: Xayah
Xayah.title: the Rebel
Xayah.blurb: Deadly and precise, Xayah is a vastayan revolutionary waging a personal war to save her people. She uses her speed, guile, and razor-sharp feather blades to cut down anyone who stands in her way. Xayah fights alongside her partner and lover, Rakan, to...

abilities.name: Clean Cuts
abilities.mobaDesc: After casting any ability, Xayah's next 3 auto-attack penetrate through all enemies in a line, dealing full damage to her main target and pass-through damage to other enemies. A feather will be left in the ground for 6 seconds after the feather travels its path. Lover's Leap: If either Xayah or Rakan is channeling Recall, the other may move nearby and channel their own to join them. Both reach base at the time of which the initiator's recall ends.

abilities.name: Double Daggers
abilities.riotDesc: Xayah throws two damaging daggers that also drop Feathers she can recall.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws two feathers in the target direction, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit and leaving two feathers on the ground.

abilities.name: Deadly Plumage
abilities.riotDesc: Xayah creates a storm of blades that increase her Attack Speed and damage while also granting her Move Speed if she attacks a champion.
abilities.mobaDesc: Creates a storm of blades for four seconds that give her bonus attack speed and cuases her auto-attacks to strike the target an additional time for 20% damage. On hitting a target, Xayah will gain bonus movement speed. If Rakan is nearby, he too will get the effects of Deadly Plumage.

abilities.name: Bladecaller
abilities.riotDesc: Xayah calls back all her dropped Feathers dealing damage and rooting enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Calls all the feathers back to her, dealing physical damage to enemies they pass through. The damage is based on the amount of critical strike chance she has. Enemies hit by at least 3 feathers will be rooted for 1.25 seconds.

abilities.name: Featherstorm
abilities.riotDesc: Xayah leaps into the air becoming untargetable and throwing out a fan of daggers, dropping Feathers she can recall.
abilities.mobaDesc: Leaps, and becomes untargetable and ghosted for 1.5 seconds, then rains down daggers in a cone which deals physical damage to enemies hit while leaving behind a line of 5 feathers. Xayah can't attack or cast abilities while she is airborne.

combos.description: For a fast root quickly Q AA and E.
Your standard trade is to W then AA Q AA, followed by E to root.
F

Xerath.name: Xerath
Xerath.title: the Magus Ascendant
Xerath.blurb: Xerath is an Ascended Magus of ancient Shurima, a being of arcane energy writhing in the broken shards of a magical sarcophagus. For millennia, he was trapped beneath the desert sands, but the rise of Shurima freed him from his ancient prison. Driven...

abilities.name: Mana Surge
abilities.mobaDesc: Xerath periodically empowers his next auto-attack to restore mana, which is doubled against enemy champions.

abilities.name: Arcanopulse
abilities.riotDesc: Fires a long-range beam of energy, dealing magic damage to all targets hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Charges for 3 seconds during which he increases this ability's range. He gradually slows himself and can recast the ability at any given time to fire a beam of energy in the target direction, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit.

abilities.name: Eye of Destruction
abilities.riotDesc: Calls down a barrage of arcane energy, slowing and dealing magic damage to all enemies in an area. Targets in the middle receive additional damage and a stronger slow.
abilities.mobaDesc: Calls down a blast of energy on the target location after a brief delay. It deals magic damage to all enemies within the impact area while slowing them by 25% for 2.5 seconds. Enemies in the center of the blast take increased damage and are slowed by a greater amount.

abilities.name: Shocking Orb
abilities.riotDesc: Deals magic damage to an enemy and stuns them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Fires an orb of energy in the target direction, dealing magic damage and stunning the first target he hits.

abilities.name: Rite of the Arcane
abilities.riotDesc: Xerath immobilizes himself and gains numerous long-range barrages.
abilities.mobaDesc: Channels and reveals himself for up to 10 seconds, during which he gains a wider field of view. He can now recast his Ultimate to send a ball of energy to a location of his choice. The ball deals magic damage and grants sight of that area for a short while. Each cast has a static cooldown of 0.8 seconds.

combos.description: Your standard stun combo is E then W Q as soon as you confirm the stun will land.
When looking to poke W then instantly Q, but release it after the slow has landed.
For perfect burst timing W E Q as quickly as you can.

XinZhao.name: Xin Zhao
XinZhao.title: the Seneschal of Demacia
XinZhao.blurb: Xin Zhao is a resolute warrior loyal to the ruling Lightshield dynasty. Once condemned to the fighting pits of Noxus, he survived countless gladiatorial bouts, but after being freed by Demacian forces, he swore his life and allegiance to these brave...

abilities.name: Three Talon Strike
abilities.riotDesc: Xin Zhao's next 3 standard attacks deal increased damage with the third attack knocking an opponent into the air.
abilities.mobaDesc: Empowers his spear for 5 seconds, causing his next three auto-attacks to deal bonus physical damage, become unstoppable, and reduce Xin Zhao's other abilities' cooldowns by 1 second each. It also refreshes this ability's duration. The third auto-attack will knock up the target.

abilities.name: Wind Becomes Lightning
abilities.riotDesc: Xin Zhao slashes in front of himself with his spear, then thrusts it forward, slowing affected enemies and marking them as Challenged.
abilities.mobaDesc: Performs 2 strikes in the target direction. The first deals physical damage to all enemies in an arc, and the second deals physical damage in a line, slowing all enemies hit by 50% for 1.5 seconds.

abilities.name: Audacious Charge
abilities.riotDesc: Xin Zhao charges to an enemy, gaining increased Attack Speed and dealing damage to all enemies in the area, slowing them briefly. This Ability gains increased range against Challenged targets.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes to the target enemy's location, dealing magic damage to all enemies surrounding the primary target and slowing them. He gains bonus attack speed for 5 seconds.

abilities.name: Crescent Guard
abilities.riotDesc: Xin Zhao passively challenges an enemy he damaged recently. When activated, Xin Zhao deals damage to nearby enemies based on their current Health and knocks non-challenged targets back, becoming impervious to damage dealt by champions outside of the circle created.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: The last enemy champion hit by Xin Zhao's auto-attacks or E is challenged for 3 seconds. Active: Sweeps his spear around him, dealing physical damage to all enemies hit. He will knockback all non-challenged units and create a zone around him. For the next 3 seconds, Xin Zhao will be invulnerable to any attack from outside that zone.

balance.otherEffects: No special effects for Xin Zhao.

combos.description: For max damage on objectives use E followed by AA W AA. Q and then AA some more.
To trade pre-6 E onto your target, then Q. AA three times, then W and AA again.

Yasuo.name: Yasuo
Yasuo.title: the Unforgiven
Yasuo.blurb: An Ionian of deep resolve, Yasuo is an agile swordsman who wields the air itself against his enemies. As a proud young man, he was falsely accused of murdering his master—unable to prove his innocence, he was forced to slay his own brother in self...

abilities.name: Way of the Wanderer
abilities.mobaDesc: Yasuo doubles his total critical strike chance from all other sources, but his critical strikes deal reduced damage. Yasuo also gains flow for moving around on the map. At 100 stacks of flow, and upon taking damage from enemy units, Yasuo consumes all the flow stacks to shield himself.

abilities.name: Steel Tempest
abilities.riotDesc:
Thrusts forward, damaging all enemies in a line.

On hit, grants a stack of Gathering Storm for a few seconds. At 2 stacks, Steel Tempest fires a whirlwind that knocks Airborne.

Steel Tempest is treated as a basic attack and scales with all the same things.
abilities.mobaDesc: Thrusts his sword in the target direction, dealing physical damage to enemies hit. This ability can critically strike. If this ability hits an enemy, Yasuo gains a Gathering Storm stack for 6 seconds. On gaining two stacks of Gathering Storm, this ability consumes all the stack to unleash a whirlwind that travels in the target direction, which deals the same damage and knocks up all enemies hit for a second.

abilities.name: Wind Wall
abilities.riotDesc: Creates a moving wall that blocks all enemy projectiles for 4 seconds.
abilities.mobaDesc: Creates a wall of wind in the target direction which slowly drifts forward and blocks all hostile non-turret projectiles that attempt to pass through it.

abilities.name: Sweeping Blade
abilities.riotDesc:
Dashes through target enemy, dealing magic damage. Each cast increases subsequent dash's damage, up to a max amount.

Cannot be re-cast on the same enemy for a few seconds.

If Steel Tempest is cast while dashing, it will strike as a circle.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes a fixed distance toward the target enemy unit, dealing magic damage to them. Yasuo cannot dash to the same target more than once every few seconds.

abilities.name: Last Breath
abilities.riotDesc:
Blinks to an Airborne enemy champion, dealing physical damage and holding all Airborne enemies in the area in the air. Grants maximum Flow but resets all stacks of Gathering Storm.

For a moderate time afterwards, Yasuo's critical strikes gain significant Bonus Armor Penetration.
abilities.mobaDesc: Blinks to a knocked up enemy and holds them airborne while generating maximum flow and dealing physical damage. For the next 15 seconds, Yasuo's critical strikes gain 50% bonus armor penetration.

balance.otherEffects: Total attack speed increased by 2.5%. W: Cooldown changed to 27 / 25 / 23 / 21 / 19 seconds.

combos.description: F
E, then AA, Q and E back out again.

Yone.name: Yone
Yone.title: the Unforgotten
Yone.blurb: In life, he was Yone—half-brother of Yasuo, and renowned student of his village's sword school. But upon his death at the hands of his brother, he found himself hunted by a malevolent entity of the spirit realm, and was forced to slay it with its own...

abilities.name: Way of the Hunter
abilities.mobaDesc: Yone doubles his total critical strike chance from all sources. Yone begins attacking with his Steel Sword, and basic attacks with the Azakana Sword deal 50% AD physical damage and 50% AD magic damage.

abilities.name: Mortal Steel
abilities.riotDesc:
Thrusts forward, damaging all enemies in a line.

On hit, grants a stack of Gathering Storm for a few seconds. At 2 stacks, Mortal Steel dashes Yone forward with a gust of wind knocking enemies Airborne.
abilities.mobaDesc: Yone thrusts his sword in a target direction. If Mortal Steel hits an enemy, Yone gains a stack for 6 seconds. Once he has 2 stacks, activating his Q will consume the stacks and cause him to dash and unleash a whirlwind that deals damage and knocks up enemies. The thrust is interrupted if Yone is hit by hard CC.

abilities.name: Spirit Cleave
abilities.riotDesc:
Cleaves forward, damaging all enemies in a cone. Grants a shield to Yone, the value is increased by the number of champions hit by the swipe.

Spirit Cleave's cooldown and cast time scale with attack speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Yone cleaves with his Azakana Sword in the target direction, dealing physical and magic damage to enemies hit in a cone. He gains a shield when he uses this ability, which is increased if he hits an enemy champion

abilities.name: Soul Unbound
abilities.riotDesc: Yone's spirit leaves his body behind, gaining Move Speed. When this ability ends, Yone's spirit is forced back to his body and he repeats a portion of the damage he dealt as a spirit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Active: Yone dashes in a target direction and creates an untargetable clone that is sent behind the original cast location. While in Spirit Form, he gains movement speed and marks champions he damages. Recast: Yone cleanses himself of all CC (apart from disarm, nearsight, silence and slow), detonates the marks and dashes back to his body.

abilities.name: Fate Sealed
abilities.riotDesc: Yone blinks behind the last champion in a line with a slash so powerful it pulls all enemies hit towards him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Yone winds up and blinks forward. All enemies who are in line with him will get stunned briefly, dealt damage and pulled towards Yone’s blinking position. They’re then knocked up. Yone will then attempt to blink beyond the last enemy hit. If he didn’t hit an enemy, he will blink to his Ultimates maximum range.

Yorick.name: Yorick
Yorick.title: Shepherd of Souls
Yorick.blurb: The last survivor of a long-forgotten religious order, Yorick is both blessed and cursed with power over the dead. Trapped on the Shadow Isles, his only companions are the rotting corpses and shrieking wraiths that he gathers to him. Yorick's monstrous...

abilities.name: Shepherd of Souls
abilities.mobaDesc: Raises a grave for every enemy unit that dies near him (with a periodic exception to minions), as well as for every enemy he kills with his Q. Only 4 graves can exist at the same time. Yorick can use Awakening to raise a Mist Walker from a grave.

abilities.name: Last Rites
abilities.riotDesc: Yorick deals bonus damage on his next attack and heals himself. If the target is a champion or large monster or if the target dies, a grave will be dug.
abilities.mobaDesc: Empowers his next auto-attack to become unstoppable, deal bonus physical damage, gain bonus range, and heal Yorick. Yorick can cast Awakening if he has 3 graves nearby, along with Last Rites being active or on cooldown. Awakening: exhumes a Mist Walker under his command from each nearby grave.

abilities.name: Dark Procession
abilities.riotDesc: Yorick summons a destructible wall at target location that will block enemy movement.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons a circular spirit wall, after a brief delay, around the target area that lasts up to 4 seconds. This wall can be targeted by enemy champions' auto-attacks and turrets.

abilities.name: Mourning Mist
abilities.riotDesc: Yorick throws a globule of Black Mist that reduces armor, damages, slows and marks enemies. Summoned units gain move speed when moving towards marked targets.
abilities.mobaDesc: Hurls black mist in the direction of his choice, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit. Enemy champions hit by this mist are slowed and are marked for 4 seconds, during which Yorick, Mist Walkers and The Maiden gain 20% bonus movement speed when moving towards them.

abilities.name: Eulogy of the Isles
abilities.riotDesc: Yorick summons the Maiden of the Mist that causes Yorick's attacks against the Maiden's target to deal bonus damage. The Maiden will also automatically raise Walkers from dead enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons the Maiden of the Mist along with a few Mist Walkers, which remain on the battlefield until she or Yorick dies. This ability can be recast to set the Maiden free, and letting her push the nearest lane till she ends up dying.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Deaths required for a grave changed to 5 at all levels. Q: AD ratio changed to 30% AD. Heal health ratio changed to 4 / 5 / 6 / 7 / 8% of his missing health.

combos.description: Lead with your E then W your enemy. Follow that up with an AA, Q and AA to finish.
Whilst farming minions use your AA, Q and E to hit your enemy off guard.
Lead with your E, then AA, Q, W and finish with a final AA.

Yunara.name: Yunara
Yunara.title: the Unbroken Faith
Yunara.blurb: Unwavering in her devotion to Ionia, Yunara has spent centuries cloistered away in the spirit realm honing her skills with the Aion Er'na, a legendary Kinkou relic. Despite all she has sacrificed, Yunara's vow to rid the land of disharmony and strife...

abilities.name: Cultivation of Spirit
abilities.riotDesc: Yunara gains Attack Speed, bonus damage On-Hit, and her Attacks spread to nearby enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passive: Yunara’s Attacks deal additional magic damage on hit. Launching an attack causes Yunara to generate 1 Unleash, increased to 2 when attacking a champion. Not attacking causes Yunara to lose Unleash over time. Active: Yunara unleashes her inner potential for a duration in which she gains: increased Attack Speed, her attacks deal additional magic damage on-hit and her attacks spread to nearby enemies dealing additional damage.

abilities.name: Arc of Judgment | Arc of Ruin
abilities.riotDesc: Yunara fires a spinning prayer bead that deals damage and slows enemies. While in her Transcendent State she instead fires off a laser that deals damage and slows enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Yunara lets rip a spinning prayer bead that slows down when near enemies and lingers and expands when it reaches its end point. The initial hit deals damage and applies a decaying slow on the target over a short duration. It deals additional damage to enemies in the area. Transcendent State - Arc of Ruin: Yunara fires off a laser that deals damage and applies a decaying slow for a short duration.

abilities.name: Kanmei's Steps | Untouchable Shadow
abilities.riotDesc: Yunara gains Move Speed and becomes Ghosted. While in her Transcendent State she instead dashes in a direction.
abilities.mobaDesc: Yunara becomes Ghosted and gains Move Speed, increased when moving towards an enemy champion, that decays over a short duration. Transcendent State: Yunara dashes in a direction.

abilities.name: Transcend One's Self
abilities.riotDesc: Yunara enters a Transcendent State that upgrades her basic Abilities.
abilities.mobaDesc: Yunara enters a Transcendent State for a period of time; Cultivation of Spirit is activated for the duration, Arc of Judgement is upgraded to Arc of Ruin and has its cooldown reduced, and Kanmei’s Steps is upgraded to Untouchable Shadow and has its cooldown refreshed.

combos.description: F
Press W then Flash, then E, AA, R, AA, E, AA, AA and W again to finish.
AA to charge your Q then auto attack your enemy. Then Use your W, E and chase with more autos!
Press W, then E, then AA, Pop your R, then E again, auto attack your enemy and throw out another W.

Yuumi.name: Yuumi
Yuumi.title: the Magical Cat
Yuumi.blurb: A magical cat from Bandle City, Yuumi was once the familiar of a yordle enchantress, Norra. When her master mysteriously disappeared, Yuumi became the Keeper of Norra's sentient Book of Thresholds, traveling through portals in its pages to search for...

abilities.name: Prowling Projectile
abilities.riotDesc:
Yuumi fires a missile, dealing damage and slowing first target hit. It deals bonus damage and an enchanced slow if it takes at least 1.35 seconds to get to its target. While on her Best Friend, the slow is always enhanced and grants bonus On-Hit damage to her ally.

While Attached, the missile can be controlled with your cursor for a brief period.
abilities.mobaDesc: Yuumi fires a missile in a target direction. When Aattached she can direct the trajectory.

abilities.name: You and Me!
abilities.riotDesc: Yuumi dashes to a target ally, becoming untargetable from everything except turrets. While on her Best Friend, she gains Heal & Shield Power and grants her Ally On-Hit healing.
abilities.mobaDesc: Yuumi gets this ability at level 1. Pressing W will dash you towards an ally who will then get bonus adaptive damage. If your anchor dies while you're attached, you will be dropped off.

abilities.name: Zoomies
abilities.riotDesc: Shields Yuumi and boosts Move Speed and Attack Speed. If she's attached, she passes it to her ally instead.
abilities.mobaDesc: When attached, she heals her ally. When not attached, she heals herself

abilities.name: Final Chapter
abilities.riotDesc: Yuumi channels five waves that damage enemies and heal allies. Yuumi can move, attach, and cast Zoomies! while channeling. While on her Best Friend, this spell also follows her mouse.
abilities.mobaDesc: Yuumi opens her book and launches 7 waves in a target direction. Enemies hit by 3 waves are rooted.

combos.description: Pop your E then W and R as many targets as you can!
Bind to your ally with your W then use E and R. Finish with your Q.
Hit your enemies with a few basic attack, then W, E and Q your enemies to finish.

Zaahen.name: Zaahen
Zaahen.title: The Unsundered
Zaahen.blurb: A fallen god wielding both divine and profane power, Zaahen hunts his fellow Darkin while defying the corruption that threatens to consume him. Once willingly sealed within his glaive to stave off madness, he now walks free, noble in heart and vicious...

abilities.name: Cultivation of War
abilities.mobaDesc: Zaahen’s attacks and abilities against enemy champions grant him stacks of Determination, gaining bonus Attack Damage per stack. When filled with Determination, Zaahen gains increased Attack Damage and can revive.

abilities.name: The Darkin Glaive
abilities.riotDesc: Zaahen slashes twice on his next attack, dealing bonus damage and healing himself. Zaahen can recast this ability to have his next attack deal bonus damage and knock up his target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zaahen slashes twice on his next attack, dealing bonus damage and healing himself. Zaahen can recast this ability to have his next attack deal bonus damage and knock up his target.

abilities.name: Dreaded Return
abilities.riotDesc: Zaahen stabs in a direction, damaging enemies hit, then pulls them toward him.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zaahen stabs in a direction, damaging enemies hit and pulling them towards him.

abilities.name: Aureate Rush
abilities.riotDesc: Zaahen dashes to a location and slices around himself.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zaahen dashes to a location and slices around himself.

abilities.name: Grim Deliverance
abilities.riotDesc: Zaahen rises then stabs downward, damaging enemies and healing for a portion of the damage dealt.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zaahen rises then stabs downward, damaging enemies and healing for a portion of the damage dealt.

Zac.name: Zac
Zac.title: the Secret Weapon
Zac.blurb: Zac is the product of a toxic spill that ran through a chemtech seam and pooled in an isolated cavern deep in Zaun's Sump. Despite such humble origins, Zac has grown from primordial ooze into a thinking being who dwells in the city's pipes, occasionally...

abilities.name: Cell Division
abilities.mobaDesc: Every time Zac uses an ability he drops a blob. If he picks up the blop he gains health back.

abilities.name: Stretching Strikes
abilities.riotDesc: Zac stretches an arm, grabbing an enemy. Attacking a different enemy will cause him to throw both targets towards each other.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zac throws out a left punch in a target direction slowing the first enemy hit. If he auto attacks another enemy, the two will bounce closer together.

abilities.name: Unstable Matter
abilities.riotDesc: Zac explodes outward towards nearby enemies, dealing a percentage of their maximum health as magic damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zac explodes dealing damage to enemies around him. The cooldown is reduced by 1 second each time he picks up a blob.

abilities.name: Elastic Slingshot
abilities.riotDesc: Zac attaches his arms to the ground and stretches back, launching himself forward.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zac channels for up to 4.5 seconds and can dash towards a target location- knocking up anybody he hits when he lands.

abilities.name: Let's Bounce!
abilities.riotDesc: Zac bounces four times, knocking up enemies hit and slowing them.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zac bounces for 3 seconds dealing damage and knocking back any champions that are hit by him.

combos.description: If you want to think more about damage Q your target then AA a nearby enemy and R right as the cc is about to end. Use W mid R then once it's done use your E to gap close and finish with another W.
While in melee range Q your target then AA a nearby enemy. Instantly E and use W while they are knocked up.
Your normal gank will start using E onto your target and Q them upon landing. AA a nearby enemy followed by using AA W AA.

Zed.name: Zed
Zed.title: the Master of Shadows
Zed.blurb: Utterly ruthless and without mercy, Zed is the leader of the Order of Shadow, an organization he created with the intent of militarizing Ionia's magical and martial traditions to drive out Noxian invaders. During the war, desperation led him to unlock...

abilities.name: Contempt for the Weak
abilities.mobaDesc: Zed's basic attacks against low health targets deals bonus Magic Damage. This effect can only occur once every few seconds against the same enemy champion.

abilities.name: Razor Shuriken
abilities.riotDesc:
Zed and his shadows throw their shurikens.

Each shuriken deals damage to every enemy hit.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zed and his shadows throw their spinning blades toward the target location. Each blade deals physical damage to all enemies struck, reduced to 60% against units beyond the first.

abilities.name: Living Shadow
abilities.riotDesc:
Passive: Zed gains energy whenever he and his shadows strike an enemy with the same ability. Energy can only be gained once per cast ability.

Active: Zed's shadow dashes forward, remaining in place for a few seconds. Reactivating Living Shadow will cause Zed to switch positions with this shadow.
abilities.mobaDesc: Passively restores energy whenever a shadow lands a mimicked ability on the same target he doesn't. Active: Zed's Shadow dashes in the target direction, remaining in place for 5 seconds and being able to mimic Q and E while in range of each other. If an ability is cast while the shadow is dashing, the shadow will cast the ability at the moment of its appearance. Living Shadow can be recast at no delay for the duration. Recast: While in range of each other, Zed and his shadow swap their respective locations.

abilities.name: Shadow Slash
abilities.riotDesc: Zed and his Shadows slash, dealing damage to nearby enemies. Enemies hit by a Shadow's slash are slowed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zed and his shadow's slash, dealing physical damage to surrounding enemies. Enemies hit by a shadow are slowed for 1.5 seconds. Enemies hit by multiple slashes take no additional damage but the slow's potency is increased by 50%. Each enemy champion hit by Zed's slash reduces the W cooldown by 2 seconds.

abilities.name: Death Mark
abilities.riotDesc: Zed becomes untargetable and dashes to an enemy champion, marking them. After 3 seconds the mark triggers, repeating a portion of all the damage Zed dealt to the target while they were marked.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dashes through the target enemy champion over 0.4 seconds, marking them, becoming ghosted for 3 seconds, and spawning a shadow at the cast location. Death Mark can be recast after 0.5 seconds of his reappearance. For the next 3 seconds, Zed stores a percentage of all pre-mitigation physical damage and magic damage he and his shadows deal to the marked target, detonating at the end of the duration to deal physical damage. On recasting, Zed and the Death Mark shadow will blink to their respective locations, swapping places.

balance.otherEffects: Energy regeneration increased by 20%. Tenacity increased by 20%.

combos.description: To trade in melee range E and AA at the same time then instantly Q.
The most basic trade will be W then instantly E Q.

Zeri.name: Zeri
Zeri.title: The Spark of Zaun
Zeri.blurb: A headstrong, spirited young woman from Zaun's working-class, Zeri channels her electric magic to charge herself and her custom-crafted gun. Her volatile power mirrors her emotions, its sparks reflecting her lightning-fast approach to life. Deeply...

abilities.name: Living Battery
abilities.mobaDesc: Zeri's Attacks deal magic damage and are treated as Abilities. Moving and casting Burst Fire stores up energy in Zeri's Sparkpack. When fully charged her next Attack deals bonus damage.

abilities.name: Burst Fire
abilities.riotDesc: Burst Fire shoots a burst of 7 rounds that deal attack damage to the first enemy hit. This Ability is treated as an Attack.

abilities.name: Ultrashock Laser
abilities.riotDesc: Zeri fires an electric pulse that slows and damages the first enemy hit. If the pulse hits a wall it expands into a long range laser.

abilities.name: Spark Surge
abilities.riotDesc: Zeri dashes a short distance and energizes Burst Fire to pierce through enemies. She will vault and grind over any terrain she touches.

abilities.name: Lightning Crash
abilities.riotDesc: Zeri discharges a nova of electricity and overcharges herself, gaining increased damage and stacking Move Speed that refreshes and gets stronger every time she hits an enemy champion. While overcharged, Burst fire becomes a faster triple shot that chains lightning between enemies.

balance.otherEffects: Q: Zeri will start the game with one point already allocated in Burst Fire!, allowing her to allocate the other two to her other abilities. E: Cooldown changed to 20 / 19 / 18 / 17 / 16 seconds.

combos.description: Use your Q and AA, then E, W and Q before another AA and finish with your Q.

Ziggs.name: Ziggs
Ziggs.title: the Hexplosives Expert
Ziggs.blurb: With a love of big bombs and short fuses, the yordle Ziggs is an explosive force of nature. As an inventor's assistant in Piltover, he was bored by his predictable life and befriended a mad, blue-haired bomber named Jinx. After a wild night on the town...

abilities.name: Short Fuse
abilities.mobaDesc: Ziggs' auto-attack is periodically empowered to deal bonus magic damage. The damage is increased on structures.

abilities.name: Bouncing Bomb
abilities.riotDesc: Ziggs throws a bouncing bomb that deals magic damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Tosses a bouncing bomb in the target direction which explodes upon hitting an enemy, colliding with terrain, or reaching the end of its trajectory. The bomb can bounce up to 2 times and deals magic damage to all nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Satchel Charge
abilities.riotDesc:
Ziggs flings an explosive charge that detonates after a delay, or when this ability is activated again. The explosion deals magic damage to enemies, knocking them away. Ziggs is also knocked away, but takes no damage.

Ziggs can use the Satchel to hexplode vulnerable enemy turrets.
abilities.mobaDesc: Flings an explosive charge towards the target area. This explodes after 4 seconds or upon recasting. It deals magic damage and knocks back all surrounding enemies. If Ziggs is within the explosion radius, he is knocked back as well. If a turret is below a certain threshold of health, this ability will destroy it instantly.

abilities.name: Hexplosive Minefield
abilities.riotDesc: Ziggs scatters proximity mines that detonate on enemy contact, dealing magic damage and slowing. Successive mine detonations on the same target deal reduced damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Scatters a cluster of 11 proximity mines over the target area, lasting for up to 10 seconds. Mines explode on contact with an enemy, slowing them for 1.5 seconds and dealing magic damage.

abilities.name: Mega Inferno Bomb
abilities.riotDesc: Ziggs deploys his ultimate creation, the Mega Inferno Bomb, hurling it an enormous distance. Enemies in the primary blast zone take more damage than those farther away.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a huge bomb at a target location that explodes upon impact and deals magic damage to all enemies caught in the blast. Enemies at the center take more damage.

balance.otherEffects: Ability haste reduced by 20. Passive: Damage to structures changed to 150%. Q: Deals 80% damage to minions (60% total). W: Tower execute threshold changed to 12.5 / 15 / 17.5 / 20 / 22.5% of turret's maximum health. Deals 80% damage to minions (60% total). E: Deals 80% damage to minions (60% total). R: Deals 80% damage to minions (60% total).

combos.description: Quick trade by using E then Q AA.
For some poke use E on your target, then W Q W.

Zilean.name: Zilean
Zilean.title: the Chronokeeper
Zilean.blurb: Once a powerful Icathian mage, Zilean became obsessed with the passage of time after witnessing his homeland's destruction by the Void. Unable to spare even a minute to grieve the catastrophic loss, he called upon ancient temporal magic to divine all...

abilities.name: Time In A Bottle
abilities.mobaDesc: Generates Experience points per second, every 5 seconds. He can use those points to level an allied champion when he has enough experience. Doing so will grant him experience points equal to the amount granted to the ally.

abilities.name: Time Bomb
abilities.riotDesc: Tosses a bomb to target area that sticks to units that come near it (prioritizes Champions). It detonates after 3 seconds, dealing area of effect damage. If a Time Bomb is detonated early by another Time Bomb, it also stuns enemies.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a time bomb at a target location that detonates after 3 seconds. If it hits an enemy, it will stick to them and the detonation will deal magic damage. This bomb detonates immediately if the target it is stuck to dies, or if another bomb attaches itself to the same unit. The second case will stun all the nearby enemies.

abilities.name: Rewind
abilities.riotDesc: Zilean can prepare himself for future confrontations, reducing the cooldowns of his other basic abilities.
abilities.mobaDesc: Reduces his Q and E cooldowns by 10 seconds each.

abilities.name: Time Warp
abilities.riotDesc: Zilean bends time around any unit, decreasing an enemy's Move Speed or increasing an ally's Move Speed for a short time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Slows enemies for 2.5 seconds or grants allies or himself bonus movement speed for the same duration.

abilities.name: Chronoshift
abilities.riotDesc: Zilean places a protective time rune on an allied champion, teleporting the champion back in time if they take lethal damage.
abilities.mobaDesc: Places a protective timer on the target ally champion or himself, lasting for 5 seconds. If the target dies during that time, they are put in stasis for 3 seconds and then resurrected, regaining a set amount of health.

balance.otherEffects: Passive: Cooldown changed to 90 seconds. W: Cooldown changed to 13 / 11 / 9 / 7 / 5 seconds. E: Cooldown changed to 13 seconds. R: Heal AP ratio changed to 250% AP.

combos.description: AA then Q then AA. Then W and Q and finish with a final AA.
Start with your E and then Q, W, and Q again to finish.

Zoe.name: Zoe
Zoe.title: the Aspect of Twilight
Zoe.blurb: As the embodiment of mischief, imagination, and change, Zoe acts as the cosmic messenger of Targon, heralding major events that reshape worlds. Her mere presence warps the arcane mathematics governing realities, sometimes causing cataclysms without...

abilities.name: More Sparkles!
abilities.mobaDesc: On casting an ability, Zoe's next auto-attack or W within 5 seconds will deal bonus magic damage to a nearby champion.

abilities.name: Paddle Star!
abilities.riotDesc: Zoe fires a missile that she can redirect in flight. Deals more damage the longer it flies in a straight line.
abilities.mobaDesc: Shoots a star in the target direction. If it happens to collide with an enemy, the star deals magic damage in a small area. If the star does not hit an enemy, it lingers at maximum ranger for one second, allowing the Q to be recast. On recasting, Zoe directs the star to a new location, which will deal damage upon colliding with an enemy. The star does greater damage if it travels a greater distance.

abilities.name: Spell Thief
abilities.riotDesc: Zoe can pick up the remnants of enemy summoner spell and active item casts and cast them once herself. Whenever she casts a summoner spell, she gains 3 missiles that fire at the nearest target.
abilities.mobaDesc: Zoe can pick up Spells and Items from bubbles dropped by a champion or special minions. She can then use this ability to mimic the cast. Casting this spell of one of her own Summoner Spells grant Zoe bonus movement speed for the next few seconds and three bubbles which orbit her for the next 10 seconds. These bubble target the nearest enemy unit, prioritizing the target she is attacking.

abilities.name: Sleepy Trouble Bubble
abilities.riotDesc: Causes the target to become drowsy, then fall asleep. While asleep, the target's Magic Resist is reduced. The first source of damage that breaks the sleep is doubled, up to a cap.
abilities.mobaDesc: Throws a bubble which upon impact will cause the target to fall asleep. She can increase the range of this ability by shooting it through terrain. If the bubble doesn't impact immediately, it spreads on the ground, over a zone, where it drops. Any enemy who walks into this will be put to sleep as well. It deals magic damage and Zoe's next attack against such a sleeping target will deal bonus true damage.

abilities.name: Portal Jump
abilities.riotDesc: Blink to a nearby position for 1 second. Then blink back.
abilities.mobaDesc: Dives into a portal and blinks to the target location for a brief duration. After a second, she blinks back to her cast location. Zoe is unable to basic attack and cast her abilities and movement spells for 0.75 seconds after casting Portal Jump and for 0.5 seconds after blinking back.

combos.description: Use your Q then AA, Q again and finish with another AA.
Use your R to a nearby wall, then use your E
Use your E, then AA, R, then Q and Q again and finish with another AA.

Zyra.name: Zyra
Zyra.title: Rise of the Thorns
Zyra.blurb: Born in an ancient, sorcerous catastrophe, Zyra is the wrath of nature given form—an alluring hybrid of plant and human, kindling new life with every step. She views the many mortals of Valoran as little more than prey for her seeded progeny, and thinks...

abilities.name: Garden of Thorns
abilities.mobaDesc: Periodically spawns seeds nearby which last for 30 seconds, breifly gaining sight over the surrounding area. These seeds will be destroyed by enemies if they step on them. Zyra can have a total of 8 seeds planted at a time.

abilities.name: Deadly Spines
abilities.riotDesc: Thick vines spread through the ground and explode into spines, dealing magic damage to enemies within the area. If cast near a seed, Deadly Spines grows a Thorn Spitter plant, which fires at enemies from afar.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sprouts thorny spines at the target location which appear after a brief delay and deal magic damage to all enemies hit. If a seed is in the vicinity of the thorny spines, it will sprout into a thorn spitter for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Rampant Growth
abilities.riotDesc: Zyra plants a seed, lasting up to 60 seconds. Deadly Spines and Grasping Roots cast near seeds will turn them into plants who fight for Zyra. Zyra can store multiple seeds at once, and killing enemies reduces Rampant Growth's recharge time.
abilities.mobaDesc: Periodically stores a seed, up to 2. Killing units will grant a 20% charge towards a seed. Active: Plants a seed at the target location, which lasts for a minute and grants sight of the area. The seed can be destroyed by enemies if they happen to step on it.

abilities.name: Grasping Roots
abilities.riotDesc: Zyra sends forth vines through the ground to ensnare her target, dealing damage and rooting enemies they come across. If cast near a seed, Grasping Roots grows a Vine Lasher, whose short range attacks reduce enemy Move Speed.
abilities.mobaDesc: Sends a surge of vines in the target direction, dealing magic damage to all enemies hit and rooting them for a short duration. If a seed is in the vicinity of the vines, it sprouts into a Vine Lasher for 8 seconds.

abilities.name: Stranglethorns
abilities.riotDesc: Zyra summons a twisted thicket at her target location, dealing damage to enemies as it expands and knocking them airborne as it contracts. Plants within the thicket are enraged.
abilities.mobaDesc: Summons a large thicket in the target location, dealing magic damage to all enemies in the area as it expands. After 2 seconds, the vines snap upwards, knocking up all enemies who are caught in the thicket, for one second. Additionally, plants hit by the thicket will gain increased health, size, attack speed, and damage for a duration.

combos.description: Use your Ultimate and then Q then follow with W twice.
Use Q then W then E then R
Use your R then E then W twice then finish with Q
